Text.en: Forged from thousands of unclaimed Beta keys
Text.zh: 由无数无人认领的封测激活码锻造而成

Text.en:
One by one, Kaom slaughtered the weakest tribe
leaders until the others leapt to join his cause.
Text.zh:
冈姆屠戮，灭尽孱弱血统，
各族恐惧，造就绝对服从。

Text.en: As battle calms, blood turns to rust.
Text.zh: 激烈战火成冷灰，浴血宝剑色锈黑。

Text.en:
You are slow, foolish and ignorant.
I am not.
Text.zh:
众人迟钝昏庸，愚昧无知。
唯我迅捷聪颖，博学睿智。

Text.en: Fear is highly infectious.
Text.zh: 恐惧宛若瘟疫恶病，迅速扩散害人夺命。

Text.en:
A token from the sea
A sign for Kaom
to lead his Karui to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
来自海洋彼岸的信物，
呼召冈姆踏上征途。
率领血族，兵临帝陆。

Text.en: Danger is the price of wealth.
Text.zh: 不入险处，焉得巨富?

Text.en:
"See without doubt, slay without hesitation."
- Marceus Lioneye of Sarn
Text.zh:
"定睛瞄准；毫无迟疑，果断放箭，转瞬灭敌"
— 萨恩的穆希尔斯·狮眼

Text.en:
The maidens of court swoon to see
the challengers crushed at your feet.
Text.zh:
杀敌致胜历百战，
常得佳人带笑看

Text.en:
Although a great leader during the war,
Voll proved disastrous in times of peace.
Text.zh:
福尔骁勇善战，登基称王
奈何治国无方，终至灭亡

Text.en:
Divine intervention feels better
when you do it yourself.
Text.zh:
替天行道，大快人心，
亲手除恶，更是快意。

Text.en:
"The wild takes care of its own."
- Hyrri of the Karui
Text.zh:
"荒野自有生存之道。"
- 卡鲁族西里

Text.en:
In the rift between future and past,
life passes quickly.
Text.zh:
古往今来，身处其中，
人生转瞬，荏苒匆匆。

Text.en:
It was a sliver of Malachai's soul
that animated the first Eternal Guardian.
Text.zh:
玛拉凯的魂魄碎片，
唤醒第一位永恒守卫。

Text.en:
Centuries of servitude, a day
of glory, an eternity of death.
Text.zh:
荣华富贵享万日，
过眼烟云又一世。

Text.en:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.
Text.zh:
万里征途抚弦悼，
号角起，羽矢啸，唯闻百里伤残号；
一世战魂拨琴梢，
生灵息，干戈倒，只望七步亡魂招。

Text.en:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.
Text.zh:
燃为灰烬，崩裂焚解；
斯是霸权，立于火焰。

Text.en:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.
Text.zh:
【碎骨溅血之声
岂非天籁悦耳之音?】
- 艾兹麦人雷姆诺

Text.en:
"One quick tap is all the persuasion you'll need."
- Archbishop Geofri of Phrecia Cathedral
Text.zh:
"与其善诱苦劝，口若悬河，
 不如二话不说，当头棒喝。"
- 费西亚大教堂的大主教吉尔菲

Text.en:
"Today, clansmen, my sword is my voice!"
- Rigwald, at the Battle of Glarryn
Text.zh:
"族人啊，今朝我以利剑代空言！ "
- 瑞佛于格拉里恩之役

Text.en:
Stoic visage, icy heart.
Life of sorrow, lived apart.
Text.zh:
清心寡欲无眷念，
静思无求断牵连。

Text.en:
Where her mouth should have been
there was only a whirling, black void.
Text.zh:
望向她双颊之间，
徒见那无底深渊。

Text.en:
"Prototype #8 makes it difficult to think negatively, but two fatalities
resulted when a lead researcher used an epithet in its presence."
Text.zh:
“八号实验底子很难让人有负面评价。
不过一位研究主管当着它的面用了绰号，结果导致了两起事故。”

Text.en:
Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness
And awoke its Master.
Text.zh:
多里亚尼误闯狂乱之境，
狂乱帝国之王因其苏醒。

Text.en:
Molten feathers, veiled spark,
Hissing arrows from the dark.
Text.zh:
炽羽疾驰化浊影，
烈矢奔腾照光明。

Text.en:
Seeing only foot soldiers, the Sarn Knights cast aside
their heavy shields... and paid dearly for their mistake.
Text.zh:
萨恩骑士只见步兵来袭，卸下重盾迎战···
结果误判战局，付出惨痛代价

Text.en: The breath of life is yours to give.
Text.zh: 藉此赋予你操控生命的权利。

Text.en:
"Shoot first, ask no questions."
- Karui wisdom
Text.zh:
"无需多问，先发制人。"
- 卡鲁的战争哲学

Text.en:
"In testing, Prototype #9 had no effect on fired arrows. However,
an unknown spell did destroy the entire firing chamber."
Text.zh:
“九号实验底子在实验中无法发射箭矢。
不过它发射了一道未知法术烧毁了整个测试间。”

Text.en:
Never blinking, always watching.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Chayula}
Text.zh: 永不眨眼，凝视不休。

Text.en:
Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows,
tipped with a poisoned hatred
only oppression can ferment.
Text.zh:
西里的箭雨呼啸而来，
矢锋剧毒命中要害，
留下冰冷遗体诉说悲哀。

Text.en:
The warrior who
fears will fall.
Text.zh:
勇斗之魂无坚不摧，
懦弱之心退缩避畏。

Text.en:
"Useless for our purposes, but perhaps we can sell Prototype #5
to an archmage to fund other experiments."
Text.zh:
“五号实验底子偏离了我们的目的。
不过可以找个大法师买家，然后开始新的实验。”

Text.en:
Fairgraves' trusty tricorne accompanied him far across
the seas, deep under the ground, and even beyond death.
Text.zh:
费尔的皮帽陪他飘洋过海，
即使入土为安，依然伴其尸骸。

Text.en:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.
Text.zh:
投注炙热感情。
秉持不移坚定。
迎向灿烂光明。

Text.en:
Lift it lightly, don it slow.
The spikes point out and in, you know.
Text.zh:
轻轻拿起，缓缓戴上。
冠刺锋利，非血即伤。

Text.en:
Asenath's mind was as quick and nimble
as the fingers that drew her bowstring.
Text.zh:
安赛娜丝速决机智，
十指灵巧，张弓放矢。

Text.en:
"It takes true strength to hold power,
and my grip grows tighter by the day."
 - Emperor Chitus
Text.zh:
"君临四海从未一蹴可及，
统治万民亦须恩威并济。"
 - 切特斯大帝

Text.en:
Hrimnor's presence was as cold as ice,
but his heart burned for vengeance.
Text.zh:
雷姆诺看似迷茫，冷若寒霜，
实则复仇心切，炽热生光。

Text.en:
We wander to pass time.
We travel to fulfill.
Text.zh:
随处漫步使我们疲乏困顿，
周游各地让我们增广见闻。

Text.en:
"The craven mind is sharp with self interest.
The honourable mind is much easier to manipulate."
 - Malachai the Soulless
Text.zh:
"怯懦者自私自利，刁难棘手，
求荣者视死若归，更易左右。"
 - 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en:
In the battle for honour, Geofri won.
Not so, the battle for survival.
Text.zh:
吉尔菲奋不顾身，捍卫荣耀护自尊，
其荣其尊永长存，奈何人已成亡魂。

Text.en:
It is said to make you invisible when the Great
Spirit comes to take you on your final journey.
Text.zh:
传说亡灵使者摄魂之际，
配此护符使你隐身欺敌。

Text.en: Wonders abound at death's door.
Text.zh: 濒临死亡之际，人总能创造奇迹。

Text.en: A mighty beast, a lavish feast.
Text.zh: 舞刃若猛兽，斩首如丰收。

Text.en:
Stand and lead the righteous pride,
Fight till death, never hide.
Text.zh:
壮志豪情战歌唱，
正面交锋，绝不躲藏。

Text.en:
"Twelve dead, and the seventh lab cannot be entered for several years.
Prototype #12 is a 'success,' if we can ever reach it."
Text.zh:
“十二人死亡，第七座实验室在数年内无法进入。
十二号实验底子很成功，只要我们能靠近它。”

Text.en:
Tempest's power given form,
Flee before the walking storm.
Text.zh:
风暴成形，初生乍现，
伺机而动，逃出生天。

Text.en: All the world is my home.
Text.zh: 敝人以天地为家。

Text.en:
Shavronne raced to Brutus' side,
her last hope against the Karui tide.
Text.zh:
薛朗赶至布鲁特斯身边
负隅顽抗，对抗卡鲁族的刀剑。

Text.en:
Blazing body, shining bold.
Dance beneath the orb of gold!
Text.zh:
贵体耀，惜资颖，
豪门权势试真金。

Text.en:
The mocking wind, a shielding spell,
The haunting screams, a maddening hell.
Text.zh:
恶风袭击，召出护身宝具，
尖啸不息，目睹烈刑恶狱。

Text.en:
Of ancient giants, none remain,
Their only trace is timeless pain.
Text.zh:
远古巨人早已荡然无存，
唯留千秋哀痛，万世伤痕

Text.en:
Maligaro operated effortlessly,
with great speed and terrible consequences.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗奇术出众卓越，
无比迅捷，带来无尽浩劫。

Text.en:
A soft caress in dead of night,
that slips about the neck, so tight.
Text.zh:
静夜青鳞现迷踪，
影中吐息杀意重。

Text.en: Wealth is not to be borne lightly.
Text.zh: 千金万贯，得来不易。

Text.en: Wealth unspent is wealth wasted.
Text.zh: 花开堪折直须折，有钱能花莫吝啬

Text.en:
While Doedre lacked Maligaro's sense of style,
she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.
Text.zh:
德瑞虽无马雷格罗的才思，
却能善用她天生的毒刺。

Text.en:
A single lightning strike fells a man.
A single knife stroke fells an empire.
Text.zh:
一道雷击，一人命殒魂殆，
一剑穿心，一国改朝换代。

Text.en:
Why cling to your sanity? It offers you nothing.
Surrender to me, and I will grant you everything.
Text.zh:
迁就理智，你将一无所获，
屈服于我，你将收获丰硕。

Text.en: The light that reveals is the glare that blinds.
Text.zh: 揭穿真实的那道光总是刺眼眩目。

Text.en:
Mindless rage will shake the world,
Cunning lies will bend it.
Reckless haste will break the world,
And into darkness send it.
Text.zh:
盲目的愤怒引起纷争，
狡诈的谎言让战火停歇；
无知的莽撞造成仇恨，
而无尽黑暗将吞噬一切。

Text.en:
They say a lifetime of wisdom is carried
in every skin the great beasts shed.
Text.zh:
据说巨兽每次脱皮税变
都累积毕生智慧，变得更加老练。

Text.en:
Few men cast a longer shadow
 than the Great Meginord of the North.
Text.zh:
北方的梅吉诺德带来挥之不去的阴影
他的恐怖无人能比

Text.en:
A large enough debt turns even a friend
into an enemy, and the Perandus family
had more debtors than anyone.
Text.zh:
欠下巨债不还，就连朋友也会反目成仇
而普兰德斯家族欠下世间最多的债。

Text.en:
Kaom's strength was rivaled only by
the great Meginord of the north.
Text.zh:
冈姆的勇猛威震天下，
唯有北方的梅吉诺德能与他一较高下。

Text.en:
By tourney's end, Daresso bled and shivered.
Yet even accursed treachery failed to steal the champion's victory.
Text.zh:
苦战后，德瑞索淌血颤抖却仍屹立不倒；
即使受到致命背叛，依然无损冠军威名。

Text.en:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.
Text.zh:
瓦尔帝国建立在无数人的血汗之上，
为之付出的人们如今却已化为尘埃。

Text.en: Cold, miserable and alone... but alive.
Text.zh: 冰冷，悲惨，无人过问，但一息尚存。

Text.en:
"With piety and justice."
- Perandus family motto
Text.zh:
"信奉真理与正义。"
- 普兰德斯家族教条

Text.en:
Marceus' unblemished shield is a testament
to his arrogance... and his fate.
Text.zh:
穆希尔斯的华盾的战盾映照着热斗的激昂，
但傲慢最终使他葬身沙场。

Text.en:
Accept your fate, or lie, pretend.
Death collects you in the end.
Text.zh:
无论接受命运，或是诈死顽抗。
你终究还是难逃灭亡。

Text.en:
His final sensation was of the executioner's blade.
It was not cold, instead warm and reassuring,
murmuring a promise of better times ahead.
Smiling, he returned death's embrace.
Text.zh:
他最后感受到刽子手的斩首刀。
刀身并不冰冷，反而令人温暖安心，
喃喃承诺着死后的解脱。
他微微一笑，进入死神怀中。

Text.en:
She paints her offer in wicked hues
An off-white grin, an elegant bruise.
To the nascent scourge she sings the ruse:
"With me in hand, what else need you use?"
Text.zh:
她为贡品撒上让人不安的光辉： 
苍白蔑笑，伤痕累累。
她想以诡计欺瞒，祭袍一挥： 
【放眼天下，舍我其谁?】

Text.en: Nothing stops the pain like a courageous rush into battle.
Text.zh: 若想止住心中哀痛，唯有奋勇冲向战场。

Text.en:
"Prototype #7 achieved even greater injury responsiveness than expected,
though at considerable cost to the long-term survival rate of the user."
Text.zh:
“七号实验底子对创伤的敏感程度远超预期。
不过要保障用户长期存活需要可观的代价。”

Text.en: A swift mind solves problems before they occur.
Text.zh: 机智心灵总能预测危难。

Text.en: The malice in her gaze froze blood and shattered bone.
Text.zh: 她的眼神冷酷，热血为之冻结，傲骨为之崩解。

Text.en:
Cast into darkness
And trapped for a thousand years,
The lonely moon weeps
Text.zh:
流放至黑暗恶地
受困千年，无从逃离，
唯有残月独自啜泣。

Text.en:
"Should I depart this mortal coil,
so shall all of my treasures."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"当我的灵魂离开肉身，我的宝藏将随我而去。"
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
Swift as thought are the actions of Man 
when borne on wings of divine providence.
Text.zh:
天意命定如羽翅
让人行动更加电掣风驰。

Text.en: When blood is paid, the weak think twice.
Text.zh: 唯有弱者对挥洒鲜血感到迟疑。

Text.en: From death springs life.
Text.zh: 死亡孕育新生。

Text.en:
Lumbering as a sea lion, clumsy as a berry-drunk pigeon. That was Erqi.
It mattered little. When Erqi's maul fell true, so did its target.
Text.zh:
尔奇平日的笨拙惹人耻笑，
但每当他舞起巨锤，对手总是小命不保。

Text.en:
Forged from the blood of countless wars,
its thirst has only begun.
Text.zh:
以无数战事的鲜血铸成，
对死亡的饥渴油然而生。

Text.en:
Ride with pride,
strike with vengeance,
live with honour.
Text.zh:
引领荣耀跨上战鞍，
击败仇人，使其落入黑暗，
立下战果光辉灿烂。

Text.en: Fly like a Storm Crow, crush like a Rhoa
Text.zh: 翱翔如掠鸦，袭敌若怒鸟。

Text.en: Do not let them step on your feet. Keep them at bay.
Text.zh: 保持距离，以策安全。

Text.en:
Unwieldy and garish became graceful
and deadly in Ungil's nimble hands.
Text.zh:
藉由恩吉的矫健身手，
劣剑顽铁也能成杀人利器。

Text.en:
"Recommend further production of Prototype #122. It makes
an ideal weapon for our suppression troops and guards."
Text.zh:
“推荐一百二十二号实验底子的后续产品。
它是镇压部队的理想武器。”

Text.en: The wyrm draws warmth from the fires of desire.
Text.zh: 欲望熊炎，是巨龙的力量来源。

Text.en:
The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.
Text.zh:
亡者徘徊之处，
生人退避却步。

Text.en:
"Outpost Twelve has been abandoned. On the bright side, I expect the plague of apparitions
to serve as ample defence for the relics we left behind."
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“十二号前哨已经被废弃。从好的方面看，
我认为那些幽灵可以为我们离开后提供充裕的防御。”
— 总管科塔拉

Text.en:
"I know how to say 'faster' and 'attack'
in Karui, Marak and Ezo."
- Voll of Thebrus
Text.zh:
"寡人深知卡鲁族【疾行】和【猛攻】的精髓─
【迅】与【摧】。"
— 席布鲁斯的福尔

Text.en:
Shavronne's apparel became ever more extravagant
as her body and soul became ever more corrupted.
Text.zh:
薛朗的肉身跟灵魂堕入魔道，
衣着妆扮越发奢华花俏。

Text.en:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes
Text.zh:
"万矢齐发，战事皆往，生者皆亡。"
- 艾兹麦人瑞佛

Text.en:
"How did you manage to lodge arrows in every single test subject
and researcher in Lab Three simultaneously?"
- Doctor Bircus
Text.zh:
“你是怎么在三号实验室把箭
同时插在每个实验对象和研究员头上的？”
— 彼库斯医生

Text.en:
"The Spirit of War knows nothing of good and evil.
It knows only destruction."
- Sekhema Asenath
Text.zh:
"战争恶火不分善恶，
只想毁灭世间一切。"
- 丝克玛·安赛娜丝

Text.en:
Swinging through the air, it sings
of sundered, severed, missing things.
Text.zh:
挥舞战斧，高举砍击
骨裂血溅，致胜斩敌

Text.en: Cursed is the star whence it came.
Text.zh: 灾星现身，生灵涂炭。

Text.en:
A chilling hush, a scraping sound
Of things no more entombed in ground.
A shambling horde is on its way
To crush the very light of day.
Text.zh:
魑魅惊魂扰生灵，
魍魉摄魄传疠病；
精怪摧命掩泣月，
妖魔噬骨蔽残星。

Text.en:
"Simply incredible. I caught an escaping test subject myself with
swarms of burning skulls. Delightful!"
- Researcher Olesya
Text.zh:
“不可思议。我亲自用一大群燃烧的头骨
抓住了一个逃跑的实验对象！”
— 研究员奥莱西亚

Text.en:
As a soldier you want to get close to enemy archers.
That is not the case when fighting the Maraketh.
Text.zh:
一般而言，应付弓箭手的最佳对策就是贴近作白刃战；
但这不适用于马拉克斯的弓箭手身上。

Text.en:
Alive but not unscathed, Victario fled
as slaughter blossomed at the gates.
Text.zh:
血腥的战斗在门前爆发
维多里奥死里逃生，毫发无伤。

Text.en: It is safer to be feared than to be loved.
Text.zh: 受人爱戴，不如为人所惧，还比较能保全性命。

Text.en: I'm hiding, yet everyone knows where I am.
Text.zh: 我四处躲藏，但行踪却众所皆知。

Text.en: The blasted oak stands forever.
Text.zh: 橡树虽已枯萎，依旧永世屹立。

Text.en: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.
Text.zh: 种下燃焰余烬，收割炼狱之炎

Text.en:
Mark us with mercy, then press on with care,
Execute us steadily, notch away at our despair.
Text.zh:
瞄准时心怀慈悲，放箭时全神贯注
将我们一击毙命，让我们不再受苦。

Text.en:
"How did you manage to lodge arrows in every single test subject
and researcher in Lab Three simultaneously... again?"
- Doctor Bircus
Text.zh:
“你是怎么……在三号实验室又一次把箭
同时插在每个实验对象和研究员头上的？”
— 彼库斯医生

Text.en:
The darkest clouds clashed and coupled,
giving birth to four lightning children of hate.
Text.zh:
乌云密布，相互碰撞交迭
激发出四道仇恨的雷电。

Text.en:
A mighty bulwark, curved and strong
A dauntless wall, against the throng
All lance and arrow, knocked aside
For rout of foe, for turn of tide.
Text.zh:
不破堡垒，抵挡万军，
厚实堵墙，高耸入云；
战枪飞箭，一律弹开，
情势逆转，敌军溃败。

Text.en:
Its corrugated surface brings a strange tingle
to the fingertips. This is no mere decoration.
Text.zh:
指尖触碰到表面波纹，就会感到诡异的阵刺痛；
这东西绝不是普通的装饰物。

Text.en:
When put to the ear it whispers not of
the sea, but long dead incantations.
Text.zh: 放在耳边不会听见海风阵阵，只会听见幽幽咒语，死气沉沉。

Text.en:
Its pleasing sheen remains even in shadow,
as if it were somehow lit from within.
Text.zh:
即使放在暗处，还是会散发动人光泽，
彷佛内部就会发光。

Text.en:
Distilled from naked ambition and unfettered obsession,
the Allflame emanates a silvern warmth like no other,
and engulfs those moths fool enough to embrace it.
Text.zh:
淬炼自纯粹的执着和野望，
不灭之火同样温暖，投射银白光芒
扑火飞蛾依旧会自取灭亡。

Text.en:
Doctor "Shaky Hands" Opden travelled with only the
finest medicines and antidotes... and a curiously
generous supply of opiates.
Text.zh:
"抖不停"欧普登信奉
"工欲善其事，必先利其器"的格言，
他的药箱里带着各式顶级药物···以及满满的鸦片。

Text.en:
Maligaro loved his tools, and took great
pains to keep them excruciatingly sharp.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗对锐器情有独钟，
苦心孤诣让武器更锋利，让敌人更痛苦。

Text.en:
The withering glare of corruption, made
corporeal and pellucid in crystal.
Text.zh:
在腐败，死寂的双眼中，
残破，静谧的躯体格外沉重。

Text.en:
Machinery makes the minions.
Minions make the master.
Text.zh:
此物编织了诸多奴仆，
奴仆成就了其上领主。

Text.en:
Essence of pure thaumaturgy.
Apply with trepidation.
Text.zh:
奇术的纯粹精华
其中添加恐惧不安

Text.en:
A craftswoman's ode to
fresh hope, a new love.
Text.zh:
谨以此镯，工匠歌颂着崭新的希望，
与初萌的爱恋梦想。

Text.en:
Segregated by treachery, this artefact
longs to be reunited with her sisters.
Text.zh:
背信弃义，导致支离破碎，
这块护符依旧渴望破镜重圆。

Text.en:
While this artefact resonates with power,
it is simply a piece in a larger puzzle.
Text.zh: 这块古物散发出神秘的力量，似乎指引着迷失的方向。

Text.en:
A relic of a sundered relationship,
it awaits reconciliation with its kin.
Text.zh:
情谊破裂，唯留碎片悼念
这块护符期盼来日重修旧好。

Text.en:
Though its power has been shared, there
is still more the Apex might unlock.
Text.zh:
如果你寻觅荣耀之途
那么，它会引导你踏上顶尖之路。

Text.en:
An open palm raised in peace,
cut down by the slaves of war.
Text.zh:
太平盛世，举手舒掌，
奸雄乱世，金手断葬。

Text.en:
"A Virtue Gem is a raging thunderstorm imprisoned within a single raindrop.
Infernal Talc simply lets the storm out." - Malachai the Soulless
Text.zh:
"古灵宝石是禁锢于滴状晶石的狂怒风暴，
使用炼狱之粉就能释放那股风暴。" - 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en:
To enter a city's bowels is to be
privy to its best-kept secrets.
Text.zh:
踏入城市的下水道沟渠
说不定会与深藏的秘密巧遇。

Text.en:
God will only offer the door.
Man must choose whether to open it.
Text.zh:
老天只提供门扉契机，
还要由人来选择开启。

Text.en:
The Emperor honours Hector Titucius as Supreme Servant.
"Strength in purpose is strength in deed."
Text.zh:
大帝册封赫克特·提图瑟为护国大将，并赞颂道： 
"师出有名，才能力克强敌！ "

Text.en:
The Emperor honours Gaius Sentari as Supreme Servant.
"A man's thoughts are his shackles. A man's thoughts are his wings."
Text.zh:
大帝册封盖厄斯·山特立为护国大将，并赞颂道： 
"思维虽然碍手碍脚，也能让人如虎添翼。"

Text.en:
The Emperor honours Marceus Lioneye as Supreme Servant.
"The road to Glory is paved with Sacrifice."
Text.zh:
大帝册封穆希尔斯·狮眼为护国大将，并赞颂道： 
"牺牲才能换来荣耀兴盛。"

Text.en: To catch an animal, think like an animal.
Text.zh: 了解你的猎物，才能驾驭你的猎矛。

Text.en:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.
Text.zh:
带翼野兽在夜里脱胎换骨，
蜕下寒霜覆盖的带麟犄角。
众人感受到凛冬寒光冷酷，
无不浑身颤抖，凄厉尖啸。

Text.en: No metal slips as easily through the fingers as gold.
Text.zh: 凡人的双手总是无法留住最贵重，也是最沉重的资产。

Text.en:
Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.
Text.zh:
冰霜和夜空互映辉映，
带来惊人的璀璨明光。

Text.en:
Knowledge brings power, and with power you can
grab truth by the throat and shape it as you wish.
Text.zh:
知识能带来力量，若获此等力量
就能掌握世间真理，任凭己意塑造真理

Text.en:
My Soul is your Strength
My Price is your Blood
Text.zh:
我的灵魂将引导你勇闯天涯，
但是必须以鲜血做为代价。

Text.en:
Despair hums, softly, deadly, in the bones of my enemies.
Eyes will burn, and souls wither, as they bask in my radiance.
Text.zh:
在敌人骸骨之中，悠悠吟唱，镇魂安灵 
在我的荣光之中，怒目灼烧，灵魂凋零。

Text.en:
Fear blisters the heart and thins the blood.
Fear squeezes lungs and sets the guts to fester.
Fear is the wound left untended.
Text.zh:
恐惧让心脏为之奔腾，血液化为浊流，
肺囊因此瑟缩，胃袋满溢腥臭，
恐惧彷佛那置之不理的腐烂伤口。

Text.en:
The nobles wanted to take her throne.
She let the peasants take their wealth.
The peasants wanted to take her wealth.
She let the soldiers take their heads.
The soldiers wanted to take her head.
She sat on her throne and wept.
Text.zh:
贵族逆反，谋夺王权。
平民领旨，夺其家园。
平民起义，觊觎王位。
将士领旨，斩杀逆贼。
将士叛变，欲斩女王。
王座垂泪，王自哀伤。

Text.en:
"As long as I see death in my mirror, so will Wraeclast."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"帝陆将随我一同踏上冥河之渡。"
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
To cease the flow of blood is to
choke the rain in the very clouds.
Both life and land feel the thirst.
Text.zh:
不想血流成河。
就要消云散雾，方能使雨水止勒。
世人和大地都会饥渴。

Text.en:
Centuries of development in steel armoursmithing
turned the armies of the Eternal Empire
into very effective lightning rods.
Text.zh:
锻钢铸簇数世纪，
保卫帝国御侵袭，
电光疾矢瞬灭敌。

Text.en:
To stand triumphant you must serve
no master other than your own ambition.
Text.zh:
为求永胜不败
就要遵从内心野望，百战不殆。

Text.en:
You carried me through life,
The least I can do is carry you through death.
Text.zh: 汝与我同生，吾与汝共死。

Text.en:
A heart can be stabbed by thoughts,
If your mind is sharp enough.
Text.zh:
锐利思维让秘密无法躲藏，
甚至足以刺探欺瞒的心脏。

Text.en:
"There is something incredibly satisfying about impaling test
subjects with Ethereal Knives. Perhaps it is the sound -
the spell, the screams, or both."  - Researcher Olesya
Text.zh:
“用虚空匕首穿刺实验对象的感觉简直妙不可言。
声音特带感，不管法术还是尖叫”
——研究员奥莱西亚

Text.en:
Whispers from a world apart
Speak my name beyond the tomb;
Bound within the Maelström's heart,
Will they grant me strength or doom?
Text.zh:
冥府阴语声声唤
坟内呼喊，坟外惊闻；
漩涡浩劫步步难
我得幸存，或成亡魂?

Text.en:
"...The discomfort shown by the others is amusing, but none
can deny that my work has made quite the splash..."
- Maligaro's Journal
Text.zh:
"···眼见他人受罪，我心欣喜难掩；
我所造成的苦难绝对不容否认···"
- 马雷格罗日记

Text.en:
Existence is infinite
A weave of the living and dead
Beyond the understanding
Of the many mortal threads
Text.zh:
亘世永存 
亦死亦生
凡人庸蠢
无从解论

Text.en:
Fire dances with those who doubt
Licks the skin and flesh from the fearful
Where there is no fear
There is no flame
Text.zh:
犹豫迟疑，身陷恶火
胆怯畏惧，皮烧肉灼
唯有无惧无畏
方能业火中自得进退。

Text.en:
For his sins he was hunted in his sleep,
judgement wrought of twisted nightmare.
The Coward bound his dreams to stone, awaiting
another to walk the path of true atonement.
Text.zh:
罪孽深重，不得安眠，
难逃审判，梦魇连连。
此人懦怯，无视警梦，
等待他人，赎罪道中。

Text.en:
Left in her tomb by the lynch mob,
the flame inside still blazed bright after her death,
and so did hers.
Text.zh:
暴民行私刑，墓中留此杖，
火光永不灭，纵使物主亡，
魂火永不熄，即便身已葬。

Text.en:
"The Vaal were even more steeped in gem culture than
our Emperor and his 'Gemlings'. It's an obsession
as old as civilisation itself."
- Icius Perandus
Text.zh:
“瓦尔对宝石文化的向往
更胜于‘古灵使徒’和圣上，
其执念如宝石文化般悠久顽强。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯

Text.en:
"A communion... but with what? By all accounts,
it wasn't God that the Vaal were trying to reach."
- Icius Perandus
Text.zh:
“令人费解的是···这交谊祭典究竟是与谁互通? 
瓦尔意欲接触的存在绝非善类。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯

Text.en:
"A waking Nightmare.
Madness of the mind?
Or madness of the flesh?"
- Icius Perandus
Text.zh:
“苏醒的影魔 
是那噬灵精魄，
还是灭门血祸?”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯

Text.en:
"Siosa, your Slavery will cause them to overlook you.
Your Karui Way will guide you.
Your Humanity will shame us all."
- Icius Perandus
Text.zh:
"萨欧赛，你身为奴隶，不可能受到重视，
卡鲁之道却锻造出你的坚定意志。
让你这般勇士，让我们愧对人世。"
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯

Text.en:
Curious, she shook it then,
And tiny screams emerged.
Curiouser, she shook again,
And an eerie silence purred.
Text.zh:
出于好奇，她拿起它晃了晃，
传来一阵微弱的尖叫声。
她更好奇了，又晃了晃，
却只得到诡异的静默。

Text.en:
There was no hero made out of Starkonja's death,
but merely a long sleep made eternal.
Text.zh:
斯塔空加死去，并未造就英雄豪杰，
只是永远长眠冥界。

Text.en:
"Man is blinded by the mud of his corporeal self. Only
through the transformation of the material into the
spiritual can we hope to taste the full body of life."
- Malachai the Soulless
Text.zh:
"人类的潜能因为肉体的泥淖而陷入盲目，
唯有解放物质的桎梏，奔向灵魂的正途，
才能体会人生真实的感触。"
- 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en: As succulent as blood, as sweet as power.
Text.zh: 多汁丰沛如鲜血，甜美诱人若威权。

Text.en: A sigil of thaumaturgy graven in granite.
Text.zh: 在石灰岩上铭刻奇术的智慧。

Text.en:
"For the life of the flesh will always be in the blood."
- Atalui, Vaal Priestess
Text.zh:
"血流殆尽，肉体必灭。"
- 瓦尔女祭司

Text.en: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.
Text.zh: 信众虔诚甚笃，即便死后依旧为神服事。

Text.en:
Nature respects the strong
And paints the snow red
With the blood of the weak
Text.zh:
自然滋养着强悍的灵魂，
雪地染上鲜红的血痕—
那是孱弱者的牺牲。

Text.en:
"Test subject walked right through the poison gas defenses, and attempts to slow her
failed. Suppression troop six, the 'Furious Flagellants,' have been sent to intervene."
Text.zh:
“实验对象直接穿过了毒气防御装置，没能拦住她。
六号镇压部队‘狂怒鞭笞者’已派去干预。”

Text.en:
My bearer shall be guarded by flame,
for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.
Text.zh:
持此护盾，圣火护卫，
吾乃凤凰，光灿永辉。

Text.en:
The night of a thousand ribbons
To remember the day of a thousand flames
When Sarn burned
And was born again
Text.zh:
白昼千火祝融满城烧
夜里千人丧服齐哀悼
此日，萨恩灭亡倾城
此时，萨恩浴火重生

Text.en:
Forget your kite shield. Just put the biggest man
 in the field between you and the archers.
Text.zh:
与其依靠那薄弱的护盾，
何不迎击劲敌，近战箭手。

Text.en:
"They say that you should take life's troubles in your stride.
Some men have a longer stride than others."
- Gaius Sentari
Text.zh:
"世人总说迈出脚步才能解问题，
但有些人就是无法一蹴而及。"
- 盖厄斯·山特立

Text.en:
"Sirrius flew on wings of light, faster than wind, faster
than thought. But try as he might to outrun the darkness,
it was there, at every turn, waiting for him."
- Azmerian legend
Text.zh:
"西里乌斯超越狂风，力振光辉双翼
穿越沉静思绪，在他挑战凌驾黑暗之际，
那暗影总是无所不在，四处迁移。"
- 阿兹莫里传说

Text.en:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt
Text.zh:
生来驾浪驭潮
命定侍从行者
若铁塔，坚韧不倒
似细针，挥动自如

Text.en:
When Solaris closes her burning eye
At the end of time,
the world will perish in ice.
Text.zh:
太阳神阖闭火瞳
时空自此告终，
世界冻亡寒冰之中。

Text.en:
The greatest mistakes cause suffering
long after they have been made
Text.zh:
最严重之过犯，让人吃苦受难。
即使事过境迁，依然阴魂不散。

Text.en: One warrior, any armour.
Text.zh: 真正的战士，穿戴任何盔甲依旧威猛。

Text.en: Cool the head and cool the blade.
Text.zh: 唯有冷静沉着，方能杀敌不惑。

Text.en:
"You shall hang, in blissful agony, on my every note."
- Kalisa, Prima Donna of Sarn
Text.zh:
"在座诸君何其有幸，听我唱出每个音符，
让你们受尽痛苦，愿意慷慨赴死。"
- 萨恩名伶卡莉莎

Text.en:
"Our superiors were getting anxious for results, and lowered security standards.
A single attempt of a spell with this unexpected power destroyed an entire floor."
Text.zh:
“我们的上级对结果很焦虑，还降低了安防标准。
该意外法术仅施展了一次就彻底毁灭了一整层楼。”

Text.en:
Death is beautiful. Let not the elements
mar it with their clumsy ways.
Text.zh:
灵魂的脱升何其光采炫目，
别让元素色彩来画蛇添足。

Text.en: Absolute corruption empowers absolutely.
Text.zh: 绝对的腐败带来绝对的力量。

Text.en:
The roar of the heavens
Strikes more than fear
Into the hearts of Man
Text.zh:
天庭狂嚎震怒
神罚永不饶恕
人心恐惧无助

Text.en:
The cards don't choose life and death
That's up to the player.
Text.zh:
手中牌无法决生死
局中人方能定死生。

Text.en:
A lad with no fear of the pest
Let rats fill his helmet in jest
When they picked his skull clean
Where his head should have been
Was naught but a vermin-filled nest!
Text.zh:
不怕鼠辈的小卒
把死者头盔塞满老鼠
当老鼠啃光此人颅骨
原本项上人头之处
空虚恶臭，鼠辈满住！

Text.en: You are the powerless master of fire.
Text.zh: 身为火灵之主，力量却化为虚无···

Text.en:
Many still hold the belief that the fossilised bones
of Vaal sacrifices have magical properties.
Text.zh:
许多人相信瓦尔献祭牺牲者的骸骨
有着奇异的魔力，但在祭坛只有树倒草枯。

Text.en:
When you have slain all of your enemies,
what is left to fear?
Text.zh:
除去所有的敌人之后，
还剩下什么会让你感到恐惧?

Text.en:
"While Prototype #3 does imbue its wearer with strength to match the original,
the first researcher to don it burst into flames when he walked into sunlight..."
Text.zh:
“三号实验底子的确给穿戴者赋予了原版相同的力量。
但穿戴它的第一名研究员走到阳光下就被烧死了……”

Text.en:
Many a collector of rarities discovered to his dismay
that the intelligent spirit in this sword
does not like to share its master's attention
Text.zh:
收藏家伤透脑筋： 
附在此剑上的魂灵
对于奇珍异宝总是有求无应。

Text.en:
The ring I stole,
My finger they took,
A shrouded mind,
Cut their curses short,
As I drained their spirit
And stole their soul.
A blessing is often a curse.
Text.zh:
我偷了枚戒指，
被人家砍下一手指，
我心已受蒙蔽，
对其诅咒漫不在意，
我吸尽他们心神，
窃取他们灵魂。
祝福往往招致咒诅。

Text.en:
Laughs of all the twisted
Echo through these halls of gold.
In this cold forgotten void
They wander, forever uncontrolled.
Text.zh:
疯人狂者哄堂大笑
在黄金大厅回荡喧闹。
寒冽失落的虚无之中
他们不停游荡，永远失控。

Text.en:
"Suppression troop two, the 'Martyrs for Science,' were able to seal
the portals before Outpost Four was overrun. Only three men survived."
Text.zh:
“二号镇压部队‘科学烈士’成功将四号前哨中疯狂出现的传送门封印了。
但只活下来了四个人。”

Text.en:
The second trial brought most to their knees.
But not you.
Text.zh:
第二道试炼让众多的挑战者屈膝投降，
但是你却旧屹立不摇。

Text.en: May you never hear it toll.
Text.zh: 希望此钟永不鸣响。

Text.en: Desperate times demand desperate measures.
Text.zh: 非常情况，狗急跳墙。

Text.en:
"An absurdly vicious weapon in the hands of our test subjects. It seems to
channel the desperate will to live. Intriguing." 
- Researcher Olesya
Text.zh:
“它在实验对象手中是一把荒唐的武器。
它似乎激发了绝望的求生意志。真有趣。”
——研究员奥莱西亚

Text.en:
It's cold and dark where the leviathan sleeps.
Colder and darker than death.
- Old Sailor's saying
Text.zh:
海怪潜伏在黑暗冰冷的海底，
它的恐怖更胜死亡的气息。
- 老水手的叮咛

Text.en:
"When the hyena howls thrice
death is sure to follow."
-Maraketh Wisdom
Text.zh:
"当鬣狗发出三声嗥叫，
猎物必定无法逃脱死亡的煎熬。"
—— 马拉克斯人古老智慧

Text.en: Gentle anger, raging calm.
Text.zh: 平静与愤怒有时是一体两面。

Text.en:
The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.
-Jaetai, Vaal Advisor
Text.zh:
世界宛若张羊皮纸。
空白对称，毫无参差；
标记左善右恶，上黑下白，
惟神圣真理亦善亦恶，亦黑亦白。
—— 雅台，瓦尔参谋

Text.en:
"A rare unequivocal success, Prototype #11 causes wounds to heal so quickly
the type Delta test subject actually survived the entire testing regimen."
Text.zh:
“罕见的成功。十一号实验底子使创伤恢复得十分迅速，
四号实验对象竟能撑过了整个实验。”

Text.en:
By its light, Lori led her young charges to safety
and bound up their wounds.
Her sword arm was iron, yet her heart gentle
and proof against hate.
Text.zh:
罗瑞以明灯助人逃离死祸
为人包扎伤口。
她剑臂是钢铁，心是绕指柔
不念新恨旧仇。

Text.en:
"What lies beneath your feet?!"
"Sacred ground, watered with tears of blood!"
Text.zh:
“汝足下所踏何处?”
“此乃血泪浇灌之圣地。”

Text.en:
When dead men rise and darkness falls
Only faith can be your walls
Walls of Light, not of brick
Twice as strong and twice as thick
Text.zh:
亡者出墓，黑暗骤降
以此信仰，作汝护墙
光之护墙，非以砖造
更为厚实，更为牢靠。

Text.en:
. . . and the Light faded and hope waned
Zahndethus cast aside his faith
and embraced the darkness.
Text.zh:
···迫切绝望，光明消亡
札德图斯抛弃自身信仰
落入黑暗深渊万丈

Text.en:
"The trick is to give nothingness,
and to receive everything in return."
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh:
"吊诡的是他们什么都不愿付出，
却索求一切作为回报。"
- 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en:
Though the Vaal revered peace, it would have
been suicide for any culture to rouse them to war.
- Icius Perandus, Scholar to the Empire.
Text.zh:
瓦尔对外族一向以和为贵，
但如有人胆敢冒犯，必将施予无赦惩戒。
— 帝国学者，伊席厄斯·普兰德斯

Text.en: RISE, SISTER!
Text.zh: 挺身奋战吧，姊妹！

Text.en:
The Treasures of the Tides wait
in agony at the End of the World.
Text.zh:
遭弃水手，死不瞑目。
葬身海域，冰冷咸苦。

Text.en: Flavour Text goes HERE
Text.zh: 某某内文放在这里。

Text.en: Flavourful flavour text is flavourful.
Text.zh: 某某内文放在这里。

Text.en:
The portrait reflected his pain,
a pain that she could never see.
Text.zh: 他在肖像中道尽辛酸苦楚，可惜佳人永远视若无睹。

Text.en:
"Here the soil is more deadly than any swing of the axe."
- Oba of the Karui, Conqueror of Corruption.
Text.zh:
"此处的土壤比任何挥动的斧头更加致命。"
- 腐化征服者卡鲁勇士欧霸

Text.en: It is too easy for the soul to escape from an open heart.
Text.zh: 疏于防范，一命归西。

Text.en:
"Nothing feels so smooth in the hand as Prototype #66.
Results like these may justify everything we do here."
Text.zh:
“六十六号实验底子十分称手。
其结果足以证明我们的努力是正确的。”

Text.en:
They flew, and leapt, and clambered over,
They crawled, and swam, and slithered under.
Still its ancient secrets await unclaimed
And of this hidden temple, only legends remain.
Text.zh:
他们飞翔腾跃，攀爬在上
他们匍匐群聚，蛇行在下
古老秘密依旧待人发现
隐密神庙中徒留传奇流言。

Text.en:
For this beauty,
beauty without strength,
chokes out life.
Text.zh:
空有妍丽美貌
奈何无力自保
注定玉殒香消

Text.en:
"A bit short in the arm, are you?
Then you'll be short of a head soon enough."
- Daresso the Daring
Text.zh:
“你挥剑的手似乎不够长吧? 
那你很快就人头落地了。”
— 无畏者德瑞索

Text.en:
"We are the soldiers of Faith, armoured in devotion.
Let the sinners come, for we - the Pure - shall endure!"
- Voll of Thebrus, at the Battle of the Bridge
Text.zh:
"怀抱信仰的战士！ 今日我们揭起正义之师，
尽斩操术罪恶之人，捍卫永恒纯粹之誓！ "
- 席布鲁斯的福尔于长桥之役

Text.en:
"Grind your words into sharp thoughts.
Grind your thoughts into the sharpest of deeds."
- Victario, the People's Poet
Text.zh:
"让激昂的文字化作敏锐的思绪，
接着塑造出善业的先驱。"
- 人民诗人维多里奥

Text.en: God blesses those who bless themselves.
Text.zh: 自助而后天助。

Text.en: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends
Text.zh: 目睹生命的消逝，才能深刻体会存活的价值。

Text.en:
"Shavronne held Sanity in her right
hand and Revelation in her left.
Brutus chose the left hand."
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra
Text.zh:
"薛朗的右手捧起理智，
左手掌握力量，
而布鲁特斯选择了左手。"- 黑影薛朗的助手 凯达弗斯

Text.en: As long as the soul is unfettered, so is the body.
Text.zh: 解放灵魂才能挣脱躯体的紧捆。

Text.en: Flavourful flavour text is flavourful.
Text.zh: 某某内文放在这里。

Text.en:
"Sharks thrash and swirl
To the pounding drum of their frenzied hearts
As they dance in the waters red."
-Lavianga, Guardian of the Karui Way
Text.zh:
“猎鲨嗅到远方那一道伤，
立即前来跃向那奄奄一息的心脏，
最终留下一抹血水荡漾。”
—— 拉维安加，卡鲁之道守护者

Text.en: Command like a king and nothing will stand in your way.
Text.zh: 唯有王者风范才能将一切乱源驱散。

Text.en:
"Prototype #599 offers an incredible defensive power, but at a cost.
What underlying physics are at play here, I wonder?"
Text.zh:
“五百九十九号实验底子提供了难以置信的防御力，但代价太大。
真想知道它的物理学原理是什么。”

Text.en:
Her purpose seems done; the oath is fulfilled.
Rust dulls her smirk with the last demon killed.
The embers grow dim and yet hope burns her lips:
"An old flame renewed can define our eclipse!"
Text.zh:
她已达成目标，信守神圣誓言。
即使杀尽恶魔，无法再展笑颜。
余烬渐渐暗去，口中喃喃希望： 
"新炎已焉燃起，我等就此消亡！ "

Text.en: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.
Text.zh: 让那信仰的铁砧将你无比的毅力千锤百炼。

Text.en: With death as my ally, all the world is within my grasp.
Text.zh: 我若与死亡结盟发兵，天下简直唾手可得。

Text.en:
"Our warehouses are bursting. Our vaults are full.
But our minds are still hungry."
- Medici Perandus, Prefect to the Treasury
Text.zh:
"财物堆满了金库，宝藏填平了秘窟，
但我们的心灵依旧遗失于欲望的迷雾。"
- 宝藏库守备官梅迪西·普兰德斯

Text.en: Let winter come. It will only make my fire burn brighter.
Text.zh: 凛冬尽管降临吧，狂风将助长我的战火。

Text.en:
Knowledge is fermented in pain and loss
Distilled with reflection
To quench the thirst of those
who dream of enlightenment
Text.zh:
苦痛失去，智慧得以发酵
回想省过，智慧得以蒸馏
凡渴慕启悟者
得以一尝镇渴

Text.en:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.
Text.zh:
转动，凝视，连连眨眼，
你注视虚幻之眼。
燃烧，夷平，痛饮若狂，
你已经丧心病狂。

Text.en:
Shedding away her regal past,
she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.
Text.zh:
他人抚慰，仅得苦痛暂缓，
回归自然，方是永恒终站。

Text.en: Victory is on the march and nothing can stop it.
Text.zh: 胜利的行队旗鼓喧张，势不可挡。

Text.en: Those who burn for victory burn for eternity.
Text.zh: 英灵之魂永垂不朽。

Text.en: It hunts; as silent as falling snow, as deadly as the tempest.
Text.zh: 出猎之人静谧如落雪，致命如疾电。

Text.en:
"Beware. Prototype #91 is haunted by a strange miasma,
an odour of evil. Nothing can shield the senses."
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“注意。九十一号实验原型附着了奇怪的瘴气。
臭得发指，简直挡不住。”
— 研究员阿恩

Text.en:
Tears of blood, aching heart,
My dear Isildria must depart.
Text.zh:
破碎的心灵淌着血，
我心爱的伊席德莉亚在此永别。

Text.en: Fire and Anarchy are the most reliable agents of change.
Text.zh: 烈火和混乱是时代更替的最佳媒介。

Text.en:
"The remarkable imbalance of Prototype #848 leads to uncommon
power or speed when striking."
Text.zh:
“八百四十八号实验底子很不平衡。
打击的威力和速度都很不匹配。”

Text.en:
There is no safer place
Than the Belly of the Beast
Text.zh:
如果你觉得保命奋战太过沉重，
不如就让巨兽吞入腹中。

Text.en: For none of us are as cruel as all of us.
Text.zh: 结群聚众必然生成力量之源。

Text.en:
"Prototype #412 seems to bear much in
common with Thought Extractor technology."
Text.zh:
“四百一十二号实验底子似乎
跟思想萃取技术有颇多共同点。”

Text.en: Where top is bottom and weak is strong.
Text.zh: 尊卑强弱，风水轮流转。

Text.en:
"Death can be outrun with these, but beware!
In running from death, you may forget to live."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 202
Text.zh:
“使用这些可以逃脱死亡，但务必当心！
逃离死亡的过程中，你也许会忘记如何活着。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，藏品第202号

Text.en:
"A lick of shadow may ease
the petty frictions of one's life."
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh:
“落入黑暗之中
让人忘却生命中的无谓争吵。”
— 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en:
"Bored gods won't give you any favours."
- Maraketh proverb
Text.zh:
"不取悦神便无法蒙获神恩。"
- 马拉克斯谚语

Text.en:
Bargg Wurmkin once severed the heads
of seven men in a single cleave.
Text.zh:
巴葛·乌尔姆金长刃一挥，
七条冤魂便到地狱相会。

Text.en:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"富贵总是险中求，
但财货乃身外之物，哪会问去留。"
- 瓦尔族多里亚尼

Text.en:
Heavy as guilt.
Beautiful as temptation.
Painful as betrayal.
Text.zh:
罪孽之深重溺沉。
诱惑之美艳绝伦。
背叛之苦痛难忍。

Text.en:
Maligaro considered his work an Art,
and his subjects his canvas.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗自认笔下尽出绝世艺术，
千万臣民皆为他精致画布。

Text.en:
A fang of hellfire, chip of frost,
Lightning flickers, blade embossed.
With dagger clenched, into the fray!
Or draw it out, and cast away.
Text.zh:
炼狱内火海冰霜，
电光闪动，刀剑雕妆。
匕首磨损，紧握不放！ 
抽刀出鞘，弃之一旁。

Text.en: Galla had an answer to everything.
Text.zh: 加菈总是能应对自如。

Text.en:
"We Ezomytes made promises that this
Eternal God would have us break."
- Thane Rigwald
Text.zh:
“艾兹麦人坚信
永恒之主将赐下福音。”
— 泰恩·里格沃德

Text.en:
Beneath the blue,
The stillness permits
The drowned dead
To regret their choices.
Text.zh:
蓝光之底，
平静死寂
溺者水出
悔不当初。

Text.en:
The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning
rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its
arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair.
Text.zh:
奇异风暴在我头顶笼罩，
雷霆风暴在我眼前宣泄
秘术让手上的金属熔解，生命零凋，
奔逃无路，求助无门！ 绝望永不止歇……

Text.en:
Doedre Darktongue knew the Way of the Thaumaturge.
In order to receive, one must give... without hesitation.
Text.zh:
德瑞·黑暗之舌深谙奇术的协奏曲： 
追求力量的共鸣，献祭绝不能犹豫。

Text.en:
"Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet
Text.zh:
“玛莉琳总是在决斗前
总是轻抚胸前的荣耀辉记，呼唤奇迹显现。”
— 人民诗人，维多里奥

Text.en:
"When one stares into the depth of the flavour text
file, one will gain no knowledge, only an addiction
to speculation." - Maligaro, Grand Trolllord
Text.zh:
"望向奇闻轶事的核心，
你会寻觅那智慧的拓印，
那乐趣总是让人上瘾。" - 魔主马雷格罗

Text.en:
"I carry neither food nor drink. I rely on the charity
of my fellow wayfarers. Dead men are generous men."
- Taruk of the Wildmen
Text.zh:
"我不会前去寻水觅食，
毕竟还有那断了气的同伴遗爱人世。"
- 野人塔卢克

Text.en:
Give yourself to the flames and your name
will burn in the minds of men forever.
Text.zh:
奉献己身，投诸火祭
汝名将受万代流传永记。

Text.en:
"Ice and flame antagonized in the essence of a prototype.
What once burned now chills the soul."
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“冰与火的对立是一种原型。
烧得越猛，就越叫人心寒。”
— 研究员阿恩

Text.en:
Tread lightly, lest their vigil find you.
Speak softly, lest their reason fend you.
Cut gently, lest their spirit haunt you.
Text.zh:
蹑手蹑足，莫让夜卫发现你。
低声细语，莫让他人顶撞你。
轻柔夺命，莫让冤魂纠缠你。

Text.en:
"A raging Solaris seared and contorted the orb's surface.
A despairing Lunaris filled the scars with her tears.
Yet Viridi remained, trapped within, forever more."
 - Azmerian Creation Myth
Text.zh:
“炽烈的阳光点燃大地，
朦胧的月影以泪填起那四方之隙，
维里迪蜗居其中，只为寻找果腹残食和蔽体薄衣。”
— 阿兹莫里《创生之纪》

Text.en:
"When your back is against the wall,
And your opponent is bleeding you dry,
There is only one appropriate response:
Unbridled, overwhelming violence."
- Daresso, the Sword King
Text.zh:
"当你身后已无退路，
对手进逼招招狠毒，
身陷危机，唯有一途
就是浑身绝技尽出，"
- 斗剑之王德瑞索

Text.en:
"Let the evil ones deliver their fiery darts.
This time I've put my faith in steel."
 - Commander Santoni of the Damned Brotherhood
Text.zh:
"恶徒竟敢如此放荡！ 
那么，就领教我满怀信仰的钢刃。"
- 诅咒兄弟会指挥官山托尼

Text.en:
Ming slew Tranquillity
Took Chaos for his wife
And on Her immortal finger
He placed his Heart
Text.zh:
明将宁静击毙
迎娶混沌为妻
在她那不朽的细指
明戴上真心诚挚

Text.en:
"There's nothing like imminent death
to galvanize one's purpose in life."
- Malachai the Soulless.
Text.zh:
"看看那转瞬的安息，
我想不出更好的结局与之相比。"
- 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en:
The Empress gave Romira two sons
Born of his brother's seed
Romira threw her a banquet
A perfidious meal indeed.
Text.zh:
皇后为罗米拉产子有二
实为兄弟之种
罗密拉为皇后设宴享乐
实为背信之讽。

Text.en:
Born of love, forged in blood
He burned as a torch in the blackest night
She shone as ice in the winter sun
Proudly, fiercely
At their mother's side, forever.
Text.zh:
生于爱，铸于血
他如火炬点亮至黑之夜
她如冬日阳光辉映冰洁
何其自豪，何其猛烈
常伴母侧，尽孝不懈。

Text.en:
The sun's fury, trapped
in pillars of blazing light,
Explodes from its cage.
Text.zh:
炽热毒辣的烈日
困在出一道道夺目光柱里，
在其中爆炸燃烧。

Text.en: Anticipation, preparation, exhilaration, celebration.
Text.zh: 含泪播种者，必欢呼收割。

Text.en:
"From Frost's ice-bound pass
Berek taunted and jeered
Until furious Flame scaled the mountain
Berek escaped through the thaw
And Frost's tortured moans."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
"贝雷克伫立冰封之道，
对自己征服此地得意逍遥。
那烈炎发出尖啸，
贝雷克却能躲过火烧
以及冷酷的撕咬。"
- 贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"Berek hid from Storm's lightning wrath
In the embrace of oblivious Frost
Repelled by ice, blinded by blizzards
Storm raged in vain
While Berek slept."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
"贝雷克凌驾风暴之巅，
怀抱一般人只敢远观的雪线；
踏遍冰河，放眼渺无人烟，
深夜狂风恶梦无限，
他竟睡得香甜。"
- 贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
"灾祸的火焰就在脚下翻滚，
贝雷克却充耳不闻；
接着，他感受到雨水划过风暴之后的余温，
于是打起精神，
却感叹自己无法
浴火新生。"
- 贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
"贝雷克拥有无比机智，
从他和抗驯者之间的缠斗便可得知。
他让那三种元素互相角力，
直到它们露出败迹，
接着一鼓作气
让自己和恶梦远离。"
- 贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"Kaom fought and killed for his people.
Kaom bled for his people.
And so the people gave, the people bled,
So their King might go on."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
"冈姆为人民奋战，残杀，
甚至不惜让身体任刀刃践踏；
子民的荣誉心因此萌芽，
跟随君王征服天下。"
- 冈姆军师拉维安加

Text.en:
"When the Ancestors fill your cup,
It is only good manners to drink your fill."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
享受先祖的赏赐时
忌贪嗔痴。"
- 冈姆军师拉维安加

Text.en: "An intriguing paradox."
Text.zh: “有趣的悖论。”

Text.en:
"It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
"遨翔的海鸥导引着先祖之途，
让那残缺，无用的躯体回归尘土。
即使人生本是虚无，
却也不应陷于迷雾。"
- 冈姆军师拉维安加

Text.en:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
"骨骼是灵魂的居所，
血肉是精神和世界交流的窗口，推动一切的力量就在心窝。
即使有了这些，失去了头脑就没有自我。"
- 冈姆军师拉维安加

Text.en:
"A type Delta test subject escaped with Prototype #18. He was last seen
ten times the height of a man and crashing straight through walls."
Text.zh:
“四号实验对象逃过了十八号实验底子。
他最后一次出现时，身高是常人的十倍，破墙而走。”

Text.en:
"She begged the Earth to spare her Son;
Out of love the Earth agreed.
To the other Elements she did not speak
And out of spite They plotted."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
"她乞求土灵留下孩子，
母爱感天动地，土灵答应饶他不死。
其他元素之灵却感到不受重视，
于是策画诡计，谋害其子。"
- 贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.
Text.zh:
喉咙嘶吼，
双眼泪流，
两手紧握，
十指颤抖，
腹部曲扭，
仍然屹立不休，
问其原因为何? 
傲骨绝不屈合。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
至微者，须弥芥子
至伟者，参天神木，
无论微伟，皆可立足帝陆。

Text.en:
My Iron heart will beat when yours is rust.
I take your Strength, your power, your lust.
By Iron Will alone I set my mind in motion.
Through endless storms of fervent devotion.
Text.zh:
你的铁心锈蚀，我的铁心跳动。
我接受你的力量，权力和落空。
我单凭借钢铁意志，化意念为行动。
通过无数热烈奉献的暴风。

Text.en:
Though the battle has been long,
Victory is at hand.
Text.zh:
久战不懈
战事最终必将告捷。

Text.en:
The cursed ghosts march forever,
On their hopeless last endeavour.
Text.zh:
受诅亡魂永世行军，
踏上必败无疑的远征。

Text.en:
So the raiders danced,
leading their foe ever west,
towards certain death.
Text.zh:
强盗们一路跳舞，
将敌人引向西方，
迎接必然的死亡。

Text.en: A cool map, for a cool guy.
Text.zh: 美好的事物只跟最棒的人分享。

Text.en:
Give me neither havens nor solace;
They are for the weak and frightened.
Instead, light the path to greatness,
So that I may begin my bright pursuit.
Text.zh:
切莫赐予天堂或藉慰；
我并非软弱胆怯之辈。
点亮去路，迈向宏伟，
我才能展开壮志追随。

Text.en: An eye for an eye. A curse for a curse.
Text.zh: 以眼还眼，以咒还咒。

Text.en:
The last thing Arimagius heard was the
jester's mocking bells in the distance.
Text.zh:
最后在亚里玛吉乌斯耳边响起
远方小丑嘲讽的铃声。

Text.en: Doomed to plunder forever.
Text.zh: 掠夺宛如饮鸩止渴─一朝为之，永无容赦。

Text.en:
What is below is like what is above,
and what is above is like what is below,
to accomplish the miracles of one thing.
Text.zh:
其上似其下，
其下若其上，
方能成奇迹。

Text.en:
The fury of the forge determines
the ferocity of the metal.
Text.zh: 锻冶热度决定剑身的锐度。

Text.en: Unnatural Origins, unnatural benefits, unnatural cost.
Text.zh: 出身，力量和所需···一切背离自然之律。

Text.en:
The eagle knows nothing
but the scream and the strike.
Text.zh:
猎鹰的生命
只有威吓和出击的命运

Text.en: Kill us with kindness, cut us with care.
Text.zh: 求你大发慈悲，一击毙命。

Text.en:
Old Bartek still stands, but is courteously
bowing to the might of time.
Text.zh:
老巴尔提克依旧屹立不摇，
出于礼貌，还是向岁月鞠躬弯腰。

Text.en: And the thunder rumbled on and on.
Text.zh: 轰轰雷鸣，不绝阵阵

Text.en:
You've no reason for fear when you're a root in a fen
- Old Ezomyte saying.
Text.zh:
像树根般紧攀着那滋养的淤泥时，何需害怕─团结力量大。
- 艾兹麦的古老智慧

Text.en:
"Attempt #306: The power I can sense in this ancient branch
still eludes me. Perhaps if I attach some string and a hook..."
Text.zh:
“第三百零六次实验：我感到这个古老树枝中的力量仍在逃避我。
也许下次该试试缆绳和钩子……”

Text.en:
Calling it poison would imply
that it was even edible.
Text.zh:
毒发身亡的猎物
经过妥善的处理也能成为美味的食物。

Text.en:
The seeds of greatness are planted in darkness,
Watered by suffering,
Tended by desperation,
And bloom steel flowers of victory.
Text.zh:
伟业种籽，栽于黑暗，
蒙受苦难浇灌，
遭到绝望照管，
方能绽放胜利的铁花瓣。

Text.en:
"Prototype #722 might look like a helmet, but I believe it to be something else
entirely. The visions it shows the wearer... are beyond mortal endurance..."
Text.zh:
“七百二十二号实验底子看起来像个头盔，可我觉得它绝对是其它东西。
它给穿戴者显示的图像……绝对是凡人难以承受的……”

Text.en:
Give a man a fish, and you can feed him for a day.
But give a fish a man, and you can feed it for a month.
Text.zh:
人以鱼为食，仅能止饥一餐；
鱼以人为饲，足可饱食数日。

Text.en:
"The ice seared his naked feet
As the lightning stilled his heart,
But it was the flames upon his lover's face
That roused him to vengeance."
- From 'The Three Dragons' by Victario of Sarn
Text.zh:
冰霜严寒，他的赤足伤痕布满，
雷霆万钧，他的心念无法动弹，
恶火猛烈，情人容颜化为飞灰，
此时他才终于奋起复仇，猛攻不退。
- 萨恩的维多里奥著作"猎龙记"

Text.en: Captivity breeds creativity.
Text.zh: 对自由的渴望会造就无穷的希望。

Text.en: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.
Text.zh: 拾起此锤者，将可操控雷霆，号令风暴。

Text.en:
The whispers of the dead
Carry wisdom for the living,
If you are willing to give your life
To listen.
Text.zh:
亡者喃喃教诲
说与生者领会，
如愿听闻，以命相陪。

Text.en:
"As the serpent shuns thought,
It shuns fear.
It strikes with the speed of wrath
And the skill of compulsion."
- Deshret, The Red Sekhema
Text.zh:
"当巨蛇不再多虑，
它变得无所畏惧。
愤恨难平，迅速杀敌： 
展现气血狂怒的战技！ "
- 赤血丝克玛迪虚瑞特

Text.en:
Alberon walked among the accursed,
and they welcomed him.
Text.zh:
阿尔贝隆踱向诅咒之渊，
而那狐群狗党露出巴结的嘴脸

Text.en:
"Starving test subject became completely incapable of exerting force.
However, after being fed, he began to poison everything he touched..."
Text.zh:
“饥饿的实验对象完全不能发力。
喂食后，他开始疯狂地下毒……”

Text.en:
All that was left of the Iron King was his bleached skull.
Yet it was all the Iron King needed.
Text.zh:
坚铁之王只余下他那苍白的头骨，
不过，这也是他唯一想留在身边的遗物。

Text.en: The darker the eye, the more diligent the watched.
Text.zh: 深沉的双眼总是望着最勤奋的灵魂。

Text.en: "So close, yet frustratingly distinct. Something more is going on here..."
Text.zh: “很接近了，但非常沮丧的是，我们肯定还漏掉了什么……”

Text.en:
"The gems are strangely human at times.
They simply love to be held."
- Doryani, First Seer to the Queen
Text.zh:
"古灵宝石拥有人性的一面： 
它们喜爱拥抱生命，为人所用。"
- 女王首席预言者多里亚尼

Text.en:
"Why waste such a fine arrow on just one man?"
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer
Text.zh:
“如此精良的箭矢为何一次只用在一个人身上?真是浪费！”
— 奇拉维，瓦尔箭术师

Text.en:
"It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer
Text.zh:
"很少人能像背后生出双眼一般地感应空气的流动。"
- 瓦尔箭术师奇拉维

Text.en:
"To shake a hand is to double your power."
- Jaetai, Queen's Advisor
Text.zh:
"交际是巩固权力的不二法门。"
- 女王策士杰泰

Text.en:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“未闻乐音的平凡人
当然会认为起舞的人理智太过放任。”
— 阿兹里，瓦尔女王

Text.en:
"You can invite them but you can never be
sure who will come knocking."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist
Text.zh:
“你可以送出诚挚的邀请，
但无从得知造访的是何方嘉宾。”
— 多里亚尼，女王的奇术师

Text.en:
"Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“死亡不求你的理解，它只需要你的奉献。”
— 阿兹里， 瓦尔女王

Text.en:
"The heart is the herald.
It will tell me when it is best to strike."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“心脏是最佳传令官，
让我知道何时该出击迎战。”
— 阿兹里， 瓦尔女王

Text.en:
"One of our researchers cut himself on Prototype #2,
and he has not stopped screaming for months..."
Text.zh:
“一个研究员在二号实验底子里出了事故。
他的尖叫持续了好几个月……”

Text.en:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"光明磊落者无所畏惧。"
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
"A queen should be seen, admired, but never touched."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"女王者，可敬观崇拜而不可亵玩焉。"
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
"I do not believe in disguising my disappointment."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"我可不想掩饰失落神情，自欺欺人。"
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
Reap what others have sown
Muster them from their graves
Parade them for your pleasure
Zealots in mortis enslaved
Text.zh:
莫让前人耕耘回归尘土
休使学问埋入坟墓
呼唤前人出坟阔步，
奴役亡躯，踏上征途。

Text.en: Look to our Queen, for she will lead us into the light.
Text.zh: 相信女王将赐给我们光明！

Text.en: Only those who aspire can dare to hope.
Text.zh: 残存的希望是那迎向朝阳的野望。

Text.en: The light without pales in comparison to the light within.
Text.zh: 至耀之光，微暮之芒。

Text.en: The Vaal shall never fear the setting of our sun.
Text.zh: 瓦尔族从未对日落感到恐惧。

Text.en: We are but dogs, howling at an uncaring moon.
Text.zh: 我们就像丧犬嗥吠，残月却冷眼旁听。

Text.en: Look to our Queen, for she will lead us from the darkness.
Text.zh: 相信女王将引领我们在黑暗中行进！

Text.en: It is only the blind who can live in darkness.
Text.zh: 唯有盲者不会在黑暗中迷途。

Text.en: When we prostrate ourselves to the night, we worship mortality.
Text.zh: 向罪恶之夜拜倒，我们将自取灭亡。

Text.en:
Mouth of the Masses, whose greatness spreads by our breath and touch,
who feeds the starving with the starved, the strong with the weak.
Text.zh:
群众之口，力量透过我们的气息和触碰漫延，
以肌饿者喂食肌饿，以弱小者喂食强壮。

Text.en:
Lord of the Wild, of the feral and frenzied,
of the uncivilized, the untamed, the untouched.
Text.zh:
原野、野性、暴怒、
野蛮、狂野、蛮横之王。

Text.en:
The Infinite Mind, unbound by the tethers of sanity,
whose thirst for knowledge is all-consuming,
whose every word stands our hair on end.
Text.zh:
无限的心智，脱离理智的系绳，
它为知识的渴望所消耗殆尽，
它的每个字皆令人毛骨悚然。

Text.en:
She of Many Bodies, whose very flesh unites all,
whose dark whispers draw forth our souls, unfettered.
Text.zh:
众多的躯体，她的血肉集合了所有，
她黯黑的轻语不受约束地引出了我们的灵魂。

Text.en:
Enter the crucible. The nexus of
nothingness and equilibrium of eternity.
Text.zh: 集齐4份记忆碎片可进入塑界者的创世之境。探索虚无空间的神秘链接和永恒存在的万物平衡。

Text.en:
Enter the crucible. The nexus of
nothingness and equilibrium of eternity.
Text.zh: 集齐4份记忆碎片可进入塑界者的创世之境。探索虚无空间的神秘链接和永恒存在的万物平衡。

Text.en:
Enter the crucible. The nexus of
nothingness and equilibrium of eternity.
Text.zh: 集齐4份记忆碎片可进入塑界者的创世之境。探索虚无空间的神秘链接和永恒存在的万物平衡。

Text.en:
Enter the crucible. The nexus of
nothingness and equilibrium of eternity.
Text.zh: 集齐4份记忆碎片可进入塑界者的创世之境。探索虚无空间的神秘链接和永恒存在的万物平衡。

Text.en: Freedom is won, not given.
Text.zh: 胜利只可争取，不可乞讨。

Text.en: Plagues are exhausted, not cured.
Text.zh: 瘟疫只可偃旗息鼓，不可妄图救治。

Text.en: Webs are torn, not untangled.
Text.zh: 乱麻只能快刀斩断，不可妄图理清。

Text.en: Corruption is purged, not cleansed.
Text.zh: 腐坏只可被净化，不可被清扫。

Text.en: Beauty is in the eye of the creator.
Text.zh: 美只存于造物主的眼中。

Text.en: Understanding leads to mastery.
Text.zh: 理解带来精通。

Text.en: Fear drives survival.
Text.zh: 恐惧带来生存。

Text.en: What is not cannot cause harm.
Text.zh: 万物皆可有害。

Text.en:
He sought to be the best,
but lost his family.
Text.zh:
他一心成功，
却牺牲了家庭。

Text.en:
He sought God,
but lost himself.
Text.zh:
他一心求神，
却迷失了自己。

Text.en:
He sought a kingdom,
but lost his people.
Text.zh:
他想建功立业，
却辜负了人民。

Text.en:
She sought to bring salvation,
but lost her compassion.
Text.zh:
她想济世救民，
却丧失了怜悯。

Text.en:
The result of the catalytic reaction would be either immortality for all,
or death for all. It was a risk Doryani was willing to take.
Text.zh:
"炼化"将让所有子民长生不老，
或是体毁魂消。无论结果如何，多里亚尼都相信这是瓦尔一族的救药。

Text.en:
"Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air. 
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer
Text.zh:
“芦苇丛中青石在，
刺骨寒风蒙雾生；
坐守河岸静眺望，
低语祈求天佑人。”
— 乔乔巴·曼赛尔，吟游诗人，钓鱼者与冒险家

Text.en:
The bindings of the victorious
wrap around the throats of the defeated.
Text.zh:
胜者众志成城
败者独自扼腕

Text.en:
Mist of breath
Icing to lips and throat
As the warm ones choke and fall
Upon the frozen wasteland.
Text.zh:
如斯雾气，化为冰霜刺进口鼻
那是冻原旅人窒息倒地前
最后一次的呼吸。

Text.en:
Only light may banish the shadows from this land
And the black lies wrapped around your heart
Text.zh:
唯有曙光能驱逐阴影
使黑暗谎言不再蒙蔽人心

Text.en:
A Karui woman's place was not the
battlefield, but the hearth.
Hyrri changed all of that.
Text.zh:
战斗非卡鲁女子本份，
西里破除持家传统，
引领姐妹踏上荣耀之行。

Text.en:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch
Text.zh:
"尽管劫运当头，饱受苦楚，
吾仅留心于手中把握之物，
如同所招致的死亡般，沉默而专注。"
- "毁灭之弦"寇拉卢斯

Text.en:
"Hyaon the 'Red Wolf'
Howling mad
Cloaked in blood
A banner to his legion
A terror to his foes."
- Garivaldi, Chronicler to the Empire
Text.zh:
"血狼海奥恩─
战吼逞快意，军士气万钧。
血躯阵中现，诸敌自披靡。"
- 帝国纪事官 加里瓦尔迪

Text.en: Don't flinch. It's a waste of good hitting time.
Text.zh: 切莫畏缩迟疑，以免错失良机。

Text.en:
"Political power is an illusion.
Popular power is fickle.
Financial power is real and loyal."
- Cadiro Perandus, Lord of the Coin
Text.zh:
权幻名虚何足道，
唯有钱赀万年行。
- 大财主卡迪罗·普兰德斯

Text.en:
"Treasure that which the Ancestors have gifted you.
For it can be gone between one breath and the next."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
"须知祖宗遗绪难守易失，
点滴丝毫望君珍之重之。"
- 冈姆谏臣拉维安加

Text.en:
"A fool steps into the unknown.
An explorer finds his way back again."
- Malachai, Thaumaturge Laureate
Text.zh:
"愚者行事，雾中跌宕
智者行事，踌躇自得"
- 首席奇术师玛拉凯

Text.en:
Maligaro was transformed by Raulo's love.
Thaumaturgy allowed Maligaro to return the favour.
Text.zh:
劳罗之爱让马雷格罗彻底改变，
他以奇术回报爱人，令其永生不死。

Text.en:
In this chaotic world
The rewards of the Soul
Outlast the rewards of the Flesh.
Text.zh:
于此乱世之中，
灵魂升华远胜肉体淬炼。

Text.en:
"The theft of another's vitality is short-lived, but sweet.
It calls to me, bidding me abandon all other pursuits."
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“窃取他人的生命力很短暂，却很甘甜。
它呼唤着我，让我放弃其它所有追求。”
——研究员阿恩

Text.en: Your reach exceeds your grasp.
Text.zh: 超越理智，接触未知···

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
Into darkness, horror, madness...
So goes the descent.
Text.zh:
迈入那黑暗，惊惧，疯狂···
后世将谨记不忘。

Text.en:
The right to rule demands mental acuity,
a strong arm,
And a tenacious sense of justice.
Text.zh:
拳头，正义感，激情；
身为王者三项缺一不可。

Text.en:
"Fear becomes Hatred.
Hatred becomes Fury.
Thus is Man transformed
from Martyr to Maker."
- Malachai
Text.zh:
“惧生恨，恨化怒，
让世人不再牺牲献身，反倒自诩为神。”
— 玛拉凯

Text.en:
"It is a cruel joke that
Man was born with more
Intent than Life."
- Malachai
Text.zh:
“人生何其残酷讽刺啊，
生年纵有限，欲念无穷尽。”
— 玛拉凯

Text.en: We all began life in darkness, we shall all end it there.
Text.zh: 生命源于黑暗，必也终于黑暗。

Text.en:
One wrong step triggers destruction.
Agony slowly dominates the will to live.
Text.zh:
一失足成千古恨，
苦痛缠身渐消沉。

Text.en:
Crimson burn'd the star of sadness,
All was woe that seem'd but gladness.
Text.zh:
血煞灾星现凶光
谁知恶劫吉中藏

Text.en:
Being lost is a trick of the mind.
A man always has two directions available to him.
Forward and through.
Text.zh:
迷茫之时无需心烦；
谨记，以下建言对男人永远有用： 
直直向前冲。

Text.en: Fire makes the perfect blossom in the endless night.
Text.zh:
在无尽黑夜之中
点点火花化身耀眼光芒

Text.en:
Nothing is pure.
Slice open the Innocent
And spill a thousand Sins.
Text.zh:
纯净，是个用来欺骗世人的词汇。
一旦将那圣洁的假象切开，
你将见识到漫无边际深沉无比的黑暗。

Text.en:
"Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world.
Today I am wise, so I am changing myself."
-Rumi of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"我曾自视甚高，想要改变这个世界；
如今我已看清，于是试图改变自己。"
—— 瓦尔之鲁米。

Text.en:
"The most terrifying split second of my life."
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh:
“我人生中最可怕的瞬间。”
— 研究员葛拉文

Text.en:
She dances a dance beneath the shade,
The twilight shroud her only blade,
Who now hears her feathersteps flowing?
Beneath the stars, the moondrops glowing.
Text.zh:
在阴影中翩翩起舞，
在剑影中穿梭自如；
在星芒下无声潜行，
在月影下悄然漫步。

Text.en:
"Once we armoured the test subject heavily enough to test Prototype #502, he proceeded
to fight his way out. I don't know what we expected." 
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh:
“只要我们给实验对象穿上重甲，测试五零二号实验底子，他就死命挣扎。
真不知道我们在期待什么。”——研究员葛拉文

Text.en: Become one with the unstoppable flame.
Text.zh: 化身为烈火之炎

Text.en: It takes a clear mind to outrun a storm.
Text.zh:
冷静　
是逃出混乱的关键

Text.en:
"The Consort of Chaos descended,
swiftly, brutally, artfully, she consumed the living,
leaving naught behind but a Rosemarie bloom,
to celebrate the massacre."
- Blass, explorer, hunter, adventurer
Text.zh:
"作为混沌灾星的配偶，
她迅速，残酷，狡猾。
除了香气，走过不留一丝痕迹。
以此，来庆祝那场大逃亡。"
- 探险家，猎人与冒险者 布拉斯

Text.en:
Apep's poison entraps, encircles,
and engulfs the leaking mind of Man.
Text.zh:
艾普之毒具有致命引力
吞噬人性理智豪不留情

Text.en: "More blood... hack open flesh... must drink..."

What is freedom but a clean slate
in an unclean world?
Text.zh:
【神乃至高无上之主，
而吾则为其下之首。
汝，将永不受吾怜悯。】
—— 圣宗领导人神主

Text.en:
What is greed but trading a mountain of death
for a sliver of life?
Text.zh:
无数杀戮只为找出生存意义
除却贪婪尚有何物?

Text.en:
What is fear but a snuffed torch
and death in the wind?
Text.zh:
随风散播的燎原之火与死亡阴影，
带来的唯有恐惧。

Text.en:
Let it grow and gather inside them,
Let it flow through their veins.
Don't waste a drop.
Text.zh:
任其在体内滋生成长。
使其在血管自在流窜。
一滴血都不能浪费。

Text.en:
"Why is Prototype #67 never in the vault it should be?
Either we're keeping faulty logs, or..." 
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh:
“为什么六十七号实验底子总没放对储藏室？
我们明明都写了错误日志了……”——研究员葛拉文

Text.en:
Soon, the pleas for mercy were muted.
Only one voice remained.
Laughing.
Text.zh:
很快的，恳求哀祈之声渐绝。
只剩一种声音四处回荡。
笑声。

Text.en:
Feed on the light of the living,
Bring darkness to all I see,
Until we are one in shadow.
Text.zh:
以光明之子的生命为饵食，
将黑暗赐与吾眼所视之物，
直到我们在阴影中合而为一。

Text.en: Hit them hard. Hit them once.
Text.zh: 打用力点，一次搞定。

Text.en:
The grandest and greatest ever to fight,
Divine the champions stand tall.
But match their power, best their might,
And even the immortal may fall.
Text.zh:
在这最为盛大及伟大的战场，
神圣的英灵们在此屹立不摇；
面对他们压倒性强大的力量，
是否有人能斩断那永恒枷锁?

Text.en:
When the wind blows, 
Know which way to bend
and watch the others break.
Text.zh:
聆听风之低语，顺应风势而行。
若是不愿臣服，烈风转眼而至。

Text.en:
"As much as Prototype #20 hints at some deep alternate physics, we cannot afford
to expend any more test subjects. Experiments halted."
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh: “虽然二十号实验底子蕴含了深刻的物理原理，但我们没法给它更多实验对象了。实验中止。”——总管科塔拉

Text.en:
Open your eyes and you will see the cracks in your enemy's walls.
Open your mind and you will see the cracks in your enemy's plans.
Text.zh:
张开你的双眼，你将看到敌人防御上的缝隙；
张开你的心眼，你将看到敌人计划上的缺口。

Text.en:
So the seed of hate was born,
Evil forged and Hope forsworn.
Text.zh:
恶念之种不断萌芽，
邪恶滋生希望破灭。

Text.en:
The horrors we've encountered are nothing
compared to the horrors we haven't.
Text.zh:
吾等所经历之恐怖梦魇，
远不如尚未见到的地狱。

Text.en:
The objects Oba valued more than his life,
sealed from the corruption that ultimately took it.
Text.zh:
欧霸所珍惜之物更胜其生命，
因此将其于崩毁之前封印永存。

Text.en:
The victor stands tall with hand held high,
unwavering, unblinking, unstoppable.
Text.zh: 胜者为王，势不可挡。

Text.en: One for each corner of the great Vinktar Square.
Text.zh: 作为维塔神圣广场的四方支柱之一

Text.en:
A glimpse of victory
is all you need to win.
Text.zh:
捕抓那关键一瞥，
是获胜所需唯一。

Text.en: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.
Text.zh:
手中所触荆棘之外，
满溢鲜血苦痛不断。

Text.en:
"Physical forces and flames seem to share some innate bond.
What logic lies beneath the veil of reality?"
Text.zh:
“物理和火焰似乎天生具有联系。
真理面纱之下到底有何逻辑？”

Text.en: Nothing is as vivid as the rage of battle
Text.zh: 唯有斗争之怒才让人感到生命之喜。

Text.en:
"A legion of forty soldiers attempted to break into Outpost Five and
steal Prototype #659. What do they know that we do not?"
Text.zh:
“有四十名士兵试图闯入五号前哨偷走六五九号实验底子。
他们知道哪些我们不知道的秘密？”

Text.en: At knifepoint, a moment's hesitation means death.
Text.zh:
刀尖上片刻的犹豫，
换来的唯有那死亡。

Text.en:
"I cannot fathom the mysteries of Prototype #16. It did nearly nothing until I
brought it to [RESTRICTED]. It makes no sense!"
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh: “我理解不了十六号实验底子。它几乎什么也做不了，直到我拘束它。太没道理了！”——研究员葛拉文

Text.en: Hear no evil.
Text.zh: 耳中充斥圣洁之声。

Text.en: If it's worth doing once, it's worth doing twice.
Text.zh: 有一就该有二。

Text.en: Gentle anger, raging calm.
Text.zh: 平静与愤怒有时是一体两面。

Text.en:
"Look around you. What do you see? 
Corruption, perversion, sin?
No. It is progress. 
You simply lack the means to see it." 
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh:
【看看四周，看到了什么? 
腐化，堕落与罪恶? 
不，那其实是自然的演进。
你只是看不到现实罢了。】
- 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en:
"Our genius will pave the way forward.
May all who are worthy be improved!"
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh:
"那群天才们会将崎岖前路铺平；
愿所有值得的人都能向前迈进。"
- 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en: Every rule has an exception.
Text.zh: 所有的规则都有例外。

Text.en:
Fear not the dark, the song of night,
Hear not the arch, the falling cry.
My giving sun, fight no more,
Rest alone, my grand nightfall.
Text.zh:
黑暗降临，夜之歌声；
弓声渐止，哭嚎渐生。
落日西沉，战争止息；
孤独一人，暮光渐沉。

Text.en:
Your lies are our strength.
Your threats are our laughter.
Your hate is our infinity
The fire rises!
Text.zh:
汝之谎言，余之力量。
汝之威吓，余之欢笑。
汝之憎恨，余之无尽。
火焰窜升！

Text.en:
In battle, virtue matters not. 
Only victory.
Text.zh:
在战场上，什么都是假的。
只有胜利才是真的。

Text.en:
"To us mere mortals, time is slippery. 
I'm just evening things out." 
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist
Text.zh:
"对我们凡人来说，时间稍纵即逝；
我只是试着平衡罢了。"
- 女王首席预言者多里亚尼

Text.en: Rage is a big part of courage.
Text.zh: 愤怒赋予胆气。

Text.en: The hunt continues when the prey falls.
Text.zh: 猎物纵死，杀猎不止。

Text.en: Fate's smile, man's ruin.
Text.zh: 命运的微笑，凡人的崩毁。

Text.en:
A gift from Valako,
appointing Kiloava as the Herald of War.
A title Kaom claimed when he ended Kiloava's bloodline.
Text.zh:
一份来自瓦拉库的礼物，
用以任命基洛瓦为战争先锋 
—— 当冈姆灭了基洛瓦一族时所被赐与之名。

Text.en:
A gift from Tasalio, God of Water,
to the chieftain Rakiata.
Kaom took Rakiata's head and hand
so that his warriors' axes might rise and fall like the waves.
Text.zh:
一份来自水神塔萨里奥赐给酋长拉其塔。
冈姆摘下了拉其塔的头颅和双臂，
那双能轻易璀毁冈姆将士们的手臂。

Text.en:
"Likely our closest to the original, yet Prototype #22 still falls short.
Are these objects actually somehow resisting our efforts?"
Text.zh:
“二十二号实验底子大概是最接近原版的作品，但仍有许多不足。
这些东西难道一直在抵抗我们的努力？”

Text.en:
A gift from Ngamahu,
a sign to the Karui to spread like fire.
Given to Akoya, but inherited by Kaom with the swing of his axe.
Text.zh:
一份来自努葛玛呼的礼物，象征卡鲁族如野火般蔓延。
赐与阿寇亚，由冈姆与其凶斧所传承。

Text.en:
The truth lies inside every man, if you dig around. 
Many a confession was found in the bowels of Axiom.
Text.zh:
每个人的背后都藏着一份真实，
只要你挖的够深。
坦白都藏于那真实的最深处。

Text.en:
"The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind. 
A curious paradox."	
- Shavronne of Umbra
Text.zh:
"肉体的苦痛换来清晰的脑袋。
真是个有趣的悖论。"
- 黑影薛朗

Text.en:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often required 
to garnish the perfect confession." 
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom
Text.zh:
“想要取得招供的最好方法，
就是洒点滚烫的液化金属在罪犯身上。”
— 布鲁图斯，典狱长

Text.en:
A sip will freeze your lips,
A swig will chill your heart,
A glass will still your soul.
Text.zh:
浅抿一滴，双唇发紫；
深饮一口，心脏冻结；
干尽一杯，灵魂寂灭。

Text.en:
Some would question if the risk was worth it.
The rest were already dead.
Text.zh:
有些人会质疑冒这风险是否值得。
其他人则早已死去。

Text.en:
As you have lived, so you shall die 
forever trying to keep up with me. 
Your blood on these hands of mine
forever makes me the public enemy.
Text.zh:
你曾活着，但必须死；
唯有如此才能够赶上我的步伐。
我的双手，染满吾血；
即使化为众人之敌也甘之如饴。

Text.en:
A scar of the flesh you'll never forget,
A scar of the mind you'll never remember.
Text.zh:
躯体伤疤，难以忘怀，
心灵创痕，不成罣碍。

Text.en:
The beasts we fear the most
are the ones who dwell in total darkness.
Text.zh: 遁形黑暗之中的猛兽最为让人恐惧。

Text.en:
Far south, the winter crawls under the skin.
Below the snow, adrift wanderers sleep.
Text.zh:
南行千里，徒见凛冽冰原疆域，
下掘三尺，唯有迷途旅者遗躯。

Text.en:
The champions rest now, free from pain,
Their souls ascend to the sun.
Some parting gifts are all that remain,
Their eternal vigil is done.
Text.zh:
英雄们皆已安息，远离伤痛，他们的灵魂已升华进烈阳之中。
永恒的守护已经结束，遗留下的是感谢勇士们的奖励。

Text.en:
In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.
Text.zh:
至辉荣耀，劣境克敌
“不败”怪物终遭天谴
芬多取得毕生最后胜绩。

Text.en:
When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.
Text.zh:
斧刃落下，塞里尔感受到他的剧痛，
他在恍然垂死时只听见
塞里尔凄厉惨烈的哀嚎。

Text.en:
With her cold resolve
And burning sacrifice
The Eternal twins arose.
Text.zh:
她以冷酷坚毅
献上熊熊燔祭
永恒双子，降生落地。

Text.en: That which was broken may yet break.
Text.zh: 往昔战败遭破，来日亦可破敌。

Text.en:
Just an ordinary barrel, used to store sensible objects. 
Not swarms of things.
Text.zh:
只是个平凡的木桶，装着一些世俗之物
绝对，绝对没有一些让人头皮发麻的虫群

Text.en:
"Every life is a story.
If you're not writing your own,
you'd better know who's writing it for you!"
- Victario, the People's Poet
Text.zh:
"人生如戏。倘若写剧本的不是你自己，最好弄清楚谁是执笔之人。"
- 人民诗人维多里奥

Text.en: The brightest flames cast the darkest shadows.
Text.zh: 至耀之炎映照极黯之影。

Text.en: The first light to grow in the primordial darkness.
Text.zh: 太初混沌中的破晓之光。

Text.en:
The best way to gain the element of surprise,
is to let your enemy learn your plans,
and execute them - twice.
Text.zh:
制胜奇袭上策： 
故意暴露欲行战术，
一波攻势未停，一波攻势又起。

Text.en:
Relentless fury
Sunder my every foe
Fuel my boiling blood
Text.zh:
怒火无尽烧夷
燃尽焚毁仇敌，
热血沸腾不息。

Text.en:
"You'll have my riches when you pry them
from my cold, dead hands!"
"That's how I prefer it."
Text.zh: "若你能够窥视我冰冷死亡之手，将获得我的宝藏！ ""这是我喜欢的方法。"

Text.en:
Doryani's ingenuity raised the Vaal Empire
to unprecedented heights. His curiosity
reduced it to ruins and bones.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼精密的设计让瓦尔帝国达到前所未有的高峰。但好奇心使它沦落为遗迹和白骨。

Text.en:
To neither ebb nor flow,
but weather the rising tide,
outlast, unshifting and unshifted,
until the waters recede and we stand together.
Text.zh:
既不随波，亦不逐流
怒浪狂潮来袭，奋身顽抗缠斗
纵历艰苦，永不屈服，
浪涛终将退散，吾等屹立依然。

Text.en:
"All are welcome in Hinekora's eternal home." 
- Karui Proverb
Text.zh: "在辛格拉的永恒之乡，我们来者不拒。"- 卡鲁谚语

Text.en:
As a maiden I was bound; as a crone was I scorned
Promised power rarely found, delivered fury fairly thorned.
Not enough?...Fine. Now I am become both and another
To take your hand and cradle your talents, not smother
The consummate flames. So hush, dear, say not a word. 
Bequeathed, betrayed...beloved. At last, I am the third.
Text.zh:
年少为奴，饱受箝制束缚；今为老妪，吞忍奚落侮辱
不见自由承诺，徒闻百般嘲弄
难道老天还嫌我不够苦?···罢也，如今韶华已逝，年迈将死
且让我扶持你，栽培你，守护你那绝美焰火。
安静，亲爱的，什么都别说。
我曾遭人遗弃出卖…如今终获关爱。
我终成第三人。

Text.en: Master yourself before you seek to master others.
Text.zh: 严以律己才能鞭策他人。

Text.en:
"I like my vassals at sword point,
but my enemies as close as the hilt."
- Emperor Chitus
Text.zh:
"寡人处处提防，就算封臣也得距离一剑之遥，
岂料仇敌宛若剑柄，早已潜伏身旁。"
- 切特斯大帝

Text.en:
Use the dead to stave off death,
An armour of bones and rot.
Hanging on with bated breath,
One lapse and all for naught.
Text.zh:
以亡魂碍阻死亡，
以尸骸护佑己身；
屏息凝神，奋战苦撑，
稍有失误，前功尽沦。

Text.en:
"Further research must be done on Prototype #282.
There is power here, if it can be tapped."
Text.zh:
“二八二号实验底子必须进行进一步研究。
它很有力量，我们必须挖掘出来。”

Text.en:
A sprinkle of hunger, a spoonful of menace
and three generous cups of Might.
Text.zh:
过程宛若烹饪： 撒上一些饥饿，倒入一匙威胁
再加上三杯满满的淫威。

Text.en: To the Maraketh, death is as intimate as love.
Text.zh: 给马拉克斯，死亡等同爱一样亲密。

Text.en:
Guard your darkest thoughts well, for they are
the cracks through which the Nightmare crawls.
Text.zh: 冰晶无瑕，让人心醉神迷，如今仅剩碎片

Text.en:
A shimmering symbol of Purity, clear as water,
but I know better than most how quickly
Purity can succumb to Corruption.
How quickly water turns to blood.
- Victario, the People's Poet
Text.zh:
此为纯净象征，清澈若水
但我比谁都还清楚明白
转瞬之间，纯净成腐败
须臾之时，清溪成血河
- 人民诗人维多里奥

Text.en:
In my dream, a voice spoke to me. It said:
'My reach knows no bounds.
All that is pure is destined to rot.
All that lives is destined to serve.'
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist
Text.zh:
迷梦之际，耳语响起
"吾土无边，吾国无际
纯净之物注定朽腐
天下苍生终为我奴"
- 女王的奇术师多里亚尼

Text.en:
"The Virtue Gems are a gift from the land, 
our land, and we will not let our gifts
be destroyed by savages."
- Marceus Lioneye
Text.zh:
"古灵宝石出自我等故土，
莫让野人毁此珍稀宝物。"
- 马尔赛斯·狮眼

Text.en:
"I ask not for understanding,
only for forgiveness
for what I am about to do.
There will be blood on these shackles yet."
- Anonymous carving, Axiom Prison.
Text.zh:
"我不奢望世人谅解，
唯求上苍赦免我身罪孽；
我即将犯下残酷谬行
让此地枷锁染血。"
- 禁灵之狱内无名刻字

Text.en:
Life persisted,
hardened, twisted.
Text.zh:
大难不死，心境剧变
残酷冷血，病态曲解。

Text.en:
"Energy redirected is energy imbalanced.
Prototype #78 serves as a prime example."
Text.zh:
“既然能量能重导，那能量就不可能平衡。
七十八号实验底子就是铁证。”

Text.en:
A King and his people are linked together
like a soul and a beating heart.
Both can be severed by a same edge, 
then forged anew.
Text.zh:
国王与子人民紧密相连，
宛若灵魂与跳动的心脏。
均能以相同锋刃斩断，
然后重新再造。

Text.en:
In the end, time comes for all of us.
It just comes for some much sooner.
Text.zh: "死亡，不一定恒亘之痛"-黑影薛朗的助手 凯达弗斯

Text.en:
The road to victory is paved
with the bones of the defeated.
Text.zh: 通往胜利的道路，铺满败者的尸骨。

Text.en:
"True Thaumaturgy can only be learned 
by the brilliant or the mad."
- Shavronne of Umbra
Text.zh:
"唯一习得真奇术者
若非旷世奇才，即为疯癫狂徒"
- 黑影薛朗

Text.en:
If you do not learn from a won battle
then you have already lost the war.
Text.zh:
光是打赢战役，而不知从中学习
还是注定一败涂地。

Text.en: A gentle hand rarely leaves a mark on the world.
Text.zh: 温良恭俭者鲜少名流千古。

Text.en:
The shield crab does not leave his shell unless it is forced to, 
and even then, it knows to keep its distance.
Text.zh: 若非万不得已，盾蟹绝不出壳，即便被迫离壳，也会待在附近。

Text.en:
The carpenter who picks up a blade is not mad.
He's ambitious.
Text.zh: 拔刀而战的木匠并非疯汉，他只是不甘平凡。

Text.en:
The Darktongue clan has long let their undead feed at the table
with their slaves, and occasionally on them.
Text.zh:
暗舌氏族总让不死者与奴隶同桌共食
而奴隶有时也会被吞噬。

Text.en: Observe and master your surroundings.
Text.zh: 洞烛机先，掌控局面。

Text.en: A helping hand has long reach.
Text.zh: 及时雨，解万急。

Text.en: Nature provides its own solutions.
Text.zh: 天无绝人之路。

Text.en:
"The swallow flew fast and took many turns,
spilling a seed where no plant had grown before. 
This seed grew and grew until the desert became fertile and abundant. 
Your mind is like this seed." 
- Maraketh Proverb
Text.zh:
“燕鸟疾飞，盘旋不离，
撒落孤种，落入荒地。
盎然生长，终成沃壤。
人心种籽，别无两样。”
— 马拉克斯人谚语

Text.en: Even the strongest of steel can be made to bend.
Text.zh: 纵为至硬坚钢，终得弯折屈让。

Text.en: When the sun sets, the plains should be red.
Text.zh: 日落之际，腥红遍地。

Text.en:
When you get down to it, we're all really just
an unprepared meal for something or someone.
Text.zh:
倘若你自省思索
我等实为俎上之肉，惊慌无措。

Text.en:
The strongest Karui tribes left the longest impressions on the land.
Their symbols served as guidance many generations
after their creators had been buried deep beneath the earth.
Text.zh:
卡鲁部族威震天下，世人难忘其威猛剽悍。
当初创造该族符文的先人虽已亡逝多年，深埋九泉之下，
符文所蕴含的知识却仍旧引导着代代子孙。

Text.en:
When you create life from nothing, 
sometimes things get a little stuck in between.
Text.zh:
无中生有，创造活物，
偶生异怪，半死不生。

Text.en: The strong grow stronger still.
Text.zh: 强者恒强。

Text.en:
When you throw iron weapons against an iron wall
you only make the wall grow thicker.
Text.zh:
掷此铁械，击彼铁壁
深陷不拔，徒厚其壁。

Text.en: Never pet a feeding Hellion.
Text.zh: 地狱犬进食，切勿招惹。

Text.en: It's hard to stay still when you're engulfed in flames.
Text.zh: 身陷滔天火海，实难从容自在。

Text.en:
"Does this jewel accomplish nothing? If only we could somehow
master cold and turn it to our own ends..." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret
Text.zh:
“难道这个珠宝什么都做不到？
如果我们能主导冷却，并实现我们的结果……”——研究主管科萨雷

Text.en: The hotter something burns, the less is left at the end.
Text.zh: 烧得越烈，剩得越少。

Text.en: Ill will is the greatest of burdens.
Text.zh: 憎恨乃是最沉重的包袱。

Text.en: In sickness, the insane becomes sane.
Text.zh: 常人愈病愈昏瞑，疯人越病越清醒。

Text.en:
And lo, Nick said unto his disciples:
"It May Be Crazy Broken"
And his disciples replied
"Meh"
And made it anyway.
Text.zh:
看啊，尼克对门徒们说：
“这东西已经无可救药。”
徒弟们却说：
“呸”
照样把它做了出来。

Text.en:
The first green shoots of Spring are the most resilient,
and the most vulnerable.
Text.zh:
春来首发绿芽
不是最为顽强，就是最为脆弱。

Text.en: "Distribute Prototype #723 to the guards. Perhaps their survival rate will increase."
Text.zh: “把七二三号实验底子分发给守卫。他们的生还率应该能提高了。”

Text.en:
The difference between the master and his apprentice
is what they see when they look at the same block of wood.
Text.zh:
师徒之别，存乎怀中
共察一木，所念各迥。

Text.en:
"If one is an annoyance
then a hundred is a threat."
- Ancient Karui Proverb
Text.zh:
“一敌侵扰，不足为惧
百军压境，灭族在即。”
— 卡鲁族古谚

Text.en: Each life taken makes the next a little easier.
Text.zh: 每败一人，愈发嗜血。

Text.en:
"Take your time, make all your plans. 
Then tell me which plan
pulls my axe from your ribs."
- Barkhul, the Butcher
Text.zh:
“别急别急，好好策画诡计。
我的斧头卡在你肋骨里
你先抽出来，再说说你有何诡计。”
— 屠夫巴尔克霍

Text.en: When your thoughts flow like a river, why build a dam?
Text.zh: 思绪既如江流，何患筑坝自囚?

Text.en:
"Curiously, as I deepen my understanding of Thaumaturgy,
I find I better understand the land we inhabit
and everything in it."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist
Text.zh:
“奇焉伟哉，吾愈发深谙奇术，
愈发了解所居之地，地上万物。”
— 多里亚尼，女王的奇术师

Text.en: Some people live on the suffering of others.
Text.zh: 有些家伙就是靠折磨他人维生。

Text.en: Working smart and working hard aren't mutually exclusive.
Text.zh: 勤奋不懈者亦可事半功倍。

Text.en:
Picking a lock takes an immense amount of skill and practice.
Breaking it with a hammer takes about three seconds.
Text.zh:
如欲解锁，必须技高一筹，勤练百回。
如欲毁锁，仅需榔头一把，短短三秒。

Text.en:
"Greatly outnumbered, Deshret dressed her personal guard 
in identical garb. When the Empire rode north, Deshret and 
her guard took turns revealing themselves, creating the illusion 
of speed beyond the capabilities of even the Virtue Gems."
- History of the Maraketh
Text.zh:
"迪虚瑞特心知双方兵力悬殊，所以便把贴身护卫打扮得跟她一模一样。
正当帝国军发兵北伐，迪虚瑞特与护卫轮番在敌人面前现身，
彷佛她神速穿梭战场，更胜古灵宝石威力，成功创造欺敌假象。"
- 马拉克斯人史录

Text.en: There is no force without movement.
Text.zh: 力量绝不静蛰。

Text.en:
The Vaal used human sacrifice to power their empire.
They, too, eventually sought means to 
make their machines run more efficiently.
Text.zh:
瓦尔人以活人献祭，祈求天佑帝国。
但最终还是背弃神祈，全心改良战争机械。

Text.en:
Atziri went to great lengths to ensure her immortality,
but nothing is eternal.
Text.zh: 阿兹里费尽多年心血，力求长生不死，奈何万物终有穷尽。

Text.en:
In their final days, every crime was punishable by death.
Atziri's empire ran on blood, but the blood was running dry.
Text.zh: 罪愆之罚，即为灭亡。阿兹里以杀戮流血巩固帝国，奈何血已渐渐流尽。

Text.en: A sharp eye can be more deadly than a sharp blade.
Text.zh: 明眼致命，尤胜利刃。

Text.en: A steady hand can hold back an army.
Text.zh: 一夫当关，退敌奋战。

Text.en: A quick step can advance great plans.
Text.zh: 夺得先机，势在必得。

Text.en: The stone may yet bleed.
Text.zh: 这颗宝石可能也会淌血。

Text.en: "The effect is subtle, but potentially lethal..."
Text.zh: “效果很微妙，潜能很致命……”

Text.en: What you earn is almost as important as what you take.
Text.zh: 既须强取豪夺，亦须苦耕收获。

Text.en: Victory is as simple as being the last one standing.
Text.zh: 何为胜者?答案很简单。就是最后屹立不倒之人。

Text.en:
Even a millennium later, Atziri's presence
casts a shroud over Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
即使千年过后，阿兹里的存在
依然为瓦尔克拉斯带来死亡阴霾。

Text.en:
"The Vaal left a thousand warnings behind.
We ignored every single one."
- Siosa, the Last Scholar
Text.zh:
“瓦尔人种种警告言犹在耳。
只是我们一概充耳未闻。”
— 萨欧赛，末代学者

Text.en:
Few living things survived the cleansing flames.
Those that did thrived... 
And changed...
Text.zh:
净化火炎烧夷，活物幸存无几
终得生生不息…发生变异…

Text.en: Darkness can never be sated.
Text.zh: 黑暗势力永不平息。

Text.en:
There is no price you can give eternal life
that some would not pay.
Text.zh:
永生若有代价
人人皆愿支付。

Text.en: Nothing is immune to the Nightmare's twisted influence.
Text.zh: 这场梦魇的影响无远弗届，所有生物都难逃异变。

Text.en: Beg for forgiveness.
Text.zh: 苦苦哀求，愿得饶恕。

Text.en: Power always comes with a price.
Text.zh: 若欲追求力量，总得付出代价。

Text.en:
"You know what to do with this, don't you?" - Researcher Graven
"Kill test subjects for their vitality?" - Researcher Olesya
"That is not what he meant." - Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“知道自己要做什么吗？”——研究员葛拉文
“杀了实验对象汲取生命力？”——研究员奥莱西亚
“他不是这个意思。”——研究员阿恩

Text.en: Walls built in a hurry fall in a hurry.
Text.zh: 猝成之墙，转瞬倾亡。

Text.en: "Your fear will overcome you."
Text.zh: "你的恐惧将击溃你。"

Text.en: "Your flesh will fail you."
Text.zh: "你的躯体将辜负你。"

Text.en: "Your desires will mislead you."
Text.zh: "你的欲望将误导你。"

Text.en:
Forged by three brothers
so that they may recognize each other
across any distance of time or travel.
Text.zh: 此戒由三兄弟合力铸造，即便物换星移，辗转流离，他们终究能以此相认。

Text.en: The best dancers often make the best fighters.
Text.zh: 舞艺最为高超之人，往往武艺最为卓绝。

Text.en:
Winter provides us with her own weapons,
hanging from the eaves of our homes.
Text.zh: 隆冬赐予世人兵器，垂于家家屋檐之下。

Text.en:
Leaders are not born in times of peace.
Leaders are born in ruins and flames.
Text.zh: 太平盛代无豪杰，烽火乱世生枭雄。

Text.en: "I've yet to see prayer stop an arrow."
Text.zh: "用祷告挡下飞箭?我还真没见过"

Text.en:
The Azmeri ascetics learnt the power
of going without the body's ordinary cravings.
Text.zh: 阿兹莫里苦行者学会摆脱肉体的常见欲念。

Text.en:
Once you understand how your body truly works
you can't help but treat it better.
Text.zh: 一旦真正了解身体的运作方式，你就会更加善待自己的身体。

Text.en:
"Movement expends energy, but perhaps a little of that energy
can be recaptured and... reappropriated."
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh: "动能可增强能量，但或许能重获少数能量··加以重新分配。"- 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en: For the ambitious, flesh is a limitation.
Text.zh: 对于野心勃勃之人，肉体仅为局限束缚。

Text.en: True strength can be found anywhere, and in anything.
Text.zh: 真正的力量处处可见，存乎万物。

Text.en: The toughest armour is the trust of your people.
Text.zh: 信任你的人民将成为你最坚固的护具。

Text.en:
A tap on the shoulder
A peck on the cheek
A sip of your wine
So red and so sleek
Text.zh:
拍肩，
啄颈，
啜酒，
红润滑顺之酒

Text.en:
"I'm a painter, and crimson is my chosen hue."
- Coralito, Brotherhood of Silence
Text.zh:
"吾乃画者，深红为吾所选择之颜料"
- 寂静联盟克拉里多

Text.en:
"Prototype #131 must never be allowed near anyone who bears a wound, no
matter how slight. Even a tiny cut makes it exponentially more dangerous."
Text.zh:
“一三一号实验底子不能靠近任何伤者，再小的伤都不行。
哪怕擦伤都能变得十分危险，成指数级增长。”

Text.en:
The Goat King drank the smoke and ate the flames
as his ruin spread across the land.
Text.zh: 山羊王饮烟食焰，其残体蔓延大地。

Text.en:
"God's creations always begin and end
with flames and ice.
We should count ourselves lucky when we see neither."
- Archbishop Geofri
Text.zh:
"冰，火，上帝创造之万物始末。两者皆未见，吾辈该感到幸运。"
- 大教主吉尔菲

Text.en:
There are two things to know about fighting:
When to swing like crazy, and when to run.
Text.zh: 战斗两项要领： 适时狂攻，适时逃跑。

Text.en:
The thicker the shell,
the greater the beast that hunts it.
Text.zh: 壳越厚重，吸引越巨大之野兽。

Text.en:
The fastest way to a man's heart
is through his sternum.
Text.zh: 直达男人心脏最快速的通道就是通过他的胸版。

Text.en:
Beneath the cold light of the moon,
the wing moves faster than the eye.
Text.zh: 冰冷月光下，疾风快于眼。

Text.en:
"She's pretty, aye. So pretty you'll
want to be with her long after you're dead."
Text.zh: "她的美丽让人死后都无法离开"

Text.en:
"May the Blessed Lakishu watch our backs and our wives."
- Legionnaire Battle Blessing
Text.zh:
"愿神圣的莱奇苏保佑吾等与发妻。"
- 军团战斗祝福

Text.en:
Sure, there's many a hard man out there.
But this'll soften them up.
Text.zh:
世上确有顽强者众。
此物定能使其屈服。

Text.en:
"The painful memories are the easiest to recall."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
“伤痛回忆，最难忘记。”
— 拉维安加，冈姆参谋

Text.en:
I suffer, I long, with thirst to slake.
Though countless corpses lie in wake.
Text.zh:
我饱受磨砺，但又充满希冀。
即使前路坎坷深渊万丈，我依旧前行。

Text.en:
When the storm comes,
the safest place to be is the centre.
Text.zh: 暴风之眼，寂静安宁。

Text.en:
To the east, 
it cannot be seen.
To the west,
