it cannot be touched.
To the south, 
it cannot be remembered.
And to the north, 
it cannot be contained.
Text.zh:
往东，你看不见它
往西，你摸不着它
往南，你记不得它
往北，你留不住它

Text.en: For every threat you spy in the shadows, there are two others you don't.
Text.zh: 威胁在即，暗中刺探，奈何总是察此疏彼。

Text.en:
<smaller>{They fought the storm together as one, 
Until the longest of days was done. 
Their love grew stronger
with every breath, 
Until it was broken apart in death.}
Text.zh:
他们合而为一抵抗最强大的暴风，直到最漫长的日子结束。
随着每一次的呼吸气息，他们的爱情变得更加深厚，
直到死亡将他们分离。

Text.en: The hermit's only friend is the greenery he can find.
Text.zh: 隐士独立于世，唯有绿枝青叶相伴。

Text.en: "They said I needed my head examined, but I'd rather just take yours." - Klopek the Cannibal
Text.zh: "大家说我脑袋有问题，需要检查一下，但我比较想先砍下你的脑袋检查。"- 食人族克洛培克

Text.en: <size:31>{A month's work, a year's wages, a foolish shortcut through a Rhoa's nest, and a grieving bride-to-be, who never received her betrothed's great gift.}
Text.zh: 仅需一月走险，得抵终年薪资。他走上快捷方式，穿越恐喙鸟巢穴，实在愚蠢至极。最后徒留准新娘哀悼，未婚夫的贵礼从未送到。

Text.en: "No man can best me, no demon can fell me. For I vanquish all with my axe!"
Text.zh: "凡人恶魔，皆败于我，我斧披靡，所向无敌！ "

Text.en:
The thumb turns down
and the crowd roars, 
they want death 
and the blood is yours.
Text.zh:
当那拇指朝下
观众狂吼轰然，
全场渴切杀戮。
唯你流血受难。

Text.en: It is with the smallest of words that we find the largest of truths.
Text.zh: 至微话语蕴含至伟真理。

Text.en:
<size:31>{"When Voll spared Malachai, accepting his aid in pursuit of Purity, the strongest faith was infected by Corruption and made brittle as glass."
- Victario, the People's Poet}
Text.zh: "当福尔饶恕玛拉凯，让他协助进行【净化】，最坚定的信念便已遭受腐化，变得如玻璃般易碎。"- 人民诗人维多

Text.en:
<size:27>{God had forsaken the land 
And Victario wept.
Corruption consumed the land 
And Victario's tears turned to blood.}
Text.zh:
神已遗弃此地
维多淌泪哀泣
腐败吞噬大地
维多纵已泪竭，仍泣血不止。

Text.en:
From death, life. 
From life, death. 
The wheel turns, 
and the corbies wheel overhead.
Text.zh:
从生到死。
由死至生。
轮轴转动，
乌鸦盘旋。

Text.en: <size:31>{The others succumbed to madness and depravity, but Lori fought on. Alone in the darkness, she could still see the dull light of hope's distant dawn.}
Text.zh: 尽管他人已疯狂堕落，罗瑞依然奋战不懈。她独处黑暗之中，仍可望见希望的遥远暮光。

Text.en:
<size:31>{Your era is now,
your power unwavered, 
soon we will see
who the gods truly favoured.}
Text.zh:
现今你称霸为王，
你的力量丝毫未减，
但我们即将见识到，
谁才是众神所眷顾之人。

Text.en: A small token of Her affliction.
Text.zh: 折磨苦难，略见一斑。

Text.en: You can change your name, but you cannot change your history.
Text.zh: 人名能更替修改，人生却无法重来。

Text.en: To own a piece of the Nightmare, you must first belong to the Nightmare.
Text.zh: 为驾驭恶梦之力，你必须先成为恶梦。

Text.en: <size:27>{The mighty warriors traded in blows, the nimble archers in arrows, yet it was the brazen thaumaturgists who would bring catastrophe to all.}
Text.zh: 强大战士刀剑相击，敏捷弓手箭海交射，为世人带来浩劫的却是无耻的奇术师。

Text.en:
"How many lives have you consumed?" 
"How many times have you blinked?"
Text.zh:
【你夺走多少生命?】
【你已眨眼了几回?】

Text.en: "More! I want more!" - Faendris, the Insatiable
Text.zh: "还不够！ 我想要更多！ "- 贪得无厌的范德利斯

Text.en: The finer the brew, the harder it is to remember drinking it.
Text.zh: 美酒酿得越是醇香，饮者越是酩酊遗忘。

Text.en: <size:31>{Each night, the light dies, and each morning she is born anew, embracing the land in her golden wings.}
Text.zh: 光明夜夜死去，日日重生，以金色羽翼拥抱大地。

Text.en: <size:31>{Brutus' first innovation as Lord Incarcerator was a weighted chain around every neck so that his prisoners would forever bow to him.}
Text.zh: 布鲁特斯身为典狱长的头号创举，就是在所有囚犯颈部缠上沉重铁链，这样囚犯无时无刻都会向他低头鞠躬。

Text.en: The earth offers nourishment, growth and healing. Unless, of course, the sky has other plans.
Text.zh: 大地让万物滋养茁壮，休养生息，除非上天另有安排。

Text.en:
With staff in hand
and wrath in heart,
your soul and corpse
shall surely part.
Text.zh:
法杖在手
怒火在心，
灵魂身躯
分离注定。

Text.en: In the hands of a master craftsman, a worthless pebble can adorn the crown of a king.
Text.zh: 经过工匠大师巧手，区区卵石也可成为皇冠饰物。

Text.en: "I don't believe in karma. If it were real, I would never win."
Text.zh: "我不相信报应。若真有报应，恶人如我绝不可能获胜。"

Text.en: <size:26>{"I wanted to give you three things. I've given you my eternal love. I've sung to you my most beautiful song. I'd have given you the moon last, but it couldn't be found. I hope you'll accept this instead."}
Text.zh: "我想送你三件事物。我已经给你无穷爱意，更以最优美的歌曲赞颂你，甚至还想把明月献给你，可惜我做不到。所以我以此代替，希望你能悦纳。"

Text.en: Life isn't what you make of it, it's already been made for you.
Text.zh: 你无从开创人生，一切早有定数。

Text.en: A beacon on the horizon; a guiding light, a call for help, or a warning to turn back.
Text.zh: 海天一线处，强光乍现，或为指引方向，或为发声呼救，或为警告勿回。

Text.en:
Justice comes swift 
Equal to the crime 
Revenge is a gift 
Life for a life 
Eye for an eye
Text.zh:
正义迅得伸张
新罪接踵而至
复仇雪恨，如获至宝
以命偿命，以眼还眼

Text.en: The house always wins.
Text.zh: 胜者总为王族。

Text.en:
Each time, it is granted to the most senior captain of the fleet,
and each time, the ring soon washes ashore once more, 
still wrapped around a severed finger.
Text.zh: 每次都给予最资深的船队队长，每次又很快的连着手指被冲刷至岸边。

Text.en:
To ascend to leadership, the child of a Redblade warlord
must pull the band from the still-hot
ashes of their father.
Text.zh: 成为首领之路，红刃霸主的小孩必须要将此环从父亲滚烫的骨灰中拿出。

Text.en:
When a fallen leader's body is taken to the funeral peak,
those who seek power must ascend together.
One returns with the seal. 
The rest do not return at all.
Text.zh:
殒落首领被送去殡葬之峰时，渴望权利者必须随行而上。
一位将会带着辉纹返回，其他将再也无法返回。

Text.en: The lords of the sea bow to no one.
Text.zh: 海之领主不向任何人低头。

Text.en: Blood shed is blood shared.
Text.zh: 流血等同分享血液。

Text.en: Embrace the snow or be buried.
Text.zh: 信奉白雪或被白雪掩埋。

Text.en: The light of victory burns eternally.
Text.zh: 胜利光芒永远的燃烧。

Text.en: Time cannot wash away that which cannot be forgotten.
Text.zh: 若为无从忘怀之事，谅时间也无从冲淡。

Text.en: Luck is a fool's game, and I know plenty of rich fools.
Text.zh: 会赌运气的都是蠢才，而我就认识不少有钱的蠢材。

Text.en: Shame what happened to my husband. He had such good taste.
Text.zh: 夫君的遭遇让人遗憾，他生前很讲究美食的。

Text.en:
<size:27>{Fire filled the sky that night 
Chaos reigned 
Where the shards fell 
All was destroyed 
-Jozen Kasigi, retelling an urban legend of the Cataclysm}
Text.zh:
当夜烈焰弥天，一片混乱
碎片掉落之处，全数毁灭殆尽
-乔森卡西吉，重述巨变的都市传奇

Text.en:
<size:31>{Strange eyes on top of spines 
Gaze beyond the veil of time 
Deep down below the mines 
A dream of crimson and of grime}
Text.zh:
冠刺顶端的诡异眼球
看穿时空迷蒙
矿场的地底深处尚有
绯红的尘封之梦

Text.en: When there is no other choice, even the meekest whisper can bring about the greatest storm.
Text.zh: 别无选择之时，最温和的耳语都能引发最强烈的风暴。

Text.en: A taste of power brings a hunger for more.
Text.zh: 一尝权力滋味，对其更加饥渴。

Text.en: <size:31>{500 times Kaom's axe fell, 500 times Kaom's Heart splintered. Finally, all that remained was a terrible, heartless Fury.}
Text.zh: <size:31>{冈姆战斧落下五百回，冈姆之心碎裂五百回，最后仅剩丧心病狂的骇人忿怒。}

Text.en: When the world burned, the greedy burned with it, while the clever left as paupers.
Text.zh: 全世界熊熊焚烧，贪婪之徒葬身火海，幸存的灵巧之辈落魄潦倒。

Text.en: <size:33>{Weaving through the cracks, searching for weaknesses, silent, indiscriminate, leaving sorrow in its wake.}
Text.zh: 极速转向，飞穿裂缝，攻其破绽，低声出击，人人皆杀。箭所及处，徒留伤悲。

Text.en: "On this day I mark the first of many agreements that I will have with this land and its people."
Text.zh: "我今日首度与这块土地与其上居民作出协议。"

Text.en: <size:29>{"I swore to use my position to help the people. What good is power when it just accumulates on the already-powerful?" - Erasmus, Imperial Gemcutter}
Text.zh:
<size:29>{“我发誓将以敝职助人。有能力之人若只是让权贵更加强大，那能力有何意义?”
— 伊拉斯玛斯，帝国珠宝匠}

Text.en: Wrapped in the glory of the heavens, she comes to mete out justice for the fallen.
Text.zh: 她有天庭荣光护体，为阵亡将士伸张正义。

Text.en: Scarier than any criminal is an innocent man in chains, for when he breaks free, his revenge will be justified.
Text.zh: 无辜之人身陷囹圄，比任何罪犯入狱还要可怖。因为将来他重获自由之时，他就能名正言顺展开复仇。

Text.en: "Paint, metal, flesh... A true artist does not limit himself." - Malachai the Soulless
Text.zh: "颜料，金属，血肉…真正的艺术家不会限制自己使用什么素材。" - 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en:
Jump right in, 
But beware 
Of things broken 
Or beyond compare.
Text.zh:
立刻投身创造吧
但请务必留意
毁坏破损之物
无与伦比之物。

Text.en: Become the leader you were born to be.
Text.zh: 你生来就是领袖，呼应天命吧。

Text.en:
Turn the crank, 
close your eyes, 
and pray to the gods 
for a pleasant surprise.
Text.zh:
转动曲柄，
闭上双眼，
向众神默祷 
祈求愉悦惊喜。

Text.en:
On the 21st of Eterni, 
two become one, 
their light outshines 
the setting sun.
Text.zh:
恒历二十一日，
两人合而为一，
屋中灯光明耀，
更胜落日余晖。

Text.en:
The power of the world, 
lies upon your hands.
Text.zh: 世间权力，尽在掌中
人性的力量啊

Text.en: A map is only useful if you know where you stand.
Text.zh: 仅管手握地图，却只有在知道自己身在何处，才有用处。

Text.en: A boy who grows up with everything learns to appreciate nothing.
Text.zh: 一个坐拥一切长大的孩子长大了永远不会心存感激。

Text.en: It's sad times we live in when a friendship has a price people are willing to pay.
Text.zh: 这是个友情需要用钱来购买的可悲时代。

Text.en:
Sturdy and strong,
grown from the stream.
The Flora that live here,
A combatant's dream.
Text.zh:
强壮勇猛，
顺流而来，
此地之卉，
吾士之志。

Text.en:
<size:26>{At the beck and call
of The Siren's hand,
winter ravages
the trembling land,
and the weight of ice that binds
will break the strongest of minds.}
Text.zh:
唯命是从，
海妖之手，
寒冬肆虐，
大地撼动，
积冰沉重，
能摧毁最坚强的意志。

Text.en:
<size:26>{Embrace death to honour the lost,
no fear in life no matter the cost. 
With one of all we are, 
and all of one we trust, 
throughout past, present and future... be just.}
Text.zh:
接受死亡，纪念逝者
生无畏惧，不计代价。
我们各为个体，
我们全都相信，
过往，现今与未来···正义得以伸张。

Text.en: The strongest emerge from suffering. The toughest bear the most scars. The sole survivor claims the greatest of rewards.
Text.zh: 苦难逆境者意志最坚强。伤疤最多者体魄最强健。唯一幸存者收获最丰硕。

Text.en: "Hold your tongue before I claim it." - Doedre Darktongue
Text.zh: "在我夺走你的舌头之前，闭嘴顾好你的舌头"- 暗语者德瑞

Text.en: No matter where your dreams take you, Nightmare follows close behind.
Text.zh: 无论梦想引你至何处，恶梦总是紧随其后。

Text.en: <size:31>{"Daughter of catastrophe, mother of pain. Amongst the filth of Wraeclast, she wanders, and her wrath follows." - Quintoon the Returned}
Text.zh: "她是浩劫之女，苦痛之母，在瓦尔克拉斯的秽物中徘徊。她的岔怒将接踵而来。" - 重生之灵昆顿

Text.en:
<size:25>{"To know for what you fight. To get up again when you've been struck down. To outmanoeuvre someone faster, trick someone smarter, crush someone stronger. That's what it takes to claim the crown."
- Daresso, the King of Swords}
Text.zh: "要了解自己为何而战，要屡败屡战，智取更为迅捷之人，骗过更为聪慧之人，击溃更强大之人。欲得皇冠，便须如此。"- 斗剑之王德瑞索

Text.en:
Those Theopolis fatcats put a price on our heads.
Let's see what they'll pay for their own.
Text.zh: 费欧普罗斯的胖猫们悬赏我们的首级。让我们看看他们自己的首级值多少。

Text.en:
Corruption sweeps across this land,
but our bloodline is clear.
It is our duty to keep it so.
Text.zh: 腐化散遍此地，我们的血族确保持清澈。这是我们的职责。

Text.en:
Our home was swallowed beneath 
the great mountain for our complacency. 
Now we must prove our value to the Molten One 
by sating his hunger for life.
Text.zh: 家园被我们自满之山吞噬。现在必须满足熔岩者对生命的饥渴来证明我们的价值。

Text.en:
The problem with working fresh trolltimber:
by the time you've carved out one end, 
the other has sprouted fresh roots!
Text.zh: 使用新鲜松木的大问题，当你完成一头的刻凿时，另一头已经长出新根！

Text.en:
His flesh had long turned to dust,
but his vengeance lived on
in every scrap of iron he touched.
Text.zh: 虽然他的血肉之躯已成灰烬，但他的复仇之心在每一片触碰过的金属中活着。

Text.en:
A lightless world
a silent reign
two sightless eyes
feed on your pain.
Text.zh:
无光之界，
无声之域，
一双无视线的眼睛，
啃食着你的痛楚。

Text.en:
My heart forces blood through my veins.
But one who may bleed may die, and
death is no fitting end to genius.
Text.zh: 我的心脏迫使着血液在血管中流动。但任何会流血之物皆会死。死亡不是天才的终点。

Text.en:
My lungs breathe the same air as
the foolish and the weak. May I be
yet another step removed from them.
Text.zh: 我的肺和傻子，弱者吸着同样的空气。让我来完成除去他们的步骤。

Text.en:
My organs tether me to mortality
like a chain. This chain holds me
from my true potential.
Text.zh: 我的器官使我和死亡连接。这阻碍了我真实的力量。

Text.en:
"The belly cannot hunger for what the eyes cannot see."
 - Karui Proverb
Text.zh:
“看不到的东西就吃不着。”
 - 卡鲁谚语

Text.en:
"One day you eat the fish. One day you feed the fish."
 - Karui Proverb
Text.zh:
“再强大的猎人，也终有一日会变成猎物。”
— 卡鲁谚语

Text.en:
"What we steal in life we repay in death."
 - Karui Proverb
Text.zh:
“生前犯下的罪孽需在死后偿还。”
 - 卡鲁谚语

Text.en:
An angry god is one thing, 
but you should really fear a god 
with an unpredictable sense of humour.
Text.zh: 神的愤怒是一回事，但你应该害怕神无法预测的幽默感。

Text.en: Leave the world in flames behind you.
Text.zh: 焚烧你身后的世界。

Text.en:
"The flames raced through Lab Five with incredible speed, but were extinguished
just as quickly. This could have been much worse." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret
Text.zh:
“火焰迅速掠过五号实验室，但很快被扑灭。
原本结果会更糟。”——研究主管科萨雷

Text.en:
What drives us to kill, to carve and to shred?
What drives us to drink the seething souls of the dead?
What drives us to love and to hold, but still go amiss?
What drives us to leave this world for the Abyss?
Text.zh:
是什么让我们杀戮，追猎? 
是什么让我们渴求喝下亡者的灵魂? 
是什么让我们珍惜，却又在流亡? 
是什么让我们远离尘世，坠入深渊?

Text.en:
"Test subject was able to survive the entire process simply by shouting epithets at
the researcher. Researcher's feelings were slightly injured." 
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh: “实验对象只要朝研究员吼出绰号就能轻松活过整个实验。这让研究员的感情有些受伤。”——研究员葛拉文

Text.en: Work in progress
Text.zh: 真正的勇气在于对自己的克制。

Text.en:
To fight an enemy on their lands is a tactical mistake. 
Make those lands your own, and the mistake becomes theirs.
Text.zh:
在敌人的领地作战是个重大的失策。
将领地占为己有，那么失策的就是敌人了。

Text.en: Be not blinded by the light.
Text.zh: 光采，不夺目。

Text.en:
A man who changes his loyalties often,
soon finds he has none.
Text.zh: 一个不断转换忠诚的人，很快就会失去忠诚。

Text.en:
Let blood sear in your veins, 
Let the pain push outwards and turn away your enemy's blows.
Text.zh:
让你的血液在血管中沸腾
让肉体的痛楚挥发，将敌人的攻击化为乌有

Text.en:
The First Ones stalk with us
upon this lifelong hunt,
and cast their contempt
upon those that would make us their prey.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代紧跟着我们
伴随着我们世代的狩猎
并对将我们视为猎物的敌人
降下最恶毒的咒怨
- 狼王

Text.en:
The civilised man must wrestle
with the demands of heart and mind.
The First Ones share no such struggle.
For their Spirit is swift and deadly certain.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
文明人的战斗
用的是对于心智的需求
而初代们毫无此烦恼
他们的灵魂是果断，迅速的
- 狼王

Text.en:
The fire of the hearth is a docile dog,
leashed and tamed.
The fire of the First Ones is a ravening wolf,
wild and free.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
内心的火像条中犬，
温驯地戴着项圈。
初代的火像条狂狼，
充满野性而自由。
- 狼王

Text.en:
The First Ones thundered over Ezomyr
upon hooves of grey and black.
The people felt their stamping rage
and cowered as the fury rained down.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代如雷般地踏过
古艾兹麦的寸土
人们感受着他们充满怒火的踏蹄
在怒气的笼罩之下俯首
- 狼王

Text.en:
We have basked in the cloying warmth of servitude.
Now the First Ones harden us
against the numbing chill of despair
so that freedom will not slip through our trembling fingers.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
我们在服侍中得到了如阳光般地温暖
如今初代将我们砥砺
成为能抵抗绝望的酷寒的人们
来防止自由从我们颤抖的手指之间流逝
- 狼王

Text.en:
I stood among the stones
And called out to the First Ones;
That with tooth and mighty claw,
They should tear our enemies asunder.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
我伫立石阵中央
并唤醒了初代的灵魂
他们尖锐的利牙和强壮的爪子
必将使敌人成为碎片
- 狼王

Text.en:
The Empire poisons our blood with sweet wine.
Poisons our flesh with silk.
Poisons our minds with civil lies.
Poisons our children with servitude.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
帝国用美酒在我们的血液中下毒
用丝绸毒化我们的躯体
用文明的谎言毒化我们的心智
用奴役毒化我们的子孙
- 狼王

Text.en:
'Sleep when you are weary,' our mothers told us.
'Sleep when you are dead,' our fathers told us.
To the First Ones, the slumbering and the corpse
are one and the same.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
妈妈说，有警觉再入睡
爸爸说，死亡时才能入睡
对初代来说，酣睡的和死亡的人
完全没有差别
- 狼王

Text.en:
To catch a big fish you need tempting bait. 
And there is no fish bigger than the Empire,
and no bait as tempting as Ezomyr.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
想抓大鱼，就必须使用诱人的饵
而没有什么鱼比帝国来得更大了
而没有什么饵比艾兹麦更诱人了
- 狼王

Text.en:
Shackled fires dance about;
Might within from force without.
Text.zh:
围攻的火焰群聚
团结之力为外力而生

Text.en:
The prisoners of the empire raised their shackled hands.
Begging to be delivered from Corruption.
The rebellion smote their chains,
And gave them the freedom to choose corruption for themselves.
Text.zh:
帝国里的罪犯们举起上铐的双手
乞求着能远离腐化
而反抗军断开了他们的锁链
给予他们选择腐化的自由

Text.en:
Ondar not only betrayed his emperor,
He betrayed his friend.
And in his dying moments, Chitus ensured,
That Ondar felt the full weight of his guilt.
Text.zh:
恩德不仅背叛了自己的军王
更背叛了自己的朋友
在他临死时，切特斯扬言
恩德亲身体会了他罪恶的深重

Text.en:
With a fire burning brash in his golden eye,
Marceus fired his arrow into the pitch-dark sky,
And seared the hope of surprise,
From Kaom's skulking horde.
Text.zh:
他金黄色双眼中燃烧的烈火
穆希尔斯朝着漆黑的天空射出箭矢
将冈姆暗藏的伏兵们的
奇袭的希望抹灭殆尽

Text.en:
The Sekhema rode to the mountain,
With her tribe, devoted and strong.
And sewed shut the mouth of nightmare,
So that it would not consume her world.
Text.zh:
丝克玛的人民攀上深山
与部落一同成长，茁壮
将梦魇之门牢牢阖上
让世界得以不被其所吞噬

Text.en:
Maligaro understood that devotion to science,
Means devotion to trial and error.
For Maligaro's errors, death was slow,
And very painful.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗懂得科学的进步在于牺牲
也就是对试炼和错误的执着
马雷格罗的错误里，死亡极为缓慢
并且十分痛苦

Text.en:
Our forefathers danced and drank and ate their fill
and did not honour the First Ones for their gifts.
So the First Ones filled the sky with fire.
Text.zh:
我们的先祖们尽情饮酒狂欢
毫不重视初代所留下的礼物
因此初代将天空布满了火焰

Text.en:
After the Great Fire, the land lay barren
and our forefathers grew weak.
Mother Gull took pity on them
and gave them grain and water.
Text.zh:
大火之后，大地贫瘠
我们的先祖开始衰颓
迷雾之母怜悯着他们
因此赋予了水和谷物

Text.en:
But the grain grew twisted and the water turned dark
and those who partook of Mother Gull's gift
birthed monsters that fed 
on the flesh of one another.
Text.zh:
但谷物开始扭曲，水开始变黑
而那些受迷雾之母恩赐的人们
生出了一群群的怪物
只能同类相食的可悲怪物们

Text.en: You cannot journey to new lands until you have the courage to leave the safety of home.
Text.zh: 直到你提起勇气远离家乡，你才有办法远征异土。

Text.en: "Axes and mauls are so uncivilised. A good clean cut to the neck with a sharp blade, that's the Sarn way!"
Text.zh: "斧头和锤子?尽是些蛮人的武器… 从脖子干净利落的一刀割下脑袋，这才是萨恩的风格！ "

Text.en: What do you see in the mirror?
Text.zh: 你在镜中看见什么?

Text.en: <size:31>{The greatness of a man is not in how much wealth or power he acquires, but in his integrity and his ability to positively affect those around him.}
Text.zh: 人的伟大之处不在于他所拥有的财富，而是在于他的品性，以及他影响周围事物的能力。

Text.en: Simple actions can lead the world to an early grave.
Text.zh: 一个微小的举动也有可能带领世界走向灭亡。

Text.en:
<size:30>{Can you hear the siren's calls,
Just beyond the sea?
A voice which hearts
of men enthralls,
I too am hooked to thee.}
Text.zh:
你是否听见了那迷人的呼唤
就在那大海的彼端
一个深入人心
掳获所有男人的魅曲
而我，也已经深深陷入。

Text.en:
Our Lady Dialla,
as a symbol of our progress,
shines greater than all the gems.
Text.zh:
我们的达拉夫人
是显示我们进步的标志
即使是宝石，也不比她的光芒来得耀眼

Text.en: They say when a dragon dies, the flesh smoulders and burns until all that remains is the still, white-hot, heart.
Text.zh: 传说当龙殒命之时，它的血肉将会溶解，只剩下一颗炽热的心脏。

Text.en:
"Masters of wit, strength and cunning. To survive the harsh winters, you must be like the fox."
- Ezomyte Proverb
Text.zh:
"要在寒冷的冬天求生，你必须有像狐狸般的智慧，狡猾以及力量。"
- 艾兹麦族方言

Text.en: Upon seeing her face, I am terrified—the moon shows me my own form!
Text.zh: 看见他的脸我真的吓坏了－月光反射出了我真实的面貌。

Text.en:
A lucky number 
For us all 
To help us through 
The perils told.
Text.zh:
一个幸运数字
从天而降
带领我们 
突破险境

Text.en:
<size:31>{The end of the old,
the beginning of the new.
A unique opportunity for transformation,
for those with the power
to grasp it.}
Text.zh:
历史的终结
未来的开端
一个转变的绝佳机会
只给那些有能力的人
掌握在手

Text.en: The dead tell me great insights. They've had nothing but time to sit and think.
Text.zh: 那些已故的人教会了我许多事。他们除了一堆坐下思考的时间外，什么都没有。

Text.en:
<size:25>{Summoned for the King's desire,
soon applause came from the court.
However insanity was his only sire,
so the King's reign was cut short.}
Text.zh:
因王的旨意而被召唤
宫殿中掌声响起；
然而，疯狂才是他们真正的王
因此沉默不语；
小丑阴险的短匕快如风
王的皇冠已易主。

Text.en: Loyalty can be bought. Just make sure you know who the buyer is.
Text.zh: 忠诚是可以被收买的。唯一需要注意的是，你必须了解买家的背景。

Text.en: Chaos spread, wreaking havoc and death. They said none would be spared, and yet here I stand.
Text.zh: 混乱散布，灾难降临。他们说没有人能得到幸免，然而我却还站在此处。

Text.en:
Bound by fate,
inseparable by choice.
Text.zh:
因命运相系
因选择相依

Text.en:
<size:27>{As Kaom slew the last of his kin,
something deep inside him broke.
And through the cracks, corruption,
pure and black, spread forth.}
Text.zh:
当冈姆手刃了他仅存的族人
他内心最深处的某些东西也跟着破碎
从这破碎的裂隙中，开始腐败
纯粹的黑暗，开始蔓延

Text.en:
<size:27>{A jolt, and it moves. Or smolders.
A current, and it lives. Or dies.
A surge, and it transcends.
Or... not.
Only one way to find out.}
Text.zh:
一瞬跳电，使其亦然震动，或是短路起烟
一道电流，使其重获生命，或是永远沉眠
一股涌电，使其向上超越···或者悄然无息
唯有一种方式才能得到解答

Text.en:
By the time their eyes meet, 
the dark deal has long since been made, 
and his fate long since sealed.
Text.zh:
当他们的双眼交会时
黑暗的交易将同时签下
他的命运也将同时终结

Text.en:
Primed, curved and sleek.
Decisive and final.
For malice and righteousness.
There's but one solution.
Text.zh:
蓄势待发的，极致的圆滑
毅然决然的，笃定的瞬间
既是恶意，既是正义
唯有一条，解决之道

Text.en: I've never come upon a ship I could not command. I have however met sailors that were not willing to be led.
Text.zh: 我从未上过一艘我无法指挥的船舰。然而，我却遇过不愿被带领的水手。

Text.en: The path to godhood is guided by the hand of sacrifice.
Text.zh: 通往神的境界的路途，是由牺牲所引领的。

Text.en: A tower built of the strongest stone is not eternal; a towering intellect is not enlightened.
Text.zh: 即使使用最坚硬的石材打造了高塔，也无法使其成为永恒。立于塔顶的智慧无法被世界所启蒙。

Text.en:
Combat is simple.
Keep your blood in.
Take theirs out.
Text.zh:
其实战斗相当单纯
守护好自己的鲜血
夺取他人的鲜血，如此而已。

Text.en: When a craving cannot be sated, any source will do.
Text.zh: 当饥饿无法被满足时，任何其他东西都能取而代之

Text.en: The great city of storms, washed away by Vinktar's thirst for power.
Text.zh: 代表暴风的大城，随着维塔渴望权力的野心冲刷而逝

Text.en:
Those who are skilled in combat do not become angered.
Those who are skilled at winning do not become afraid. 
Thus the wise win before they fight, 
while the ignorant fight to win.
Text.zh:
争战之兵不知愠
常胜之士不知畏
贤者胜之不武
愚者武之求胜

Text.en:
The quick die young, the brilliant go mad,
and the powerful stand alone in a wasteland of their own creation.
Text.zh:
迅速之人死得早，聪明之人容易疯
而强大之士独自在废土中自立自强

Text.en:
There's no motivation for genius
quite like desperation.
Text.zh:
天才的字典里没有动机
如此的绝望可悲

Text.en: "Prototype #298 must be contained in a non-conductive glass box at all times."
Text.zh: “二九八号实验底子必须放在绝缘的玻璃箱里。”

Text.en:
"Exiled to the sea; what a joke. 
I'm more free than I've ever been."
- Captain Weylam "Rot-tooth" Roth of the Black Crest
Text.zh:
海上流亡?简直笑话。
我得到了前所未有的自由。
- 船长·威廉 "烂牙" 黑峰上的罗斯

伊泽洛缓缓的发现背叛在他心中慢慢茁壮
并无力抵挡；
将船驶向礁石的船长。

Text.en: Rancid, rotten, and wicked are those that dare to taste my serum.
Text.zh: 胆敢尝我血液的人都是些恶心，腐烂，和诡异的人们

Text.en:
When Voll took the throne,
He swore to care for the empire with eyes open.
And so he looked to the salvation of his people,
Blind to the damnation in his hands.
Text.zh:
当福尔戴起了皇冠
他发誓将会明眼守护帝国
因此他积极救赎人民
却对他所创造的恶果盲目

Text.en:
From north to south the sea of fire swept,
Rolling waves of gorging flame,
Growing taller and hungrier,
With every land they consumed.
Text.zh:
由北至南的火海
滚滚烈焰如浪袭来
每吞噬完一片土地
火就更高涨，更饥饿

Text.en:
As a boy, Rigwald was taught to hunt,
Through the first snows of winter,
When beasts have gorged their fill,
And see nothing but the long slumber ahead.
Text.zh:
早在男孩时，狼王就被教导着如何狩猎
过了冬天的初雪
野兽们已经填饱了肚皮
准备阖上双眼进入长时间的鼾睡

Text.en:
The Purity Rebels fought with heart and soul,
To free their empire from corruption.
And the fires of war did merely serve,
To temper the steel of their spirits.
Text.zh:
纯净反叛军团用尽了心和灵来战斗
为的是将帝国从腐化中拯救出来
而战火仅仅只是为了
吊慰他们灵魂的坚强

Text.en:
"They spent a lifetime in the service of God, 
only to spend eternity in the service of me." 
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra
Text.zh:
"他们竭尽一生侍奉神
却不知这只是在永远的服侍我"
- 黑影薛朗的助手 凯达弗斯

Text.en:
We forge order from the world around us
Wielding anarchy and destruction as our tools of genesis.
Text.zh:
我们为世界制定规则
掌控着混乱和毁灭来创造新生

Text.en:
Those who witness the shimmering scales of the wyrm
know only fear for the rest of their lives.
Fortunately, the rest of their lives
can be measured in seconds.
Text.zh:
那些目睹过让人颤栗的冰霜巨龙
只能永远活在恐惧的阴影下
然后，幸运的是
他们的余生也只剩下几秒钟而已

Text.en:
Thousands gazed upon the doors of the great labyrinth,
at an Eternal Champion in steel and gold, 
The first to challenge its treacherous traps. 
To mark the occasion, Izaro had the Champion's remains gilded.
Text.zh:
人们凝视着大迷宫入口的那位，
由铁和金包覆的永恒英雄，
成为史上第一位成功挑战迷宫中可怕陷阱的英雄。
为了纪念，伊泽洛为这位英雄亲手镀上金。

Text.en:
The once-glorious emperor spent his final days
imprisoned in his greatest creation;
a tool to filter out the unworthy
that pushed a monster to power.
Text.zh:
曾经雄霸一方的君主
在他的亲自打造的创造物中
受到监禁结束了一生；
一位仅仅只是找出无能之处
并且给了怪物无穷力量的工具人

双面铜板；
人头为友，
反之为敌；
双子之掷

Text.en: <size:31>{Born of relentless fury and abhorrence, warped by turmoil and anguish, tainted through desire and carnality, I thirst for bloodshed once more.}
Text.zh: 由愤怒及憎恨中出生，于混乱和痛苦中求生，在欲望与邪念中贪生，我只奢求再一次的沐浴在鲜血之中。

Text.en: When the dead raise and master their own, the land is truly lost.
Text.zh: 当死亡的躯体复活并得以自立于世，那么这片土地就真正的陷落了。

Text.en:
<size:31>{"Mastery of thaumaturgy is like any other pursuit; it requires dedication and sacrifice. Sometimes several sacrifices."
- Shavronne of Umbra}
Text.zh: "奇术就像世上其他的技艺一样。它必须透过牺牲才能有所专精，有时候甚至是无以计数的牺牲。" - 黑影薛朗

Text.en:
"Some see our mortal flesh as a limitation. I see it as an opportunity for vast, miraculous improvements."
- Shavronne of Umbra
Text.zh: "一般人只把人的肉体视为障碍和界限。我则认为它是朝向伟大进化的机会。" - 黑影薛朗

Text.en:
Weaving the six,
a serpent stands tall.
Wearing a crown,
the thousand petals call.
Text.zh:
蜿蜒诡谲，
毒蛇直立待发；
头戴冠冕，
花瓣成千绽放。

Text.en: To tame a beast, you first must subdue its heart.
Text.zh: 若是要驯服野兽，你必须先使其心归顺。

Text.en: Let these fine arrows pack a punch.
Text.zh: 让这些精良箭矢成为你最强的武器。

Text.en: Exploring lands made of flesh and sorrow, we'll reap and plunder like there's no tomorrow.
Text.zh: 在充满血肉和悲伤的土地中，我们将不顾一切烧杀掳掠。

Text.en: If this is my dream, I don't wish to wake.
Text.zh: 如果这就是我的梦中世界，我盼望永不苏醒。

Text.en:
"He might be lacking in vision, but his virtuosity is undeniable."
- Malachai, on Maligaro
Text.zh:
"他或许缺乏远见，但他的眼光确实卓越。"
- 玛拉凯对马雷格罗评语。

Text.en: Unlimited power is apt to corrupt the minds of those who possess it.
Text.zh: 无穷的力量容易使人的心智堕落。

Text.en: <size:31>{As their civilisation crumbled, the Vaal looked to their queen. In her, they saw a way out. In them, she saw a burden she was happy to free herself from.}
Text.zh: 当他们的王朝开始崩坏，瓦尔民族的人民望向他们的女王。在她身上，人民看到了一线希望。在人民身上，她只见到负担。

Text.en:
"This one? It is NOT for sale. You would sooner pry it from my lifeless hand."
- Jonfé Darontos, Ringmaker
Text.zh: "这一件吗?这个是非卖品。但我想你总有一天会从我已死亡的双手中抢走。" - 强菲·达隆托斯，戒指锻造师

Text.en:
"It's risky not knowing where your wares come from. That's why I source my own."
- Klayver, the Antiquarian
Text.zh:
"不清楚自己货物的来源是件相当危险的事情。这就是为什么我总是亲自查验。"
- 克雷佛，古董收藏家

Text.en:
"Through thick and thin,
blood and bone,
a peaceful life
is one I can't condone."
- Tukohama, Father Of War
Text.zh:
"千回战场，
血骨交织，
平凡人生，
是我无法赦免的结。"
- 图克哈玛，战争之父

Text.en:
<size:31>{My son, you lost your way before you arrived.
To never lose you again,
I make a path in my heart.}
Text.zh:
<size:31>{孩子，你在到来前早已迷失了自己的道路。
为了不再失去你，
我将开辟内心之路。}

Text.en:
"With this, I will weave the threads of fate 
into a noose for our 'glorious' emperor."
- Chitus Perandus
Text.zh:
"有了这个，我将亲手将交错的命运
编织成给我们"贤明"的君主的上吊绳"
- 切特斯·普兰德斯

Text.en:
Izaro saw himself not as a man,
but as a divine saviour trapped in a man's body.
Text.zh:
伊泽洛从不把自己视为区区凡人
而是一个天上降下，受困于凡人之躯的救世主

Text.en:
When slaughtered flesh falls silent,
the soul may yet scream on.
Text.zh:
当肉体坠入寂静
灵魂可能尚在尖叫

Text.en:
Take your partners by the hand,
Keep your steps in time.
Swing together, spin apart,
And dance with death sublime.
Text.zh:
执伴之手，
步调一致，
一共摇摆，
与亡共舞。

Text.en:
A mage from the coast rode up on a broken nag, legs burnt to his bones.
Before he collapsed, he uttered:
"I watched the world we know end yesterday."
Text.zh:
一名法师从海岸骑着老马回来，腿烧伤见骨
在他要倒下前的一刻，他说道： 
"我亲眼见证了我们熟悉的世界在昨天崩毁了。＂

Text.en:
Chitus began to aggressively expand his empire
into neighbouring nations at great human cost. 
But for absolute power, there is no price 
that a Perandus won't pay.
Text.zh:
切特斯开始积极地拓展帝国的版图
吞并周围的国家，牺牲了许多人命
但在绝对的权力前，没有任何东西
是身为普兰德斯人不愿付出的代价

Text.en:
Lioneye's men stood at the walls,
eyeing the savages that walked the beach below.
With a single word,
a thousand bodies, and ten thousand arrows,
would litter the sands.
Text.zh:
狮眼军团的勇士伫立高墙
凝视城外游荡的野蛮部落
只待一声令下
上万的箭矢即将脱离弓弦
艳丽的夕阳就要染红沙滩

Text.en:
Long after the Karui passed through,
the whispers of those who stood their ground
at Lioneye's Watch could be heard amongst the rubble.
Text.zh:
在卡鲁族离开之后
那些留在原地的人的耳语声
能在狮眼的守望里的废墟中细细听见

Text.en:
The Eternals commanded an army that need not eat, sleep, or breathe
without the usual depravities of necromancy.
Text.zh:
永恒帝国不用唤醒死者的魔法就能指挥着
一批不需要吃饭，睡觉，甚至呼吸的部队

Text.en:
"Admittedly lacking the finesse of the fabled original,
Prototype #4 achieved identical results through brute force alone."
Text.zh:
“虽然四号实验底子远不及原版精巧，
但它仅凭蛮力就取得了原版一样的成效。”

Text.en:
You can never truly tame the tempest.
You can barely even leash it.
Text.zh:
你永远无法真正的驯服风暴
你连给它戴上项圈都几乎不可能

Text.en:
Every decade, Lunaris devours Solaris
Each time, Solaris emerges from Lunaris, born anew.
Text.zh:
每隔十年，月亮都会吞噬太阳
然而每次太阳都会从月亮中获得崭新的诞生

Text.en:
When God forged the rules of reality,
he stated that some forces cannot co-exist.
He then made man with an unequivocal
desire to disobey.
Text.zh:
当神创造了现世的规则
他规定了某些力量无法共存。
然而他又赋予人们与生俱来
反抗规则的本性。

Text.en:
In time, all becomes nothing.
We just expedite the process.
Text.zh:
对时间来说，所有事物如同无物
我们仅能加速事情的发展而已

Text.en:
Fight not the cold
Forsake hope
Be still.
Text.zh:
不用跟寒冷为敌
现在就放弃希望
接着永远沉寂

Text.en:
"Attempt #2520: Been slaving away at this one for longer than I can remember.
Convinced this assignment is retribution from my superior..."
Text.zh: “#第二千五百二十次实验：我在这东西上倾注的时间已经数不清了。这一定是上级给我的惩罚……”

Text.en:
"They say a draught of fine spirits will ward off
the elements and promote a longer, merrier life.
I have found this to be true on all counts." 
- Zerphi of the Vaal
Text.zh:
＂它们说灵魂们会聚集成河
朝向更长，更美好的永恒
我发现这千真万确。＂
- 瓦尔的泽佛依

Text.en:
To cure the Goddess,
and break the chains of corruption,
you must shatter the world.
Text.zh:
" 要治愈女神，
断开腐败的连接，
你必须击碎世界。"

Text.en: Wherever she went, death was sure to follow.
Text.zh: 她所经之地，必定跟随着死亡。

Text.en:
<size:31>{Sometimes an apprentice becomes a master through countless hours of hard work and practice.
Sometimes it happens by force.}
Text.zh:
有时后见习者透过不断的努力而成为大师。
有时候是透过强大的力量。

Text.en: Eternal beauty has a cost, one which Shavronne was happy to pay with the lives of others.
Text.zh: 内在的优美是有代价的。薛朗愿意以它人的性命换取。

Text.en:
<size:27>{"There are worlds that lie beyond the edge of my page, the edge of my understanding. Worlds of wonder. Worlds of terror."
Aramil - Cartographer to Emperor Chitus}
Text.zh:
"在超出我书页的范围，超出我所理解的地方，有着其它的世界。奇妙的世界，恐怖的世界。"
阿拉米尔 - 给切斯特大帝的制图

Text.en:
<size:27>{Thy knee shall bend
in shifting dark,
thy blade shall serve his vigil.
Thy oath shall bind thee
to his mark,
thy flesh shall bear his sigil.}
Text.zh:
你的膝为了在黑暗中迅敏的移动而弯曲，
你的刃为了你而守卫。
你的誓言将连接你和他的印记，
你的身躯将注记着他的的魔符。

Text.en:
Nature was her domain,
Love was her song,
Family was her devotion,
Knowledge was her gift.
Text.zh:
自然是她的领域，
爱情是她的旋律，
亲情是她的奉献，
知识是她曾经的赠礼。

Text.en: They say it is the head that leads, but all must flow through the body at some point.
Text.zh: 人们说头是身体的主导，但身体中所有一切最终还是要在体内流动一轮。

Text.en:
"Only after one forsakes rage, can true power be found."
- Sekhema Asenath
Text.zh:
"唯有遗忘愤怒，方能获得力量。＂
- 丝克玛·安赛娜丝

Text.en: When you dwell in total darkness, even the faintest light may guide you out.
Text.zh: 当你遁入黑暗的深处，最微弱的光也能成为你的引导。

Text.en:
<size:30>{"Long ago, people looked to the stars, believing they influenced us. Soon, it will be us who influence the stars."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturge}
Text.zh:
"很久以前，人们仰望群星，相信着它们正影响着我们。很快的，我们将会成为影响群星的人们。"
- 多里亚尼，女王的奇术师

Text.en:
In the light of Solaris, the shadows cower and hide.
But every night they gather and grow,
and all but the strong and the stupid
seek shelter from their grasp until daybreak.
Text.zh:
在日光的照耀下，阴影无处躲藏
但当夜幕降临，阴影聚集而壮大
也带来愚蠢懦弱之人
在晨曦到来前苟且偷生

Text.en:
It's said to be noble to stand one's ground.
To soak the earth in stalwart blood.
While the First Ones chose to laugh and run
and caper with untamed glee.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
人们说有自己的信念是高尚的
将大地的精华融于血液之中
然而初代们选择愉悦的奔跑
那喜悦的姿态如猴儿般蹦跳的心情一般
- 狼王

Text.en:
We Ezomytes are beasts of burden
bearing wealth of an empire on our backs,
growing lean and strong
while our masters grow fat and weak.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
身为负重高手的艾兹麦族人
为帝国的人们背着他们的财富
因此能越加成长越加精壮
而有钱的主人越来越虚弱肥胖
- 狼王

Text.en:
Fear the children of the First Ones.
Let fear shield your back.
And let the dullard speak of bravery
when the First Ones come for him.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
畏惧初代的子孙吧
让恐惧成为你的支柱
当初代准备出来之时
让愚人畅谈他的勇猛
- 狼王

Text.en:
The first ones live where they can, where they must.
They embrace the frost, the storm, the drought.
Waxing and waning, breaking and mending,
living with time and happenstance, as must we.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代们定居在他们必须待的地方
他们居拥山林，风雨，和饥旱
来来去去，修修补补
和凡人们一样，与时间和命运相依
- 狼王

Text.en:
"This thing is not a pet. It is a parasite that feeds on the very will of its host.
Like any part of nightmare, it has found a way to make its price... acceptable."
- Malachai the Soulless
Text.zh:
"这可不是个宠物。它是个以宿主的意志为生的寄生虫。
就像任何的梦魇，它找到了一个人人能接受的··。价钱。"
- 超灵者玛拉凯

Text.en:
"I offer to you an eternal oath 
that binds your heart to mine;
a bond that not even death will break.
Will you accept?"
- Daresso, to his beloved
Text.zh:
"让我为你献上一份永恒的誓言
将你的心与我的心紧紧相依；
这份死亡都无法抹灭的牵连
你是否会与我相守相怜?"
- 德瑞索，致爱人

Text.en:
Long ago, the ocean was a puddle where a golden fish dwelt,
who lit the ocean from within and kept the water fresh.
When the sky burned, the fish dived deep,
never to return, and the waters turned sour.
Text.zh:
古早之时，汪洋不过一尾金鱼栖身之池，
它在海中照亮汪洋，醒活海水。
天空灼烧之后，金鱼潜入渊底，
待它销声匿迹，汪洋渐成死水一汪。

Text.en:
Just as the rat cowers before the dog
and the dog cowers before Man,
so too should we cower before the First Ones
and pray we never learn of what comes next.
Text.zh:
正当老鼠屈服于狗
而狗屈服于人类
人类应当屈服于初代
并祈求永远不用知道再下一阶是谁

Text.en:
I once thought the First Ones were just
stories made to scare children.
But I've seen what they can do. I've felt it.
And now I must live with that terrible knowledge.
Text.zh:
我曾以为我们口口声声的初代
仅仅只是为了吓唬小孩子的故事
但如今我见证了他们的所作所为
我将必须在这让人恐惧的事实中活下去

Text.en:
I am but a vessel for a greater force.
It acts through me. Speaks through me.
Decides what lives and dies through me.
And will change the world through me.
Text.zh:
我只是一个为了更强大存在而活着的躯壳
它透过我行动着，透过我诉说着
并且透过我的手决定谁该活下来谁该死去
接着透过我彻底的改变整个世界

Text.en:
The Hunter faced the First One
and notched his final arrow.
The First One bared its fangs
and savoured its final breath.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
当猎人们面对着初代
并拉上他们最后一支箭矢
初代露出了他的獠牙
接着品尝着他们最后一口气
- 狼王

Text.en:
With the will of the first ones in our sinews
we shall tear down the walls of Sarn.
Yet as is the way of the wildlands,
Only the strong may grow stronger.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
与初代的意志同心协力
我们必将萨恩之墙推倒
就如同是荒野中的法则
只有强者能变得更强大
- 狼王

Text.en:
From flesh and ferocity,
the First Ones roamed
through the realm of Spirit,
and into the darkness beyond. 
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
利用与生俱来的躯体和野性
初代们一步一步地闲晃着
从灵魂的领域
直到超越黑暗的领域
- 狼王

Text.en:
The First Ones are the forever ones.
There is no dust of the hourglass in their blood.
No fissures of weariness in their faces.
To drink of their blood is to drink of time itself.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代是种永恒的存在
在他们的血液中没有时间的流逝
在他们的脸庞上没有焦虑的痕迹
若要饮下他们的血即是饮下时间
- 狼王

Text.en:
When we free ourselves from the shackles
of civilised existence
we learn to feed and run and breathe
as the First Ones have always done.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
当我们将自己
从文民的枷锁解放时
我们学会了疾跑，呼吸，和猎食
就像是初代们的所作所为一样
- 狼王

Text.en:
The first ones marked their hunting grounds
with blood and piss.
We have tried to paint our future in words.
Now we shall paint with inks of savagery.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代们用献血和汗水
标下了属于自己的狩猎区
我们曾尝试用文字画出未来
现在我们必须用野性的墨水来尝试
- 狼王

Text.en:
We grew contemptuous of our past.
Dismissed the first ones as ignorant and wild.
We were fools and naive children
to turn our backs on our inheritance.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
我们开始对过去感到鄙视
视初代为野蛮和原始并背弃了他
然后我们其实只是愚笨天真的孩子
与我们天生的本性背道而驰
- 狼王

Text.en:
Death met with the First Ones
and demanded they hunt with mercy.
For while pain might delight the mind,
it does not fill the belly.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
当死亡遇上了初代时
要求他们狩猎时手下留情
仅管制造痛苦能让人快乐
但却无法填饱肚子
- 狼王

Text.en:
Look not upon me with fear, my men.
Though I seem strange, even monstrous,
were you to see with the eyes of your forebears,
your hearts would be filled with wonder.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
别用畏惧的眼神看着我，人类
我或许长得奇怪，甚至如怪物般
若你见着先祖们的眼睛
你的心将会充满更多的好奇
- 狼王

Text.en:
We breed thoughts of single mind,
fashion tools of single purpose.
While the First Ones bring to bear
anything that the wildlands provide.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
我们孕育出个体的心智
创造单一功能的器具
而初代却能将废土中
任何的事物加以运用
- 狼王

Text.en:
Within the heart of every man and woman
lies the soul of a ferocious beast.
If you cannot tame it, embrace it.
Text.zh:
在所有男人和女人的心中
都潜藏着一个野兽的灵魂
如果你无法驯服他，那就接纳他

Text.en:
Tear the flesh from the bone. 
Turn the bone to dust.
Scatter the dust to the wind.
Text.zh:
扯下骨头上的血肉
将骨头化为粉末
再将粉末洒向风中

Text.en:
Fear not death. Turn to him, face him.
And smile as he sinks his teeth
into the throats of our oppressors.
Text.zh:
别畏惧死亡。转向他，面对他
当你的咽喉被牙齿深深陷入时
对你的敌人微笑吧

Text.en:
The fortunate inscribe their legacy
in the pages of history books.
The rest of us must leave our mark with our blood
or the blood of others.
Text.zh:
富裕的人们在历史书中
写下他们丰富的遗产
而剩下的我们只能用我们的血
或别人的血留下些什么

Text.en:
Howls and laughter
They hide in the day
They smell you, they watch you
They track their new prey
Text.zh:
狼嚎和笑声
他们在白昼下躲藏
而他们闻得到你，看得到你
他们追踪着新的猎物

Text.en:
The wolf greeted the king,
In the light of the harvest moon.
The wolf offered the strength of the wild,
And the king paid for it in blood.
Text.zh:
狼在满月的月光下
像王表示了敬意
狼献出了野性的力量
而王献出了他的血

Text.en:
Those who dwell in the deep freeze
enjoy a special kind of madness.
Text.zh:
那些藏匿在寒冰深处的人们
享受着一份特殊的疯狂

Text.en:
The First Ones hold us
between two sharpened blades.
That should we stray too far from the path,
we find ourselves severed.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代用两柄锋利的刀刃
将我们夹在其间
如果我们偏离了路途
就会发现自己身首异处
- 狼王

Text.en:
The victorious know only leadership,
the rest only servitude.
Text.zh:
胜者只知统治
其余只知服侍

Text.en: Accumulating wealth has its own costs.
Text.zh: 累积财富也是有代价的

Text.en:
<size:29>{Three men travel
through the gate;
they carry a protective ward.
A faction conspires
against their fate,
but magic unravels the sword.}
Text.zh:
三人成行
穿越拱门
携手守护
支派阴谋
命运相斥
揭示之剑

Text.en: "Many believe murder is a grisly, grim, and grotesque crime. Then there are those who simply make art of it."
Text.zh: 许多人认为谋杀是邪恶，不人道，另人作恶的罪恶。然而却也有些人视其为艺术。

Text.en:
"Experiment 22A: Rhoas, when deprived of water, secrete a most delightfully potent toxin."
- Maligaro
Text.zh:
"实验 22A： 抽干水分的恐喙鸟会释出一种绝妙的毒素"
- 马雷格罗

Text.en: "Most people only have one. I'm a bit of a hoarder."
Text.zh: "大部分人有一个就够了。但我有收藏癖。"

Text.en: <size:31>{The Eternals lauded his valour. The Karui relished his defeat. Yet the final thoughts of Marceus Lioneye were naught but lament for his pride.}
Text.zh: 永恒帝国赞扬他的英勇。卡鲁族回味他的落败。而这些关于穆希尔斯·狮眼的评价也只是毫无价值的，对他昔日荣耀的哀悼。

Text.en:
<size:28>{Scaly beast of the skies,
watching with his golden eyes.
Shadow that blocks out the sun,
it's too late for you to run.}
Text.zh:
天空中布满鳞片的野兽
用它金黄的双眼静观四方
当你进入它影子的范围里
那就一切都太迟了。

Text.en: Whoever said 'more is always better' has obviously never met a rat.
Text.zh: 那些说"越多越好"的人们肯定没见过老鼠。

Text.en: "There is no right or wrong choice, no best or worst. There are only choices and their consequences."
Text.zh: "没有选择是正确或错误的，也没有最好或最坏的。只有选择，和结果而已。"

Text.en: Beware the sudden calm, for it is a sure sign of a storm on the horizon.
Text.zh: 注意突然的宁静。它很可能是暴风来临前的征兆。

Text.en:
To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
 - High Templar Voll
Text.zh:
要成神，必先弃神之赐
生命，心灵，和神圣的躯体
- 圣宗福尔

Text.en:
"The Karui savages claim the weapon was forged by their fire god.
I'm rather inclined to believe them."
- Fairgraves, Renowned Explorer
Text.zh:
卡鲁族人声称他的武器
是由他们的火神所锻铸
我认为我相信他们
- 费尔，知名探险家

Text.en:
Thaumaturgy has no limit.
It is our fragile reality that imposes boundaries.
Text.zh:
魔法没有极限
是脆弱的现实给它设下界线

Text.en:
For too long we have crawled in darkness,
scavenging through rotten scraps.
The First Ones teach us to scavenge until we can hunt,
and then never crawl again.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
我们在黑暗中藏身了太久
在腐朽的残骸中觅食
初代教我们在学会狩猎前
不断觅食，然后不再藏身
- 狼王

Text.en: Between a rock and a rock.
Text.zh: 在巨石与巨岩之间

Text.en:
The Empire hides lies and falsehoods
Behind a mask of politeness and civility.
The First Ones teach us to look through the lies,
And that no beast can truly cover their tracks.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
帝国一直藏着谎言和误导
藏在文明礼仪的面具后面
初代教会我们看穿那谎言
没有谁能完全抹灭其踪迹
- 狼王

Text.en:
The world of the First Ones is harsh;
We struggle on our bellies to survive.
But that which imprisons us also changes us
And soon we will emerge anew.
- The Wolven King
Text.zh:
初代生长的世界是严酷的
我们为了填饱肚子而求生
那囚困我们的也改变着我们
但我们终究会重获新生
- 狼王

Text.en:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3
Text.zh: 不曾锈蚀绝不代表纯净

Text.en:
Those who dwell in the deep freeze
enjoy a special kind of madness.
Text.zh:
那些藏匿在寒冰深处的人们
享受着一份特殊的疯狂

Text.en:
"Researcher Graven spent eleven hours suffering electrocution in the lab
before he was found. Prototype #14 somehow kept him from dying."
Text.zh:
“发现研究员葛拉文之前，他在实验室里遭受了十一个钟头的电击。
不知道十四号实验底子是怎么让他活下来的。”

Text.en:
"A man cowers behind his walls.
A woman carries her fortress with her.
In heart, in mind, in hand."
- Sekhema Deshret
Text.zh:
"男人躲藏在墙后
女人携带着堡垒
在心里，脑海里，手里。"
- 丝克玛迪虚瑞特

Text.en:
"Additional test subjects approved. Determine exactly how many wounds
need to be endured to activate Prototype #612's energies."
Text.zh:
“批准额外实验对象。
查明到底需要多少伤口才能实现启动六一二号实验底子的能量。”

Text.en:
To her beauty you submit,
lest your neck the great Queen slit.
Text.zh:
臣服在女王的美丽之下
至少你还能献出颈项让她划破

Text.en:
"Don't worry, I know what I'm doing."
- Toggo's Last Words
Text.zh:
"别担心，我知道我在做什么"
- 特格的遗言

Text.en: Taste and grow strong. Drink too much and be buried.
Text.zh:
浅尝能成长
饮尽则下葬

Text.en: "If I fall, we will fall together with my fangs in your throat."
Text.zh:
"如果我死了
你会在我身边，还有刺入你咽喉的我的利爪"

Text.en: The fight is the easy part. It's the years of training that'll kill you.
Text.zh:
真正的战斗是最简单的
让人想死的是长年的训练

Text.en:
"Since one with knowledge of machines
might be able to bring the labyrinth to a standstill, 
Izaro had us place many boobytrapped decoys.
But I know which switch brings the monster down."
- Xirgil, Trapbuilder's final words.
Text.zh:
"因为任何拥有关于机器知识的人
皆有可能让迷宫停止运作，
伊泽洛命令我们设下许多假的诱饵
但我仍然知道正确的开关是哪个。"
- 舍吉，陷阱制造师的遗言

Text.en:
What is stronger, the stone or the wind?
Look to the east. Do you see a single stone still standing amongst the dunes?
- Sekhema Deshret
Text.zh:
何者为强，石或风? 
向东方看去。你有看到任何一块石头竖立于沙丘中吗? 
- 丝克玛迪虚瑞特

Text.en:
An era so ingrained with decadence, greed and cruelty
that even the graves of murderers were gilded.
Text.zh:
一个根深蒂固于衰败，贪婪，和残酷的年代
甚至杀人犯的坟墓上都镀了金。

Text.en:
Little makes it across the dry plains 
to the foot of the mountain alive.
The mountain dwellers ensure nothing reaches the top.
Text.zh:
几乎无人能活着穿过干枯之地
到达山脚之下。
山里的居民更确保着无人能够到达山顶。

Text.en:
The caustic fumes that rise from the caldera
kill nearly everything downwind eventually.
The Redblade, however, just go mad.
Text.zh:
火山口飘散的腐蚀云雾
最终击败了下风处的所有生命。
然而红刃只是变的疯狂。

Text.en:
For generations, the gentle Pondium tides
sheltered the smugglers, murderers and thieves,
and let their resentment and population flourish.
Text.zh:
世世代代以来，波地安温柔的潮汐
藏匿着盗贼和罪犯，
使他们的人口和怨恨逐渐繁荣。

Text.en:
As if pulled by divine strings,
the powerful are drawn to the powerful,
breaking any morals and laws that might stand in the way.
Text.zh:
像是被神圣之绳牵系着，
强大的力量被强大的力量吸引，
打破任何道德和法律的阻碍。

Text.en:
A captain's first love is his ship. 
They either die together,
or forever linger apart.
Text.zh:
舰船即为船长初恋
同生共死，
永不分离。

Text.en: Unconventional criminals require unconventional prisons.
Text.zh: 不寻常的犯人就应该用不寻常的手段来遏制。

Text.en:
"Though ingenious instruments have been found,
it seems surgery before thaumaturgy
was not so delicate."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3546
Text.zh:
"尽管发明了巧妙的工具
但似乎在奇术以前的手术
不是非常的精细呢"
- 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，古物收藏家，物品编号 3546

Text.en: "The best place for this prototype would be in the hands of our enemies."
Text.zh: “这种实验底子最好落在我们敌人的手上。”

Text.en:
Love only death
For she shall never let you go.
Text.zh:
爱上死亡吧
因为她绝不会放你走的

Text.en:
There is nothing, flesh, spirit, or stone
Free from our hunger for dominion.
Text.zh:
没有任何的生物，灵魂，或是物质
能逃过我们统治的渴望

Text.en:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.
Text.zh:
仁慈的罪犯扫过了萨恩的街道
夺走了衰弱和悲哀之人的气息

Text.en:
"Three test subjects confirmed Prototype #495 creates an additional
debilitating effect from poisons. This could be very useful."
Text.zh:
“三名实验对象证实，四九五号实验底子
能额外产生毒素强化效果。这很有用。”

Text.en:
The blade thrums with wild energy
Eager for vengeance against all who walk free.
Text.zh:
刀锋上狂野的能量颤动着
渴望着对那些侥幸之人复仇

Text.en:
"Test subjects were unable to strike even a motionless target.
However, when a trained guard tried it..."
Text.zh:
“实验对象连一动不动的目标都打不到。
直到一名训练有素的守卫试了一下……”

Text.en:
It doesn't matter how well the young swordsman trains.
All form and finesse are forgotten when blood first hits the ground.
Text.zh:
再怎么训练有素的年轻战士
在第一滴血落下时
所有学过的姿势和技巧都将混乱

Text.en:
"We do not command fire.
Ngamahu lends it, and Hinekora returns it."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
我们不操控火焰
努葛玛呼为我们借来，辛格拉负责归还
- 拉维安加，冈姆的顾问

Text.en:
He cast far into the ocean
And tore out her heart.
Text.zh:
他深入远洋
撕裂了她的心

Text.en:
As man sins,
God weeps.
Text.zh:
人造孽
神拭泪

Text.en:
"Success! Prototype #54 has tapped into that sliver of divinity that exists within.
Faith fuels the flesh, and the flesh fuels the fire..."
Text.zh:
“成功了！五十四号实验底子挖掘出了存在于体内的一丝神性。
信仰驱动血肉，血肉驱动火焰……”

Text.en:
Faith does not make us invulnerable.
It makes us immortal.
Text.zh:
信念无法让我们刀枪不入
但它却能让我们永不止息

Text.en: The worst of Axiom were imprisoned by more than iron.
Text.zh: 看守着最低劣的思想的不仅仅是刀枪

Text.en:
"Painful suicide in the hands of a fool, 
Creative death in the hands of a master."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 2992
Text.zh:
“愚者之手，是痛苦的自我了断；
大师掌中，是创造性的死亡。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，藏品第2992号

Text.en:
Swift and silent.
One strike, one corpse.
Text.zh:
悄无声息的出动，
悄无声息的归来，
寂静中终结一切。

Text.en:
The Goat King knew not of war,
of the lands and laws he trampled.
The Goat King knew only joy
at turning life to ash.
Text.zh:
"···而所有站在特克特斯面前的人，
那个创造了大地山水的人，
只能在他的伟大前屈膝颤抖···"
—— 无名刻文

Text.en:
The quickest way to understand
your own strengths and weaknesses
is to walk in the skin of another.
Text.zh:
了解自己优缺点
最快的方式就是
进入别人的身躯

Text.en:
"Proof that if you devote yourself to a god of death,
you may be spared from its wrath."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 408
Text.zh:
“这证明，若你献身于死亡之神，或可免于其盛怒。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，藏品第408号

Text.en:
Terror doesn't make you jump.
Terror makes you run.
Text.zh:
恐惧不会让你跳起
恐惧让你拔腿奔跑

Text.en: Why waste the good stuff on something that's going to blow up?
Text.zh: 为什么要把好东西浪费在即将爆炸的东西上?

Text.en: "A curious jewel. Like so many others, a shining little paradox."
Text.zh: “奇怪的珠宝。跟其它一样，是个耀眼的悖论。”

Text.en:
Izaro's insistence on using lava
resulted in some surprising material discoveries.
Text.zh: 从火焰里锻造的东西不会被烧伤

Text.en:
Anyone can catch a lumbering beast.
Try catching a bird before it has even landed.
Text.zh:
任何人都能抓住动弹不得的野兽
试试看抓住在空中飞翔的鸟儿

Text.en:
Night's frost becomes morning's dew
Darkness cleansed, pure and new.
Text.zh:
夜晚的冰会化为清晨的露水
连黑暗也能被净化，纯净崭新

Text.en:
The Ezomytes have a saying:
Take everything and waste nothing.
Text.zh:
艾兹麦族人说过： 
拿走所有东西，不要浪费

Text.en: Saboteurs, like chefs, have their own secret recipes.
Text.zh: 就像大厨一般，破坏者也有他们的秘密食谱

Text.en:
"Researchers will refrain from giving test subjects virtue gems which produce traps.
We are still finding explosives in the vents months later." 
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“避免让研究员把产生陷阱的美德宝石给实验对象。
我们过了好几个月都还能在通风口发现爆炸物。”——总管科塔拉

Text.en:
Branded a heretic for your beliefs,
You stand alone against many.
May the truth that fuels their anger,
Carry your blade into their hearts.
Text.zh:
为你的信念烙上异教徒的纹路
你只身抵抗天下众人
但愿他们怒火的真相
能带领你的剑刃直入他们的心脏

Text.en:
The greatest victories happen
before the battle has begun.
Text.zh:
最完美的胜利
总发生在战斗之前

Text.en:
Language is a tool that can be used to build walls 
or tear them down.
Text.zh:
语言是个能筑墙的工具
也是个能拆墙的工具

Text.en: Even an iron fist can be handled with grace.
Text.zh: 铁拳也能优雅从容

Text.en:
Learn as much as you can, 
and surround yourself with people who know the rest.
Text.zh:
尽可能的学习知识
然后认识那些懂你所不懂的人们

Text.en:
A single step forward
Snap free from the prison
Reborn into freedom eternal
Text.zh:
向前一步
脱离牢笼
重生于永恒自由

Text.en:
A snake cannot survive without its head.
But neither can the head survive without the body.
Text.zh:
无头之蛇不得活
无身之头亦不可活

Text.en:
All living things need a heart,
even those made of stone.
No heart, no life.
Text.zh:
所有的生物都需要一颗心脏
即使是石头所做的也是如此
没有心脏，就没有生命

Text.en: Beware the one who seeks to contain a storm.
Text.zh: 小心想要藏住风暴的人们

Text.en: Return Nature's gift to the source.
Text.zh: 将大自然的恩惠回报给其源头

Text.en: What can be built, can be destroyed.
Text.zh: 能被建造的东西，一定能被摧毁

Text.en: That which takes an eternity does not happen.
Text.zh: 需要永恒创造的东西绝对没有出现过

Text.en:
Take a cog here, place a cog there,
and the great machine grinds to a halt.
Text.zh:
这里拿个齿轮，那里放个齿轮
然后伟大的机器就此消磨殆尽

Text.en:
The best way to keep out an unwanted guest
Is to simply close the door.
Text.zh:
要拦下讨厌的客人
最好的方式就是关上门

Text.en: A man's life is the greatest gift he can give.
Text.zh: 生命是身为一个人能给的最好的礼物

Text.en:
"Close to the original, and perhaps even more useful. However,
close is not what we are looking for. Keep trying." 
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“很接近原版，甚至更有用。
不过我们要的不是接近。继续实验。”——总管科塔拉

Text.en:
Forget kings and emperors;
He who holds the coin holds all the power.
Text.zh:
王侯将相又如何；
手握金币之人才真正大权在握。

Text.en:
A sword he brought, his foes to maim and rend,
from places dark behind forbidden doors,
but night by night he woke with frighten'd roars
from ghoulish dreams, too strange to comprehend.
Text.zh:
他带着剑，将敌人肢解撕裂，
凌立禁忌之门后的黑暗世界，
每个夜晚在恐惧的嘶吼中惊醒
那残忍至极的噩梦，诡异而无法理解。

Text.en:
"The night-gaunts, they fly, soaring about in darkness beyond the ken of mankind.
I hear the silent whispers of their wings as they descend, for me, for me..." 
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“夜魇在人类无法企及的黑暗中高飞。
我能听到他们降临的飞翼声。它们是为我而来……”
— 研究员阿恩

Text.en: If the path to divinity were simple, we'd all be gods.
Text.zh: 如果通往神圣的道路是简单的，那么人人都能成神。

Text.en: Lioneye looked to the heights of glorious victory. And thus he missed the defeat right under his nose.
Text.zh: 狮眼仰头看着胜利的荣耀，却忘了留意面前的泪水。

Text.en: <size:30>{Many that have wielded the power of lightning have said that death by electrocution looks like the victim is more alive than ever before.}
Text.zh: 许多操纵着雷电力量的人说过被电击而死的受害者都看起来更加地有活力。

Text.en: <size:29>{Moribund, he gazed upon the journey taken as blood trickled down his chin. His eye closed on the city ahead that he would never call home.}
Text.zh: 他垂死的凝视着走过的旅程，血液缓缓流到了下巴。他看着永远不会称做家的城市，缓缓地闭起了双眼。

Text.en:
<size:30>{"Greetings! Just because you think I'm greedy doesn't mean I'm not willing to share. You'll just have to kill me first."
-Grandmaster Dy'Ness}
Text.zh: "你好！ 你以为我是个贪婪的人不代表我就不愿意分享。你只要先把我干掉就可以了。" —— 元帅·死王

Text.en: Boundless is the distance between where we start and where we start again.
Text.zh: 无尽的距离就是从我们启程到我们再次启程的距离。

Text.en: A king's movement is unwavering.
Text.zh: 王的每个步伐都是不可动摇的。

Text.en: Only a fool tries to contain unlimited power.
Text.zh: 只有愚蠢之人才会试着装下无尽的力量。

Text.en:
<size:30>{"Let us not forget the most important lesson the Vaal taught us:
Nothing is eternal."
- Siosa Foaga, Imperial Scholar}
Text.zh:
"我们不能忘记瓦尔教过我们最重要的一课：
没有任何事物是永恒的。"
- 萨欧赛·佛耶葛，皇家学者

Text.en:
Their whims left unknown,
Their life left for others.
Text.zh:
他们的幻想依然成谜
他们的性命为他人而牺牲

Text.en:
<size:26>{Black and White, Silver and Gold
Let us see the world Unfold
Red and Blue, Yellow and Green
Let us remake it in colours Unseen}
Text.zh:
黑白，金银
让我们见证世界的真相
红蓝，黄绿
让我们再造无人见过之色彩

Text.en: Be like water, friend.
Text.zh: 像水一样，朋友。

Text.en: Reach into the Void and claim your prize.
Text.zh: 深入虚空并领取你的奖赏。

Text.en:
"Fear controls the masses."
- Laszlo, the Scourge
Text.zh:
"恐惧支配众人"
- 拉兹罗，灾祸之源

Text.en:
<size:30>{A weapon, a shelter, a prison.
The web's purpose changes
with the spider's needs.
A lesson we should
take to heart.}
Text.zh:
武器，避难所，监狱。
蛛网的用途不断改变
因应着蜘蛛的需要。
一堂课题
需要我们用心学习。

Text.en:
<size:30>{Taste not of their
forbidden fruit.
Theirs is a harvest of
the darkest kind,
twisted, rotten and
damned for eternity.}
Text.zh:
不要尝试
禁忌果实。
他们正收割着
黑暗的一族，
扭曲，腐败以及
受到永恒之诅咒。

Text.en:
Embrace the Light,
Await the Morrow,
No more Spite,
And no more Sorrow.
Text.zh:
拥抱光明，
等待明日，
不再怨恨，
并不再悲伤。

Text.en:
True to his title,
Voll, newly crowned,
had many of the
Eternal Empire's signature
extravagances destroyed.
Text.zh:
与其头衔名符其实，
新登基者，福尔
摧毁许多
永恒帝国著名的
奢侈与浮华。

Text.en:
The First Ones
may be blasphemy,
but they are
powerful blasphemy.
Text.zh:
初代们
或许是种亵渎，
但他们是
强大的亵渎。

Text.en:
If you beckon the
Lord of Lightning,
do not be surprised
when you are struck.
Text.zh:
若你召唤了
雷霆之神，
当你被雷劈时
也别觉得惊讶。

Text.en:
So many memories,
so much pain in
such a small token.
Drown it in blood
so you can forget.
Text.zh:
许多回忆，
许多苦痛
充斥着小图腾。
淹没在血液之中
才能使你遗忘。

Text.en:
<size:28>{A map is similar
to a pair of eyes,
without one you stumble
around, unable to find your way.}
Text.zh:
地图就像
一双眼睛，
若失去它你将
蹒跚，找不到去路。

Text.en: When the outcome is the same, does it matter if it is fortune or trickery?
Text.zh: 戏法或运气，结果一致时，有谁会在意?

Text.en:
Time and change
shall naught avail,
To dim the Light
of Truth's fair grail.
Text.zh:
即使光阴的变迁
也将无法黯淡
真理清澈的光芒

Text.en:
They can't be THAT lucky,
or they'd still be here!
Text.zh: 真没那么幸运，否则他们现在可还在呢！

Text.en:
<size:28>{Crimson rubies, drops of vigour,
flowing through my veins,
flesh like coal, try to crush me,
diamond is what remains.}
Text.zh:
艳红珠宝，有如血气，
畅流于吾脉，
身体有如媒矿，尝试碾碎我，
残留的便是坚钻

Text.en: <size:28>{First, I gave my wealth, and we went hungry. Next, I gave my land, and we were homeless. Then, I gave my family, and I was alone. Last, I gave my eyes, and all I could dream was mine.}
Text.zh:
我付出了财富，我们开始饥饿。
我付出了土地，我们无家可归。
我付出了家人，我变的孤独。
我付出了双眼，获得梦寐的渴望

Text.en: <size:29>{The largest beasts cannot be overpowered. The Greatwolf teaches us to use guile, not strength, to probe for the soft flesh and strike deep.}
Text.zh: 巨兽无法靠蛮力压制。彪狼教导我们使用诡计替代力量，刺探要害，深切重击。

Text.en:
<size:28>{A symbol of beauty and innocence
The gems corrupted her mind
Malachai corrupted her gems
All but a glimmer of
greatness lost in madness}
Text.zh:
美丽与纯净的象征
宝石污染了她的神智
玛拉凯腐败了她的宝石
疯狂吞噬了仅存的荣耀。

Text.en: <size:32>{Blood flows not just through veins, but through worlds.}
Text.zh: 鲜血不仅流动于血脉，它畅流任何大地。

Text.en:
<size:26>{The villain strikes,
the world is torn.
A war begins, a hero is born,
The nemesis sets the sky alight.
A hero's sacrifice
sets everything right.
- Drake's Epitaph}
Text.zh:
邪恶侵袭，撕毁了大地。
战争四起，造就了英雄，
复仇之火点燃夜空。
英勇奉献将永熄业火。
- 德雷克之墓

Text.en:
Formless might,
Wild beauty tamed,
The brine of gods,
The seas restrained.
Text.zh:
无形的力量，
驯服狂野之美，
神祇的海水，
拘束八方海域。

Text.en: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod
Text.zh: 爱苦，亦无人寻之欲之，乃因其苦

Text.en: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod
Text.zh: 爱苦，亦无人寻之欲之，乃因其苦

Text.en:
Move in with haste.
Strike quick, strike hard.
Vanish like smoke in the wind.
Text.zh:
迅速地移动。
灵敏出击，沉重一击。
像烟雾般消散在风中

Text.en:
"The test subject nearly escaped, but the poison gas
system in the hallway functioned as expected."
Text.zh:
“实验对象差点逃跑。
不过过道的毒气系统发挥良好。”

Text.en: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod
Text.zh: 爱苦，亦无人寻之欲之，乃因其苦

Text.en:
Renowned by those distinguished,
Exalted by the few.
He skulks in darkness, 
and watches from beneath the city.
Text.zh:
闻名于杰出之众中，
崇高于少数之中。
躲藏于黑暗之中，
在城市底下监视着。

Text.en: Thoughts that shimmer like light across the rain.
Text.zh: 像光芒在雨中闪耀一般的私想。

Text.en: Skin like steel tempered by bright flames.
Text.zh: 像钢铁在烈火中锻造般的表面。

Text.en: Fists that strike like a falling tree.
Text.zh: 像树木倒下般沉重的拳头。

Text.en:
You think we do not know.
We know all that you think.
Text.zh:
你以为我们不知道。
我们洞悉你的全部。

Text.en: Remember the past, anticipate the future.
Text.zh: 回忆过去，预想未来。

Text.en:
Tukohama, Tawhoa and Kitava went to the lake to fish.
Tawhoa weaved a net to catch the fish,
Tukohama built a fire to cook the fish,
and Kitava swallowed the entire lake, fish and all, with a single gulp.
Text.zh:
图克哈玛、塔华、奇塔弗去湖边钓鱼。
塔华编织了渔网，方便抓鱼。
图克玛哈生了火，方便烤鱼。
奇塔弗一口把湖给喝了。

Text.en:
Even from the back rows,
the whistling steel was mesmerising.
They watched the dance in the arena dust, silent as the dead.
A spell only broken by the spilling of blood.
Text.zh:
就算是在后排。
钢铁的低语一样迷人。
他们观赏竞技场的尘土飞扬，死亡后的寂静。
只有鲜血能够破除的魔咒。

Text.en: Empty cup, full of promise.
Text.zh: 空杯，满满的承诺。

Text.en:
Beaten in contest, he would try once more
Guided by magic, Magjar took aim at a dove
Saemus' gift would influence the score
Guided by darkness, Magjar spilled the blood of his love
Text.zh:
竞赛中失利，他会继续尝试
遵随魔法的指引，马扎尔人瞄准白鸽
谢默斯的赠礼将影响分数
遵随黑暗的指引，马扎尔人洒着爱人之血。

Text.en:
With unending determination and resolve he destroyed first the gates, 
then the constructs guarding the tomb on the other side.
Text.zh:
他抱着无止尽的决心首先摧毁了大门，
接着摧毁了门后守护着坟墓的建筑。

Text.en:
Do not hide your flaws, your cracks,
mend them, and display them proudly.
For it is these that set us apart.
Text.zh:
不要掩藏你的弱点、缺陷，
改善它，然后引以为傲的展现。
我们因此脱颖而出。

Text.en: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod
Text.zh: 爱苦，亦无人寻之欲之，乃因其苦

Text.en: The smaller the teeth, the sharper the bite.
Text.zh: 牙齿越娇小，咬合越锋利。

Text.en:
Grip the frozen steel, feel it numb you.
Wield the cold touch of death like 
a splinter of your own shattered heart.
Text.zh:
握紧冰冻的钢铁，感受麻木。
支配冰冷的死亡之触，
像是你碎裂的心脏之碎片。

Text.en:
Fragile is the vessel that holds the soul.
Wrap it in cloth, seal it tight.
For once the seal is broken, the contents are lost forever.
Text.zh:
包覆灵魂的脆弱躯体。
以布包裹，密封。
一但封印瓦解，内容将永远遗失。

Text.en:
The cuts on my hands are a small price to pay
for the opportunity to drive my steel
beyond the flesh and into the demon's soul.
Text.zh:
手上的伤痕只是微小的代价
为了驱使钢铁
深入血肉之躯直阿修罗魂。

Text.en:
A single breeze blows
A hundred blades dance
Text.zh:
一道轻柔微风
百刃为之起舞

Text.en: A true predator does not chase; It waits.
Text.zh: 真正的狩猎者不会追逐；只会等待。

Text.en:
All revere the earth they walk,
For it wields strength beyond compare,
Holds knowledge more than thought,
Stands long after all else falls.
Text.zh:
敬仰他们经历过的一切，
那是难以形容的力量，
那是超越常理的知识，
即使一切崩毁，仍然屹立的唯一。

Text.en: Righteous men seek virtue like tame pups seek praise.
Text.zh: 正义之人追求美德就像幼崽追求赞美

Text.en: Wicked men chase power like stray dogs chase a rat.
Text.zh: 邪恶之人渴望权力就像野狗追逐街鼠

Text.en:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.
Text.zh:
诅咒他们卑劣的议会。
他们把我当成杂种小孩将我排除在外。
他们并不知道我拥有的力量。

Text.en:
It is time for the Goddess to give her final verdict.
Your fate rests in her even hands.
Text.zh:
该是女神做出最后判决的时刻。
你的命运掌握在她公平的双手。

Text.en: Many things come to one who has nothing.
Text.zh: 许多事物落于一无所有之人。

Text.en:
If two great leaders like Lioneye and Kaom
had been on the same side of the battle,
nothing would remain unconquered.
Text.zh:
若犹如狮眼和冈姆般伟大的两个领袖
站立于同一阵线之上，
没有东西不被征服。

Text.en:
Each death witnessed is a valuable lesson, 
and what use is knowledge if it is not put into practice?
Text.zh:
每个死亡皆见证了一个宝贵的课堂，
知识若不使用便如同乌有。

Text.en:
Death does not remove you from our grasp.
Death only brings you closer.
Text.zh:
死亡不会使你逃离我们的魔爪。
死亡只会使你更加接近。

Text.en:
"I feel altered when Administrator Qotra wears these gloves.
Somehow, I find that disturbing." 
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“总管科塔拉戴上这副手套时，我感到了变化。
我发现这不安。”——研究员阿恩

Text.en:
Travelers of the deep wood speak of a witch
whose ale provides a different kind
of liquid courage.
Text.zh:
丛林深处的旅人述说着女巫
她酿的酒能给你特别的
借酒壮胆之勇气。

Text.en: Thin is the line between mechanical genius and magic.
Text.zh: 科技和魔法是有区别的。

Text.en:
To extend your life as long as possible
is to extend all the maladies that come with it.
Text.zh:
延长你的寿命
一并延长伴随着的疫病。

Text.en: We stand together. We strike together.
Text.zh: 我们站在同一方。我们一起出撃。

Text.en: Breathe deep, and give yourself over to eternity.
Text.zh: 深呼吸，将你自己交付于永恒。

Text.en:
Kaom guided his Karui across the sea
and spilled their blood on foreign soil.
Text.zh:
冈姆引领他的卡鲁穿越海洋
使他们血洒于异国之地。

Text.en: For dead men require no answer.
Text.zh: 死人不需要任何答案。

Text.en: There is no wall thicker or stronger than fear.
Text.zh: 没有比恐惧更强更厚的墙壁。

Text.en:
The Karui boats were closing the gap,
but Shavronne had laid for them one final trap.
Text.zh:
卡鲁的船只越来越接近，
但薛朗为他们准备了最后一个陷阱。

Text.en:
The overture stretches thin,
The chorus gathers to begin.
Stacatto, drone, a rest drawn long,
Another hears Death's final song.
Text.zh:
序曲即将终结，
合唱即将开始。
突然的，低沉的，延长的休止符，
接着而来为最终的死亡之歌。

Text.en: Nothing spreads fear faster than the unknown.
Text.zh: 没有比未知能够更加快速的传播恐惧。

Text.en: The largest rock leaves the deepest mark.
Text.zh: 最大的岩石留下最深的痕迹。

Text.en:
Fire spreads thick and fast.
The first spark is never the last.
Text.zh:
火焰迅速窜升漫延。
最初的火花永远不是最终。

Text.en:
Flames to guide the Great Spirit to the site of the dead,
and smoke to carry them into the sky.
Text.zh:
火焰引领伟大得灵魂至亡者的世界，
烟带领他们飘向天空。

Text.en:
Giant's blood you cannot tame,
as wild as an unwatched flame.
Text.zh:
巨人之血无法被训服，
像森林大火般狂野。

Text.en:
Let it pierce you, let blood flow.
Make more room for the soul to grow.
Text.zh:
让他将你刺穿，让血液流出。
让你的灵魂有更多生长的空间。

Text.en: A moment of victory may last an eternity in memory.
Text.zh: 短暂的胜利能留下永恒的记忆。

Text.en: May it echo through the halls.
Text.zh: 让回音穿越整个大厅吧。

Text.en: What goes out must come in.
Text.zh: 跑出来的东西必定会再次进入。

Text.en: Even the mightiest tree was once just a sapling.
Text.zh: 就算是最伟大的神木，也曾经只是个小树苗。

Text.en:
Flesh may freeze and rot,
but the soul remains unbroken.
Text.zh:
躯体会结冻、腐蚀，
但灵魂不被摧毁。

Text.en: The gryphon knows only the hunt and the flight.
Text.zh: 狮鹫知道如何狩猎和飞翔。

Text.en: A burned branch leaks sap no more.
Text.zh: 烧焦的树枝不再流出树液

Text.en:
"The Vaal, a thousand years ago, 
came up with more delightful methods of murder
than I could ever wish for." 
- Koralus Doomfletch
Text.zh:
"瓦尔，千年以前，
发明了在我想象之外
更加令人兴奋的毁灭方式。"
- "毁灭之弦"寇拉卢斯

Text.en: The lone tree grows thickest.
Text.zh: 孤立的树木成长得最为强壮。

Text.en:
Where steel-grey clouds gather and crash together,
a storm is sure to follow.
Text.zh:
当钢铁般的乌云聚集结合时，
一场风暴肯定将要来临。

Text.en:
The last sweet music to touch Hrimnor's ears
passed right beneath his chin.
Text.zh:
雷姆诺最后听到的甜蜜之乐
从他下巴之下穿越。

Text.en: No one likes a quiet encore.
Text.zh: 没有人喜欢一个寂静的安口。

Text.en:
"The flames are surely coming.
I just pray I am long dead before they arrive."
- Archbishop Geofri
Text.zh:
"火焰必定到来。
我只祈祷我不会活到那一天。"
- 大主教吉尔菲

Text.en:
The soldiers stormed her throne room.
The guards held them at bay.
The peasants overwhelmed the guards.
The nobles paid for their lives.
The nobles took her throne,
and so she fled to the woods.
Text.zh:
士兵攻破了她的皇室大厅，
卫兵将它们抵挡。
民众击溃了卫兵，
贵族付出生命为代价。
贵族夺取了她的王位，
而她朝丛林中逃去。

Text.en:
"A taste of Midnight, and you may never see the dawn."
- Inquisitor Maligaro
Text.zh:
“最后享受这午夜的味道吧，你可能永远看不到黎明了。”
- 审判者马雷格罗

Text.en:
"At last, my beauty is beyond reproach."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“最后，我的美丽无可指责。”
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
It was Doedre who learned that pain is just
as much about fear as it is about injury.
Text.zh:
这是德瑞发现的真理：
疼痛就是恐惧，
越是恐惧，就越感到疼痛。

Text.en:
You cannot control the storm,
but you can utilise it.
Text.zh:
你无法控制风暴，
但是你可以利用风暴。

Text.en: Die for no one.
Text.zh:
为自己而生，
为自己而死。

Text.en:
"Laws are for city folk.
Can't try a man for murder if you can't find him."
- Taruk, Last of the Wildmen
Text.zh:
"法律只适用于文明之内的居民。
如果你找不到凶手，那么凶手就无法被审判。"
- 塔鲁克，最后的野人

Text.en:
Beneath the frozen eye of Lunaris
a new world will be born.
A crystalline, perfectly still utopia.
Text.zh:
在月影女神冰冻的眼眸之下，
一个新的世界即将诞生。
一个水晶般的，完美的乌托邦。

Text.en: A single taste leaves you wanting more.
Text.zh: 单调的食物会让你渴望更多。

Text.en:
Burning goddess, shine so bright.
Set the world 'fore you alight.
Text.zh:
燃烧的女神，闪耀着光芒。
把世界都摆在你的面前。

Text.en:
An open mouth, a blinding shriek,
Your mind goes dark, your body weak.
Text.zh:
一张张开的嘴，一声刺耳的尖叫，
你的思维变慢了，你的身体也变脆弱了。

Text.en:
Embrace your burning ambition.
Embrace your frozen heart.
You will be transformed.
Text.zh:
拥抱你燃烧的野心。
拥抱你冰封的过去。
你将会改变。

Text.en:
"Even for the great Magi,
time passes without relent."
- Doryani, Queen's Thaumaturgist
Text.zh:
即使是伟大的奇术师，
时间也不会为他停留。
- 女王奇术师多里亚尼

Text.en:
"The most dizzying heights are surrounded by precipitous falls.
Progress cannot be eternal."
- Doryani of the Vaal
Text.zh:
最令人晕眩的高峰美景总是被险峻的悬崖峭壁所包围。
没有任何事物能永恒的发展与前进。
- 瓦尔族多里亚尼

Text.en:
"Cut down the tallest tree,
and another becomes the tallest."
- Old Ezomyte saying
Text.zh:
"砍下最高的树，
成就了另一颗最高的树。"
- 艾兹麦的古老智慧

Text.en:
Follow your most basic instincts.
The rest will come naturally.
Text.zh:
追随你最基本的本能。
剩下的自然就来了。

Text.en:
Asenath loosed arrows with almost musical rhythm,
a rhythm matched by her nearly inaudible whispers,
and the crunch of the dead hitting the dust.
Text.zh:
安赛娜丝的箭几乎带着一种音乐的韵律，
一种与她那几乎听不清的低语相匹配的节奏，
一种嘎吱嘎吱作响的死亡之声。

Text.en:
"Make a man believe he is doing the world a good deed,
and there is nothing you can't make him do."
- Malachai, the Soulless
Text.zh:
"让一个人坚信他是在为世界做一件好事，
然后你就能让他做任何事了。"
- 失去灵魂的马拉凯

Text.en:
There is no cost too great to pay for power.
Merely men who lack the conviction to pay it.
Text.zh:
追求力量的道路是没有底线，不计成本的。
只有弱者才会对力量不置一顾。

Text.en: The breath of life is theirs to take.
Text.zh: 生命，就是保持呼吸。

Text.en:
By light we are shadowed,
in darkness we are bound.
Text.zh:
在光明中我们被遮蔽，
在黑暗中我们被束缚。

Text.en:
Few men command an army better
than the Great Meginord of the North
Text.zh:
与北地伟大的梅吉诺德相比，
很少有人能比他更好地指挥军队。

Text.en:
Few men can guide their people
like the Great Meginord of the North
Text.zh:
与北地伟大的梅吉诺德相比，
很少有人能比他更好地领导人民。

Text.en: Fury fuels defiance.
Text.zh: 愤怒能点燃蔑视。

Text.en:
Hyrri's quick thinking led to victory,
but it came at the cost of respect.
Text.zh:
西里的敏捷果断带领卡鲁走向胜利，
但这是以日积月累的尊重为代价的。

Text.en:
Make a man hot, and his heart will skip a beat.
Set a man on fire, and his heart will skip all beats.
Text.zh:
让一个男人着迷，他的心跳会略过一拍。
把一个男人点燃，他的心就会跳过所有的节拍。

Text.en:
The night dances on
Wine continues to flow
Your skin looking pale
Your soul letting go
Text.zh:
夜晚的舞蹈
流淌的葡萄
你苍白的外表
你自由的灵魂

Text.en:
"Confess your sins to me. My god will not be nearly so forgiving."
- Archbishop Geofri of Phrecia Cathedral
Text.zh:
“向我忏悔你的罪过吧。我们的神不会那么仁慈。”
- 费西亚大教堂的大主教吉尔菲

Text.en:
"Please, take whatever you want. Just don't kill me"
"But then I wouldn't have everything I want, would I?"
Text.zh:
“请随便拿吧。只要留下我的性命。”“
“但是那样的话，我就无法拥有我想要的一切了呀？”

Text.en: As death arrives, so too does instinct.
Text.zh: 越是靠近死亡，本能越是敏锐。

Text.en:
Legend tells of a time when Solaris will
burst forth from Lunaris,
and night will be eternally banished.
Text.zh:
一个传奇曾经说过，
当日耀与月影迸发了战争，
黑夜将被永远放逐。

Text.en:
One more partner by the hand,
Let your steps entwine.
Spin together, swing as one,
And dance with death in trine.
Text.zh:
拿起手中的伙伴，
让你的舞步开始纠缠。
一起旋转，一起摇摆，
与死神不见不散。

Text.en:
"Stand steadfast in the face of destruction.
The Council cannot afford to falter."
- Mauritius, the Iron Heart
Text.zh:
“坚定不移地面对毁灭。
议会养不了懦夫。”
——马力留斯，钢铁之心

Text.en:
The weight of faith is great
Yet it is never borne alone.
Text.zh:
信仰的重担极沉，
但它却从不让人独自承担。

Text.en:
Even the dead dare not
trespass into Ullr's dominion.
Text.zh:
就连死亡都不敢
闯入乌尔的领域。

Text.en:
"Though Geofri's beacon was extinguished,
his embers may yet light our way."
- Victario, The People's Poet
Text.zh:
“虽然吉尔菲的光辉已经熄灭，
但他的余烬仍能为我们照亮道路。”
——维多里奥，人民的诗人

Text.en: As you guided me, now I guide others.
Text.zh: 我将指引他人，如同你曾指引我。

Text.en: Temptation is man's greatest folly.
Text.zh: 诱惑是男人最大的愚蠢。

Text.en:
The Thaumaturgical masters of the Eternal Empire,
as unpredictable and varied as they were,
all understood one thing:
Free thinking leads to free action.
Text.zh:
永恒帝国的奇术大师们，
他们变幻莫测且各个多变万化，
却全都了解一件事： 
自由的思考将引导自由的行动。

Text.en:
Faintly gleaming in the moonlit night,
Kondo's Pride was primed to fight.
Driven by an inner fire,
bloodlust, spite and ill desire.
He swiftly moved to strike them all,
wreaking havoc like a steel squall.
Text.zh:
月光下隐约的闪烁，
刚多的虚荣已蓄势待发。
心中怒火、嗜血欲望，
恨意、歹意，成为动力，
他迅速的移动，击倒一切，
似钢飑一样的带来肆虐。

Text.en: They will rise and fall in fire and blood.
Text.zh: 他们将浴火而生，血池中倒下。

Text.en: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.
Text.zh: 保护乌龟的龟壳同时也是它的棺材。

Text.en: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.
Text.zh: 你的脑力可能没有极限，但你的头颅却不这么认为。

Text.en:
Quickly cooled the steel,
but never could it forget
the heat of the forge.
Text.zh:
钢铁迅速地冷却，
但永远无法忘却熔炉的温度。

Text.en:
"...and so He said: 'Let only the good meet my gaze'
and no eye met His. So He called down the cleansing flames
and let black smoke sweep the Sinners away."
- Book of Innocence
Text.zh:
""纯净之人迎接我的目光"他说道···却丝毫感受不到视线。
他便唤下净化之火，一阵黑烟席卷并带走了罪人们。"
- 纯净之书

Text.en: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.
Text.zh: 血肉的气味弥漫于空气中。

Text.en: If you know where to strike, you need only strike once.
Text.zh: 若看清弱点，一击便足够。

Text.en:
They wrap around you
until your blood turns as cold as theirs.
Text.zh: 用鲜血灌溉它，让它的残暴更加的嗜血。

Text.en:
With increasing mastery over death
comes an increasing desire for it.
Text.zh: 当越能掌握死亡，也意味着你更加地渴望它。

Text.en:
Breathe deep, my child.
Let the frigid air engulf your soul.
Embrace the eternal cold, 
And it will embrace you back.
Text.zh:
深呼吸，我的孩子。
让冰冷的空气吞噬你的灵魂。
将自己投入永冻怀抱，
它也将完全地接纳你。

Text.en: The end is written into the beginning.
Text.zh: 结局被写入开始。

Text.en:
They roamed, they fed, they grew,
Killing as they went,
Conquer though they may,
Their hearts will never be content.
Text.zh:
他们四处奔走、觅食、成长，
不停的杀戮、侵占，
却永远得不到满足。

Text.en:
Step into the void
and experience true freedom.
Text.zh: 步入虚空，感受真正的自由·

Text.en:
"Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."
Text.zh:
“实验对象在他房间里折断了兔子的脖子，然后破墙而去。
不过他速度不够快。建议进行挖掘作业，回收实验底子。”

Text.en:
By my hand, the inert is given life.
By my hand, that which rots is reborn.
There is nothing that cannot be changed.
Nothing.
Text.zh:
以吾之手，与惰者生机。
以吾之手，予腐者重生。
万物无定数，
世事无绝对。

Text.en:
"I don't always have a flame handy
when a fresh delinquent walks through our gates."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom
Text.zh:
“当一个鲜嫩的流放者走监狱大门的时候，
我并不总是有时间亲自招待他们的。”
— 布鲁特斯，典狱长

Text.en:
"Think of those that cursed us, judged us, 
and burned our sisters upon the pyre. 
Think of their names as you drink, 
and even their children will feel what we do to them today." 
-Vadinya, to her coven
Text.zh:
"想想那些诅咒我们，审判我们，
让我们家破人亡的家伙。
只要是呼吸的每时每刻都不要忘却他们，
那么他们总有一天会受到应得的报应的·" 
-瓦迪娜，迷之女巫

Text.en:
All things must die.
Whether you burn out or explode is up to you.
Text.zh:
任何事物都有尽头，
像蜡烛一样逐渐耗尽，
或像闪电般闪耀而短暂，
一切都取决于你·

Text.en:
Please take out your blades,
your whips, and your spikes.
Class is now in session.
Text.zh:
拔出你的剑，举起你的盾，
背上你的长矛，新的战斗即将开始·

Text.en: Eternal life is within our grasp. Do not let it go.
Text.zh: 永恒的生命就在你的手中，千万别让他悄悄溜走·

Text.en:
Some dead have long envied the living.
When given the chance, they take from us what they can.
So we offer our suffrage.
In return, they give only suffering.
Text.zh:
那些死去的生命一直在窥视生者的幸福，
一旦找到机会，他们将从黑暗的深处爬起，
不顾一切的将一切都拉入深深的黑暗·

Text.en:
"A stone is not a stone.
It is but one part of a fortress."
- Ezomyte proverb
Text.zh:
“石头不仅是石头，
它是壁垒的一部分。”
— 艾兹麦谚语

Text.en:
"Do not cause the land to stir,
It holds secrets better unknown."
- Azmerian proverb
Text.zh:
“切勿干扰大地，
它将为你守密。”
— 阿兹莫里谚语

Text.en:
"The summoned golems immediately battered through the chamber wall
and killed several guards, but their fury only lasted a short time."
Text.zh:
“召唤的魔像立刻打碎了墙壁，杀死了几个守卫。
但它们没逞强多久。”

Text.en:
"Kings fall, empires crumble, mortals perish.
All turn to earth and sand."
- Maraketh proverb
Text.zh:
“王者殒落、帝国崩坏、
凡人消亡，亦成砂土。”
— 马拉克斯谚语

Text.en: An oath once made is an oath never broken. Do not delay in keeping it, for I take no pleasure in fools.
Text.zh: 所谓誓言，就是改变的约定。绝不为了达成目标而延期，这只是愚弄傻瓜的把戏·

Text.en: Take small pieces of things and then assemble them together
Text.zh: 一点一滴，拾取每一件小小的物品，最终将它们组合成杰出的艺术品·

Text.en: Rigwald believed he'd seized great power, but it was the great power that had seized Rigwald
Text.zh: 狼王瑞佛以为他获得了力量，其实只不是过是力量又多了一个仆从·

Text.en: BeachBox Placeholder
Text.zh: 蕴含着深沉的故事

Text.en:
Upon the red pyre we are born.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Xoph}
Text.zh:
柴堆中我们的血肉换得他的爱。

此物品能够通过索伏的祝福改造

Text.en: Upon the grey winds his love spreads.
Text.zh: 我们成长，是为了散播他的启示。

笼罩在他的红色光辉之下，我们的肌肤化成了灰烬。

此物品能够通过索伏的祝福改造

Text.en: He burns us to keep us from harm.
Text.zh: 他烧灼我们使我们远离伤害。

他的心跳，使我们受到驱策。

此物品能够通过索伏的祝福改造

Text.en:
We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.
Text.zh:
我们是他的血肉。
透过我们，他散播炙热的启示。

Text.en:
We remember the stillness.
Then the great fall.
The pain of separation.
We return once more.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Tul}
Text.zh:
我们铭记静止。
我们铭记殒落。
我们分离的痛。
我们再度回归。

此物品能够通过托沃的祝福改造

Text.en:
We fracture and splinter.
We pierce our sides.
But in the great freeze we are forged anew.
Text.zh:
碎裂、断裂，
穿刺自己的身躯。
但极冻中我们将获新生。

Text.en:
"Are we mad for attempting to build an engine out of this?
Looping cycles, power and pain..." 
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“我们疯了吗？想用这个来造引擎？
动力和疼痛简直是个死循环……”
——研究员阿恩

白皙起舞，如流似水，
互相冲击，重生如一。

此物品能够通过托沃的祝福改造

Text.en:
We share one space,
speak one voice,
act through one body.
A flawless crystal.
Brittle.
Text.zh:
共享的空间，
共同的发言，
同个个体我们行动。
无瑕的水晶。
脆而不坚。

Text.en:
"Test subject battered through the hatch with her bare hands,
forcing us to resort to threatening her children to restore containment."
Text.zh:
“实验对象徒手空拳就打破了舱门。
我们只能拿她孩子做威胁才控制住了场面。”

伟大的崩雪，我们渴望着加入，
我们尤如死尸，静候佳机。

此物品能够通过托沃的祝福改造

Text.en:
A single moment sets in motion an eternal fall,
beneath which all are buried.
Text.zh:
剎那便能造就无尽毁坏，
一切将受掩埋。

她用心养育我们，
直到我们必须相互食噬。

此物品能够通过艾许的祝福改造

Text.en:
She carries us and nurtures us
until we must feed upon each other.
Text.zh:
她把我们拉扯长大
直到我们可以自食其力。

Text.en:
She thinks and we act.
She acts and we think.
Fragments of the whole that washes clean the skies.
Text.zh:
她的思想，使我们动作。
她的动作，使我们思考。
完整的碎片洗净天空。

Text.en:
She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Esh}
Text.zh:
面对自己的倒影
她颤抖、摇曳，
直至眼中的她不再是自己。

此物品能够通过艾许的祝福改造

静止的身影，缠绕着光晕；
陌生的自己，映入了眼帘。

逢伊开口，
众人躬敬，
惨遭毁灭。

此物品能够通过艾许的祝福改造

Text.en:
But the fool did not bow.
The fool stood and questioned.
And the fool was unwritten.
Text.zh:
愚人未躬不敬，立于疑惑。
始终他立于疑惑。

Text.en:
We move to be closer to her, but the distance yet grows.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Uul-Netol}
Text.zh:
我们越是靠近她，
她离的距离越远。

此物品能够通过乌尔尼多的祝福改造

Text.en:
We leave a trail, that we may know
where never we will return.
Text.zh:
我们预留踪迹，
避免重蹈覆辙。

Text.en:
"Researchers will please refrain from combining our prototypes with existing relics
of power. The temptation is obvious, but the results can be... unpredictable." 
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“研究员应该避免把实验底子和权力欲结合在一起。
这种诱惑显而易见，但结果难以预测。”
——总管科塔拉

感受着母爱，
我们恳求回归至她怀中。

此物品能够通过乌尔尼多的祝福改造

Text.en:
At last she holds us,
and so we turn to dust.
Text.zh:
终受拥入她怀。
我们化为尘埃。

Text.en:
We are within her reach,
and when the time is right,
she will reach into us.

<default>{This item can be transformed with a Blessing of Uul-Netol}
Text.zh:
位于她所及之处，
当时机到来，
她将伸出援手。

此物品能够通过乌尔尼多的祝福改造

Text.en:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.
Text.zh:
身体沉默了内心，
因此我们舍去肉体。

他幸运的崇信者永入梦境，
而我们匍匐在下。

此物品能够通过夏乌拉的祝福改造

Text.en:
They grow fat and ripe in slumber.
To be fed upon when he wakes.
Text.zh:
在睡眠中他们壮大、熟成。
做为他苏醒后的粮食。

献上我们的四肢，
捍卫领主的死尸。

此物品能够通过夏乌拉的祝福改造

Text.en:
The Lords are chosen so carefully.
Only they may grace His flesh.
Text.zh:
君王们必须仔细选择，
唯有他们能够接受他的恩典。

我们如鲜血般涌入夏乌拉的口中，
同时洒落在我们熟悉的大地上。

此物品能够通过夏乌拉的祝福改造

Text.en:
We coagulate; a crimson shell
that suffocates the unworthy.
Text.zh: 我们凝固；腥红外壳使不配者窒息。

我们有如藤蔓攀爬于夏乌拉的双臂，
竭力伸向应该是我们的世界。

此物品能够通过夏乌拉的祝福改造

Text.en:
We take root in the dirt
and strangle those who tread upon it.
Text.zh:
我们扎根于土壤，
绞杀踏上的一切。

我们冲击夏乌拉的身体，
如雨滴似落在无法前往的地点。

此物品能够通过夏乌拉的祝福改造

Text.en:
We swell and flood
and drown the undeserving beneath our might.
Text.zh:
膨胀、泛滥的我们，
力使不值得的家伙溺死。

Text.en:
Tukohama couldn't lose a fight in his fortress,
So he carried his fortress to the fight.
Text.zh: 战争之父图克哈玛未尝败绩，因为这具盾牌一直守护着他。

Text.en:
"As one of our few creations that did not cost any fatalities,
Prototype #10 bore unexpectedly positive results."
Text.zh:
“这是极少数没有造成伤亡的作品。
十号实验底子的效果出人意料地好。”

Text.en:
A man can spend his whole life fishing
before he learns it is not fish that he seeks.
Text.zh:
一个人可以花费一生钓鱼，
最后发现他找寻的不是鱼。

Text.en: Without light, there can be no shadow.
Text.zh: 没了日光，夜影也将荡然无存。

Text.en:
Greatest is the Brine King's domain,
and every day it grows a little greater,
not through force, but patience.
Text.zh:
海，领域中的王者。
领土随着每日扩张，
但靠的并非力量，而是耐性。

Text.en:
And from the ashes he rose, like a black cloud.
The Sin of one became the Sin of many.
Text.zh:
余烬中他升起，黑霄漫布。
独自的罪过成为众人的恶行。

Text.en: Without night, there can be no day.
Text.zh: 日夜皆存，缺一不可。

Text.en:
Hinekora bound Kitava to a rock 
that Kitava could not lift with all his might.
Kitava vowed that when he broke free, 
he would devour every soul in Hinekora's domain.
Text.zh:
悉妮蔻拉将奇塔弗绑在只有图克哈玛能搬动的巨石上，
奇塔弗向悉妮蔻拉发誓，在重获自由之日，
他将吞噬悉妮蔻拉领域中所有灵魂。

Text.en:
"The world is not simply black and white,
it is not divided into good and evil.
But black and white, good and evil, do exist,
and we must know how to recognize them."
- Archbishop Geofri
Text.zh:
“世界不单纯分为黑与白，
不单纯分为善与恶。
但只要黑、白、善、恶存在，
我们则须学习区分。”
— 大主教吉尔菲

Text.en:
"Lab Two suffered significant structural damage in the process of creating
Prototype #77. It is, however, the closest we've come to perfection."
Text.zh:
“在制造七十七号实验底子的过程中，二号实验室遭受了严重的结构性损坏。
不过这是我们最接近圆满的一次。”

Text.en:
"Some blows must be evaded. Some blows must be endured.
The trick is to tell them apart."
- Daresso, the Sword King
Text.zh:
“有些攻击必须闪躲。
有些攻击必须承受。
区分两者是诀窍所在。”
— 德瑞索，斗剑之王

Text.en: All children must eat.
Text.zh: 所有后裔皆须进食。

Text.en: Simple is the life of the bear.
Text.zh: 单纯，简易，仅取所需。

Text.en: The dreamer stirs, the world trembles.
Text.zh: 梦境搅动、世界颤抖。

Text.en: The first quill separates the quick learners from the dead.
Text.zh: 第一支带羽毛的箭把人分成两类： 学以致用的，以及等死的·

Text.en: No man may hope to turn back the storm. You can only hope you do not attract its ire.
Text.zh: 没有人希望风暴再临。你能做的只是默默祈祷你不会无意激怒它·

Text.en: Genius knows no limits.
Text.zh: 天赋没有界限·

Text.en: Claw them from the bottom, you'll be glad that you have got 'em, claw them from the top, you'll never want to stop.
Text.zh: 从底下撕裂他们，你会为你的杀戮满意；从顶上撕裂他们，你会上瘾着迷。

Text.en: Those whose hands are their livelihood know the importance of keeping them safe and warm.
Text.zh: 用双手劳动和生存的人知道如何珍惜那双生活的来源·

Text.en: Necromancers, believe me, are more terrifying than their thralls.
