Text.zh:
你的任何秘密就是对付敌人的利器。
当大地初子狩猎时，她总是静静地行动。
从不给敌人深入了解她的机会。

Text.en:
When the inferno spread across the land,
it was the First of the Sky who singed his feathers
as he brought the flames to a standstill.
Text.zh:
当无尽的火焰蔓延大地，
是苍空初子将燃烧的羽毛伸入了天空。
而天空使火焰停止了跳动。

Text.en:
The First of the Sky was the Last of the First.
It was he who showed us that our limits are self-imposed,
that what we take for law may just be an illusion.
Text.zh:
苍空初子是最后一位初之子。
是他告诉我们，我们自己决定了物种的极限，
世间的真理可能只是一种幻觉和约束。

Text.en:
A bird, too heavily laden, cannot take flight.
The First of the Sky teaches us to put aside our possessions
so that we may live more freely.
Text.zh:
一只鸟，如果太重了，就不能飞翔。
苍空初子教会我们把身外之物放在一边。
这样我们才能更自由地生活。

Text.en:
Though we are individual, we share the same plight.
The First of the Sky teaches us that unity and selflessness,
not division and greed, is what will carry us upwards.
Text.zh:
我们每一个都是独特的个体，
但我们又有着相同的困境。
苍空初子告诉我们要团结和无私，
而不是分裂和贪婪，
这样才能把我们带往正真的高处。

Text.en:
The First of the Night was the first explorer
It was she who first braved night's terrors
and found comfort in silence and solace.
Text.zh:
暗夜初子是探险的源头。
是她第一次勇敢地面对了黑夜的恐惧。
最终在沉默和宁静中找到安慰。

Text.en:
A hunter uses everything at their disposal.
The First of the Night did not hold back her venom. 
She used it to weaken her enemies, 
and used her enemies to strengthen her many children.
Text.zh:
一个猎人该懂得使用一切可以利用的东西。
暗夜初子没有丢掉她的毒液。
用它来削弱敌人，
并利用她的敌人来培育她的子民。

Text.en:
A burden shared is a burden made lighter.
The First of the Night teaches us that our burdens 
are not just ours to bear, but ours to use against oppressors.
Text.zh:
分担负担会减轻负担。
暗夜初子教会我们，我们的负担不只是我们自己的，
在不断的压迫中成长，
我们的负担会逐渐成为敌人的负担。

Text.en:
When the fires spilled out of the mountain, The First of the Night wove a net
and was carried into the night on its hot winds.
Though we cannot live without danger, we can learn to live with it.
Text.zh:
当大火从山上倾泻而出时，
暗夜初子编织了一个网，我们在热风中被带进了黑夜。
虽然生活不会没有危险，但我们可以学会在危险中成长。

Text.en:
Gleeful are the few
who bask in the blood of the many.
Text.zh: 幸灾乐祸的总是那些躺在他人的鲜血中晒太阳的人。

Text.en:
When it comes to finding a use for surplus,
a rich man has within himself
boundless creativity.
Text.zh:
当谈到关于财富的使用之道时，
正真富有的人将拥有无限的创造力。

Text.en:
"Better... stronger... more vital... and then... failure. Always, failure.
What key fundamental secret are we missing?"
Text.zh:
“更好……更强……更有活力……然后我们失败了。总是失败告终。
我们到底缺失了什么关键原理？”

Text.en:
When your skin sloughs, and your blood cooks,
you'll wish the lightning strike had killed you.
Text.zh:
当你的皮肤脱落，
你的血液沸腾，
你会希望闪电批中了你
然后杀了你。

Text.en:
What started as a desire to feed
became a desire to learn...
Text.zh:
最初是想要觅食的欲望，
最后成长为了学习的欲望。

Text.en:
Great works take time.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Dominance}
Text.zh:
伟业多磨。

<default>{该物品可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en: A plan without a deadline stays a plan.
Text.zh: 没有期限的计划方为计划。

Text.en:
From the flesh of the gods, Xibaqua was born.
From the carnage of Xibaqua, we were born.
It is our duty to return to the gods what was once theirs.
Text.zh:
夏巴夸亚源于众神之躯。
而我们则生于它的遗骸。
那么，归于众神自然是吾等之大限。

Text.en: Give him your body, and your burdens will follow.
Text.zh: 向他献出你的躯体，你的负担也会随之而去。

Text.en:
Destined for sacrifice,
they were dressed in garments
that blurred the lines between this world
and the next.
Text.zh:
注定要献身的人，
他们华服盛装
模糊了今生
与往生的边界。

Text.en:
The seed of life, saved and savoured.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Sacrifice}
Text.zh:
生命的种子，值得保全并品味。
<default>{该物品与献祭魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en: We are incapable of change without sacrifice, for we are both the iron and the forge.
Text.zh: 没有牺牲就无法改变，正如熔炉和钢铁。

Text.en:
We are born raw and untested, and we are shaped by life.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence}
Text.zh:
众生本粗粝，生命塑人形。

<default>{该物品与超越魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
Though the body rots, the spirit lives on.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence}
Text.zh:
尽管躯壳腐烂，但灵魂犹在。

<default>{该物品与超越魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
Any thought, no matter how fleeting, changes the thinker.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Transcendence}
Text.zh:
思想无论如何变幻，都会改变思考者。

<default>{该物品与超越魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
We are as much shaped by what we do
as what is done to us.
Text.zh:
行为影响我们
结果塑造我们。

Text.en:
Take comfort knowing that, even in death,
we may serve our Queen and fuel her empire.
Text.zh:
让人宽慰的是，即使死亡，
我们也会服侍女王和她的帝国。

Text.en:
A keen mind sees what others do not,
makes connections where others do not, 
and is dangerous in a way that others are not.
Text.zh:
洞察的思维可见旁人所不能见，
连接旁人所不能连，
制造旁人所不能制造之危险。

Text.en:
Freedom is for the privileged, even in death.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of the Ghost}
Text.zh:
自由是特权者的独有，死后也不例外。

<default>{该物品与鬼魂魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
"What care have I for their pain? They're already dead."
- Atalui, Vaal Priestess
Text.zh:
“我要他们的痛苦有什么用？他们已经死了”
- 瓦尔女祭司

Text.en:
For the Vaal, the relationship between slave and master
was as intimate and volatile as that of lovers.
Text.zh:
对瓦尔人来说，奴隶和主人之间的关系
就像爱侣般时而亲密，时而冲突。

Text.en:
Facing their death,
the mind of a sacrifice
retreats into instinct and madness.

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of the Ritual}
Text.zh:
面对死亡时，
为信仰献身的念头
也就化作了本能和疯狂。

<default>{该物品与仪祭魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
Facing their death,
the mind of a sacrifice
retreats into instinct and madness.
Text.zh:
面对死亡时，
为信仰献身的念头
也就化作了本能和疯狂。

Text.en:
Only a fool seeks meaning
in a life so fleeting.
Text.zh:
追逐真义的愚者
转瞬即逝的年华。

Text.en:
Death is your most important duty.
Face it, or curse your bloodline for all eternity.
Text.zh:
死亡是你的最高职责。
拥抱它，或是为你的血脉降下万世诅咒。

Text.en:
Through war we found peace. Through death we found advancement.
Our ancestors did not know where their actions would take them.
Are we any better?

<default>{This item can be transformed on the Altar of Sacrifice along with Vial of Fate}
Text.zh:
通过战争我们得到了和平。通过死亡我们找到了升华。
我们的祖先又何曾知道他们的一举一动，又能带来什么呢。
我们又何必如此？

<default>{该物品与命运魔瓶一起，可在牺牲祭坛处进行转化}

Text.en:
Doryani promises immortality, yet we build great structures, 
carve magnificent works into stone, so a part of us lives onward.
A sign of faithlessness through action.
Text.zh:
多里亚尼会许下不朽，因此我们建造伟大的楼宇，
雕刻宏伟的石雕，以此让生命前行。
行动昭示着信仰的崩塌。

Text.en:
War is a thriving infection.
It numbs the heart and eats away at the soul
until only emptiness remains.
Text.zh:
战争是令人振奋的疫病。
它麻木了心灵，吞噬了灵魂
最后只剩空虚。

Text.en:
There the weary multitude of man-kind 
shall turn in their masses into the wide fire, 
where the destroying flame embraces the living, 
some will go up, some down, filled with misery.
Text.zh:
人类命运羸弱
愿投身残躯于烈火，
企图灭火以得生路。
而有人会活下来，有人则会神秘地倒下。

Text.en:
"Lord of Bone, Lord of Flesh, yet all that we can
master turns to ash." 
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“骸骨之主，血肉之主，
然而我们掌握的一切都终归尘土。”——研究员阿恩

Text.en:
"Great minds wish to reveal all the secrets of time and space.
But it does not matter. Creation, the act of Matter Metamorphosis, 
is the only secret worth discovering." 
- Zeel, Vaal Tinkerer
Text.zh:
“伟大的心灵期望解释所有时间和空间的奥秘。
但无所谓。造物，事物的质变，
才是唯一值得探究的奥秘。”
- 泽尔，瓦尔工匠

Text.en:
An Emperor must conquer his own darkness
before he can act as a beacon of light.
Text.zh:
帝王必须征服心中的黑暗
方能成为万民之灯塔。

Text.en:
Kaom watched the torches patrol the top of the Watch. 
He observed the lay of the beach, its barricades and rocks, 
and his men in their canoes, ready to lay their lives down for him.
But when his foot hit the sand, he thought only of the fight.
Text.zh:
冈姆望着塔顶梭巡的火光。
望着蔓延的海岸线，布满路障礁石，
轻舟站满他的死士。
但当他踩上沙滩，脑中的念头就只剩战斗。

Text.en:
Standing behind iron bars,
Daresso thought of his adoring fans cheering his name, 
his wife's warm embrace waiting for him, 
and of the celebrations that would soon be thrown in his name.
But when the arena gate lifted, he thought only of the fight.
Text.zh:
铁栏之后，
德瑞索想到拥趸们高呼他的名字，
想到等待他的妻子的臂弯，
想到很快以他之名举办的狂欢。
但当角斗场大门升起，脑中的念头就只剩战斗。

Text.en:
Voll stood at the gates of Sarn, and a nation stood behind him. 
He thought of the righteousness of his cause, 
and of the glory he would bring to the empire he would soon lead. 
But as Chitus and his gemlings advanced, he thought only of the fight.
Text.zh:
福尔站在萨恩帝国门前，整个民族是他的后盾。
他想到了自己的正义，
想到了他很快会引领帝国走向荣耀。
但当切特斯和古灵前进时，脑中的念头就只剩战斗。

Text.en:
"No man, before or since,
has climbed to such lofty heights
or fallen so far."
- Voll, Emperor of Purity
Text.zh:
“从来没有谁，
能爬得如此高，
却又堕落到如此田地。”
— 福尔，纯净帝王

Text.en:
"I don't know how I know, 
I just know that I know."
Text.zh:
“我不知道我是如何知道的， 
但我就是知道。”

Text.en:
When you're on the run,
look only to yourself for survival.
Text.zh:
你在逃亡路上，
千万要保住自己的性命。

Text.en:
Xibaqua's treachery was met with divine fury.
One by one, the gods reclaimed their flesh,
until all that remained was a droplet of pure light:
The first Vaal.
Text.zh:
夏巴夸亚的背叛遭到了神罚。
众神逐一剥夺了他们的肉体，
直到他们的身躯只残留下最后一点光沫，
那就是最早的瓦尔。

Text.en:
So great was the thaumaturgy of a bloodpriest's mark,
that sacrifices soon welcomed their death.
Text.zh:
血祭司宝印的奇术曾是如此伟大，
那些献祭很快为他们迎来死亡。

Text.en: Death is but the start of your servitude.
Text.zh: 然而这死亡却是侍奉的开端。

Text.en: We serve only the Night.
Text.zh: 我们只听候寂夜差遣。

Text.en:
There was never a simpler time.
Just simpler motivations.
Text.zh:
没什么更单纯的机会，
只有更单纯的动机。

Text.en:
The leash of the lifegiver
binds in both directions.
Text.zh:
生命赐予者的枷锁
束缚着彼此两端。

Text.en:
"One coy look. One blown kiss. One word spoken.
One night I wish I'd forget."
Text.zh:
“腼腆的一瞥，温柔的一吻，轻轻的一句
永不愿记起的一夜。”

Text.en: He was a lot luckier before he lost this.
Text.zh: 他在失去这个之前曾有更好的运气。

Text.en:
The empire is both the tree and the fruit.
It provides safe harbour as ideas grow within,
and when the time is right, the apple is picked. 
The idea, and our ideals, take root.
Text.zh:
帝国既是因，也是果。
它为诸多理想提供了安全的港湾，
当时机成熟，自然瓜熟蒂落。 
这理想，包括我们的理想，就这样生根发芽。

Text.en:
Sing with me one last duet,
the curtain closes nigh.
Join me in a quiet song,
Before we all must die.
Text.zh:
在这帷幕落下之夜，
最后一次伴随我的二重奏歌唱吧。
让我们用安详的歌声，
迎接我们注定到来的死亡。

Text.en: The greatest of guardians make the greatest of sacrifices.
Text.zh: 最伟大的守护者带来最伟大的牺牲。

Text.en:
"Feel the pain of ancient wounds.
Feel the doom of dying souls."
Text.zh:
“感受上古之殇的痛苦。
体会濒死之魂的灭亡。”

Text.en:
You will know if your subjects follow you from fear
or respect when you have your first moment of weakness.
If it's the former, they will tear you into pieces like rabid dogs.
Text.zh:
当臣民追随你走出恐惧时你就会明白，
当你第一次彷徨无措的时候你就会懂得尊敬。
要是在以前，他们会像疯狗一样把你撕碎。

Text.en:
It was not his fearlessness or ferocity, nor his tactical genius,
it was his leadership that earned Aul, the Last King, his crown.
Text.zh:
并不是因为他的无畏和凶猛，也并非他天才般的谋略，
而是他的领导力成就了奥尔，最后的国王因此加冕。

Text.en:
Where once had stood a village, lay naught but splinters.
Some had once been her home. 
Some had once been her creations.
Some had once been her family.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
这里曾一度矗立着一座村庄，如今只剩断垣残壁。
这里曾经有她的家园。 
这里曾经有她的造物。
这里曾经有她的家人。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
The river, once fertile and fresh, 
and flowing briskly to the sea,
now stood, stained, at a standstill.
Dammed by the coagulating dead.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
这条河流曾经清澈见底，水产丰沃， 
朝着大海奔涌，
如今被尸体围堰，
变成一汪污浊的死水。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
The narrow path turned to rough rocks that led towards the sky.
One last obstacle in a life-long journey
to find a land they could call home.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
这条崎岖的道路布满艰难险阻，却没有出路。
有人在这条路上耗费毕生光阴，
寻找自己的归宿。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
Cold winds blasted what little grew on the icy surface.
The gifts of the land lay hidden deeper,
and only patience and persistence would free them.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
猛烈的寒风助长着冰面的蔓延，
让这片土地的馈赠埋得更深。
只有耐心和坚持才能得到它们。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
Sheltered beneath thick ice,
the river ferried fat fish towards the sea.
But the First King knew the river's secret,
and the fish were not the only ones who grew fat.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
在坚冰之下，
肥美的鱼儿通过暗河游向大海。
但是最初的国王知道河流的秘密，
不再只有鱼儿能长得腰圆体肥。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
He surveyed his lands, green and vital,
watched with pride as his slaves quarried fine stone for his fortress,
and thanked the heavens for his many blessings.
But this pilgrimage to the peak was to be his last.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
他眺望着自己的土地，那里生机盎然，
他骄傲地看着奴隶用上好的石料为他修筑堡垒，
感谢众神赐予他这么多的福祉。
然而朝着远峰的朝圣之旅却使他一去不返。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
The fields were silent but for the plucking of fruits,
the rustling of leaves, and the breaking of stone.
No slave dared to speak or look the passing king in the eye.
No one... except Aul.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
田野寂静地注视着对庄稼的践踏，
只有树梢的窸窣和碎石的抗议。
没有哪个奴隶胆敢抬眼冒犯威严的国王。
没有人……除了奥尔。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en:
With no stone for rebuilding, each storm took its toll on the village.
Huts eventually collapsed, their occupants injured or dead.
Bodies were left by the river, to appease the gods.
But the dead would not remain there.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.}
Text.zh:
由于无力重建家园，每场风暴都给村庄带来新的伤亡。
村中的房屋终于倒塌，这里的居民死伤殆尽。
河流带走了尸体，抚慰神灵。
但死者却不会停留在那里。

<default>{这个物品能够在商贩处用草原和山谷戒指融铸。}

Text.en: History teaches humility.
Text.zh: 历史告诉我们谦卑。

Text.en:
In the weeks that followed the Cataclysm,
the dead began to rot and fester.
The air fouled with such concentration,
that passing birds drowned in flight.
Text.zh:
灾变后的几周里，
亡者开始腐烂。
空气中弥漫着恶臭，
就连偶尔经过的鸟儿也被熏死了。

Text.en:
Though we live and act as individuals,
in truth, we are tethered together. 
The barriers that divide us need not be broken 
for our spirits to become entangled.
Text.zh:
尽管我们单独生活和行动，
事实上，我们都紧紧绑在一起。
我们的灵魂始终相互缠绕，
跨越阻隔我们的所有障碍。

Text.en:
Time, like light, can be refracted into all its myriad colours.
The first shade is beautiful, but the last will drive the unwary insane.
Text.zh:
时间就像光一样，可以折射出无数色彩。
初见时总是美丽的，但最后一刻总会出其不意地令人疯狂。

Text.en:
"There were no survivors. It had only been fired twice."
- Order of the Djinn inscription
Text.zh:
“无人幸存。尽管只发射了两次。”
——巨灵教铭文

Text.en:
"Fusing the parasite with another ring has manifested unpredictable effects.
I theorise the sacrificial vessel's level of anguish is a key variable."
- Arzaak, Syndicate Researcher
Text.zh:
“为寄生者熔铸一枚新戒指后，出现了一些意想不到的后果。
根据我的理论，祭品的痛苦程度是一个关键变量。”
——辛迪加研究者阿尔扎克

Text.en: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.
Text.zh: 为获新生，有时必须适当烧毁旧躯壳。

Text.en: Open the way to new and dangerous lands.
Text.zh: 打开通往危险新大陆的大门。

Text.en: Is it better to find new lands - or to create them?
Text.zh: 寻找新大陆，或是自行创造，孰优孰劣？

Text.en: See the land as it is.
Text.zh: 认清这片土地的本质。

Text.en: See creation as it was, aflame and frantic.
Text.zh: 认清造物的过去，炽烈而疯狂。

Text.en: See creation as it will be, frozen and silent.
Text.zh: 认清造物的未来，冰冷而寂静。

Text.en: See creation as it is, energetic and storming.
Text.zh: 认清造物的现在，蓬勃而汹涌。

Text.en: There can be no defence against the celestial siblings entropy and time.
Text.zh: 天界同胞的熵力和时空之力无人可挡

Text.en:
"The form of this replica came to me in a troubled dream.
I do not believe we should ever allow it to be used."
- Researcher Arn
Text.zh:
“该仿品是在我的噩梦中出现的。
我不知道要不要用它。”——研究员阿恩

Text.en: What has no siblings but is always a twin?
Text.zh: 什么独来独往，却又成双成对？

Text.en:
"This is one riddle I can't solve." 
- Researcher Graven
Text.zh:
“这个谜我解不开。”
——研究员葛拉文

Text.en: Cold winds whirl at the crown of the world.
Text.zh: 世界之顶上冷风呼号。

Text.en:
In their crimson nightmare, the Vaal are still sacrificing themselves to her glory and beauty. 
They stab their own hearts and cry out in ecstasy, only to rise again.
Text.zh:
在瓦尔人血腥的噩梦中，他们仍为她的荣耀与美丽甘愿献身。
他们把刀刺进自己的心脏，发出狂喜的呼喊声，随后获得新生。

Text.en: The spirit hungers for the flesh.
Text.zh: 灵魂渴盼重获血肉。

Text.en:
The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.
Text.zh:
宇宙的广袤蕴藏着远非复杂可形容的能量，
只有最坚韧之人才能掌握它们。

Text.en:
"We could rival the gods with this power, if only we had the mitigating mechanisms
to make it work. A jewel, a talisman, an armour... or the Font..."
Text.zh:
“我们可以用这种力量跟众神比肩，只要我们能找到舒缓机制让它运行。
那可能是一种珠宝，一种魔符，一种装甲……甚至是一种字体……”

Text.en: A tourniquet for the soul, squeezing ethereal into physical.
Text.zh: 止血灵魂，从无到有。

Text.en:
"You covet the strength of your peers, mortal?
Perhaps it can be yours, if you are willing to make an offering of their blood..."
- Vaal Myth of the Third Snake
Text.zh:
“你觊觎旁人的力量吗，凡人？
也许我可以将其赐予你，只要你用他们的鲜血向我供奉”
- 瓦尔神话中的第三条蛇

Text.en:
Exceptional men and women of strong will can flicker a spark, 
but something much greater is needed to unleash the wildfire of true divine flames.
Text.zh:
卓越的男士和强壮的女子总会擦出火花，
但更棒的是在神圣烈焰中燃起野性之火。

Text.en: The power of lightning is a power best shared.
Text.zh: 闪电之力应为世人所分享。

Text.en: The judge determines worthiness by comparison to the paragon: himself.
Text.zh: 审判者决定万物的价值，而参照物则是至臻完美之人，也就是他自己。

Text.en:
I condemned an innocent man to the pyres, but to admit this mistake is to condemn myself.
My only choice is to strive harder.
Text.zh:
我将一个无辜之人定罪为火焚之刑，但这个错误让我对深深自责。
我唯一的选择就是更加努力的抗争。

Text.en:
My subordinates circled me eternally, attuned to the slightest weakness,
ready to tear me apart for their own gains.
Text.zh:
我的附庸们永远环绕着我，适应着我最微小的弱点，
准备有朝一日因己欲将我撕碎。

Text.en:
I sacrificed a life of love for one of responsibility, so that she,
and others like her, might be kept safe.
Text.zh:
为了一己的责任，我牺牲了可能去爱的一生，只为她，
和所有与她相似的女子，活的安康。

Text.en:
I was a happy child, before the cruel truth was revealed to me.
I fight so that the children may remain ignorant.
Text.zh:
在残酷的真相出现之前，我曾是个快乐的孩子。
我奋起抗争，是为了让其他孩子们不染世事。

Text.en:
I feel the moral weight of what I must do to protect Wraeclast.
I accept my guilt without shame. It is my gift to humanity.
Text.zh:
道德感让我必须保卫瓦尔克拉斯。
我毫不羞愧地认罪。这是我对人性的恩赐。

Text.en: Strike true, strike hard, and leave no survivors to retaliate.
Text.zh: 出手要准，出手要狠，绝不留喘息之机。

Text.en:
"The type Delta test subjects could have escaped with the power offered by
Prototype #15, but they suddenly chose to murder each other instead..."
Text.zh:
“四号实验对象们可以依靠十五号实验底子的力量逃跑。
但他们却选择自相残杀……”

Text.en:
Something within the machine never stops moving,
but Oriathan scholars dare not open it to find out why.
Text.zh:
这个机器内似乎有某种永远在活动的东西，
但奥瑞亚的学者们没人敢打开机器，一探究竟。

Text.en: When the time comes to face evil, the faithful are never alone.
Text.zh: 当邪魔降临之时，信仰之人绝不会独行。

午夜的铸造是为了白昼的血案；
凶险之箭悄然射出，街头恶棍横尸当场。
我的事业未竟，还不能与他们相见。

Text.en:
"The Midnight Tinkerer's aid was invaluable during our brief alliance,
but when we failed to make any progress on resurrection, he continued his search elsewhere..."
Text.zh: “在我们短暂的盟约中，午夜修补匠的援助非常宝贵。但我们在复活方面没有进展后，他就去别处继续研究了……”

Text.en: The Black Sekhema's trial had only just begun.
Text.zh: 漆黑丝克玛的审判才刚刚开始。

Text.en:
The champion's name echoes through time, 
drowning out the whispers of the defeated.
Text.zh:
勇士之名在历史中回响，
战败者之言无人铭记。

Text.en:
Young Napuatzi was thrown into the pits, an unwilling sacrifice, 
but the offer of her blood was refused. 
She rose from the pit alive and anew.  
A Leader. A Conquerer. A Viper.
Text.zh:
年轻的娜帕齐被强行当作祭品，扔进了祭坑，
可她的鲜血却没有被接受。
她从祭坑中重获新生。
她成为了领袖和征服者，她就是蝰蛇。

Text.en:
"Hyrri and her arrows broke the sacred code, damning herself. 
Kaom seized her sacrifice, and in doing so, seized victory." 
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
西里和她的利箭违背了神圣的戒律，真该死。
冈姆利用了她的牺牲，正因为如此，他才抓住了胜利的时机。”
- 拉维安加，冈姆的顾问

Text.en:
"The more the warrior understood Tangmazu's gift, the less the mask aided him.
His dreams were filled with divine laughter."
- Tenth Song of the Islands
Text.zh:
“武士对唐玛祖的恩赐了解越多，面具对他的襄助就越少。
他的梦境中充满了神圣的笑声。”
— 《群岛第十歌》

Text.en: The Light drove the darkness from our lands and from our hearts.
Text.zh: 光明从我们的土地和心中驱走了黑暗。

Text.en: A secret few among the Templars grant absolution by bearing the guilt of others.
Text.zh: 圣堂中有少数人通过暗自承担他人的罪行而得到赦免。

Text.en: They believed themselves the pinnacle of civilisation, but that height toppled their empire.
Text.zh: 他们坚信自己到达了文明的顶点，可站得越高就摔得越重。

Text.en: They believed themselves the greatest warriors, but that savagery turned upon their own.
Text.zh: 他们坚信自己是最伟大的武士，可他们却反受野蛮之害。

Text.en: They believed themselves the most ordered, but that tradition turned their forests to salt.
Text.zh: 他们坚信自己是秩序的化身，可他们的家园变为了不毛之地。

Text.en: They believed themselves the utmost faithful, but that conviction became oppression.
Text.zh: 他们坚信自己有最崇高的信仰，可信念却变成了迫害。

Text.en: They believed themselves better than the past, but that confidence brought about nightmare.
Text.zh: 他们坚信自己比先辈更好，可这却变成他们最大的梦魇。

Text.en:
The enslaved Ezomyte clans were not permitted to own weapons.
For years, they trained in secret, watching and waiting for the
perfect moment to reveal the true depth of the Empire's folly.
Text.zh:
血花之役向艾兹麦人的部落展示了真相，
让他们分崩离析的只是虚妄。
恩怨无中生有，从日渐严重的纷争中获得滋养。

Text.en:
Those heroes that set foot on Wraeclast found
themselves changing, only subtly at first...
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED]

Text.en:
For forty-two nights, the Feller of Heroes challenged
the next greatest warrior to a one-on-one duel.
None could match his might.
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED]

Text.en:
In their hour of desperate need, the Knights of the Sun
called out for aid... and the Black Scythe answered.
Text.zh:
烈日骑士在最绝望的时刻呼唤援助……
于是黑镰佣兵给予了回应。

Text.en:
Where others would retreat when vulnerable,
Olroth the Gallant fought deeper into battle.
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED]

Text.en: The priests of the Kalguur worshipped knowledge, not gods.
Text.zh: 卡古兰教士不敬拜神明，他们敬拜知识。

Text.en:
Cadigan the Third ruled dispassionately
through the iron might of artifice.
Text.zh: 卡迪甘三世用善使巧力的铁腕统治着国家。

Text.en:
Olroth the Gallant,
tireless and true,
he fights for me,
he fights for you!
Text.zh:
勇敢的欧罗什，
不知疲倦和真实，
他为我而战，
他为你而战！

Text.en:
Uhtred and his priests drank of the skies
to empower runes... and themselves.
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED]

Text.en:
Nothing endures. All things end.
Then, they begin again.
Text.zh:
万物终将消亡。
然后再重新开始。

Text.en:
Vorana trained her mercenaries
thus: strike true and survive.
Text.zh:
沃拉娜训练佣兵。
要点是：狠狠打，好好活。

Text.en:
Try as you like to hide the
blood on your hands.
You'll still know the truth.
Text.zh:
尽管擦去手上的鲜血吧。
你对此心知肚明。

Text.en: Death's approach brings clarity.
Text.zh: 死神逼近，再无疑惑。

Text.en: Rivers of power course through your veins.
Text.zh: 你的血管里奔流着力量之河。

Text.en: Those that can never die have but one wish.
Text.zh: 不死之人只有一个心愿。

Text.en:
The time is nigh.
War has come.
We dream as one.
Text.zh:
长夜已降，
战号已响。
你我共此梦想。

Text.en:
Judge not the weak, for
they empower the strong.
Text.zh:
勿要批评弱者，
因为他们成就了强者。

Text.en: Every clash leaves one more scar.
Text.zh: 每次冲突都会留下一道疤。

Text.en:
"We awoke to a sudden jungle rupturing the valleys of our home.
Grasping limbs coiled around us, into us. We sank into each other,
then rose into the living sky. My family screams alongside me still."
Text.zh:
“我们醒来后，发现一片丛林忽然穿越了我们的家园。
蔓藤爬上了我们的四肢，钻进了我们的身体，让我们深陷其中，
接着它们越长越高。我的家人都在放生尖叫。”

Text.en:
"We awoke to a sudden dawn cresting through the mountains.
Each peak rose into searing fire, a massive roiling tide.
A great eye gazed upon us, and we became known—utterly."
Text.zh:
“”我们醒来后，发现山间忽现黎明。
每座山峰都被烈焰吞没。
巨眼凝视我们，让我们无处可藏。”

Text.en:
That winter, scorched refugees emerged from the shrine,
speaking only in strange tongues. They prayed to a new
symbol of power, not out of love, but out of fear.
Text.zh:
那年冬天，烧焦的难民从神社中现身，
，他们用陌生的语言述说着，向新的力量之源顶礼膜拜，
那不是关爱之力，而是恐惧之力。

Text.en:
A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.
Text.zh:
只要一个剖面，就能领略
无数被解体的世界的智慧。

Text.en:
There is no force more destructive in the heavens
than the scintillating light of utter clarity.
Text.zh: 天堂中在没有比璀璨之光更有破坏力的东西了。

Text.en:
To eat, to feast, to forget the horror of endless agonising existence
if but for a moment... only to disgorge and do it all again...
Text.zh:
尽情吃喝吧，忘掉无尽痛苦的存在带来的恐怖吧，
哪怕只有片刻也好……吐吧，然后再来一遍……

Text.en:
He reached for his home one last time, a shining jewel among the stars...
only to watch in horror as it ruptured and shattered under a tide of limbs.
Text.zh: WIP

Text.en:
Where that searing dawn fell, silence reigned.
We sought the shadows, but none remained.
Text.zh:
黑暗的内爆撕裂了世界，
每一次都是下一次的原动力。

Text.en:
Those that escaped the annihilating light
sank eternally into crushing darkness.
Text.zh:
虚空在呼唤，它操纵着自然的原力，
让腐坏在灰烬之河中窒息。

Text.en:
Lost in a sea of limbs and screaming faces, they claw
for any fleeting pleasure which might dull the pain.
Text.zh: WIP

Text.en:
A multitude of beings share a wretched existence
irrevocably bound together in perpetual torture.
Text.zh:
万千生灵在永恒的折磨中被拘束在一起，
共享着悲惨的生命。

Text.en:
"The newcomers warn of doom and death beyond mortal ken.
I ask, why should we fear the fire when we serve the Lord of Light?"
- Maxarius, the first High Templar
Text.zh:
“新来之人警告着凡人无法理解的毁灭和死亡。
我反问到，既然我辈侍奉光之王，为何还要惧怕火焰？”
——首任神主马克夏留斯

Text.en:
The minds of those studied utterly by the Cleansing Fire
continue to think and dream and beg for silence...
Text.zh:
被洁净之火彻底看透的人
还在继续做梦，祈求平安……

Text.en:
The bodies of those wholly subsumed by the Tangle
continue to merge and mutate and cry out for release...
Text.zh:
被纠缠之主包裹的肉体们
在永无止尽的融合中哭喊着救命……

Text.en:
Gripping the stolen Spear of Solerai in hand,
the bandit king of Stridevolf watched his enclave burn.
As foretold, the weapon was powerful beyond compare,
but using it had cost him absolutely everything.
Text.zh:
斯特里德沃夫的强盗国王手持偷来的索瑞之矛，
亲眼看着自己的领地被烧成白地。
预言说这把武器威力无比，
但它却让他失去了一切。

Text.en:
Mortal pleasures can hold back the memories,
but a hollow soul can never be healed.
Text.zh:
凡人的快乐可以封印记忆，
但空虚的灵魂永远无法治愈。

Text.en:
A cacophony of battle cries
Reverberate through time and space
Inflicting pain beyond measure
Text.zh:
刺耳的战吼
在时空中回响，
造成的苦痛无法估量

Text.en: Simply the way it must be, so that existence may be.
Text.zh: 简而言之，它必须如此才得以存在。

Text.en:
Only when the mind is empty of ambition
can the cold truth of existence take hold.
Text.zh:
只有意识中毫无野心
存续的冰冷真相才得以占据上风。

Text.en:
She was the last of countless progeny bred to test the limits of limitless power.
In the cosmic prison of her birth, her siblings fought each other to the death
for supremacy. She alone reached her limit... and broke through.
Text.zh:
她是最后一批被培养来测试无限之力的人选。
在她出生的洪荒监狱里，她的兄弟姐妹为争夺霸权
战斗至死。但只有她达到了极限……并完成了突破。

Text.en:
This world is not good enough for her,
so I will make a better one. Nothing
matters but the pursuit of perfection.
Text.zh:
这个世界对她来说还不够美好，
所以我要把它变好。没什么
比追求完美更重要了。

Text.en:
Destruction incarnate leaves a bitter aftertaste
as one soul is imbued with remnants of another,
and the earth is salted by rivers of blood.
Text.zh:
毁灭的化身留下了痛苦的余味，
一个灵魂被另一个灵魂的残余所浸染，
而大地是则被鲜血之河所浸泡。

Text.en:
Alone among the powers of artifice, there is one against
which the horrors of Wraeclast have never adapted.
Text.zh: 在所有诡谲的力量中，只有一种力量是瓦尔克拉斯的恐怖也无法抵抗的。

Text.en: She stands grim, wreathed in flame, awaiting the crusader's call.
Text.zh: 她冷峻地站在那里，被火焰所包围，静候圣战者的召唤。

Text.en:
Knowing the human body to harbour infinite potential,
she endowed her subjects with the most potent forces at her disposal,
striving invariably for improvement.
Text.zh:
知道人体蕴藏着无限的潜力，
她赋予她的臣民最强大的力量，听候她的差遣。
不断努力改进。

Text.en: Some artists wait a lifetime for inspiration. He waited for five.
Text.zh: 有些艺术家一生都在等待灵感。他静候了五个目标。

Text.en: Even after she harvested their tongues, they were still able to scream.
Text.zh: 即使在她割下他们的舌头后，他们仍能喊叫。

Text.en:
This grotesque conglomerate is truly an abomination to behold.
You feel a strange sense of déjà vu when you gaze upon its hideous visage...
Text.zh:
这个怪诞的组合怪看起来确实令人厌恶。
当看到其丑陋面孔时，你会有一种奇怪的似曾相识的感觉...

Text.en:
A fiery horror from a distant plane of existence,
it feasts upon the charred corpses subsumed by lava pits.
Don't fall in...
Text.zh:
一个来自遥远平行世界的炽热恐怖，
它以被熔岩坑吞没的烧焦尸体为食。
别掉进去...

Text.en: Lightning always strikes twice.
Text.zh: 闪电始终成双。

Text.en:
He feeds on the nightmares of the Atlas' denizens.
If you fall asleep in the Atlas, he'll be waiting...
Text.zh:
他以阿特拉斯居民的噩梦为食。
如果你在阿特拉斯睡着了，他会等着你...

Text.en:
In the wake of tyranny,
The battlefields have been left barren.
Text.zh:
暴政过后，
战场已经荒芜。

Text.en: Under clouds of black beset by crimson lightning, we sailed stormy seas of poison and disease. Only one light shone in that darkness; only one Flame to keep hope alive.
Text.zh: 乌云裹挟着深红色闪电，我们在毒物和疾病的风暴洋中航行。黑暗中只有一盏灯还亮着；只有一团火焰让希望不灭。

Text.en: A life without risk is no life at all.
Text.zh: 没有风险，绝非生活。

Text.en: On judgement day, only those who are worthy will survive.
Text.zh: 审判之日，受人敬仰之人方可得生。

Text.en:
Otherworldly incantations echo across the battlefield,
And the warrior readies his blade.
Text.zh:
超凡的咒语在战场上回荡，
战士已磨刀霍霍。

Text.en:
Mechanisms gone awry, circuitry in flux.
This experiment became something truly perverse.
Text.zh:
装置出错，电路乱流。
这个实验变得有些反常。

Text.en: Torture something enough, and you just might force a reaction.
Text.zh: 太多煎熬之后，你可能会强制产生一个反应。

Text.en: Who can tell when whispers are truly from a god?
Text.zh: 谁能知道什么时候低语真的来自上帝？

Text.en:
On the outskirts of Utzaal, at the Temple of Chaos,
the Trialmaster awaits your challenge.
Text.zh: 在乌察尔的郊外，混沌神殿，试炼使者正等待着你的挑战。

Text.en: Fear can be instilled by the smallest entity.
Text.zh: 最小的生物能制造致命的恐惧。

Text.en:
In a void strewn with incandescent stardust,
the emissary of flame traverses interplanetary space
consuming the knowledge of fallen civilisations.
Text.zh:
在散布着炽热星尘的虚空之中，
烈焰的使者跨越浩瀚星宇
吞噬着那些陨落文明的知识。

Text.en: Faith springs abundant at the edge of death.
Text.zh: 信念在死亡的边缘涌现。

Text.en:
We may fight, and we may die, but in these
moments of blood and battle, we truly live.
Text.zh:
我们可能会战斗，我们可能会战死，
但在流血和战斗的时刻，我们真正地活着。

Text.en:
Ancient worshippers of the Greatwolf were overtaken
by a ravenous hunger for all things mystical.
Text.zh: 远古的巨狼崇拜者被对所有神秘事物的极度渴望所占据。

Text.en:
Pray that the flames find fascination,
for the true end follows when the great eye closes.
Text.zh:
祈祷吧，让火焰找到魅力，
因为当合上伟大之眼时，真正的结局随之而来。

Text.en: What do you see when you look inward?
Text.zh: 当你反省时，看到了什么？

Text.en:
On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.
Text.zh:
一边是你的选择。
另一边是它的孪生。

Text.en:
They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.
Text.zh:
它们诞生于原始造物的寰宇汪洋之中。
以母亲的乳汁大宴豪饮，
哪怕只一毫一滴，它们也要争斗到底。

Text.en: A wellspring of vitality bubbling from within.
Text.zh: 从中涌现出生生不息的活力。

Text.en: A mountain fortress safe from the storm.
Text.zh: 不受风暴侵袭的一座山城。

Text.en: A mass of flesh writhing with savage fury.
Text.zh: 一团剧烈翻滚着的血肉。

Text.en: A body that never falters.
Text.zh: 坚不可摧的身躯。

Text.en: A spirit that never rests.
Text.zh: 矢志不渝的精神。

Text.en: A mind that never quiets.
Text.zh: 永不磨灭的热血。

Text.en:
Logic wanes in shining faith, and in rationalism, ardour dims
Thus, the cynic and the zealot are divided
But can they not be one and the same?
Text.zh:
灼灼信仰中，逻辑衰败。理性主义中，热忱不再。
因此愤世嫉俗者总是和虔信狂热者划分开来，
然而这两者就不能合二为一吗？

Text.en:
Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.
Text.zh:
有余则为朽，
不足亦为艰。

Text.en:
A legion of lives claimed
by the shards of obliterated worlds.
Text.zh: 消亡世界的碎片夺走了一大批生命。

Text.en:
Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.
Text.zh:
倦怠占据上风，直到灵感的火苗
被愤怒点燃，挡在他路上的一切
全都灰飞烟灭

Text.en: The price of immortality is isolation.
Text.zh: 不朽的代价是与世隔绝。

Text.en:
Bold and beautiful, a castaway
Hemmed and hawed, for her to stay
Oh, what I'd give for one more day
For she's the one that got away
-Franklin
Text.zh:
流浪的人儿，勇敢而又美艳
只言片语啊，盼望她会流连
再留片刻吧，我愿付出一切
当日一见呐，转眼竟是诀别
-富兰克林

Text.en:
How simple a power, on which empires turn,
when one man stands firm and says, "I refuse."
Text.zh:
当一个人坚定地说：“我拒绝。”时，
多么简单的力量，帝国也会为之改变。

Text.en:
The true secret of the elements
is that all are one and the same.
Text.zh:
元素的真正秘密在于
所有元素皆为同一。

Text.en:
Within a firestorm, the Thane commands the flames
Emblazoned by glory and the song of the First Ones
For the master of fire fears nothing.
Text.zh:
在火焰风暴中，领主号令着烈焰。
用荣耀和初生之子的歌声装点着，
赞颂火焰之主无所畏惧。

Text.en:
Life... Death...
The whim of the cosmos.
Text.zh:
生……死……
不过是宇宙的突发奇想。

Text.en:
In darkest night, 'neath waxen moon
A witch snatches a boy from his room.
He wards off her hexes
The witch he perplexes
And so becomes part of her stew.
Text.zh:
在最黑暗的深夜里，在苍白的月光下
一个女巫将一个男孩从他的房间里掳走。
他抵御了她的妖术
女巫对他困惑不已
于是把他加进了一锅炖菜。

Text.en:
Enraged by the incompetence of mortals
The demon-lord opens a gateway
Unleashing a litany of pain upon the world.
Text.zh:
凡人的无能激怒了魔头
他打开了一道传送门
向这个世界释放了一连串的痛苦。

Text.en:
Maligaro did the cutting... at her request.
In the new void, a malevolent power emerged.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗挥了刀……应她的要求。
在全新的虚空中，一股邪恶的力量出现了。

Text.en: Witness the emergence of a new cosmic power.
Text.zh: 见证全新的宇宙之力诞生。

Text.en:
Fellshrine stood as a holy bastion opposite the
Chamber of Sins, and all that it represented.
For one to rise, the other must fall.
Text.zh:
堕道遗迹作为一座神圣壁垒屹立着，
与罪孽之殿及其所代表的一切相对。
其中一个若要崛起，另一个必将陨落。

Text.en: A fell wind brings death.
Text.zh: 陨落之风带来死亡。

Text.en:
Centuries of peace brought immense wealth to Keth,
but many worried that it had also left the people soft.
Text.zh:
克斯经历数百年的和平，积累的财富不可计数，
忧心的言论却层数不穷：财富也会令人民软弱。

Text.en:
By fire and ice, perhaps the end of the world.
They did not fall on their knees and lament.
Text.zh:
熬过烈火与寒冰，经历世界的终结，
他们也没有屈膝，不曾有哀声一片。

Text.en:
All rejoiced when Solerai and Lundara shattered the grey sky,
but with the cold banished, sandier climes began to creep in...
Text.zh:
索瑞和兰拉击碎了灰色的天空，
可寒冬刚刚散去，飞沙就已来袭。

Text.en:
As they looked toward the future, yet held close the past,
the tale-women began to see the tapestry of Time.
Text.zh:
他们凝望未来，也坚守着过去，
说书人终于看清了时光的织缕。

Text.en:
The path forward is unknown,
but someone must lead.
Let it be the best of us.
Text.zh:
前路不知去往何处，
可必须有人带头，
以佼佼者为先。

Text.en: In the coldest depths of the Winter of the World, overrun by darkness and fighting to the last, life itself clung to existence by the barest remaining thread.
Text.zh: 世界之冬，寒渊之中，黑暗围攻，奋战至终。生命之火，岂肯屈从。

Text.en:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.
Text.zh:
纯净之神升格成为神灵并不是靠信仰所激发，
而是对另外一个人的诋毁和憎恨。

Text.en: An eye for an eye makes the whole world dead.
Text.zh: 冤冤相报，举目皆亡。

Text.en:
Beidat made false promises to many denizens,
converting only one into a conduit through
which Wraeclast might be consumed.
Text.zh:
贝达特曾向许多人许下虚假的承诺
但只选中一个作为容器
试图以此吞噬整个瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
The spirits of our ancestors guided us from the Archipelago to the continent.
Inextricably, the purity of our souls is linked to the ones who came before us.
Text.zh:
祖先的灵魂指引我们
从群岛来到大陆。
我们纯洁的灵魂与先祖别深深相连。

Text.en:
The fundamental forces of our world are secrets
to be uncovered by the intelligent and the capable.
Like all secrets, they, too, can be stolen.
Text.zh:
世界的基本力如同秘密
将由智慧且能干之人所揭示。
然而就像所有的秘密一样，它们也能被窃取。

Text.en:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe
Text.zh:
“我射出连珠箭矢飞入害我爱人的凶手的心脏。
但这并没有给我带来满足，
没有治愈，没有复仇。只留下一片...空虚。”
——雷默科部落的女酋长，阿华纳

Text.en:
"A man confronted with sufficient adversity
may ascend to unprecedented heights
and triumph over his coddled rivals."
- Weylan the Ezomyte
Text.zh:
“当一个人屡逢逆境
是否能攀上巅峰
战胜备受溺爱的对手。”
——卫兰，艾兹麦

Text.en:
There is no greater thrill than leaping into combat,
slashing and hewing with utmost abandon.
Text.zh:
再没有比纵身跃入战场，
毫无保留地挥舞剑刃更让人兴奋的事情了。

Text.en:
The inferno surged past, devastating Stridevolf, but the Maraketh
warrior somehow remained. Soot-blackened and resolute, she
grinned. In that moment, the bandit king knew true despair.
Text.zh:
烈火席卷而过，摧毁了斯特里德沃夫，但马拉克斯
的勇士仍屹立不倒。她满身灰烟，却坚毅地笑着。
那一刻，盗贼之王感到了真正的绝望。

Text.en:
At the core of the warrior's spirit,
a fierce determination burns,
igniting their capacity to endure.
Text.zh:
战士之魂中燃起了决心之火，
点燃了他们坚韧的耐力。

Text.en:
Seek not to avoid the mortal pains of this world.
In flagellation, there lies freedom from temptation.
Text.zh:
切莫逃避凡世的痛楚，
历苦行方能挣脱诱惑。

Text.en:
"Slay my twin and I will inherit her wisdom.
Slay me and her life will be prolonged by my demise.
Our souls are eternally bound by the sacrifices we have made."
- High Priest Atazek
Text.zh:
“杀了我的双胞胎，我就能继承她的智慧。
而杀了我，她的生命就会因我的死而延长。
因为彼此的灵魂永远被那牺牲所束缚。”
——高阶祭司阿塔扎克

Text.en:
"Atziri ordained that we exploit the weaknesses inherent in our slaves.
With relish, we did exactly as she instructed."
- Guatelitzi, Architect of Flesh
Text.zh:
“阿兹里命令我们要利用奴隶们的弱点。
我们津津有味地完全照做了。
——血肉建筑师瓜铁雷兹

Text.en:
"Put your faith in me.
Our god demands it."
- High Templar Maxarius
Text.zh:
“相信我吧。
我们的神要求如此。”
——教宗玛萨留斯

Text.en:
As the fiery remnants of our outpost were subsumed into the caldera,
a thunderous voice echoed across the barren landscape,
"Your fragility is your folly. May others rise where you have fallen."
- El'Abin, Bloodeater
Text.zh:
随着我们的前哨站被付之一炬，残骸没入隆隆岩浆
宛若雷霆的声音传遍了这片荒芜之地
“你的弱点便是愚蠢。但愿其他人能在你倒下的地方站起来。”
——嗜血者伊兰雅本

Text.en:
For their mortal allies, the last Titans forged a mighty staff,
one that could safely hold the first unearthed virtue gem.
Text.zh:
为了他们的凡人盟友，最后的泰坦铸造了一根强大的法杖，
可以安全地容纳下第一颗被发掘出的古灵宝石。

Text.en:
Its forging marked the melding of man
and Titan against the rising darkness.
Text.zh:
它的锻造标志着人类与泰坦的融合，
共同抵御崛起的黑暗。

Text.en:
Blood, slaves and stone.
The timeless edifice of Dominance.
Text.zh:
鲜血，奴隶和石头。
都是统治者不朽大厦的基石。

Text.en: Call to place the demon gods of the past.
Text.zh: 召唤过去的古代魔神。

Text.en: The eyes of Apep flicker open and the Poisoned One stirs.
Text.zh: 邪眼眨一眨，剧毒就散了开来。

Text.en:
The ritual creates order. 
Both in the minds of men and gods. 
The ritual creates order.
Text.zh:
仪式创造秩序。
对凡人和神都一样。
仪式创造秩序。

Text.en:
Ancient myths of flame, frost and thunder.
Will we ever know the way forward?
Text.zh:
古老的神话，烈焰、冰霜与雷霆。
我们会找到前进的路吗？

Text.en:
Your actions live but a moment;
their repercussions never die.
Text.zh:
你的举动只存一刻；
它们的影响却永恒存在。

Text.en:
With great tragedy and power,
the dead are netted in anguish.
Text.zh:
有着伟大的力量和悲剧，
亡者也就不再痛苦。

Text.en:
It is not our flesh, our thoughts, or our soul that limits us;
it is the distinction between them.
Text.zh:
并不是我们的躯体、思维或灵魂在制约着我们；
而是三者之间的差别使然。

Text.en: Festivities of blood. Bleeding hearts and screaming lungs.
Text.zh: 鲜血的盛典。流血的心和哭喊的喉。

Text.en:
You walk away bloodied and exhausted,
but victorious. You have overcome.
Text.zh: 你带着血迹和疲惫离开，但是你胜利了。你克服了困难。

Text.en:
Your broken body lies forgotten,
nourishing only the worms.
Text.zh: 你支离破碎的身驱被遗忘，成为虫子的美味。

Text.en:
Mortals spend their lives wondering which
fate shall be theirs. Chaos takes amusement
in knowing the answer: all of them.
Text.zh:
凡人终其一生都在思考自己的命运。
混沌以知道答案为乐：所有一切。

Text.en:
You stagger away, embarrassed by your failure.
Your only consolation prize is your life.
Text.zh: 你蹒跚而去，为自己的失败感到难堪。唯一的安慰奖是你的生命。

Text.en:
The Ember-dwellers sought to throw you to their volcanic god, young Omid,
but we caught you instead. The Order of the Djinn is your tribe now.
Text.zh:
灰烬氏族打算把你献给他们的火山之神，年轻的奥米德，
但是我们先找到了你。现在，巨灵教就是你的部落了。

Text.en:
We task you, honoured Omid, with the investigation of this mysterious
'Xoph' and artefacts related to rifts in the boundaries of our world.
Text.zh:
我们指派你，尊敬的奥米德，对这个神秘的“索伏”
和我们的世界边缘那些裂口相关的圣物进行调查。

Text.en:
Omid, Master Researcher, has left a final commandment upon his death:
the world must never know.
Text.zh:
杰出的学者奥米德临死时留下了一条最后的告诫：
永远不要让世人知晓。

Text.en:
The Master Researcher's final commandment has failed.
The High Templar has seen the truth of our situation,
and the world will be undone by his fear.
Text.zh:
研究大师的最后戒律失败了。
神主已经见到了我们处境的真相，
世界将在他的恐惧中灭亡。

Text.en:
Consider yourself an orphaned Eternal no longer, young Betucia.
The Order of the Djinn is your family now.
Text.zh:
你不再是孑然一身的永生者了，贝图西亚。
巨灵教就是你的家人。

Text.en:
For your loyalty and valour, honoured Betucia, we are proud to put
the requisition of dream-artefacts in your capable hands.
Text.zh:
鉴于你的忠诚与勇敢，贝图西亚，我们骄傲地
将找回梦之神器的任务交给你。

Text.en:
Betucia, Bearer of the Sealing Blade, the Order of the Djinn survives
because of your sacrifice, but will be forever wounded by your loss.
Text.zh:
贝图西亚，封印长剑之主，你为巨灵教的存活
而献身，你的离去是我们永远无法弥合的伤口。

Text.en:
The Sealing Blade has been removed, and the agent of Decay
shall feed upon this world until nothing remains but dust.
Text.zh:
封印之剑已经移除，腐坏的爪牙将对世界敲骨吸髓，
直到它化为灰烬。

Text.en:
The Maraketh left you to die alone in the desert, young Sumei, but we
saw the potential in you. The Order of the Djinn is your akhara now.
Text.zh:
马拉克斯人把你扔下等死，年轻的苏美，
但我们看到了你的潜力。现在，你是巨灵教的人了。

Text.en:
As the best of our lorekeepers, honoured Sumei, it is now your task
to investigate the mysterious duplication of artefacts of power.
Text.zh:
你是我们当中最优秀的博学者，尊敬的苏美，
调查力量神器的神秘复制品的任务就交给你了。

Text.en:
Go to your rest now, Sumei, Master Lorekeeper. The Order shall keep
contained the terrible secret that burdened your final years.
Text.zh:
安息吧，苏美，伟大的博学者。巨灵教
将保守在最后的时光困扰你的那些可怕秘密。

Text.en:
The books were burned, and the scribes set themselves aflame.
What secret so terrible could they have discovered?
Though centuries have passed, we must investigate this for ourselves.
Text.zh:
书籍已被烧毁，抄写人都已自焚。他们到底发现了什么可怕的秘密？
虽然许多世纪已经过去，我们也必须一探究竟。

Text.en:
Feuding Ezomytes slaughtered your kin, young Agnar, but we pulled you
from the flames. The Order of the Djinn is your clan now.
Text.zh:
你的亲族全部葬身在与艾兹麦人的冲突中，年轻的阿格纳，是我们
将你从烈焰中救了出来。现在，巨灵教就是你的族人了。

Text.en:
None among us understand the beasts of this world better than you,
honoured Agnar. You will root out the mysteries of wild-artefacts.
Text.zh:
你是我们当中最了解世间种种野兽的人，尊敬的阿格纳。
你将会找到神秘的野性神器。

Text.en:
The Order was your clan in life, Agnar, Beastmaster, but the First Ones call
back their favoured son. The gift of their Visions will pass to another.
Text.zh:
巨灵教是你生前的族人，野兽大师阿格纳，但现在初代们要召回
他们最心爱的儿子了。他们的灵视将传给下一个继承者。

Text.en:
Without an experienced Beastmaster to find them new realms,
the First Ones' ravaging hunt brings them ever closer to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
没有老练的魔兽大师为他们寻找新家，
初代们的疯狂狩猎就会日益逼近瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
Without an experienced Beastmaster to find them new realms,
the First Ones' ravaging hunt brings them ever closer to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
没有老练的魔兽大师为他们寻找新家，
初代们的疯狂狩猎就会日益逼近瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
Without an experienced Beastmaster to find them new realms,
the First Ones' ravaging hunt brings them ever closer to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
没有老练的魔兽大师为他们寻找新家，
初代们的疯狂狩猎就会日益逼近瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
Without an experienced Beastmaster to find them new realms,
the First Ones' ravaging hunt brings them ever closer to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
没有老练的魔兽大师为他们寻找新家，
初代们的疯狂狩猎就会日益逼近瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
Without an experienced Beastmaster to find them new realms,
the First Ones' ravaging hunt brings them ever closer to Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
没有老练的魔兽大师为他们寻找新家，
初代们的疯狂狩猎就会日益逼近瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
The Peak-dwellers saw you as impure, young Qianga, but the Order of
the Djinn sees you as all the stronger for your uniqueness.
Text.zh:
独峰氏族认为你不纯洁，年轻的羌雅，但
巨灵教看到了你的独特之处中蕴含的力量。

Text.en:
Bold dreamer, Qianga of the Stars, she of the Celestial Cold! These titles
we bestow upon the one among us whose soul speaks to the ineffable.
Text.zh:
勇敢的梦想家，星辰中的羌雅，众星之寒！这些，还有其他的称号，
都属于我们当中那位能与未知对话的人。

Text.en:
Qianga of the Stars, Deliverer of the Sealing Blade to the Watchers, go now, and
let your half-dreamt life be troubled by nightmares of achromic hunger no more.
Text.zh:
星辰中的羌雅，将封印长剑交给守望者的人，离去吧，
愿你半生饱受饥馑的噩梦永不再困扰你。

Text.en:
The Watchers have gone silent, yet they scream still.
Something lurks among the stars of our dreams, knocking at the door,
whispering with the voices of long lost friends...
Text.zh:
凝视者失去了声音，却仍在尖叫。
有东西在我们的梦境之星周围蛰伏，敲着门，
用久违朋友的声音耳语……

Text.en:
Your visions led the Azmeri down into a world left abandoned by the Vaal.
They cast you out, young Egrin, but the Order of the Djinn accepts you.
Text.zh:
你的灵视将族人带到了被瓦尔人抛弃的世界中。他们把你赶了出来，
年轻的艾格林。但巨灵教张开双臂欢迎你。

Text.en:
Speaker of unclean truths, Egrin of the Dark Between Stars.
We curse you whose soul echoes the madness of the void!
Text.zh:
丑恶真相的代言人，夜空之暗艾格林。
虚无的疯狂在你的灵魂中回响，我们诅咒你！

Text.en:
Egrin of the Dark Between Stars, Forger of the Sealing Blade,
let your name be redeemed by your unexpected sacrifice.
Text.zh:
夜空之暗艾格林，先被阿兹莫里人放逐，随后是巨灵教。
让你的名字洗清耻辱！封印长剑的铸造者，你的意外牺牲
将为你洗刷一切污名。

Text.en:
We are all equally fools for our childish notions.
That dread force Decay cannot be defeated by self-sacrifice.
Text.zh:
我们都是蠢货，都太天真。
腐坏的致命力量不可能靠自我牺牲打败。

Text.en:
As the first Brinerot to join the Order, you have much to prove,
young Raethan. We are confident you will succeed.
Text.zh:
作为第一个加入巨灵教的布琳洛特人，你有许多需要证明的事情，
年轻的雷桑。我们相信你会成功的。

Text.en:
For harnessing and controlling the power of lightning, you, Raethan,
are now charged with researching this new energy.
Text.zh:
鉴于你驾驭和控制闪电力量的能力，
雷桑，研究这种新能量的任务就交给你了。

Text.en:
Let him not be called Raethan the Betrayer. His discovery was too important
to keep locked away. Now, for good or ill, it is in civilisation's hands.
Text.zh:
不要叫他叛徒雷桑。他的发现太过伟大，不能永远埋藏。
现在，无论是福是祸，这种力量都已落入人类文明手中。

Text.en:
Madness marches in machine form.
Harnessed lightning, grim faces, and cold ambition abounds.
Civilisation will be its own undoing.
Text.zh:
疯狂在机械中激荡。
缠绕的闪电，冷峻的面孔，还有无所不在的冰冷野心。
文明只会被自己灭亡。

Text.en:
You were a casualty of callous Karui warfare, ageless Narumoa, but the Order
mended your wounds. You are bound to us now by your own code.
Text.zh:
不老的纳鲁摩奥，你本会死在无情的卡鲁战争中，
是巨灵教为你治好了伤口。依照你尊奉的信条，
现在你属于我们了。

Text.en:
Though your peers fear you, Narumoa, the elders have decided that your
second sight is ideal for handling all artefacts that seek to subvert Fate.
Text.zh:
尽管同伴们都畏惧你，纳鲁摩奥，但教团长老认定，
你的第二视觉是处理颠覆命运的神器的
理想工具。

Text.en:
Your centuries of service have been invaluable to us, Narumoa. Go now,
return to Hinekora, and join your ancient kin in the halls of the dead.
Text.zh:
几个世纪以来，你为我们付出了宝贵的服务，纳鲁摩奥。回去吧，
回到辛格拉身边，到亡者之境寻找古老的亲族去吧。

Text.en:
Hinekora has sent the world another herald, but this hatungo walks another path.
We are left blinded, and subject to the vagaries of Fate.
Text.zh:
辛格拉给这个世界派来过另一位先知，但这位哈图纳格斯却走上了另一条道路。
我们不再盲目，向变幻莫测的命运屈服。

Text.en:
Young Tsarsk, you were a broken and forgotten child lying glassy-eyed
in a flesh-pit in Trarthus, but the Order found and cleansed you.
Text.zh: 年轻的扎斯克，你本是一个虚弱的孩子，被人遗弃在特拉特斯的万人坑里等死，是巨灵教找到你，为你洗去污垢。

Text.en:
Your tortured soul long kept you isolated from your peers, Tsarsk, but has attracted
new kindred in kind. You are tasked with appeasing these anguished spirits.
Text.zh:
你的灵魂饱受折磨，因此同伴们总是离你远远的，扎斯克，
但这却吸引了其他与你同病相怜的族类。现在，你需要去抚慰这些痛苦的灵魂。

Text.en:
Though you were swallowed by your own darkness, you saved countless others
from eternal misery, young Tsarsk. You were not nothing, as you feared.
Text.zh:
你被自己的黑暗吞噬，但却使无数人从永恒的折磨中得到解脱，
年轻的扎斯克。别再担心了，你的存在并非毫无意义。

Text.en:
Without a speaker of the dead, the countless anguished spirits only grow in number.
They have no voice, and no hope. The sun darkens with each passing year.
Text.zh:
死者没有代言人，难以胜数的痛苦灵魂只会越来越多。
它们没有声音，没有希望。阳光也逐年黯淡。

Text.en:
Your outlaw camp abandoned you when their surprise attack failed, young Rindwik.
Now that you know we exist, we cannot let you go. You have two choices.
Text.zh:
你们的犯罪团伙突袭失败后，他们抛弃了你，年轻的林德维克。
现在，你已经发现了我们的存在，我们不能让你就这么离开。你有两个选择。

Text.en:
Your people were renegades, Rindwik, but you have proven your loyalty.
You will lead the martial defence of our expeditions.
Text.zh:
你原来的同伴都是一群背信弃义之人，林德维克，但你已经证明了
自己的忠诚。你将在我们的远征中负责军事防御工作。

Text.en:
Master Warrior Rindwik fell to one opponent alone: old age.
Only the greatest soldiers can say as much.
Text.zh:
战斗大师林德维克只输给过一个敌人：衰老。
只有最伟大的战士才会得到这样的荣耀。

Text.en:
In the absence of a strong martial presence, the renegades rise once more.
Their poisons threaten to cloud the land.
Text.zh:
没有足够震撼的奇迹，叛乱就会再起。
他们的怨毒将会席卷这片土地。

Text.en:
Your ancestry has been much maligned by history, young Sarina Titucius,
but to the Order of the Djinn, you are born anew.
Text.zh:
你的祖先在历史上留下的记录并不光彩，年轻的
萨琳娜·提忒休斯，但在巨灵教，你获得了新生。

Text.en:
For deciphering the language of the inscrutable ones, honoured Sarina,
we charge you with investigating their intent in our land.
Text.zh:
你破译了神秘者的语言，尊敬的萨琳娜，
因此我们派你去调查他们来到我们这里的目的。

Text.en:
For your valour beyond the Gate, Sarina Titucius, we honour you with the first
Gilded Scarab awarded while its recipient still lives. Remain vigilant.
Text.zh:
因为你在命运之门另一侧表现出的勇气，萨琳娜·提忒休斯，你将成为第一个
荣获镀金圣物的生者。保持警惕。

Text.en:
The thousand year truce has faltered, for the inscrutable ones have imprisoned their own God.
Should they invade again, there will be no warning.
Text.zh:
千年休战即将瓦解，皆因那群莫名之辈禁锢了自己的神灵。
他们入侵在即，这无需警醒。

Text.en:
Your people no longer walk this continent, young Revna,
but the Order of the Djinn will give you a new home.
Text.zh:
小瑞弗纳啊，汝等一族不复存在，
但迪精之令却可以给你新家。

Text.en:
As you delve into the mysteries of this world, apprentice Revna,
remember to learn from the past, not be consumed by it.
Text.zh:
我徒瑞弗纳啊，待汝深究世界的奥妙，
一定要师从过去，但不要被其吞噬。

Text.en:
We lay you to rest in the forest deep, Runesmith Revna, so that you may be
forever hidden from the stars which so terrified you in your final days.
May the secret you took to your grave be lifted from your burdens.
Text.zh:
符文师瑞弗纳啊，我等葬你于密林深处，如此你便不必再看到让你惊恐的群星。
愿你的秘密随你一道入土消散。

Text.en:
Darkness surges in the shadows of the past. Ancient evils stir. The stars
watch, forever aloof, forever menacing. None remain who know the
secret, so we are defenseless in the face of the unknown.
Text.zh:
黑暗在往日幽影中涌动，上古邪魔蠢蠢欲动。
群星在高天上虎视眈眈。通晓奥秘之人均已亡故，
我等只能面对未知，举手无措。

Text.en:
Your faith and our Order are not in opposition, young Eutychus. 
Let this be the start of a new era of cooperation.
Text.zh:
你的坚贞和我辈的信条并不矛盾，年轻的尤提克斯。
让我们携手合作，开启全新的纪元。

Text.en:
As our hand in the Chamber, we grant you, Deacon Eutychus,
access to a domain we lack the resources to explore.
Text.zh:
我们授予你职权，尤提克斯辅祭，
去找到那个我们无力探寻的恶魔。

Text.en:
Given the fate of Deacon Eutychus and the men under Cardinal Sanctus Vox,
let none dare the Domain, lest they too feed that vile hunger eternal.
Text.zh:
尤提克斯辅祭和那位仅次于圣沃克斯大主教之人的下场，
使无人再敢冒犯神域，也使它们永远保持恶毒的饥渴。

Text.en:
As the passage between Wraeclast and the land beyond time's reach is torn open,
we stand on the precipice of eternal war.
And no one remains to hold us back.
Text.zh:
被时间遗忘之地和瓦尔克拉斯的通道已经打开，
我们已经被逼上永恒之战的边缘。
我们已经孤立无援。

Text.en:
Rejected even by the Faridun outcasts, young Saresh, you were cursed to walk the
white sands until we found you. The Order shall command your penance now.
Text.zh:
年轻的沙利希，连法里顿流浪汉都拒绝接纳你。被我们找到前，
你在诅咒中穿越白色沙漠。现在，教团需要你赎罪。

Text.en:
As you explore the vast well of human darkness, Saresh, our Surgeon of the Dead,
remember that the price can sometimes exceed the value of knowledge.
Text.zh: 死者之医沙利希啊，请牢记一句，探索人性黑暗的代价，恐怕远超它带来的价值。

Text.en:
There was a man of bone, rotting flesh, and weeping black, but his name, his
ill-gotten knowledge, and his role in the Order shall be stricken from memory.
Text.zh:
有人只剩下了枯骨，他的血肉早已朽坏，眼中只剩下了腐水，
但他的名字，他来路不明的学问，还有他在教团的角色都将永遭唾弃。

Text.en:
Though the Necromancer of Weeping Black fell in the desert by the hand of Garukhan,
his mindless legions remain scattered throughout Wraeclast, with no master to curb their hunger.
Text.zh:
虽然腐泣的死灵师被格鲁坎亲手消灭在沙漠中，
但他没有心智的军团仍在瓦尔克拉斯肆虐，再没有主人喂养它们的饥饿。

Text.en:
We pulled you from the raging ocean, young Dhunan,
but we cannot return you to your home. The Order of the Djinn
offers you a place on Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
年轻的杜楠，我们在怒海中把你捞了起来，
但我们无法送你返回艾斯克拉斯。
迪精之令可以送你去瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
For using the techniques of your homeland to contain
the fungal plague, honoured Dhunan, you shall lead the war
to eliminate it and end the century-cycle of infestation.
Text.zh:
尊敬的杜楠，只要运用您故乡的菌潮抑制技术，
你必然可以让我们根除菌潮，
终结这场以世纪为周期的祸乱。

Text.en:
Be at rest, Blightmaster Dhunan, on the distant shores of
your home. A dangerous expedition, but one worthy for
he who gave his life to cleanse Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
菌潮克星杜楠，愿你在远离故土的海岸上安息。
这场冒险很危险，但这是值得的。
他牺牲了自己的生命净化了瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
The fungal plague returns, and its roots have adapted.
The undiscovered Blightheart that Dhunan theorised
must still exist somewhere, yet none remain
with the skill to see to its destruction.
Text.zh:
菌潮又回来了，它们的根须进化了。
但杜楠所说的菌潮之心肯定存在，
只是现在还没有发现，
我们也没有能力找到它的下落。

Text.en:
As the hordes of bone and blood and foul magic surge across the Vastiri Plains,
the scant survivors of our akhara agree to your alliance, ash-scarred Ahkeli.
Disorder means death. Order may mean life.
Text.zh:
灰疤阿克莱，如今崇尚鲜血、骨骸，还有污秽魔法的部落横行瓦斯提里平原。
我们只剩残兵败将，只能同意和你结盟。
因为只有秩序才能带来生命，混乱只能带来灭亡。

Text.en:
Your golems and your leadership have slowed the tide of death, Clayshaper.
The relics of power you bid us find have kept the Vastiri Plains from the brink
of oblivion. The defences of the Maraketh will hold.
Text.zh:
塑泥人，你的魔像和领袖才能阻挡了死亡之潮。
你命我们寻找的遗器让瓦斯提里平原避免被湮灭倾覆。
马拉克斯的防线必能守住。

Text.en:
The Winter of the World has ended at the hands of the Three Sisters. We lay this scarab
upon your ancient grave in thanks for your efforts, Honoured Founder. As you hoped,
the fate of your people will never befall another.
Text.zh:
尊敬的奠基人，冬之世界已经终结在了三姐妹手上。为了感谢您的贡献，我们向您古老的陵墓献上这只圣甲虫。
我们实现了您的愿望，您的人民再也没有第二次倒下。

Text.en:
The Abyssals creep forth by night and by storm. Their eons underground were not
a respite, but an amassing, and now they number beyond comprehension.
Text.zh:
深渊孽种趁着夜色和风暴爬出来。
它们并非在底下残喘，而是积蓄力量，静待如今壮大之时。

Text.en:
A glorious vista once exclusive
to emperors. Not anymore.
Text.zh:
这样的美景曾是皇家独有。
现在再也不是了。

Text.en:
A paradise, forever replenished by
endless waves teeming with life.
Text.zh:
一个永远
充满勃勃生机的天堂。

Text.en:
Unknown legacies.
Untold stories.
Text.zh:
神秘的传承。
失传的故事。

Text.en:
A penitentiary for those who are not penitent
is nothing more than an inn for the evil.
Text.zh:
如果不知忏悔，
教养所不过是容纳奸邪的旅馆罢了。

Text.en:
An unwashed gutter, where wretches
cut purses and throats alike.
Text.zh:
肮脏的小道，你的钱包和喉咙
都随时有可能被划开。

Text.en:
Slaves held like cattle. A blood-soaked
revolution, just waiting to happen.
Text.zh:
奴隶遭到了非人的虐待。
一场浸透鲜血的革命一触即发。

Text.en:
Heat. Dust. Wind. These are what
forge strong minds and bodies.
Text.zh:
高温。尘土。风霜。
顽强的意志和体魄就是这样打磨出来的。

Text.en:
Water vanishes; an impromptu
prison becomes a tomb.
Text.zh:
河水消失了，
临时监狱变成了坟墓。

Text.en:
In darkness, beast and man
alike clamour to survive.
Text.zh:
在黑暗中，
人和兽一样为生存而喧嚣。

Text.en:
Embraced by mud. Grasped by roots.
The careless are silently swallowed.
Text.zh:
被泥土拥抱。被根须抓住。
一不小心，就会被静静吞噬。

Text.en:
Icy fangs seek tender hulls
to sink themselves into.
Text.zh:
冰冷的獠牙正等着
咬开不够坚硬的脑袋。

Text.en:
Treat a man like a wild animal,
and he will soon learn to bite.
Text.zh:
把人当野兽对待，
很快他就能学会撕咬。

Text.en:
The water brings life,
the poison takes it away.
Text.zh:
水带来生命，
毒药又将其带走。

Text.en:
Two unexplored frontiers remain:
The skies and the soil.
Text.zh:
还有两条没有探索的前线：
天空和土壤。

Text.en:
Amidst the barren wastes,
a slender strand of life blooms.
Text.zh:
在一片贫瘠废土中，
一丝生机正在悄悄萌发。

Text.en:
The farmer no longer plows
or sows. Only the flattened
soil remains.
Text.zh:
农民不再耕耘。
只留下平坦的
土地。

Text.en:
The wealthy foolishly battle
the ocean for domain.
Text.zh:
富人愚蠢地挑战海洋，
试图争夺地盘。

Text.en:
Vile fiends hide beneath
the peaceful plains.
Text.zh:
平原看似平静，
其下暗藏杀机。

Text.en:
Life crushed together.
Left to crumble to dust.
Text.zh:
生命彼此撞击，
随后归为尘埃。

Text.en:
We create so that some part
of us may remain after death.
Text.zh:
创造的目的是在
死后留下些什么。

Text.en:
Countless generations have
walked these time-worn stones.
Text.zh:
这些饱经沧桑的石头
曾经历过一代又一代人的脚步。

Text.en:
Relics of a forbidden past.
Hidden away. Forgotten.
Text.zh:
一段禁忌历史的遗物。
深深隐藏。久久遗忘。

Text.en:
Justice born of love is a surrender.
Justice born of law is a punishment.
Text.zh:
爱的正义是妥协。
法律的正义是惩罚。

Text.en:
Nothing good washes up
on this dark shore.
Text.zh:
在这片黑暗的海滩，
海水从不会带来任何好消息。

Text.en:
We all began life in darkness,
we shall all end it there.
Text.zh:
生命始于黑暗，
终于黑暗。

Text.en: Beauty and brutality in such close proximity.
Text.zh: 美丽与残忍总是如影随形。

Text.en:
Forget kings and emperors;
He who holds the coin holds all the power.
Text.zh:
王侯将相又如何；
手握金币之人才真正大权在握。

Text.en:
Trapped in absolute darkness.
Despair. Panic. Terror.
Text.zh:
受困绝对黑暗中。
绝望。疯狂。恐惧。

Text.en:
We must all walk the narrow, winding path.
The end is always the same.
Text.zh:
我们必须踏上这条狭窄曲折的道路。
尽头也总是一样的。

Text.en: Tremble in the might of the flames.
Text.zh: 在烈焰的力量前颤抖吧。

Text.en:
Fire ignites the sky.
A signal to keep away.
An invitation to invade.
Text.zh:
烈火点燃天空。
逃跑的信号。
侵略的邀请。

Text.en:
A deep wound in the land.
One that will never heal.
Text.zh:
大地上深深的伤口。
永远无法愈合。

Text.en:
Ornate, elaborate, ostentatious...
and dripping with death.
Text.zh:
华丽、精致、璀璨…
黑暗的气息满溢而出。

Text.en:
The creatures that prowl the wildest extremes,
nature anoints with cruel efficacy to defend her.
Text.zh:
生活在最恶劣条件下的生物，
必有最残酷的能力保护自己。

Text.en:
Forlorn and sorrowful, this once opulent
ruin conceals the sins of a fallen line.
Text.zh:
死气沉沉而充满悲伤，
这片曾经丰饶的废墟埋藏着一个没落家族的罪恶。

Text.en:
They live trapped forever in darkness
and confusion. We are no different.
Text.zh:
他们永远受困于黑暗与迷茫。
我们何尝不是如此。

Text.en: We are ever the makers of our own undoing.
Text.zh: 一切的错误与失败都源自于我们自己。

Text.en:
The stone cannot stop the torrent.
It can only divert it.
Text.zh:
岩石无法阻挡洪流，
只能令其分裂。

Text.en:
Affluence and effluence, separated
by a few feet of soil.
Text.zh:
生机与剧毒，
只隔着几寸薄薄的土地。

Text.en:
This was not the first
civilization to believe itself
the greatest. And it will
not be the last.
Text.zh:
这并非第一个
自诩凌驾世界之上
的文明。也不会是
最后一个。

Text.en:
Man and nature intertwined,
but only for the chosen few.
Text.zh:
人与自然彼此羁绊，
但只有幸运的少数可以存活。

Text.en:
Panic only hastens the venom's
passage to the heart.
Text.zh:
恐慌只会加速
毒液进入心脏。

Text.en:
Man burrows for only
the eternal hibernation.
Text.zh: 人类踏入永恒的休眠。

Text.en:
A vault for the dead, as if
they were valuable. Pathetic.
Text.zh:
为逝者修建的大厅，
仿佛他们还有一丝价值。可悲。

Text.en:
They pleaded for the gods to bless their land.
Now they lie under the soil.
Text.zh:
他们恳求众神眷顾自己的土地。
现在他们都躺在土地里了。

Text.en: Verdant canopies shroud the world in darkness.
Text.zh: 苍翠的华盖遮天蔽日，其下一片黑暗。

Text.en:
Every movement is watched,
recorded, remembered.
Text.zh:
一举一动都被
监视、记录、铭记。

Text.en:
They came for enlightenment,
but were imprisoned by madness.
Text.zh:
他们为启迪而来，
却被困在疯狂中。

Text.en:
Little light enters.
No life escapes.
Text.zh:
光进不来。
生命出不去。

Text.en:
Reach out into the abyss,
and the abyss reaches back.
Text.zh:
当你凝望深渊的时候，
深渊也在凝望你。

Text.en:
Desperately reaching skyward
and digging downwards.
Sustenance is an
eternal struggle.
Text.zh:
在绝望中
上天入地。
生存是永恒
的挣扎。

Text.en:
Time turns even the vicious
volcanoes to hollow shells.
Text.zh:
即使最暴烈的火山，
也会被时间变成空洞的躯壳。

Text.en:
Whispers from
a world apart
Speak my name
beyond the tomb;
Bound within
the Maelström's heart,
Will they grant me
strength or doom?
Text.zh:
来自另一个世界的
喁喁细语
在坟墓那边
说着我的名字
在魔暴护心符
里面，
他们会为我带来
力量还是末日？

Text.en: A stone forest of forgotten names.
Text.zh: 一片刻着被遗忘名字的石林。

Text.en:
Some dead have long
envied the living.
When given the chance,
they take from us what they can.
So we offer our suffrage.
In return, they give
only suffering.
Text.zh:
有些亡灵一直
嫉恨生者。
一旦获得机会，
他们就会想方设法夺走我们的一切。
于是我们不停祈祷。
而他们的回报，
只有折磨。

Text.en:
Silent stillness. The waters are
as cold as they are black.
Text.zh:
一片死寂。冰雪般寒冷，
深夜般黑暗的海水。

Text.en: So much power in the hands of so few.
Text.zh: 权力很多，掌权者却很少。

Text.en:
Thrust above the waves, still teeming
with horrors from the depths.
Text.zh:
浪花之颠，仍旧翻腾着
来自深海的恐怖。

Text.en:
Fiend and fortune-hunter alike turned to ash.
A sorry alliance of unending agony.
Text.zh:
邪恶与赌徒一同化为飞灰。
失败的同盟，只会带来无尽的痛苦。

Text.en: Home only to misery now.
Text.zh: 住在这里的只剩下悲伤。

Text.en:
A wall is the surest sign for raiders
that there is something of value to take.
Text.zh:
再没什么比一堵墙
更能说明这里有值得一抢的东西了。

Text.en:
Shifting, morphing, expanding. A reminder
of the virtues of an agile mind.
Text.zh:
变幻、蜕变、扩张。
就像一个充满智慧的头脑。

Text.en: Man creates where nature cannot.
Text.zh: 自然无能为力，人类却能创造。

Text.en:
The dead ask to be remembered,
but such requests
are seldom met.
Text.zh:
逝者总希望被铭记
，但却很少
能实现。

Text.en:
They flew, and leapt,
and clambered over,
They crawled, and swam,
and slithered under.
Still its ancient secrets
await unclaimed
And of this hidden temple,
only legends remain.
Text.zh:
他们起飞、腾跃，
翻过高墙。
他们匍匐、游泳，
四处乱钻。
然而古老的秘密
始终不曾被人发掘
这座隐秘圣殿，
也只剩下传说。

Text.en:
Life, like still water, becomes trapped.
Stagnant. Foul.
Text.zh:
生命如同静水，
都会受困。浑浊。腐朽。

Text.en:
Howls and laughter
They hide in the day
They smell you, they watch you
They track their new prey
Text.zh:
狼嚎和笑声
他们在白昼下躲藏
而他们闻得到你，看得到你
他们追踪着新的猎物

Text.en:
Vibrant colours dash across the grey,
consuming Man's work.
Text.zh:
鲜艳的色彩改过灰暗，
人类的作品渐渐消失。

Text.en:
Man is not the only beast to
bend nature to its will.
Text.zh:
人类不是唯一一种
企图用自己的意志左右自然的生物。

Text.en: Greed is the only god here.
Text.zh: 这里的神明只有贪婪。

Text.en:
My last waking moments looked very
much like this place... I miss it. I miss her.
Text.zh:
我最后的记忆和这里看上去很像…
我想念那里。我想念她。

Text.en:
Should we feel disgusted at how the weak predate
the strong, or should we feel... admiration?
Text.zh:
弱者被强者取代，
是应该反感，还是…欣赏？

Text.en:
Only fear remains unforgotten, where once
magnificent rites drew important crowds.
Text.zh:
盛大的仪式曾吸引各地的要人前来参加，
现在只有恐惧还被铭记。

Text.en:
A good slave is driven by
only two thoughts:
service and sacrifice.
Text.zh:
好的奴隶
只能有两种念头：
服务与牺牲。

Text.en:
"Should I depart this mortal coil,
so shall all of my treasures."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“若我能脱离俗世轮回，
我的宝藏必将追随。”
——瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
Many hands may
move a mountain.
Text.zh:
众志成城，
移山填海。

Text.en:
There is no war. There is no army.
Only fear lingers.
Text.zh:
没有战争。没有军队。
只剩恐惧。

Text.en:
An elaborate, beautiful garden,
hidden from the public. Selfish.
Text.zh:
精致而美丽的花园，
不允许公众进入。自私。

Text.en:
To the east, 
it cannot be seen.
To the west, 
it cannot be touched.
To the south, 
it cannot be remembered.
And to the north, 
it cannot be contained.
Text.zh:
往东，你看不见它
往西，你摸不着它
往南，你记不得它
往北，你留不住它

Text.en:
Filth springs forth like blood
from a severed jugular.
Text.zh:
肮脏的泉水就像破裂动脉中
喷出的血液一样流淌。

Text.en: Each life, each act, as fleeting as footprints in the sand.
Text.zh: 所有生命，所有行动，都像沙上脚印一样短暂。

Text.en:
The Treasures of the Tides
wait in agony
at the End of the World.
Text.zh:
潮水的宝藏
在世界尽头
痛苦地等待。

Text.en:
The temptations of paradise
draw forth the good
and the bad alike.
Text.zh:
天堂的诱惑
既能引发善行，
也能带来恶行。

Text.en:
God's jar of raw materials.
Life lying dormant,
waiting to sprout.
Text.zh:
神的原材料大杂烩。
生命在其中蛰伏，
等待萌发。

Text.en:
Night's promises are dark, for
even the stars must be harvested.
Text.zh:
黑夜的承诺永远是黑暗的，
就连星辰也会被收割。

Text.en:
In the shadow of war,
all are eclipsed.
Text.zh:
在战争的阴影之下，
一切都将黯然失色。

Text.en:
Lives come and go.
Only bones and dust remain.
Text.zh:
生命来来去去，
只有枯骨和尘土是永恒的。

Text.en: We ascend to great heights to commit low acts.
Text.zh: 爬得更高，只是为了能把道德标准放得更低。

Text.en:
Verdant life blossoms
amidst death.
Text.zh:
在死亡中，开出了
繁茂的生命之花。

Text.en:
Steep cliffs divide where the trees
may grow, and where they may not.
Text.zh:
峭壁两侧，一边树木葱郁，
一边寸草不生。

Text.en:
Where land springs from water,
life will shortly follow.
Text.zh:
流水滋润的土地，
必能滋养生命。

Text.en:
Wealth beyond imagining,
locked beyond reach.
Text.zh:
无法想象的财富，
无法企及的距离。

Text.en:
Immaculate white stone rises
from the abyss. Perfection.
Text.zh:
深渊中探出
无暇的白石。完美。

Text.en:
Laughs of all the twisted
Echo through these
halls of gold.
In this cold forgotten void
They wander, forever uncontrolled.
Text.zh:
一切扭曲的笑声
回荡在这些
黄金的宫殿中。
在这片被遗忘的寒冷虚无中
他们游荡着，永远不会停歇。

Text.en:
The sound of a thousand calls
for blood echo for eternity.
Text.zh:
数千人渴望鲜血的呼喊声
永远在这里回荡。

Text.en:
Ancient artifacts and beautiful baubles.
All paid for in blood.
Text.zh:
古老的神器和美丽的装饰。
全都付出了鲜血的代价。

Text.en:
Please take out your blades,
your whips, and your spikes.
Class is now in session.
Text.zh:
拔出你的剑，举起你的盾，
背上你的长矛，新的战斗即将开始·

Text.en:
Knowledge balanced atop a vast pit. Hold on,
or perish in the darkness of ignorance.
Text.zh:
知识在深井之上摇摇欲坠。
要么抓紧，要么就在无知的黑暗中消亡。

Text.en: No rest, no peace, no negotiation. Only War.
Text.zh: 没有休息，没有和平，没有谈判。只有战争。

Text.en:
The stone and lumber sleeps.
The captains are long dead.
Only the sea knows their end.
Text.zh:
岩石与树木都在沉睡。船长们早已逝去。
只有大海知道他们的结局。

Text.en:
Bells are rung in celebration, and in sorrow.
And, finally, in despair.
Text.zh:
钟声有时表示欢庆，
有时表示悲伤。最终，则是绝望。

Text.en:
They feel your every move,
your every breath,
with a million little wires.
Text.zh:
他们有几百万条小触角
能感到你的一举一动
和每一次呼吸。

Text.en:
A white bone stripped of its fertile flesh.
Life spirals towards its end.
Text.zh:
白骨被迫离开丰腴的肉体。
生命的螺旋走向末日。

Text.en:
Crushed together and fenced in,
to live out their lives like cattle.
Text.zh:
在栅栏中挤成一团，
像牲口一样度过余生。

Text.en:
Layer upon layer of death and rot.
Disgusting.
Text.zh:
一层又一层的死亡与腐烂。
真恶心。

Text.en:
Man's reach extends into
the ocean, clawing at
its infinite depths.
Text.zh:
人类的触手伸到了
海洋，向着无尽的深处
探索。

Text.en:
Saints and heathens look the same
once the rot takes hold.
Text.zh:
圣人与异教徒的尸骨
腐烂后都是一样的。

Text.en:
For his sins
he was hunted in his sleep,
judgement wrought
of twisted nightmare.
The Coward bound
his dreams to stone,
awaiting another to walk
the path of true atonement.
Text.zh:
为了他的罪行
他在睡梦中被追捕，
最后的判决是
没有止境的噩梦。
懦夫将自己的
梦境封在石头里，
等待另一个人走上
赎罪之路。

Text.en: The fruit that grows from bloody ground tastes sweetest.
Text.zh: 鲜血浇灌的土壤中能长出最甜美的果实。

Text.en:
Even the greatest achievements
will eventually be abandoned.
Text.zh:
即使最伟大的成就
最终也会被抛弃。

Text.en:
The grandest and greatest
ever to fight,
Divine the champions stand tall.
But match their power,
best their might,
And even the immortal may fall.
Text.zh:
从没有人见过如此
宏大壮观的战斗，
神圣的斗士高高挺立。
但只要你能匹敌他们的力量，
压倒他们的气势，
就算神明也会尸体倒地。

Text.en:
In darkness, the alpha rises. The companionship
of beasts is fragile indeed.
Text.zh:
头狼在黑暗中崛起。
野兽的友谊是最脆弱的。

Text.en:
Small minds demand
the largest structures.
Text.zh:
渺小的头脑才需要
巨大的建筑。

Text.en:
A dough of bad blood.
A yeast of ill will.
Text.zh:
邪恶之血和成的面团。
恶念做成的酵母。

Text.en:
Each branch, each leaf,
an extension of a web
that spans sanity.
Text.zh:
每一根枝，每一片叶，
都让跨越理智的大网
变得更宽广。

Text.en:
The dark seas swallow the careless
and spit them against sharp rocks.
Text.zh:
黑暗的大海将粗心大意者
吞入腹中，再吐向礁石。

Text.en:
A river in the sky, far from that
which so desperately needs it.
Text.zh:
天空中的河流，
离那些渴盼水源的人那么远。

Text.en:
Repetition. Convention. Duplication.
Creation distilled to perfection.
Text.zh:
重复。成型。复制。
造物向完美的提炼。

Text.en:
Barren and sun-bleached.
Emptiness as far as
the eye can reach.
Text.zh:
日光暴晒下，一片荒芜。
目力所及处，
空无一物。

Text.en: Blood turns the soil to mud.
Text.zh: 血化为土，土化为泥。

Text.en:
Crafted with reverence.
Defiled with ease.
Text.zh:
怀着敬畏之心铸成。
却在瞬间归为污浊。

Text.en:
We are swept ever upwards by our ambition,
with no thought of what awaits us at the peak.
Text.zh:
野心让我们一路攀登，
却从未想过顶峰有什么在等待。

Text.en:
A once great monument,
now a forgotten memorial.
Text.zh:
曾经伟大的丰碑，
现在成了被忘却的石头。

Text.en:
Curious, she shook it then,
And tiny screams emerged.
Curiouser, she shook again,
And an eerie silence purred.
Text.zh:
出于好奇，她拿起它晃了晃，
传来一阵微弱的尖叫声。
她更好奇了，又晃了晃，
却只得到诡异的静默。

Text.en:
When the castle falls,
it has failed its only purpose.
Text.zh:
城堡坍塌时，
就已经辜负了唯一的使命。

Text.en:
As the torch flickers, brilliance
emerges in boundless variance.
Text.zh:
火光闪动，
伟大以千百种形态闪耀。

Text.en:
Wealth is powerless to stop
the corroding force of time.
Text.zh:
在时间侵蚀面前，
财富无能为力。

Text.en:
Who is the true criminal, the one behind
bars, or the one who tortures him?
Text.zh:
铁窗后的人，和折磨他的人，
谁才是罪犯？

Text.en:
"Here the soil is more deadly
than any swing of the axe."
- Oba of the Karui,
Conqueror of Corruption.
Text.zh:
“这里的土壤比任何斧子都更致命。”
——卡鲁的欧霸，
腐化之征服者。

Text.en:
Even in death, we long to
be close to one another.
Text.zh:
即便死后，
我们也希望彼此靠近。

Text.en:
So the raiders danced,
leading their foe ever west,
towards certain death.
Text.zh:
强盗们一路跳舞，
将敌人引向西方，
迎接必然的死亡。

Text.en: Rats chase their tails for the amusement of fools.
Text.zh: 老鼠追尾巴，是为了让蠢人开心。

Text.en:
From the heart of fire, rivers
of burning rage billow forth.
Text.zh:
从火焰的中心，
喷射出燃烧的怒火。

Text.en:
Amongst the rabble,
brutality is the law.
Text.zh:
暴民之中，
残忍就是法律。

Text.en: A brief respite in a sea of obligation and uncertainty.
Text.zh: 在责任与不确定性的海洋中，短暂地喘息。

Text.en:
Boils swell from the earth.
Foul malignant flesh
without purpose.
Text.zh:
暴躁水灵从土壤中涌出。
恶臭之源漫无目的地
蔓延。

Text.en:
A garden on a stone pedestal.
An incredible, and foolish, feat.
Text.zh:
石台上的花园。
一件不可思议而愚蠢的成就。

Text.en: Black tiles don't stain so easily.
Text.zh: 黑色的砖块不容易染上血迹。

Text.en:
There is no war. There is no army.
Only rage lingers.
Text.zh:
没有战争。没有军队。
只剩愤怒。

Text.en:
As mirage becomes reality,
hardship is briefly quenched.
Text.zh:
幻觉成为现实，
人们暂时忘却了世事艰辛。

Text.en:
Black monstrous bridges cross oily rivers,
leading nowhere. Nothing as it should be.
Text.zh:
丑陋的黑色桥梁跨过油腻的河面，
不知通向何方。一切都不对头。

Text.en:
Life means as little as a passing
moment of entertainment.
Let them rot.
Text.zh:
生命只是一瞬间的娱乐，
毫无意义。
就让他们腐烂吧。

Text.en:
Clear water springs forth.
A moment of purity before it too gathers filth.
Text.zh:
清洁的水涌了出来。
这一刻它们是纯洁的，哪怕即将汇入浊流。

Text.en:
The trees grow twisted and gnarled,
without a hint of light.
A curse lingers here.
Text.zh:
树木扭曲多结，没有一丝光线透过来。
这里弥漫着诅咒的味道。

Text.en: A sanguine supplication to death and depravity.
Text.zh: 死亡与堕落，不限量供应。

Text.en: Drought took the plants, famine took the people.
Text.zh: 干旱带走了植物，饥荒带走了村落。

Text.en:
A hollow echo of bygone times
in a land where none lived long.
Text.zh:
过去的时光在无人久留的
土地上发出空洞的回响。

Text.en:
Death forces even the most
determined of despots to
pass the crown.
Text.zh:
在死亡面前，即使
最顽固的独裁者也要
交出王冠。

Text.en:
At the heart of a peaceful, secluded valley,
an island of burning, consuming fury.
Text.zh:
一片平静避世的山谷中心，
有一座小岛在燃烧怒火。

Text.en:
Built so the prayers would echo.
A resonance no god could hear.
Text.zh:
建筑的设计可以让祈祷声回荡不息。
但没有神能听到这种回响。

Text.en:
From the walls, water, and ferns...
Death comes crawling on ancient steps.
Text.zh:
沿着墙缝、水沟、草丛…
死亡慢慢爬上古老的台阶。

Text.en:
Each plank of rotting wood,
each dead sailor,
feeds the island and makes it grow.
Text.zh:
每块腐烂的木板，每个死去的水手，
都成为了小岛的养分。

Text.en:
Life's wet, reproductive stink abates,
relenting to death's chaste ritual of decay.
Text.zh:
生命潮湿的繁衍臭气慢慢减弱，
被死亡用腐蚀的仪式侵占。

Text.en:
Where once waves crashed with crushing force,
brittle wooden bones tell tall tales.
Text.zh:
凡巨浪翻波之地，
必有枯腐的龙骨述说着怪谈。

Text.en:
Aided by unrelenting rain,
rot devours new life at the first fumble.
Text.zh: 无情的雨水助长了腐物迅速吞噬新生。

Text.en:
The faintest traces of civilisation
defiantly resist nature's scouring tendrils.
An admirable, but futile, effort.
Text.zh:
文明最微弱的痕迹仍在抵抗着大自然的卷须。
值得钦佩，但这注定徒劳。

Text.en:
The fleet lay stranded in the winter wastes,
those aboard to never again see the light of day.
Text.zh:
舰队滞留在冬日的荒原，
他们再也无法见到太阳的光芒。

Text.en:
Does the land reject the dead,
or do the dead reject their fate?
Text.zh:
是这片土地拒绝死亡，
还是死亡否决了他们的命运？

Text.en:
Rain will wash away the stains,
but the madness and memories will never fade.
Text.zh:
雨水会洗去污点，
但疯狂和回忆不会被遗忘。

Text.en:
Great stone towers tore at the natural order
and were promptly put in their place.
Text.zh:
自然规律毁灭了伟大的石塔，
并迅速将其取代。

Text.en:
Ever does man look to emulate his creator,
only to match his indifference.
Text.zh:
人总想模仿自己的造物主，
却只能展现出自己的冷漠。

Text.en:
Ice forges a fickle path,
as those beneath its veil can attest.
Text.zh:
冰雪铸造无常之路，
埋于冰雪之下的人们就是明证。

每一种本能的愿望
都会让你在严寒中长眠。
活下来的人必须时刻与之战斗。

Text.en:
Grim blessings whispered in the deepest,
most secret of places.
Text.zh:
阴暗的祝语总在最深邃，
最隐秘的地方述说。

Text.en:
One of my captors hid a beast within his heart.
Now his true self can be seen by all.
Text.zh:
抓住我的人当中有一个心中藏着一头野兽。
现在，所有人都能看到他的本来面目了。

Text.en:
One of my captors wore many faces,
yet kept her true face hidden.
Now she cannot escape her true face.
Text.zh:
抓住我的人当中有一个有许多面孔，
但从不以真实面目示人。
现在，她再也躲不过去了。

Text.en:
One of my captors felt no emotion.
He did not hesitate to inflict pain.
Now all he feels is intense, unstoppable agony.
Text.zh:
抓住我的人当中有一个毫无感情。
他折磨人的时候从不犹豫。
现在，他能感到的只有无尽的剧烈痛苦了。

Text.en:
One of my captors refused redemption.
He did not see value in a new life.
Now new life surrounds him.
Text.zh:
吾之守卫啊, 
你拒绝死神的召唤.不畏重生的限难, 
迎来新生.

Text.en:
Voices. Visions. Violence.
They will haunt these grounds for all of eternity.
Text.zh:
声音。影像。暴力。
这片土地将永远被这些缠绕。

Text.en: The nexus of nothingness and equilibrium of eternity.
Text.zh: 虚无的连接与永恒的平衡。

Text.en: From those who are gone, to those who remain.
Text.zh: 从逝者而来，向生者而去。

Text.en: Whispers and promises, ancient and alluring.
Text.zh: 古老的呼唤，诱人的承诺。

Text.en:
The winters of my youth were cold and harsh.
We had nothing, yet to my mother's credit, I wanted for so little.
Text.zh:
我小时候的冬天酷寒难耐。
我们一无所有，包括我妈的信用，我一点也不想要。

Text.en:
What had seemed sacred and infallible
so quickly became flawed out of necessity.
Created from compromises. Vulnerable to mortal whims.
Text.zh:
神圣纯净竟能迅速沉沦。
妥协退让是凡人的弱点。

Text.en:
Without our strict rule, man's destructive side would take hold.
Our beautiful public spaces, our services for the ill and the needy,
all of it would crumble.
Text.zh:
规矩若不严苛，兽性就会彰显。
救死扶伤，扶弱济贫，
都将化为泡影。

Text.en:
It was in my oath that I found peace.
In echoing marble halls I found my voice.
Before the congregation I found purpose.
Text.zh:
在誓言中，我找到了安宁。
在厅堂的回音中，我找到了自我。
面对信众，我找到了目标。

Text.en:
Though my life is gone, my purpose is not.
My will remains, emboldened and empowered
by the righteousness of my cause.
Text.zh:
虽然我的生命消逝，但目标仍在。
我的意志长存，
在正义的锤炼下日益茁壮。

Text.en:
"Did nobody think to report that we had acquired some sort of free-floating
Memory? Cease testing and lock this away immediately!" 
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“没人汇报我们发现了某种自由漂浮的记忆体吗？
马上停止实验！”
——总管科塔拉

Text.en: The secret of the elements lies within a square triangle.
Text.zh: 元素的奥秘就藏在正三角形中。

Text.en:
There is a way to survive the bite of an ice snake,
but few have the resolve to attempt it.
Text.zh:
只有一种方式能逃过冰蛇的毒牙，
但甚少有人敢下决心。

Text.en:
Those members of the Brotherhood who employ the venom of 
Trarthan ice snakes must take great care with the volatile substance.
Text.zh:
兄弟会的人想要使用特拉珊冰蛇之毒，
那就务必小心谨慎。

Text.en: A glacier of putrid meat, crushing mountains and valleys alike.
Text.zh: 腐肉如冰川，高山似深谷。

Text.en: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.
Text.zh: 灵敏和智慧方为武器，强于任何刀剑。

Text.en: Poison the land and they'll have nothing to defend.
Text.zh: 毒化地面，则无需再守。

Text.en:
"Recommend extreme caution on any prototypes that can lead to a chain reaction
of deaths. Lab Twelve has been lost to the flames." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret
Text.zh:
“对待实验底子一定要十分慎重，因为那会引发连锁死亡反应。
十二号实验室已经沦陷了。”——研究主管科萨雷

Text.en:
Centuries ago, there existed a unique grove imbued with ancestral fire.
As with all things, the Karui used its wood for war.
Text.zh:
数百年前，他们在古老的树林中闪烁着先祖的火焰。
无一列外，卡鲁人也把它们用于战争。

Text.en:
Biology is but a machine, begetting effusion of energies;
death is but a curse, that can be given... or reversed.
Text.zh:
生命只是机器，生产鲜活的精力。
死亡只是诅咒，可以施予，也能改逆。

Text.en: Forsake what you might have had. Command power beyond your potential.
Text.zh: 抛弃既有的力量，拥抱无限的潜能。

Text.en: Lose that which you never had. Gain power you could not have grasped.
Text.zh: 失去的从未拥有。获得的从未掌握。

Text.en: There is nothing more brutal than a simple blade wielded with rage.
Text.zh: 跟发狂乱舞尖刀没什么两样。

Text.en:
"Researchers will refrain from scaring each other by firing ice spears while holding
Prototype #141. Sooner or later, someone's going to lose an eye." 
- Administrator Qotra
Text.zh:
“避免让研究员拿着一四一号实验底子相互发射冰枪。
迟早有人会因此失去眼睛。”
——总管科塔拉

Text.en:
The villagers seared the blight with fire, but it only spread like dancing flames.

<default>{This item can be anointed by Cassia}
Text.zh:
村民用火焚烧菌潮，它却在火中狂舞。

<default>{卡西娅修女可以为该物品涂膏}

Text.en:
The villagers seared the blight with cold, but it only bloomed countless spears.

<default>{This item can be anointed by Cassia}
Text.zh:
村民用寒冰对待菌潮，它却回应无数尖矛。

<default>{卡西娅修女可以为该物品涂膏}

Text.en:
The villagers seared the blight with lightning, but it only forked into countless tendrils.

<default>{This item can be anointed by Cassia}
Text.zh:
村民用雷电劈打菌潮，它却挥舞着无尽的触手。

<default>{卡西娅修女可以为该物品涂膏}

Text.en:
Relentlessness. Nothing more, nothing less.

<default>{This item can be anointed by Cassia}
Text.zh:
坚定不移，不偏不倚。

<default>{卡西娅修女可以为该物品涂膏}

“七号镇压部队‘瞪眼忠臣’在逃跑的实验对象射箭的空当，冲锋过去将其击倒。”

<default>{该物品可以被卡西娅涂膏}

Text.en:
The last gasp is not always one's final act.

<default>{This item can be anointed by Cassia}
Text.zh:
临终之时不只有最后一口气。

<default>{卡西娅修女可以为该物品涂膏}

烧掉鸟眼和羊须，听我号令：
离开这些懒骨头；跳吧，败吧，听我号令！

Text.en: A single act of anger travels countless paths of destruction.
Text.zh: 微小的愤怒会带来无尽的毁灭。

Text.en: Divinity is not the only path to enlightenment.
Text.zh: 求神不是悟道的唯一途径。

Text.en: The mind is a filter through which anarchy becomes order.
Text.zh: 心灵为利器，乱中理思绪。

Text.en: Fear not the fury of the storm.
Text.zh: 不要惧怕风暴之怒。

Text.en: Those who offer up sacrifices to every deity entreat the full favour of none.
Text.zh: 向每位神祇献上祭品，只能换来虚妄的回报。

Text.en:
Light as a board,
Stiff as a feather.
Text.zh:
轻如浮木，
静如长羽。

Text.en:
"For personal defence, Prototype #444 is fantastic. It is one hundred percent
effective seventy five percent of the time... once." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret
Text.zh:
“四四四号实验底子可以提供绝好的个人防护。
它在百分之七十五的时间里都百分百有效。”
——研究主管科萨雷

Text.en:
We whack, we sack, we hack up the back,
We bore, we gore, because we're bored.
Text.zh:
咱抢，咱劫，咱从后头动手。
咱挖，咱捅，无聊就是由头。

Text.en: Lay bare paths to pain you never knew you had.
Text.zh: 为从未有过的苦难铺平道路。

Text.en: Lead the army of the damned from the front.
Text.zh: 从前线把该死的军对带走。

Text.en: The laws of the faith do not apply to its leader.
Text.zh: 清规戒律对教会的领袖无效。

Text.en: Some sins were never meant to be remembered...
Text.zh: 有些罪恶永远不会被记起……

Text.en:
The memories and emotions of countless victims of the Elder,
locked in stone for eternity.
Text.zh:
这里长埋着刻骨铭心的记忆，那是给裂界者的无尽献祭，
它们铭刻于此，直至永恒。

Text.en:
The Maven knew nothing of mercy
until she herself needed it.
Text.zh:
贤主从不知慈悲，
直到她自己也需要慈悲。

Text.en:
The Elder fed on all that gave life meaning
until it encountered an unbreakable bond.
Text.zh:
裂界者一直以赋予生命内涵的事物为食，
直到它碰上牢不可破的羁绊。

Text.en:
The Eater of Worlds consumed for countless
eons to satiate the desperation of masters
that could never be satisfied.
Text.zh:
灭界者倾注了亿万年的时光，
只求能满足哪些
永不知足的绝望之主。

Text.en:
The Searing Exarch spread the Word of
Enlightenment for countless eons without
ever understanding its master's message.
Text.zh:
焚界者倾注了亿万年的时光，
只求启迪众生，
然而却无人能够理解。

Text.en: Drink, my children, and be strengthened.
Text.zh: 干了它，孩子，给自己壮壮胆。

Text.en: Make your mark on history.
Text.zh: 让你自己名垂青史吧。

Text.en: The body stands, but the spirit soars.
Text.zh: 人在此处，心已飞扬。

Text.en:
On the mirrored edge of infinity,
one man sinks forever into darkness,
one man rises into light.
But which one am I?
Text.zh:
站在无尽的镜像边缘，
有人的肌肤永沐黑暗，
有人则飞升拥抱光明，
试问我是其中何人？

Text.en: The storm cannot break that which bends.
Text.zh: 弯下腰来就不惧风暴。

Text.en: Though we cannot touch; one thought, one wish, through centuries alone in darkness.
Text.zh: 我们触碰不到彼此，其中一人思索，其中一人憧憬，就这样在黑暗中百年飞逝。

Text.en:
Through vision coloured by burning rage and icy hate
peers a visitor from a realm of ill intent...
Text.zh:
炽烈的怒火和冰冷的仇恨会遮蔽视线
目光从恶毒之国投来……

Text.en:
Those who could flee did so.
The rest fought bravely,
and died horrifically.
Text.zh:
