有人注定逃亡。
其余英勇奋战，
然后死得惨烈。

Text.en:
They came, full of vim and vigour, to take what was not theirs.
They crashed and clamoured like waves against rocks,
and were swept back out to sea.
Text.zh:
他们充满旺盛的精力，来夺走不属于他们的一切。
他们像海潮一样喧哗
也会如海潮一般被逐回大海。

Text.en:
The King's Eye returned from the west.
Fertile pastures lay just beyond sight.
Just a little farther, he said.
It was always just a little farther.
Text.zh:
国王的目光从西方归来。
在那远方是肥沃的牧场。
他说只要再进一步，
永远只要再进一步。

Text.en: Nothing is more alluring than mystery.
Text.zh: 神秘比任何事物都诱人。

Text.en:
There exists in every man and woman
a desire to push boundaries, to break new ground,
to make great discoveries,
no matter the personal cost.
Text.zh:
它们存于每个男女的内心
是一种突破新生，突破边际的欲望，
来完成伟大的发现，
无论付出何等代价。

Text.en:
Conflict begets only suffering.
For some, that is by design.
Text.zh:
冲突只会带来痛苦。
而某些则是特殊设计。

Text.en:
Does the belly swell, or the belt shrink?
To those caught between, there is no difference,
and something must soon give.
Text.zh:
是肚子鼓了，还是腰带小了？
对于二者之间的人，这并无区别，
因为有些事情即将降临。

Text.en: A moment of calm before the battle can end the war.
Text.zh: 从容一击，息鼓偃旗。

Text.en: Winter's white blanket swaddles all.
Text.zh: 冬之摇篮包裹一切。

Text.en:
The Trickster God turned the very Day and Night against each other.
What hope have you?
Text.zh:
狡诈的天神让白昼和夜晚永世为敌，
你还能有什么指望？

Text.en: The machines do not hate. They merely serve one who does.
Text.zh: 机器无喜乐，全凭人使唤。

Text.en:
Savour the bitter, cherish the sweet,
For there may never be another chance to eat.
Text.zh:
品味苦涩，珍惜甜美吧，
你再也没有进食的机会了。

Text.en:
"Try as I might, I could not escape it.
When I closed my eyes, I saw only death.
Each breath tainted with the scent of seared and smouldering flesh,
And each sound tangled with pleas for mercy."
Text.zh:
“竭尽所能无路可逃。
闭上双眼唯见死亡。
鼻息之间尽是焦灼，
双耳之畔只有哀号。”

Text.en:
You can take the girl out of the woods, 
but you can't take the woods out of the girl.
Text.zh:
你能让那姑娘摆脱密林，
但无法让她摆脱心中的密林。

Text.en:
Pain is a fine motivator,
But if you seek the truth,
Fear of pain unknown has no parallel.
Text.zh:
痛苦乃是良师。
恐惧未知的痛苦
乃是探寻真理的最佳良方。

Text.en:
As the dead battered Highgate's barricades,
The Black Sekhema accepted her fate,
And stood her ground.
Text.zh:
自从亡者攻克了统治者之殿的屏障，
漆黑丝克玛就接受了自己的命运，
誓死抗争。

Text.en:
Maids used to threaten to send misbehaving children of
nobility to the pits beneath the Grand Arena.
For the children of slaves, it was more than just a threat.
Text.zh:
女仆们恐吓贵族家的孩子，
说要把他们扔进大竞技场下的深坑。
这对奴隶的孩子并不是一句恐吓。

Text.en:
Once you begin to rely on your weapons, 
You ensure you can't live without them.
Text.zh:
一旦依赖武器，
你就再也离不开了。

Text.en:
It was a great honour to fight at the front. 
The few that survived the initial charge were guaranteed fame and fortune.
Text.zh:
冲锋在前是莫大的荣誉。
活下来的少数人将会走上人生巅峰。

Text.en: You need not go looking for a second opinion.
Text.zh: 你无需寻求其它念想。

Text.en: If you're going to act like you're better than everyone else, make sure you are.
Text.zh: 如果你想表现得比所有人都强，那最好有真本事。

Text.en: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.
Text.zh: 只有疯子才无视天神的指引。

Text.en: Nothing spreads as quickly as an idea.
Text.zh: 言语如风，望尘莫及。

Text.en: How do you defeat that which dwells within you?
Text.zh: 你如何才能战胜内心的自己？

Text.en: Bloodlust begets suffering.
Text.zh: 嗜血产生痛苦。

Text.en: Lightning lives in an endless circle.
Text.zh: 闪电循环，无穷无尽。

Text.en:
"We have methods of interrogation the Inquisitors only dream of."
- Marcus, Brotherhood Liaison
Text.zh:
“我们的审讯术是审判官们梦寐以求的。”
——兄弟会线人马库斯

Text.en:
"This was the first step in some grand design, 
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher." 
- Dominus, High Templar
Text.zh:
宏伟计划终于迈出了第一步，
我们困惑已久，终于取得了进展。
——神主多米纳斯

Text.en: The Azmeri must never touch the Tears of Maji, lest Viridi weep.
Text.zh: 阿兹莫里人绝不该碰众神之泪，以免维里迪哭泣。

Text.en:
"I believed I understood Prototype #112 quite fully, until a test subject
with Azmeri ancestry donned it. I will be haunted by the results
for the rest of my life."  - Researcher Graven
Text.zh:
“我原以为对一一二号实验底子的原理已经非常透彻了，
直到有个阿兹莫里血统的人戴上它。这结果会纠缠我一辈子。”
— 研究员葛拉文

Text.en:
Under its influence, shards of metal take on a life of their own, wriggling into flesh,
burrowing into organs, and exploding outwards in search of other victims.
Text.zh:
在它影响下，金属碎片为自己夺取生命，
它们蠕动着刺入血肉，钻入内脏，向外爆炸后继续寻找新的牺牲品。

Text.en: Claws open, brace for a bite. Stinger raised, dodge or die.
Text.zh: 利爪已扬，作势欲张。毒刺已起，不避则亡。

Text.en: Imbue the body with stolen spirit, hold the leash tight.
Text.zh: 将盗来的灵魂注入身躯，让牢笼更加严密。

Text.en:
Chitus' success stemmed from his cunning, taking calculated
risks so that greater dangers could be averted.
Text.zh:
切特斯的成功源于他的心计。
他精打细算，规避了更严重的风险。

Text.en: An eye for an eye.
Text.zh: 以眼还眼

Text.en: The strong survive. The strongest thrive.
Text.zh: 越能活，越耐活。

Text.en: The pyre is never wasted on just one heretic.
Text.zh: 哪怕火刑柱上只有一个异端，也不算浪费柴火。

Text.en: Death creeps closer; unseen, inexorable, hungry.
Text.zh: 死亡悄然靠近，它无形无踪，不可阻挡，还十分饥饿。

Text.en: A dance as old as time.
Text.zh: 这支舞像时间一样古老。

Text.en: Simple. Deadly. Unstoppable.
Text.zh: 简单、致命、势不可挡。

Text.en: Lead by example.
Text.zh: 按图索骥。

Text.en:
He may have returned from the frozen southern reaches,
but that doesn't mean he ever truly escaped them.
Text.zh:
他会从南方冰封的边疆归来，
但他未必能真正摆脱他们。

Text.en:
For how little time they had together,
their love was all the more powerful.
Text.zh:
他们在一起的时间越短，
他们的爱就越强大。

Text.en:
Every glorious conquest
stands astride innocent bones.
Text.zh: 一将功成万骨枯。

Text.en: The target changes, but the job's always the same.
Text.zh: 目标会变，但工作不变。

Text.en: Freedom is won only by those who are not free.
Text.zh: 只有失去自由，才能赢得自由。

Text.en:
Better to act without thought
than to think without action.
Text.zh: 不假思索胜过光思不做。

Text.en:
The Goddess abides a kingdom beyond compare,
should you meet her challenge.
Text.zh:
女神的王国无可比拟，
也许你该前往一试。

Text.en:
You may appeal to the Goddess for another verdict,
but justice favours only the truly worthy.
Text.zh:
你该恳求女神重新给予裁断，
但正义只青睐有价值的一方。

Text.en:
Before the Goddess, nothing remains hidden.
Adversity reveals old flaws and new strengths.
Text.zh:
在女神面前一切都无所遁形。
逆境中既有旧日不足，也有新的力量。

Text.en: On the edge of existence, he watches with ire.
Text.zh: 他徘徊于存在边缘，妒火怒火渐上心头。

Text.en:
The line that divides hope and fear,
life and death, crowd and mob,
is as thin as a whisper.
Text.zh:
生死良顺，
希望恐惧，
皆一纸之隔。

Text.en:
"This will help with the pain.
One for you... and one for me."
- Doctor 'Shaky Hands' Opden
Text.zh:
“它能缓解痛苦。
不光有你的……还有我的。”——颤手欧普登医生

Text.en:
The sky, the land, the people burned.
What little still stood soon faced wild, battering storms.
Winter arrived suddenly and stayed for a generation.
Civilisation was not simply halted, but reversed, erased.
Text.zh:
天空大地人皆燃。
仅存瓦砾迎风暴。
凛冬忽降世代传。
文明中断归原始。

Text.en: Somebody does have to get hurt.
Text.zh: 总得有人受伤。

Text.en: All roads lead to that destined doom.
Text.zh: 条条大路通灭亡。

Text.en: Nothing stabs colder than pure hatred.
Text.zh: 唯仇恨之刃最为冷酷。

Text.en: As the flow of battle demanded, she became a sudden storm or a vanishing wind.
Text.zh: 她随战斗的局势而变化，忽如奔腾怒雷，忽如瞬逝之息。

Text.en: A thousand years of dark skies and unending cold.
Text.zh: 千年苍穹黯淡，千载寒意连绵。

Text.en: Druids of the Grelwood never fight alone.
Text.zh: 韧木德鲁伊从不会单打独斗。

Text.en:
The Oriathans built their empire on naval mobility, which allowed
them to wage war wherever their enemy was weakest.
Text.zh:
奥瑞亚人依赖海运建立帝国。
他们可以在敌人最薄弱的地方发起进攻。

Text.en: The giant cares not for the ants.
Text.zh: 巨人不在乎蚂蚁。

Text.en: Expand one single ambition to crystal clarity... and beyond.
Text.zh: 把野心变得纯粹……高远。

Text.en:
To stand at the confluence of the elements,
the master must achieve perfect balance.
Text.zh:
掌握元素交汇的大师
需要完美的平衡力。

Text.en: Obtaining information depends upon pretending one already has it.
Text.zh: 获取信息要假装自己已经知道了信息。

Text.en: The lightning fears not the flame.
Text.zh: 闪电不惧火焰。

Text.en: Maximum power fueled by science gone mad.
Text.zh: 疯狂的科学提供着最大的动力。

Text.en: Indiscriminate destruction fueled by science gone mad.
Text.zh: 疯狂的科学提供着最恣意的破坏。

Text.en: Fragile, explosive, and punishing.
Text.zh: 脆弱，爆炸，惩罚。

Text.en:
Never let the audience know your true form. Misdirect them,
beguile them. Strike when they least expect it.
Text.zh:
千万别让观众发现真实的你。误导他们，哄骗他们。
在他们最不希望的时候出手。

Text.en:
The single well-placed arrow that changes the world
must be preceded by ten thousand practice shots.
Text.zh:
要想一箭改变世界，
那就要千锤百炼。

Text.en: Teach a man to burn, and you'll be warm for the rest of his life.
Text.zh: 教人燃烧，就能在他余生得到温暖。

Text.en:
"Remain poised. Remain balanced. Keep all the emotions of a lifetime caged.
Let only your enemies see the truth of your rage."
Text.zh:
“保持镇静，保持平衡，把所有情绪都一辈子锁在笼子里。
只让你的敌人看到你真实的愤怒。”

Text.en:
"The Faridun cannot earn burial in the sky.
They have other ways of keeping the dead."
Text.zh:
“法里顿人的葬礼见不到阳光。
他们只能用其它办法保存遗体。”

Text.en:
"Allegedly turns water to Lethe. That makes it my competition. 
I don't like competition."
Text.zh:
据说它能将河流引向忘川。那就成了我的对手。
我不喜欢对手。

Text.en:
"Sap of the Aturi tree, known only to grow at the meeting point of the seven waters.
Nothing since its disappearance has smelled as wondrous."
Text.zh:
据说阿图里树只生长在七河交汇之地。它消失之后，
再也闻不到它那奇迹般的香气。

Text.en:
"A symbol of my birthright and claim to my fiefdom. 
I must have it if I am to return my family to its rightful place."
Text.zh:
“它象征着我与生俱来的权利，也是我领地的宣称。
如果要让我的家族恢复应有的地位，我就要得到它。”

Text.en:
"A true curiosity. Matches no known language, yet its illustrations hint at knowledge 
only rediscovered hundreds of years after the death of its unknown author."
Text.zh:
“真是本奇书。它跟所有已知的语言都不一样，
可它的插图却暗示了作者故去几百年后才发现的知识。”

Text.en:
"Balabus Arimor was a little-known preacher during the days of Emperor Chitus,
who believed eternal life could be achieved through ritual sacrifice.
We shall see whether he was a prophet - or a charlatan."
Text.zh:
“巴拉卜斯·阿利摩是切斯特皇帝在位时一个名不经传的教士，
他相信可以通过献祭实现永生。
他究竟是先知，还是江湖骗子，我们终将知晓。”

Text.en:
"As warm as living flesh, and smelling strongly of sulphite.
Morbid curiosity compels me to add it to my collection of oddities."
Text.zh:
“像活物一样温暖，还有浓郁的亚硫酸气味。
病态的好奇心迫使我把它纳入怪诞藏品的行列。”

Text.en: Rubbing the eel's head is said to bring smugglers good fortune.
Text.zh: 揉搓鳗鱼脑袋据说能给旅人带来好运。

Text.en:
"If Jamanra has been resurrected the way so many other ancient heroes have returned,
then perhaps I can convince him to rise up and unite the Faridun once more!"
Text.zh:
“如果亚曼拉也像其他古代英雄一样复活的话，
那我说不定可以说服他重新把法里顿人团结起来！”

Text.en:
"Some of my inventions don't live up to their names, but some work all
too well. Let's hope that the Unbreakable is the former, not the latter."
Text.zh:
“我有些发明达不到名字的效果，但有些却非常好。
只希望【牢不可破装置】不属于后者吧。”

Text.en:
"A part of me still believes I can convince Nashta to give up her rebellious ways and come home. That part
of me will forever be nine years of age, futilely chasing her as she runs off into the dunes yet again."
Text.zh:
“我仍然幻想着能说服纳希塔放弃叛乱，跟我回家。
我真希望永远停留在九岁，看着她又跑进了沙丘，在背后徒劳地追她。”

Text.en:
"There can be no freedom
while hate still reigns."
Text.zh:
“只要仇恨还唱主角，
就没什么自由。”

Text.en:
"If Admiral Darnaw is stupid enough to send orders to his fleet members 
and not expect us to steal them, then he deserves what's coming to him!"
Text.zh:
“如果达诺上将蠢到给舰队发布命令，
还不怕被我们截获，那他就活该！”

Text.en:
"The Vox speak in threats.
We will answer them with action."
Text.zh:
“沃克斯兄弟威胁我们。
我们得用行动回答他们。”

“锤子每一下都在给钢锭塑形，
每一下都在拉伸，削尖。
磨利刀锋，夺走生命。”

Text.en:
Quenched, the blade hardens, becomes brittle.
The edge will not last forever,
But when it breaks, its service will continue.
Text.zh:
淬火会让刀锋坚硬，锋利。
刀锋不会永久锋利，
一旦卷口，就需要重新磨砺。

Text.en:
Her apprentice spends hours working the steel,
and the end result is melted for scrap.
Each one made better than the last.
Each one made more quickly.
She knows the path well.
Text.zh:
她的学徒花了几个钟头跟钢铁战斗，
但每一次都熔成了废铁。
每一次都比上一次更好。
每一次都比上一次更快。
她知道学习之道就是如此。

Text.en: Horrific experiments with corrupted flesh require careful management.
Text.zh: 用腐肉做可怕的实验务必小心谨慎。

Text.en:
Beyond the veil of death, there burns a fire
by whose light night is borne.
Text.zh:
远在死亡的面纱之外，
燃烧着以黑影为柴的火光。

Text.en:
A sacrifice of blood calls forth His vengeance.
Let the righteous become the Hand of God.
Text.zh:
鲜血的祭奠呼唤着神明的复仇。
让天神之手降下正义吧。

Text.en:
The burden falls heaviest not on those that died,
but on those that did not.
Text.zh:
负担最重的不是那些死人，
而是那些没死成的。

Text.en:
"Her sisters eternally fought for that shining apex in the skies,
but Viridi instead found strength in humility."
- Azmerian Creation Myth
Text.zh:
“她的姐妹们永无止尽地为高不可攀的空中尖塔而战，
而维里迪却找到了谦卑的力量。”"
——阿兹莫里创世神话

Text.en:
"That bronze girl sure knows how to cut someone down to size!"
- Bertrand the Plush
Text.zh:
“那古铜肤色的姑娘肯定知道怎么把人大卸八块！”
——公子哥柏特兰

Text.en:
Within each of us exists a being of pure malice,
held back only by the lies we tell ourselves.
Text.zh:
我们每个人心中都有魔鬼，
只能靠自我欺骗才能生存。

Text.en: The tortured thinker is made heavier by the weight of his guilt.
Text.zh: 受折磨的思想家在愧疚中日益沉重。

Text.en: The cruel thinker finds glee in torture most precise.
Text.zh: 残酷的思想家在酷刑中自得其乐。

Text.en: The cowardly thinker's greatest success is simply surviving.
Text.zh: 懦弱的思想家只求能活得下去。

Text.en:
Accept the infection, let it take hold.
Then carry it far and wide.
Text.zh:
接受感染，让它生根。
再带它见识广阔天空。

Text.en:
Primordial rage slumbers, waiting for the call
of the stars to return and swallow the world.
Text.zh:
原始的愤怒在沉睡中等待呼唤，
准备卷土重来吞噬世界。

Text.en:
All that was loved, all that was hated -
naught remains but ash.
Text.zh:
无论爱恨情仇，
如今只余尘土。

Text.en:
Stories of heroism by the victor persist,
for no one survives to contest them.
Text.zh:
胜者书写英雄伟业，
败者没命开口辩白。

Text.en:
"I found the tomb in the first place, and they had the nerve to empty it without me! 
Reckon it'll make a fine trophy for my efforts."
Text.zh:
“我首先发现了这个坟墓，可他们胆敢背着我把它搬空！
它本来会成为优秀的战利品。”

Text.en:
"One must, as one should, admire the lasting works of those who came before.
The Vaal were the uncontested greatest architects until we,
and Matatl soared above their best."
Text.zh:
“人人都应该欣赏前人留下的杰作。

在我们之前，瓦尔人是优秀的建筑师，
而马泰尔人比他们最杰出的更强。”

Text.en:
"I believe she was a beautiful maiden. 
Kind, virtuous and devout through-and-through.
Such a gift will set me apart from all other suitors."
Text.zh:
“她肯定是个美丽的少女。
善良、贤惠，还非常虔诚。
这个礼物能让我胜过其他所有追求者。”

Text.en:
"Victims of war, the indebted, and the irredeemably shamed
were to live their lives in servitude. Some rose above their station. 
This individual, it seems, was all but deified."
Text.zh:
“这些欠债者和受辱着是战争的牺牲品。
他们注定要在奴役中生活。有人却超越了他们的地位。
这一个就几乎被神化了。”

Text.en:
"Heard if you put a drop of blood in its mouth,
it'll whisper the secrets of immortality.
Doesn't have to be your own blood, does it?"
Text.zh:
“听说只要把血滴到它口中，
就能听它低声说出秘密。
必须是自己的血吗？”

Text.en:
"I'll give it to her and tell her
'It once held the reflection of a Queen, and now it will once more.'
Anton can cross the Vastiri on his family fruits 
if he thinks he loves her like I do."
Text.zh:
“我要把它送给她，并告诉她，
它曾经珍藏着一位王后的影像，如今会珍藏另一位的。
如果安东觉得他像我一样爱她，
那他就可以带着家产横跨瓦斯提里了。”

Text.en: Once cast the reflections of royalty, now worth the sum of its parts.
Text.zh: 王家威名一旦铸成就受益无穷。

Text.en: Ornately adorned and heavier than is practical.
Text.zh: 奢华装潢比实际更沉重。

Text.en: A common figure adorning Vaal ruins, but exquisitely crafted from gold.
Text.zh: 俗人用精雕细琢的黄金来装饰瓦尔遗迹。

Text.en: The last shimmering face witnessed by many a sacrifice.
Text.zh: 最后的面孔闪闪发光，见证了许多祭献。

Text.en: Silently keeps innumerable secrets whispered in moments of desperation.
Text.zh: 默默地保守着无数秘密，在绝望时悄悄倾述。

Text.en: At once horrid and beautiful, awkward and alluring, silly and overwhelmingly mysterious.
Text.zh: 既恐怖又美丽，既可怕又迷人，既愚蠢又神秘。

Text.en: Dried blood remains trapped in its many deep grooves.
Text.zh: 深槽中仍有干枯的血迹。

Text.en: My inventions, my babies, deserve to be in better hands!
Text.zh: 我的发明，我的宝贝，应该被更好的人拥有！

Text.en:
...the blueprints for my Extreme Warmth Beam, my Storm Wooing Rod,
the Mind Sublimator, and the Unbreakable...!
Text.zh:
“……我的蓝图，有终极送温暖光波发射器、求爱风暴制动杆，
还有……心灵洁净器和……牢不可破装置！”

Text.en:
"If we can prove Jamanra existed, then the Faridun may have a chance to rejoin the
Maraketh. I, for one, would like to meet my parents. I have many questions..."
Text.zh:
“只要能证明亚曼拉存在，那马拉克斯人就有可能重新接纳法里顿人。
我也很想见见我的父母。我心中有很多疑问。”

Text.en:
"There is nothing quite so exquisite as a forced confession. The sufferer will
say anything to make the pain stop, and that's the point. Guilt is irrelevant."
Text.zh:
“逼供是最美妙的艺术。受刑的人愿意用一切来停止痛苦。
这就是重点。内疚毫无意义。”

Text.en:
"It supposedly causes enormous plants to grow from almost any soil. The myth claims we
need to sacrifice a baby to make it function, but that's a bit grotesque, even for me."
Text.zh:
“据说它能让植物在任何土壤里茁壮生长。
神话里说必须献祭一个婴儿才能让它发挥作用。这连我都觉得有点太过分了。”

Text.en:
"When hope was but a memory, the twin sister Sekhemas Solerai and Lundara arose to unite the Maraketh.
They wielded the essence of gold and silver. The Spear is one of the two weapons that forged us."
Text.zh:
“当希望变成回忆之后，孪生姐妹索瑞和兰拉重新把马拉克斯人团结起来。
她们的武器是黄金和白银的精髓打造。而那把矛就是其中之一。”

Text.en:
"Wraeclast is harsh, and the Plains of Vastiri are unforgiving. We Maraketh can
ill afford an internal war. We must prove that Nashta is behind these attacks."
Text.zh:
“瓦尔克拉斯的环境很艰苦，但瓦斯提里大平原更加艰难。
马拉克斯人承受不起战争了。我们必须阻止躲在幕后的纳希塔。”

Text.en:
"They were me granddaddy's. 
Could break into any house as quick and silent as a Cardinal's fart."
Text.zh:
“这都是我爷爷的。
它可以打开任何房门，不搞出丁点动静，就跟枢机主教闷声放屁一样。”

Text.en:
"Traitorous scum took the life I could've had. 
I ain't usually the forgiving type, 
but I feel in this case that I owe him a little gift."
Text.zh:
“该死的叛徒夺走了我应有的生活。
我这人有点记仇，
不过我觉得应该给他送份小礼物。”

Text.en: "Never take credit for another man's work."
Text.zh: “永远别想占有别人的成功。”

Text.en:
"Loved her like she was my own daughter.
I just want to know she's safe."
Text.zh:
“我把她当成自己的女儿。
我只想知道她现在的情况。”

Text.en:
"Damn near everything I've earned. 
Worth every little bit."
Text.zh:
“这几乎是我挣到的一切。
每一分都值得。”

Text.en:
"Lost touch with a mate of mine when
he got recruited into some secret squad.
Just want to see how he's doing."
Text.zh:
“我一个朋友被招进秘密部队后就跟我断了联系。
我就想知道他怎么样了。”

Text.en:
"Enoch deserved better. 
This is the least I can do."
Text.zh:
“伊诺克应该有更好的下场。
我至少能为他做这个。”

Text.en:
"Just the usual highly-illegal compounds.
Don't drop them. It's fine if you do, but don't."
Text.zh:
“只不过是一种严重违法的混合物。
别丢下它。虽然没关系，但千万别丢。”

Text.en:
"I wish I could say this was the first time I've forgotten to restock on this thing. 
I forget what it was, but I'm sure I'll remember by the time we need to get it.
Was it beetles? Bottles? I think it began with 'B'.
Or it had no 'B'."
Text.zh:
“真想说我是第一回忘了补这种货。
我忘了是啥了，可我明明记得我很需要它。
是瓶子还是苹果来着？反正是‘瓶’这个音开头的。
好像不是‘瓶’。”

Text.en:
"I heard the script will send any who attempt to perform it mad,
but other than that, it is very good."
Text.zh:
“我听说那个剧本会让演员发疯，
但除此之外，它非常精彩。”

Text.en:
"Make sure it'll fit a small man, or a very large child.
And check for stains! Knew a few people who'd use them for-... 
...Just check for stains."
Text.zh:
“它一定要适合小个子，或者大孩子。
还有检查下污渍！我知道有些人把它用来……
千万要检查下污渍。”

Text.en: "Let's just hope she wasn't wearing it when she wandered into the sea!"
Text.zh: “真希望她去海上的时候没穿着它！”

Text.en: "It isn't fair to either of us to keep chasing this dream."
Text.zh: “继续追逐这个梦想对我们都不公平。”

Text.en:
"When you stop viewing someone as a fellow human being,
there's little you won't do to forward your agenda.
That is what we're dealing with."
Text.zh:
“当你不再把人当成伙伴，
那你无所顾忌了。
那就是我们要做的。”

Text.en:
"Selfishness and hate fuel these kidnappings. 
It's time we find who is leading them."
Text.zh:
“自私和憎恨驱使着这些绑架行动。
该找出幕后主使了。”

Text.en:
"Darnaw is stupid and confident.
I am certain he will have recorded his misdeeds."
Text.zh:
“达诺又蠢又自负。
他绝对把自己的劣迹都记下来了。”

Text.en:
"Fidium's fealty to fairness 
makes him the perfect pawn in my plan.
Our plan. Perfect pawn in OUR plan."
Text.zh:
“费迪庸为人正直，
所以是个完美的棋子。
这当然是我们的计划，他是我们最完美的棋子。”

Text.en:
"A symbolic piece of history,
from a time when people of all backgrounds
united against a common enemy."
Text.zh:
“这是历史的象证。
它象证着当年所有乌旗守卫都团结一致，
对付共同的敌人。”

Text.en: "An unusual request."
Text.zh: “这请求真不寻常。”

Text.en:
"I won't be bullied.
We must get Hana back."
Text.zh:
“我不喜欢恐吓。
我们必须把哈娜救回来。”

Text.en:
"Admiral Proclar wreaked havoc on my smuggling routes for two full decades. Now that he's dead, 
it's a matter of thieves' honour to check whether my product was in his pipe."
Text.zh:
“波克莱上将跟我的私运线路作对了整整二十年。
出于荣誉感，我得看看他的烟斗里有没有我的东西。”

Text.en:
"The chalice holds certain properties that make scientists quite possessive and irrational.
It's best if you don't ask too many questions about this one."
Text.zh:
“这个杯子具有某种特性，让科学家们打得头破血流。
最好不要对它问太多问题。”

Text.en:
"At first glance, this seal seems no more than an ornament. But when one
looks closer, one realizes the design is from no culture we yet know of."
Text.zh:
“乍一眼看，这枚印章只是一件普通装饰品。
但仔细看就会发现，它不属于我们熟知的任何文化。”

Text.en:
"In the early days of his religion, Innocence told his followers to drink of his blood and
enjoy eternal life. If that power holds in his ancient ichor, I hope that it can resurrect as well."
Text.zh:
“纯净之神在早期曾经要求信徒们喝下他的血，享用永恒的生命。
如果他的上古另液还有这种力量，那我希望它能重新起作用。”

Text.en:
"This unassuming rock reportedly fell from the sky a few centuries ago. Sounds impossible,
but the men who are guarding it obviously believe the tale, so I do, too."
Text.zh:
“据说这块不起眼的石头在几百年前从天而降。
听起来像扯淡，不过保卫它的人显然对此深信不疑。所以我也信。”

Text.en:
"A simple ornament from the days when Keth's trade empire was the
glory of the world. Protectors at the massive toll gates wore these."
Text.zh:
“这是克斯人的贸易帝国强盛时期的普通装饰品。
庞大的关卡守卫曾经都戴着它。”

Text.en:
"There are very few devices in this world that can act as a heart for a
machine. This one is an ancient remnant of the work of Vaal engineers."
Text.zh:
“世界上只有极少数装置可以像心脏一眼给机器供能。
这是瓦尔工程师的古老遗产。”

Text.en:
"I currently possess four-hundred and forty-four pieces of this ancient
and puzzling device. A few seem to be missing. This part is crucial."
Text.zh: “这个既古老又费解的装置我有其中四百四十四个零件。而这个零件是其中最关键的。”

Text.en:
"There is no telling what this device may do when completed, but I
have made it my life's work. There must be a deeper meaning!"
Text.zh:
“没人知道这个装置完工后能做什么。
但它是我毕生心血，所以肯定有更重要的意义！”

Text.en:
"I have spent my family's entire fortune in the pursuit of this device.
Assembling it and turning it on is all I have left."
Text.zh:
“为了这个装置我花光了所有家产。
我只想把它装好，把它启动。”

Text.en:
"My schematics are clear. Once the Enigmatic Assembly is complete, it
will be a weapon to rival the gods! It must be... it has to be..."
Text.zh: “我的目标很明确。只要这个神奇装置完工，它就能挑战众神！它一定可以……必须可以……”

Text.en:
"The Eldritch Blade is one half of a pair. Together, the two are said to drive men
insane by revealing the truth of the world to them. I wish to know this truth."
Text.zh:
“古神之刃是一对雌雄剑，这只是其中一半。
双剑合璧会让人发疯，同时通晓整个宇宙的真理。朝闻道，夕死可矣。”

Text.en:
"Caspiro was a master of presentation. He maintained peace in Wraeclast through displays
of strength that, sadly, had no meaning to the dark presence that dismembered him..."
Text.zh:
“卡斯皮罗是一位演说大师。他靠展现力量维系了瓦尔克拉斯的和平。
可惜他的力量对肢解他的黑暗存在毫无意义……”

Text.en:
"Trust in scientists to create tools for better drug distillation. They don't know the
worth of the beautiful tools they have. Let's make sure it stays that way."
Text.zh:
“就知道科学家们能造出更好的药品蒸馏器。
他们根本不懂它的真正魅力。还是我们来让它发挥真正的用途。”

Text.en:
"Long ago, a traitor was promised this mythical elixir. We consider her a fool for
believing it exists, but if it does... I would certainly like to take a sip and find out."
Text.zh:
“很久以前，有个人为了这种神秘灵药当了叛徒。我们都以为她是个傻瓜， 居然相信这东西存在。
不过如果它真的存在……我想喝一小口就知道了。”

Text.en:
"The lamp is said to contain Aziza, the Fourth Servant of Water. I doubt the tale
is true, but I cannot allow one of our artifacts to fall into Kondor's hands."
Text.zh:
“据说这盏灯里装着阿兹扎，那是水神的仆人。
我很怀疑这个故事的真实性，但我不能允许任何神器落入康多的手里。”

Text.en:
"The relief depicts some sort of forgotten Maraketh goddess. I have no idea what
the context is. The important thing is that you steal it before Bazira does."
Text.zh:
“这段浮雕描述了一位被遗忘的马拉克斯女神。我看不懂上面写了什么。
不过重点是你赶在贝兹拉之前拿到了它。”

Text.en:
"It is said that the Golden Ibis was forged before time itself, before writing, or even
oral history. That's nonsense, of course, but it's still very old, and therefore noteworthy."
Text.zh:
“据说这只金鹮诞生于太初之前，比文字和口述的历史更古老。
这当然是胡说，但它的确非常古老，显然很有价值。”

Text.en:
"The world is governed by certain natural laws. Science and thaumaturgy are one
and the same. But the crystal... it shouldn't exist. It's not from here. We must have it."
Text.zh:
“自然规律支配着整个世界。科学和奇术都是其中的一部分。
不过这个水晶……它不该存在。它不是这个世界的产物。我们必须得到它。”

Text.en:
"Are we the only ones who understand the danger? The fools! Living ice absorbs heat
and grows. We must control it properly, lest it spread across all of Wraeclast."
Text.zh:
“难道只有我们知道它的危险性？太蠢了！活化冰会吸收热量，不断成长。
我们必须妥善控制它，不能让它祸害整个瓦尔克拉斯。”

Text.en:
"I have a suspicion that the Maraketh Sekhema of legend, Lundara, is the same historical
figure as the Azmeri and Eternal goddess Lunaris. The Seal may prove that."
Text.zh: “我怀疑马拉克斯人传说中的丝克玛兰拉跟阿兹莫里人的同名历史人物，还有永恒帝国的女神月影是同一个人。这枚印章就是证据。”

Text.en:
"The relief was the first ever depiction of some Maraketh girl named Orbala undertaking her
fifth great adventure. I don't particularly care about the story, I just don't want Bazira to have it."
Text.zh:
“这段浮雕是马拉克斯女孩欧巴拉的第五次冒险的第一份历史记录。
我对这个故事本身没什么兴趣，只是不希望贝兹拉拿到它。”

Text.en:
"My accursed father owes his children this heirloom. We deserve
to know our culture, just like you full-blooded humans do."
Text.zh:
“这个传家宝是我那该死的父亲欠我的。
我们理应知道自己的文化，就跟你们这些纯种人类一样。”

Text.en:
"It is my belief that Solerai, from the Maraketh legend, is Solaris herself in another system of
myths. If I can prove that, I can begin piecing together a true history of the Winter of the World."
Text.zh:
“我相信马拉克斯传说中的索瑞就是日耀女神。
如果我能证明，我就能拼凑出世界之冬的历史真相。”

Text.en:
"The history of the order of Sin Eaters is shrouded in secrecy and shame.
Nevertheless, history demands truth, even if it takes centuries to be revealed."
Text.zh:
“罪恶吞噬者的历史被隐瞒在秘密和耻辱中。
但历史需要真相，哪怕花上好几个世纪。”

Text.en:
"Those Eternal bastards looted everything that wasn't bolted to the floor when we
finally drove them from our island! That candelabra belongs with us!"
Text.zh:
“等我们把永恒帝国的杂种从岛上赶跑的时候，他们把所有没有拴起来的东西都抢走了！
这个烛台是属于我们的！”

Text.en:
"By all accounts, the Sword of the Inverse Relic was found aged and rusted,
but is becoming less weathered over time. We really must study its properties."
Text.zh:
“不管怎么看，逆世之剑被发现的时候已经老化生锈了。
但它磨损的程度却随时间推移越来越小。我们真该好好研究研究。”

Text.en:
"If the skull is real, and not a forgery, then it may show that my people are not the
abominations others believe us to be. The word 'human' may have a broader meaning."
Text.zh: “如果这个头骨不是伪造的，那就说明我们绝不是其他人口中的孽种。‘人类’一词应该有更宽泛的定义。”

Text.en:
"A great fire once swept the land, and our leaders were turned to ash where they stood.
The urn contains exactly what you think it does, and serves as proof of our long lineage."
Text.zh:
“烈火一度席卷大地，将我们的领袖烧成灰烬。
这个瓮里的东西跟你想的一样，能证明我们悠久的血统。”

Text.en: Only the souls trapped within can bear witness to the Maven's dark proclivities, and they dare not speak up.
Text.zh: 只有受困于此的魂灵能见证贤主的黑暗癖好，但它们绝不敢声张。

Text.en:
It would be foolish to obey the Maven's demands.
It would also be foolish not to.
Text.zh:
只有蠢货才会服从贤主的命令。
不服从一样愚蠢。

Text.en:
For those who must not endure it,
there may be found a perverse joy 
in watching the struggle for survival.
Text.zh:
注定不能忍受的人们
在目睹挣扎求生的过程中，
大概能找到一丝荒诞的乐趣。

Text.en:
Precious and perilous,
Tantalising and terrible.
Text.zh:
既珍贵又危险，
既诱人又可怕。

Text.en:
"The village was locked within its walls,
protected from those who could do them harm,
protected from those who could save them."
Text.zh:
“村庄紧闭高墙，
既抵御了敌人，
又断绝了外援。”

Text.en:
"Believing them to have discovered new lands,
they planted their flag in the dirt and called it their own.
A gesture not taken with a great deal of pleasure
by those who already dwelt there."
Text.zh:
“他们自以为发现了新大陆，
于是插上旗帜宣示主权。
可那里早已有人定居，
对此并不满意。”

Text.en:
"The first explorers took to the hills to discover the lay of the land,
and watched with wonder as the land undulated, crashed and twisted."
Text.zh:
“首批探险家登上高山，探查土地的全貌，
他们被眼前崎岖、起伏、崩塌的大地震撼。”

Text.en:
"Atop the highest peaks, the sunlight pierced but did not warm.
The air choked and did not nourish.
And those that made the trek realised the folly of their desire for greatness."
Text.zh:
“高山之巅的阳光灼人却丝毫没有温暖。
空气令人窒息却丝毫没有清新。
跋山涉水者们才恍然明白他们对壮举的追求多么愚昧。”

Text.en:
"Where once a mountain stood there was now but fields and dust.
One by one, the stones were moved and placed with intention,
the consequences borne by the destination and the origin."
Text.zh:
“曾经山脉屹立之地如今只余尘土和荒原。
石头都一块接一块被有意搬走了，
它们留下的后果被起源和终点共同承担。”

Text.en:
"The Shade walked the land with no end in sight,
no purpose in mind,
but the one it invented to pass the time."
Text.zh:
“影子在望不到尽头的大地上漫游，
没有目的，
只有一个用来打发时间的目标。”

Text.en:
"There were seasons in this strange new place, but not of sun and snow.
Seasons of stone that rose and fell like waves.
Seasons of structure and growth and madness and chaos.
Seasons of birth and decay that seemed untethered to cause."
Text.zh:
“这片奇怪的新大陆一样有季节变化，但那跟酷暑和落雪无关。
这里只有石头起落如潮的季节。
这里只有疯狂和混沌疯长的季节。
这里只有生衰腐坏无常的季节。”

Text.en:
"For a time, it was thought this place could seed an empire
greater than any in history.
The lands could be tamed, and commanded, they thought.
But control, like all things in that place, was an illusion."
Text.zh:
“有一段时间，这里被认为可以成长为一个帝国。
比历史上任何一个都伟大。
他们认为这片土地可以被驯服，可以听从他们的号令。
但支配这个词，在这个地方跟其它东西一样，只是个幻觉。”

Text.en: "Grand plans were laid for a place called Atzoatl, though fierce bickering between its Architects is said to have stifled its development." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Research Report
Text.zh: “一个叫阿佐亚特的地方制定了宏伟的蓝图，但建筑师之间猛烈的争吵拖累了它的进展。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯最近的报道

Text.en:
The Banished Architect sought to employ all the
darkest secrets of the Vaal... at the same time.
Text.zh: 被放逐的建筑师试图同时采用所有最黑暗的瓦尔秘法……

Text.en:
The first Karui born on the fringes of the Vaal empire
developed a blood fever born of corruption.
Text.zh:
首个卡鲁人诞生于瓦尔帝国边陲，
来自一场从腐化中开发血瘟的实验。

Text.en: Their three serpentine heads found unity in balance.
Text.zh: 它们的三颗蛇头在平衡中团结一致。

Text.en:
The High Priests ensured the loyalty of their slaves by habituating
them to narcotic stimulants with lethal withdrawals.
Text.zh: 高阶祭司们让奴隶们沉溺于难以戒断的精神药剂，以此维系忠诚。

Text.en:
Man retains sanity and strives toward civilisation
only under the blessed veil of ignorance.
Text.zh: 只有在无知的祝福之下，才能保持理智，心向文明。

Text.en: Crush your enemies with your essence, so that you may drink of theirs.
Text.zh: 用自己的精华碾碎敌人，你就可以痛饮他们的精华。

Text.en: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.
Text.zh: 跪伏于她，否则就面对最严厉的死亡。

Text.en:
The priest that carried Yaomac's sigil was
granted one boon by each serpentine head.
Text.zh:
戴着约马克印记的祭司
得到了每一个蛇头的恩赐。

Text.en: Stolen power is still power.
Text.zh: 偷来的力量仍是力量。

Text.en: The Hated Slave seeks dominion over his own kind.
Text.zh: 心怀嫉恨的奴隶想要主宰自己的同胞。

Text.en: The Sovereign of the Well seeks dominion over the light.
Text.zh: 井中之王想要主宰光明。

Text.en: The Blackblooded seeks dominion over darkness itself.
Text.zh: 黑血之人想要主宰黑暗。

Text.en: The Liege of the Lightless seeks dominion over the surface dwellers.
Text.zh: 无光之君想要主宰地上之民。

Text.en: The dance of metal and flesh never ends.
Text.zh: 灵与肉之舞永无止尽。

Text.en:
You shall be weighed and measured. You shall be judged...
and perhaps you shall be found worthy.
Text.zh:
待你经过称重度量，接受判决……
想必能找到你的价值。

Text.en: "Atzoatl was a locus of Corruption, a temple dedicated to the worship of the unspeakable." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Eroded Vaal Orb
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特是腐化的聚集地，它是一座膜拜不可言说之物的圣所。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，侵蚀的瓦尔宝珠

Text.en: "When the Vaal discovered power could be gained from sacrificing the living, Atzoatl became a death march for the lower classes." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Obsidian Sacrificial Knife
Text.zh: “当瓦尔人意识到献祭活人可以换取力量后，阿佐亚特便向底层发起了攻势。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，黑曜石献祭匕首

Text.en: "In their paranoia, the Architects of Atzoatl hoarded wealth beyond any reasonable measure." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Vaal Golden Idol
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特的建筑师们在猜疑驱使下，囤积了超出理智的财宝。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，瓦尔金偶像

Text.en: "Doryani himself conducted gem research at Atzoatl in its final days. What brilliant discoveries were lost with that temple?" - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Third Ciphered Tablet
Text.zh:
“多里亚尼在晚年亲自主导了阿佐亚特的宝石研究。这座神庙里到底还埋藏了多少伟大的发现？”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，第三块密码板

Text.en: "Much could be learned from the relics said to be kept in Atzoatl. We consider the Vaal ancient, so what did they consider ancient in turn?" - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Vaal Mural
Text.zh: “这些据说存放于阿佐亚特的遗物让我们获益良多。我们认为瓦尔人很古老，那他们又认为谁很古老呢？”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，瓦尔壁画

Text.en: "Evidence suggests that Atzoatl's influence grew great enough that Atziri herself moved her seat of power to within its walls." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Royal Decree cast in Bronze
Text.zh: “证据表明，阿佐亚特的影响力如日中天，连阿兹里都把自己的权力中枢搬到了这里。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，铜板上的敕令

Text.en: "Atzoatl played host to the Cult of the Purple Flame. I do not know what powers they worshipped, but my educated guesses leave me shaken." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Embalmed Claw
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特也是紫焰密会的所在。我不知道他们追随的是谁，但只需理性推测就让我十分震惊。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，防腐处理的爪子

Text.en: "The Architects intended to research supposed 'Obelisks Beyond Time,' but the Vaal fell before the first obtained monolith was so much as measured." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Crystal Shard
Text.zh: “建筑师们致力于研究出所谓‘超越时间的方尖碑’，可没等造出来，瓦尔人就灭亡了。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，水晶碎片

Text.en: "Trade with lesser cultures, such as the Maraketh and the early Karui, resulted in overflowing vaults full of golden trinkets and elegant jewels." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, 'Dekhara's Resolve'
Text.zh: “他们跟马拉克斯及早期卡鲁人这样的低等文明贸易，换来了沉甸甸的金银首饰。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，德卡拉的决心

Text.en: "In its last days, the Architects of Atzoatl became increasingly obsessed with fictional lands. Wondrous lands, by their description, but fictional. Very odd." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Unidentified Angular Device
Text.zh: “在灭亡之前，阿佐亚特的建筑师们疯狂地痴迷于虚构的世界里。他们把那些世界描述为奇迹之地，却纯属子虚乌有。太奇怪了。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，用途不明的装置

Text.en: "Zantipi is said to have spent most of his considerable talent devising ambushes that used the promise of treasure as a lure for would-be looters." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Broken Locking Mechanism
Text.zh: “都说赞提佩把毕生才华都用在了设计埋伏上。他用说好的宝藏当饵，引诱想当劫掠者的家伙。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，坏掉的机关

Text.en: "Merchant carvings of the era consistently reported that the Architects could alter the weather in manners terrifying and incomprehensible." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Trade Record Tablet
Text.zh: “那个年代的商人刻下的文字里显示，建筑师可以用可怕费解的方式改变天气。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，贸易记录版

Text.en: "The Vaal were said to have experimented with fire at Atzoatl, though to what end is unknown." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Charred Parchment
Text.zh: “据说瓦尔人在阿佐亚特用火做实验，但结果已经无从知晓。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，烧焦的文件

Text.en: "The Architects apparently sought to master lightning. They may have succeeded just before the fall." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Copper Detritus
Text.zh: “建筑师们大概想掌握闪电的力量。他们在灭亡之前可能已经取得了成功。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，铜片残骸

Text.en: "Their engineering knowledge may have rivaled that of the modern world. The fall of the Vaal no doubt set humanity back a thousand years." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Ancient Gear Interlock
Text.zh: “他们在工程学上的造诣可以跟当代媲美。瓦尔人的灭亡无疑让人类文明倒退了上千年。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，上古齿轮绞锁

Text.en: "A great many warriors were stationed at Atzoatl, ostensibly due to repeated invasion by something referred to as 'a haunting death.'" - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Carved Interment Records
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特驻扎了大批武装，显然是为了防备记录中提及的‘亡灵作乱’的入侵。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，葬坑记录板

Text.en: "A great many creatures were bred at Atzoatl, ostensibly due to repeated invasion by some kind of horrifying murderous entity." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Fossilized Egg Sac
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特饲养了大批生物，显然是为了防备某种可怕造物的入侵。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，卵囊化石

Text.en: "At the height of their civilization, the Vaal took to ritual combat to solve all of their disputes. As a result, their surviving warriors were among the best in history." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Rust-coated Sword
Text.zh: “瓦尔人在鼎盛时期采用了一种仪式性战斗来解决他们的所有争端。幸存下来的武士将跻身于史上最伟大的武士行列。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，生锈的剑

Text.en: "The heart of Atzoatl imbued its denizens with vigour, according to the myths." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Glowing Stone
Text.zh: “根据神话，他们将有元气的居民注入阿佐亚特之心。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，发光的石头

Text.en: "Expedition logs suggest quite a few explorers sought Atzoatl over the centuries. The Architects planned against this potential plundering, however, with ingenious and lethal traps." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Corroded Spring Mechanism
Text.zh: “探险记录表明，有一些探险家数百年来都一直在寻找阿佐亚特。然而建筑师们对此早有安排，他们给未来的掠夺者准备了精密致命的陷阱。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，侵蚀的弹簧机关

Text.en: "The Architects were certainly fond of their ghost stories. The tales almost sound as if the business was taken literally." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Carved Fable
Text.zh: “建筑师们十分喜爱鬼故事。这些故事几乎跟它们字面上的意思一模一样。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，故事刻板

Text.en: "The Vaal had little concern for the externalities of their engineering. The toxins produced by their manufacturing may have poisoned the entirety of Atzoatl." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Desiccated Corpse of a Vaal Citizen
Text.zh: “瓦尔人从不担心他们的工程造成的外在影响。他们生产的毒素已经污染了整个阿佐亚特。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，瓦尔人的遗体

Text.en: "The Architects sought immortality... perhaps they reside within Atzoatl still..." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Vial of Emerald Water
Text.zh:
“建筑师们追求永生……也许他们如今依旧居住在阿佐亚特里……”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，翡翠色试剂

Text.en: "Atzoatl was a place of crude alchemy rather than art." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Urn of Unstable Powder
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特是为了原始的炼金术而生，绝非为了艺术。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，装有活性粉末的坛子

Text.en: "Armour crafted at Atzoatl became the envy of the known world." - Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Ancient Metals
Text.zh: “阿佐亚特生产的铠甲让整个已知世界羡慕不已。”——古董商伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，上古金属

Text.en:
Of ash and avalanche,
in storm and flesh,
we dream of unity.
The time approaches...
Text.zh:
我们在灰烬之中，
在风暴与血肉之中渴望着团结。
那一刻即将到来……

Text.en:
It isn't the twisted transformative power of corruption that makes it so dangerous.
It is its ability to hide in plain sight.
Text.zh:
并非腐坏那扭曲变形的力量使其如此危险。
而是它显露出的能力。

Text.en:
The gateway of flesh, horror unbound,
requires a key of madness and pain.
Text.zh:
肉体之门，恐怖无边，
它需要疯狂与苦痛之匙。

Text.en:
The minds of men are but motes
on a sea of infinite madness.
Text.zh: 人类的思维不过是无尽疯狂之海上的一抹尘埃。

Text.en: Flesh can be as clay to the properly motivated artist.
Text.zh: 在有心的艺术家面前，肉体如同泥胚。

Text.en:
The Infinite Hunger awaits in a cosmic stomach where
whole civilisations are digested - but do not die.
Text.zh:
无限饥饿在等待，它的胃大如宇宙，
无数文明在其中消化，却没有灭亡。

Text.en:
From the heart of the Tangle, the Eater of Worlds
reaches out for control of the Atlas.
Text.zh:
灭界者从纠缠之主的心中伸手，
想要操控异界。

Text.en:
Once within the grasp of the Black Star,
there can be no escape.
Text.zh:
一旦被漆黑之星抓住，
就再也无路可逃。

Text.en:
From the corona of an ancient star,
the Searing Exarch seeks to master the Atlas.
Text.zh:
焚界者从古老恒星的日冕中伸手，
想成为异界的主宰。

Text.en:
For aeons, ancient constructs have lain dormant,
but now their designs are under your control.
Text.zh:
亘古以来，这些古老的构造体一直陷入休眠，
如今它们尽在你的掌控之下。

Text.en:
<size:23>{Even though his flame has burned out,
he will never fade away.}
Text.zh:
<size:23>{尽管他的烈焰已经燃尽，
但他永远不会消逝。}

Text.en: <size:30>{Weapons such as these require a darker kind of forge...}
Text.zh: <size:30>{如此利器需要更为黑暗的锻造方式……}

Text.en: Even our most devout beliefs are subtly shaped by our darkest desires.
Text.zh: 即便我们的信仰无比坚定，黑暗的欲望也会潜移默化地影响我们。

Text.en:
<size:26>{All things slow under winter's 
onslaught - even life itself.}
Text.zh:
<size:26>{凶猛地寒冬拖慢了万物
——甚至是生命本身。}

Text.en:
<size:28>{I cannot contain myself,
but I can barely squeak,
so many words I'd have for you,
if I could only speak!}
Text.zh:
<size:28>{我无法控制自己，
只能发出几声吱叫，
有那么多话想对你说，
我要能说话就好了！}

Text.en:
This grelwood heirloom hums softly with latent emotion,
imbued by centuries of songs passed from mother to daughter.
Text.zh:
韧木制成、音色柔和的传家珍宝，
母女传承，千年之久的歌中浓情。

Text.en:
Together, the runes are an oath of peaceful
passage and a request for freedom in
pursuit of an important cause.
Text.zh:
刻在一起的符文象征着
畅通无阻的承诺，还有
为追逐大义而求取自由。

Text.en: Untouched by fate. Its power waits for a purpose.
Text.zh: 命运未曾触碰。它的力量在等待使命。

Text.en:
The rune on the buckle means
'unity' or 'safety from harm.'
Text.zh:
扣带上的符文表示
“团结”和“转危为安”。

Text.en:
The rune at the base of the blade
means 'to strike true' or 'truth.'
Text.zh:
刃柄上的符文代表
“从不失手”或“真理”。

Text.en:
"Take me to the Trial of the Sekhemas.
I will serve."
Text.zh:
“带我去往丝克玛试炼吧。
我愿侍奉你。”

Text.en:
Mortals spend their lives wondering which
fate shall be theirs. Chaos takes amusement
in knowing the answer: all of them.
Text.zh:
凡人终其一生都在思考自己的命运。
混沌以知道答案为乐：所有一切。

Text.en:
Mortals spend their lives wondering which
fate shall be theirs. Chaos takes amusement
in knowing the answer: all of them.
Text.zh:
凡人终其一生都在思考自己的命运。
混沌以知道答案为乐：所有一切。

Text.en: The ignoblest of choices.
Text.zh: 这是最为可耻的抉择。

Text.en:
Fight enough battles, and it
becomes all but inevitable.
Text.zh:
经历足够的征战，
结局早晚会到来。

Text.en:
There is always a chance, however small,
that you might actually succeed.
Text.zh:
虽然微不足道，但总有一种可能，
你或许真能凯旋而归。

Text.en:
First and foremost, a Sekhema
must possess strength.
Text.zh:
首先，丝克玛
利用掌握力量。

Text.en:
The world will seek to crush you and yours.
A Sekhema must have relentless will.
Text.zh:
整个世界企图将你和族人碾碎，
所以丝克玛要拥有顽强的意志。

Text.en:
Strength can be outmatched by move and countermove.
A Sekhema must be perceptive and cunning.
Text.zh:
自如进退便可以柔克刚，
而丝克玛必须敏锐机智。

Text.en:
Time is the ultimate power. A true Sekhema must hold in
her heart the truth: only the akhara can carry on forever.
The greatest victory lies in ensuring the next generation.
Text.zh:
时间是无上的力量。而真正的丝克玛
要将真理铭记在心：唯阿卡拉能永存。
若能保证世代传承，便已可凯歌高奏。

Text.en:
The rune emblazoned on the crest means
'freedom' or 'for a worthy cause.'
Text.zh:
纹章上的符文
写着“自由”或“大义”。

Text.en: The cruelty of the Eternals...
Text.zh: 永恒之民的残暴……

Text.en: ... shall never be forgotten.
Text.zh: ……永远不会被忘却。

Text.en:
The rune of Authority is said to dim one lunar
cycle after a Count's soul is laid to rest.
Text.zh:
据说当伯爵的灵魂得以安息
权威符文的光辉将黯淡一月。

Text.en:
An elegantly crafted alchemical tool from a far-off land.
The obsidian material glimmers darkly at certain angles.
Text.zh:
精雕细琢的炼金工具，来自遥远的土地，
黑曜石在特定角度下闪烁着黯淡的光芒。

Text.en:
Melted down and reused repeatedly by centuries of clan smiths,
this steel has seen countless battles in countless forms.
Text.zh:
由部族铁匠熔化、锤锻、淬炼了数百年，
这块千变万化的精钢早已遍历战场。

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en: Corruption often causes crystals to grow in strange places...
Text.zh: 腐化会让水晶生长在奇怪的地方……

Text.en: The skull of a stolen child, carefully cultivated by the Bog Witch...
Text.zh: 一个被偷走的孩子的头骨，被沼泽女巫精心培育……

Text.en: The mind springs forth eternal.
Text.zh: 思想的源泉永恒不竭。

Text.en: Bound by ink, upheld by trust.
Text.zh: 以墨为契，以信为本。

Text.en: Forgework tools belong to Renly and his son.
Text.zh: 属于蓝礼与他儿子的锻造工具。

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en:
When Orbala drew in a mighty breath and sounded the Horn,
every tent in the whole of the Plains blew wildly open.
Text.zh:
欧巴拉威严地深吸一口气，吹响了号角。
劲风吹开了平原各地坐落的每一处帐篷。

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en: [DNT-UNUSED} Fill Me In
Text.zh: [DNT-UNUSED}填写

Text.en:
It howled alone on the eve of
the first snow. Now, it snarls
forever, heralding the cold.
Text.zh:
初雪纷落之夜孤狼哀嚎，
其恒久怒容为冰雪先兆。

Text.en: A sense of gratefulness and peace radiates with warmth.
Text.zh: 那股暖意中透露着感激与宁静。

Text.en:
"Bit of Ezomyte know-how, bit of local herbs...
it's no mythical Welakath, but it'll sustain you."
Text.zh:
“一点艾兹麦的学问，一点本地的药草……
不是神秘的维拉克斯，但能维系你的性命。”

Text.en: Age-old ivory from a forgotten era.
Text.zh: 不知来自何时的上古象牙。

Text.en:
It burns with the primordial heat
of a long-ago Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
熊熊燃烧的始源之火，
来自万古之前的瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en: The last few drops from veins dry as sand.
Text.zh: 如沙漠般干枯的血脉中仅存的几滴精华。

Text.en:
By the terms of the Third Pact, the Constrictor Queen
was banished from Keth, but given the eastern sands.
Text.zh:
依第三盟约所定，狂蟒女王卡芭菈
虽应被逐出克斯，但享有东部沙海。

Text.en:
By the terms of the Third Pact, the Sun Clan
agreed to never again attack the Maraketh.
Text.zh:
依第三盟约所定，烈日部族同意
不得再大动干戈，进犯马拉克斯。

Text.en:
For a time, there was peace, a wall against
mutual enemies from beyond.
Text.zh:
和平短暂地降临了，如高墙一般
抵御着来自彼方的，共同的敌人。

Text.en: Life thrives where death dwells.
Text.zh: 生终死，枯亦荣。

Text.en:
Those near the ruby describe a sensation of intense malice,
as if something is peering through from the other side...
Text.zh:
靠近红宝石就会感觉到强烈的怨恨，
仿佛它的另一侧投来了凝视的目光……

Text.en:
"Why are you standing there gawking at me?
We must go to the Trial of the Sekhemas!"
Text.zh:
“你怎么还呆呆地盯着我？
我们要去参加丝克玛试炼！”

Text.en: The primordial molten world was not devoid of life.
Text.zh: 遍地熔火的洪荒世界亦不乏生命的踪迹。

Text.en: The phrase 'dekha no Garukhan breala' is carefully painted around the middle.
Text.zh: 中间精心地涂绘了“德卡之格鲁坎所获”一句。

Text.en: The bottle shakes angrily when the entity inside sees you looking.
Text.zh: 内在的实体发现了你的目光，瓶子恼怒地晃动了起来。

Text.en: Cool and pure, it represents hope in a bleak era.
Text.zh: 清冷纯净，象征着荒凉年代中的一滴希望。

Text.en: "Weep not for me. This punishment is my own doing."
Text.zh: “勿要为我哭泣。我乃咎由自取。”

Text.en: "I'd have preferred to go with the Serpent Clan."
Text.zh: “我宁愿与毒蛇部族为伍。”

Text.en: Frozen trophies of a predator's reign.
Text.zh: 掠食者的冰封战利品。

Text.en:
Extremely personal words of love, honour,
and hopelessness scrawled by a shaking hand...
It appears to have been carefully written to
avoid revealing who it was intended for.
Text.zh:
颤抖的手写下的私密话语，
诉说着爱意、荣耀与绝望……
书写的方式似乎非常缜密，
以免透露它本应写给的人。

Text.en:
Beware the bite of those serpents that call a human corpse home.
Nature has given them the means to acquire a new dwelling.
Text.zh:
小心人骸中寄宿的毒蛇，
自然赐予了它侨居之术。

Text.en: The smell is bad enough to make a veteran warrior faint.
Text.zh: 恶臭扑面而来，勇士亦难招架。

Text.en: The liquid within is acrid enough to burn nose hairs.
Text.zh: 液体刺激无比，鼻毛也难幸免。

Text.en: The smell overpowers everything else.
Text.zh: 面对这股气味，一切都无所谓。

Text.en: It hums faintly. Not with life, but with purpose.
Text.zh: 它轻轻低鸣，并非因为生命，而是因为使命。

Text.en: Oddly, it remains warm...
Text.zh: 奇怪的是，它余温未散……

Text.en: The pupils refocus as you look closer.
Text.zh: 见你仔细打量着它，瞳孔又一次聚焦起来。

Text.en:
Blind to pleas. Deaf to lies.
Her scales weigh only truth.
Text.zh:
对呼唤无动于衷，对谎言充耳不闻；
她的天平只称量真相。

Text.en:
The flesh continues to grow and change,
perhaps forming an entire new body in time...
Text.zh:
血肉的生长与变化从不停歇，
也许早晚能长出新的躯体来。

Text.en:
Even the slightest movement causes air to move through them,
releasing a subtle mind-numbing pressure.
Text.zh:
丝毫举动间，气流从中涌过，
心烦意乱的压迫涌上脑海。

Text.en: The meaning of the symbols has been lost to time.
Text.zh: 这个符号所象征的意义早已在时光中零落了。

Text.en: Diamora sings no more.
Text.zh: 戴娅摩菈的歌声停止了。

Text.en: The sea gave it strength. Now it serves a greater purpose.
Text.zh: 大海赋予它力量，它如今服务于更高的目标。

Text.en: A shooting star may bring great fortune.
Text.zh: 一闪而过的流星也许会带来好运。

Text.en: They are engraved with the runes for 'Authority,' 'Break,' and 'Release.'
Text.zh: 上面铭刻着“权威”、“破解”和“释放”的符文。

Text.en: Clutched tight, even in death.
Text.zh: 即便死后也紧握不放。

Text.en: Weathered, but not forgotten.
Text.zh: 风蚀其表，然未被遗忘。

Text.en: Smells of salt, rust, and fear.
Text.zh: 带着咸味、铁锈与恐惧的气息。

Text.en: No light touched it for centuries.
Text.zh: 已有千百年未见天光。

Text.en: The storm has not struck, but the sky is watching.
Text.zh: 风暴尚未降临，但苍穹正在凝望。

Text.en: What is written in water is never truly lost.
Text.zh: 水中所书之文，永不真正湮灭。

Text.en: The forge is ready. Flesh is only waiting.
Text.zh: 熔炉已然就绪。血肉仅待锻造。

Text.en: To the unknowing, it is nothing. To Yama, it is everything.
Text.zh: 对无知之人而言，它空无一物。对雅玛而言，它便是一切。

Text.en: Tawhoa rewards those who grow.
Text.zh: 塔赫亚犒赏精进之人。

Text.en: Hunters of the Tasalio Tribe are just as effective on land.
Text.zh: 塔萨里奥部落的猎人们在陆地上一样能干。

Text.en: When Ngamahu's chosen truly wish to destroy an enemy, nothing can stop them.
Text.zh: 努葛玛呼的神选决心摧毁敌人时，又有什么能阻挡得了？

Text.en: The forest stands tall against the storm.
Text.zh: 林海参天，巍然屹立风暴之中。

Text.en: Tasalio bids you take a moment to stop and enjoy the calm of the ocean.
Text.zh: 塔萨里奥邀请你暂歇一会儿，享受海洋的宁静。

Text.en: The Ngamahu Tribe believes the Karui will be reforged in a volcano at the end of time.
Text.zh: 努葛玛呼部落坚信卡鲁族会在末日的火山中重铸。

Text.en: Hinekora is not the master of Death, but she is its Mother.
Text.zh: 辛格拉并非死亡之主，而是死亡之母。

Text.en:
The war goes on, but the warrior does not.
Do not let yourself die until you have
made your mark. The Ancestors see you.
Text.zh:
战争仍在继续，但战士不会。
在留下你的印记之前，莫让自己倒下。
先祖注视着你。

Text.en:
The sea goes on, but the sailor does not.
Enjoy each moment as it flows over you,
through you, for it will never come again.
Text.zh:
大海仍在继续，但水手不会。
享受每一个流淌过你、穿透你的瞬间，
因为它们永不复返。

Text.en: Ancient facets remain warm to the touch.
Text.zh: 远古的雕琢表面抚触尚温。

Text.en: Somewhere, a distant scream echoes.
Text.zh: 不知何处，飘渺的尖叫声回荡不止。

Text.en:
Heat emanates from the facets,
living warmth encased in crystal.
Text.zh:
雕琢的表面散发出灼热的高温，
水晶的内部封存着跃动的暖意。

Text.en:
It burns with the heat of rage and murderous intent,
a single soul imprisoned eternally for his crimes.
Text.zh:
滚滚怒意和凶残恶念在其中沸腾，
累累罪行让这个灵魂永不得解脱。

Text.en: This idol seems strangely shaped, as if made specifically to fit into something.
Text.zh: 这个神像造型古怪，似乎能够嵌入某种物体之中。

Text.en: The skulls of stolen children adorn carved wood.
Text.zh: 雕文木头上挂满了失窃孩童的遗骨。

Text.en:
The smith may not remember higher
pursuits, but the hammer does.
Text.zh:
匠人或许遗忘了崇高的追求，
但锤子永远铭记着。

Text.en:
To forge the most exquisite of creations,
sometimes cold is needed instead...
Text.zh:
欲铸就最精美的造物，
有时所需者……却是严寒。

Text.en: Golden Treasure lies forgotten...
Text.zh: 被人遗忘的黄金珍宝……

Text.en: ...in the depths of an ancient ruin...
Text.zh: ……藏于远古遗迹的深处……

Text.en: ...rewarding any bold enough to seek it.
Text.zh: ……无畏者方可夺得奖赏。

Text.en: Brilliant idols of immense value...
Text.zh: 夺目的雕像价值连城……

Text.en: ...prized for their rarity...
Text.zh: ……稀世罕见而令人垂涎……

Text.en: ...and exquisite craftsmanship.
Text.zh: ……做工绝伦而博人艳羡。

Text.en: Death is both a mercy and a curse.
Text.zh: 死亡既是一种怜悯，也是一种诅咒。

Text.en: A soul still clings to fading shreds of life.
Text.zh: 这个灵魂仍紧紧抓住那逐渐消逝的生命碎片。

Text.en:
Passed down through royal bloodlines since
the time of the gods, it lies heavy in your hand.
Text.zh:
自众神时代便由王室血脉传承，
此刻它沉甸甸地躺在你手中。

Text.en: It is safer to be feared than to be loved.
Text.zh: 受人爱戴，不如为人所惧，还比较能保全性命。

Text.en: An Ezomyte endures.
Text.zh: 一位艾兹麦人忍辱负重。

Text.en:
In death, the legendary boar's tusks were turned
to the slaying of Phaaryl's Eternal oppressors.
Text.zh:
传奇野猪的獠牙化作一把利器
推翻了压迫法瑞欧的永恒之民。

Text.en:
That most legendary caravan bandit had
one rule: never let them see you flinch.
Text.zh:
传奇匪王有一条规矩：
可以胆怯，不能露怯。

Text.en:
Not the sound of thunder on the wind, but the
rhoaback riders—death charging from the sands.
Text.zh:
风中回荡呼啸并非雷鸣之声，
那是恐喙鸟骑士的搏命冲锋。

Text.en:
Knowing she could outlast any opponent,
Wrashmin fought not to win, but to delay.
Text.zh:
华士敏深知自己能拖垮对手，
战斗时不求速胜，但求持久。

Text.en: The toughest armour is the trust of your people.
Text.zh: 信任你的人民将成为你最坚固的护具。

Text.en:
Some would question if the risk was worth it.
The rest were already dead.
Text.zh:
有些人会质疑冒这风险是否值得。
其他人则早已死去。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.
Text.zh: 保护乌龟的龟壳同时也是它的棺材。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: The warrior who fears will fall.
Text.zh:
勇斗之魂无坚不摧，
懦弱之心退缩避畏。

Text.en:
Tears of blood, aching heart,
My dear Isildria must depart.
Text.zh:
破碎的心灵淌着血，
我心爱的伊席德莉亚在此永别。

Text.en: When cornered and desperate, look within for the rage to break loose.
Text.zh: 困入死局而走投无路之时，心中的狂怒仍可助你挣脱。

Text.en: To catch an animal, think like an animal.
Text.zh: 了解你的猎物，才能驾驭你的猎矛。

Text.en: The blasted oak stands forever.
Text.zh: 橡树虽已枯萎，依旧永世屹立。

Text.en: The desert is ever flowing.
Text.zh: 沙海奔流，从不停歇。

Text.en:
"I carry neither food nor drink. I rely on the charity
of my fellow wayfarers. Dead men are generous men."
- Taruk of the Wildmen
Text.zh:
“我不会前去寻水觅食，
毕竟还有那断了气的同伴遗爱人世。”
——野人塔卢克

Text.en:
Wraeclast has suffered many great disasters,
but life always springs back anew.
Text.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯经历过无数浩劫，
然而生命总能从灰烬中绽放。

Text.en:
The truth lies inside every man, if you dig around. 
Many a confession was found in the bowels of Axiom.
Text.zh:
每个人的背后都藏着一份真实，
只要你挖的够深。
坦白都藏于那真实的最深处。

Text.en: As the serpent wills.
Text.zh: 腾蛇之愿必将实现。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Shedding away her regal past,
she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.
Text.zh:
他人抚慰，仅得苦痛暂缓，
回归自然，方是永恒终站。

Text.en:
Feed a beast and it will not hunt.
Protect it and it will not fight.
Ferocity must be learned, not taught.
It is suffering that forges the greatest warriors.
Text.zh:
喂食野兽，它就不会伤害你·
保护它野兽 它就不会与你为敌·
暴行最易被模仿却无法被教授·
只有疼痛能够打造最强的战士·

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows,
tipped with a poisoned hatred
only oppression can ferment.
Text.zh:
西里的箭雨呼啸而来，
矢锋剧毒命中要害，
留下冰冷遗体诉说悲哀。

Text.en:
"The boy is a bad omen," he cried. "Ravens gather
before him!" That night, a new raven appeared, and
shadowed the Auspex for the rest of his days.
Text.zh: “这孩子是个不祥之兆，”他哭喊道，“乌鸦在他面前集结！”当晚，一只新乌鸦出现了，并在余生中一直跟随着那位占星者。

Text.en: Faith springs abundant at the edge of death.
Text.zh: 信念在死亡的边缘涌现。

Text.en: The soul cannot flourish in a doubting mind.
Text.zh: 满心疑虑困惑，灵魂便不得滋养。

Text.en: Suspicion is a sinister shadow slithering in the soul.
Text.zh: 猜忌如同邪影，深伏人之内心。

Text.en:
Fueled by the blackness in the hearts of men,
the armies of Saresh were just as relentless.
Text.zh:
沙利希的无穷大军冷酷无情，
人心的黑暗助长了那份气焰。

Text.en: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.
Text.zh: 种下燃焰余烬，收割炼狱之炎

Text.en:
In its final era, the roofs of Keth were rife with
anything and everything that could hold water...
should the opportunity arise.
Text.zh:
在最后的那个时代
克斯的屋顶摆满了盛水的器皿……
只求那一丝生机。

Text.en: A faith born of flesh.
Text.zh: 诞生自肉体凡胎的一缕信念。

Text.en:
My Soul is your Strength
My Price is your Blood
Text.zh:
我的灵魂将引导你勇闯天涯，
但是必须以鲜血做为代价。

Text.en: The tale-women of old knew how to build anticipation.
Text.zh: 从前的说书人知道如何吊起胃口。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Reap what others have sown
Muster them from their graves
Parade them for your pleasure
Zealots in mortis enslaved
Text.zh:
莫让前人耕耘回归尘土
休使学问埋入坟墓
呼唤前人出坟阔步，
奴役亡躯，踏上征途。

Text.en:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.
Text.zh:
喉咙嘶吼，
双眼泪流，
两手紧握，
十指颤抖，
腹部曲扭，
仍然屹立不休，
问其原因为何? 
傲骨绝不屈合。

Text.en:
Hallowed Dordalus was cast into the pit as a heretic,
but his piety was so great, he would not burn.
He rose again, lauded, his faith forever changed...
but not the way the Templar believed.
Text.zh:
圣徒多达鲁斯被判作异端，抛入坑中，
可虔诚之心昭然，罪火无法伤其分毫。
他挺身而起，高声赞颂，信仰不曾移……
圣堂武僧却不愿相信。

Text.en:
Shavronne's apparel became ever more extravagant
as her body and soul became ever more corrupted.
Text.zh:
薛朗的肉身跟灵魂堕入魔道，
衣着妆扮越发奢华花俏。

Text.en:
For those noble families obsessed
with keeping their bloodline pure,
there was a price to pay...
Text.zh:
高贵家族痴迷于
维护血系的纯粹，
自有代价要偿付……

Text.en:
In the mists they dwell,
forever hungry,
forever cold.
Text.zh:
它们深居于迷雾中，
永远饥肠辘辘，
永远阴冷相随。

Text.en: A power unknown aids your own.
Text.zh: 那股未知的力量也为你所用。

Text.en:
His isolation caused him to treasure
their companionship all the more.
Text.zh:
正是因为他向来孑然一身，
才会如此珍视他们的陪伴。

Text.en:
There is no safer place
Than the Belly of the Beast
Text.zh:
如果你觉得保命奋战太过沉重，
不如就让巨兽吞入腹中。

Text.en:
"This was the first step in some grand design,
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."
- Dominus, High Templar
Text.zh:
宏伟计划终于迈出了第一步，
我们困惑已久，终于取得了进展。
——神主多米纳斯

Text.en:
That day, both the Unblinking Eye and
their enemies stood in silence. That day,
the sky was clear, but it was raining.
Text.zh:
那一日，凝望之眼与宿敌
相逢却沉默无言。那一日，
晴空万里，雨却打湿了脸。

Text.en:
The world churned during the Great Wasting.
Tawhoa may have stilled the rioting earth,
but it was Valako that tamed the broken sky.
Text.zh:
大荒废年代里，世界天翻地覆。
塔赫亚也许能安抚狂暴的大地，
但能制服破碎天穹的只有瓦拉克。

Text.en:
"I will never forget. I will carry your memory
forward, all of you, from this ghastly Vale."
- Artair, last survivor of the Ogham rebellion
Text.zh:
“我绝不会忘记。我会背负你们的回忆，
带你们每一个人，走出这该死的谷地。”
— 阿泰尔，欧甘义军的最后幸存者

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Whiff of cold, tiny spark, faintest flicker in the dark.
Embers swirl, ice takes form, sky exposed - Death's perfect storm.
Frost and thunder, flames shine bright, ruin walks the land tonight.
By your hand they dance and bend, wield them and brook no end.
Text.zh:
寒冷气息，渺小火光，黑暗中额外明亮
余火旋转，冰霜自燃，死亡风暴转瞬就到
霜与雷，火与光，今夜将陆地燃成荒
你手中，皆臣服，征服战火愿天不亮

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"What are you lot looking at? We're
under fire! Get to your stations!"
- Captain Sventura, the Unlucky
Text.zh:
“你们这帮家伙在看什么？我们正在被炮击！各就各位！”
— 斯文图拉，倒霉的船长

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: The gleam of the night and howling teeth alike could not abate the rising of the sun.
Text.zh: 暗夜无光，利齿嘶嚎，可太阳照常升起。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
When Solaris closes her burning eye
At the end of time,
the world will perish in ice.
Text.zh:
太阳神阖闭火瞳
时空自此告终，
世界冻亡寒冰之中。

Text.en:
"Do not despair! Give yourself to the woods!
Become empty, and the Goddess will find you.
From within her roots... you shall be restored."
- Cirel of Caer Tarth
Text.zh:
“不要绝望！将你自己献给森林！
变得空无，女神便会找到你。
在她的根须之中……你将被恢复。”
——赛尔塔斯的西雷尔

Text.en:
Although a great leader during the war,
Voll proved disastrous in times of peace.
Text.zh:
福尔骁勇善战，登基称王
奈何治国无方，终至灭亡

Text.en:
The greatest mistakes cause suffering
long after they have been made
Text.zh:
最严重之过犯，让人吃苦受难。
即使事过境迁，依然阴魂不散。

Text.en:
Through every great purge, and every fiery inquisition,
the Twilight Order endured in secret.
Text.zh:
熬过净化，避过审讯，
暮光会仍在悄然扩张。

Text.en:
"Move in ways your enemy does not expect.
Confuse them with elegance and grace.
They'll never see the axe coming."
- Rakiata, Chieftain of the Tasalio Tribe
Text.zh:
“行动当出其不意
以优雅身姿欺敌，
斧刃便所向无敌。”
——拉其塔，塔萨里奥部落的酋长

Text.en:
It is often said of nobles that they live off their
peasants... sometimes, it's truer than any suspect.
Text.zh:
人们常说，贵族是平民百姓头上的吸血鬼。
有些时候……事实确实如此，千真万确。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Faith does not make us invulnerable.
It makes us immortal.
Text.zh:
信念无法让我们刀枪不入
但它却能让我们永不止息

Text.en:
The Twilight Order rejected the gods, choosing
instead to put their faith in each other.
Text.zh:
暮光会拒绝侍奉神明，
选择将信仰赋予彼此。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The collector need not even speak. Each ring
regaled them with tales of his conquest.
Text.zh:
收藏家甚至无需开口。
每枚戒指都向他讲述着他的征服传奇。

Text.en:
His latent potential unleashed itself, a beast
bursting from its shackles. Each strike of Farrow's
hammer rang out a song for the First Ones.
Text.zh: 他的潜能骤然释放，仿若挣脱枷锁的野兽。法罗的每一记锤击，都为初生之子奏响战歌。

Text.en:
"Hold firm. Let no word but the Mothers' turn your head.
Through your unfaltering fealty, you achieve perfection."
Text.zh:
“坚守信念。除母神之言，勿让任何话语动摇你心。
凭借坚定不移的忠诚，你方能臻至完美。”

Text.en:
"Prepare the rack, boy. And be careful with those hooks!"
- the Master Torturer's last words
Text.zh:
“搭好架子，小子。当心铁钩！”
——拷问大师的遗言

Text.en:
It was in this forsaken land, where mists shroud the world in mystery,
that thieves, murderers, and outcasts, sought refuge.
Text.zh:
在这片被遗忘的土地上，迷雾笼罩着世间的奥秘。
宵小、凶犯与浪客寻得了栖身之地。

Text.en:
Born among the high peaks, many Mutewind
live their entire lives in snow and ice.
Text.zh:
许多哑风成员诞生于群峰之间，
终此一生都在冰天雪地中跋涉。

Text.en: Be not where death falls.
Text.zh: 莫与死神同路。

Text.en: In all things, control.
Text.zh: 万事万物，皆有掌控。

Text.en:
Mortality is a curse.
The cure is simple.
Text.zh:
终末乃是诅咒。
解咒轻而易举。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Thin is the line between mechanical genius and magic.
Text.zh: 科技和魔法是有区别的。

Text.en:
"...The discomfort shown by the others is amusing, but none
can deny that my work has made quite the splash..."
- Maligaro's Journal
Text.zh:
“……眼见他人受罪，我心欣喜难掩；
我所造成的苦难绝对不容否认……”
- 马雷格罗日记

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.
Text.zh:
诅咒他们卑劣的议会。
他们把我当成杂种小孩将我排除在外。
他们并不知道我拥有的力量。

Text.en:
A gift from the Draíocht, lost in Darkness.
The bronze hums. The cloth sighs.
Living pieces of her, yearning to exist.
Text.zh:
德莱契赠予的礼物，失落于黑暗之中。
青铜嗡鸣，织物叹息。
她是鲜活的碎片，渴求着存在。

Text.en:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“无愧于心者，
何惧之有？”
——瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en: The younger brother waded into battle, shrugging off blows.
Text.zh: 弟弟一步步迈向战火，对刀光剑影视而不见。

Text.en: The older brother retained calm in the midst of fury.
Text.zh: 在狂怒与喧嚣之中，哥哥依然保持着冷静。

Text.en:
Centuries of servitude, a day
of glory, an eternity of death.
Text.zh:
荣华富贵享万日，
过眼烟云又一世。

Text.en:
The beasts we fear the most
are the ones who dwell in total darkness.
Text.zh: 遁形黑暗之中的猛兽最为让人恐惧。

Text.en:
We may fight, and we may die, but in these
moments of blood and battle, we truly live.
Text.zh:
我们可能会战斗，我们可能会战死，
但在流血和战斗的时刻，我们真正地活着。

Text.en: May you never hear it toll.
Text.zh: 希望此钟永不鸣响。

Text.en:
Only the High Priests could enact the sacrifices,
but all who witnessed shared in exultation.
Text.zh:
只有高阶祭司能主持奉献仪式，
可所有见证者，都将欣喜若狂。

Text.en: The Emperor's trusted surgeons are not the only ones who practice the dark arts. Some of us are just more discreet."
Text.zh:
“这个国家里研究黑魔法的并不只皇帝的心腹医师，
我们有些人也有涉猎，只不过研究时更谨慎而已。”

Text.en: An eye for an eye makes the whole world dead.
Text.zh: 冤冤相报，举目皆亡。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
When you have slain all of your enemies,
what is left to fear?
Text.zh:
除去所有的敌人之后，
还剩下什么会让你感到恐惧？

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Beyond madness lies inspiration.
Text.zh: 灵感埋没在疯狂的另一端。

Text.en: No metal slips as easily through the fingers as gold.
Text.zh: 凡人的双手总是无法留住最贵重，也是最沉重的资产。

Text.en: No man burns alone.
Text.zh: 行于烈火之人并不孤独。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Ancient worshippers of the Greatwolf were overtaken
by a ravenous hunger for all things mystical.
Text.zh: 远古的巨狼崇拜者被对所有神秘事物的极度渴望所占据。

Text.en:
"Be vigilant, Nezahul! When the serpent is cornered, does it give up?
No... It waits. Then it bites the first hand it finds. 
The danger of numbers is all in your mind!"
- Viper Napuatzi, instructing Royal Commander Nezahul
Text.zh:
“保持警惕，尼札胡！毒蛇被逼入绝境时可会屈服？
不……它会等待时机，咬住眼前出现的第一只手。
你只知势众之危，岂不知困蛇之险！”
——蝰蛇娜帕齐对皇家指挥官尼札胡的训示

Text.en:
Brinerot pirates live in a perpetual blaze of glory,
pushing their luck right to the end.
Text.zh:
布琳洛特的海盗永远在追逐荣耀。
并将自己的好运挥霍一空。

Text.en:
There was no hero made out of Starkonja's death,
but merely a long sleep made eternal.
Text.zh:
斯塔空加死去，并未造就英雄豪杰，
只是永远长眠冥界。

Text.en:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.
Text.zh:
投注炙热感情。
秉持不移坚定。
迎向灿烂光明。

Text.en: The end always comes sooner than we think.
Text.zh: 结局近在眼前，远超你我所想。

Text.en:
Nature respects the strong
And paints the snow red
With the blood of the weak
Text.zh:
自然滋养着强悍的灵魂，
雪地染上鲜红的血痕—— 
那是孱弱者的牺牲。

Text.en:
Lift it lightly, don it slow.
The spikes point out and in, you know.
Text.zh:
轻轻拿起，缓缓戴上。
冠刺锋利，非血即伤。

Text.en: The spirit hungers for the flesh.
Text.zh: 灵魂渴盼重获血肉。

Text.en:
Tale-women do not fight as dekharas.
They command a power all their own.
Text.zh:
说书人虽不像德卡拉一样征战，
却也掌控着只属于自己的力量。

Text.en:
Keep your heart as ice,
lest your passions stir.
Text.zh:
心中须存冷酷，
莫使情绪激荡。

Text.en:
From the flesh of the gods, Xibaqua was born.
From the carnage of Xibaqua, we were born.
It is our duty to return to the gods what was once theirs.
Text.zh:
夏巴夸亚源于众神之躯。
而我们则生于它的遗骸。
那么，归于众神自然是吾等之大限。

Text.en:
They screamed her name in adulation as they gave
their very lives. She looked on with impatience.
Text.zh:
谄媚的他们高呼女王之名，奉献身心。
她却不耐烦地注视着一切。

Text.en:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.
Text.zh:
转动，凝视，连连眨眼，
你注视虚幻之眼。
燃烧，夷平，痛饮若狂，
你已经丧心病狂。

Text.en:
"The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind.
A curious paradox."
- Shavronne of Umbra
Text.zh:
“肉体的苦痛换来清晰的脑袋。
真是个有趣的悖论。”
——黑影薛朗

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Branded a heretic for your beliefs,
You stand alone against many.
May the truth that fuels their anger,
Carry your blade into their hearts.
Text.zh:
为你的信念烙上异教徒的纹路
你只身抵抗天下众人
但愿他们怒火的真相
能带领你的剑刃直入他们的心脏

Text.en:
Where the body's limits begin,
the mind's limits end.
Text.zh:
肉体决定了你的起点，
而灵魂决定了你的终点。

Text.en: In the end, even heroes fade away.
Text.zh: 到头来，英雄豪杰终凋零。

Text.en:
Sometimes patching up your
equipment gets out of hand.
Text.zh:
有些时候，光是修补行装
也成了一件难于登天之事。

Text.en: Let the rider's aim be true.
Text.zh: 愿骑手能百发百中。

Text.en:
He never spoke a word. His opponents imagined
their own personal mockeries, most cruel.
Text.zh:
他从不言语，对手却想象到，
那是最残酷、最刻薄的嘲弄。

Text.en: Familiarity breeds contempt.
Text.zh: 熟门熟路会令你疏忽大意。

Text.en:
Swift as thought are the actions of Man 
when borne on wings of divine providence.
Text.zh:
天意命定如羽翅
让人行动更加电掣风驰。

Text.en:
"What lies beneath your feet?!"
"Sacred ground, watered with tears of blood!"
Text.zh:
“汝足下所踏何处？”
“此乃血泪浇灌之圣地。”

Text.en:
A cacophony of battle cries
Reverberate through time and space
Inflicting pain beyond measure
Text.zh:
刺耳的战吼
在时空中回响，
造成的苦痛无法估量

Text.en:
"Focus. Hone your mind. Your lessers rely on the tangible.
Shed your senses, and raze them from this physical realm."
Text.zh:
“专注。磨砺你的心智。弱者才依赖有形之物。
剥离你的感官，将他们从这个物质世界彻底抹除。”

Text.en: An endless river of bodies lie in the wake of ambition.
Text.zh: 为酬壮志，万骨皆枯。

Text.en: Heavy is the head.
Text.zh: 戴冠之人，头重脚轻。

Text.en:
A lightless world
a silent reign
two sightless eyes
feed on your pain.
Text.zh:
无光之界，
无声之域，
一双无视线的眼睛，
啃食着你的痛楚。

Text.en:
The seeds of greatness are planted in darkness,
Watered by suffering,
Tended by desperation,
And bloom steel flowers of victory.
Text.zh:
伟业种籽，栽于黑暗，
蒙受苦难浇灌，
遭到绝望照管，
方能绽放胜利的铁花瓣。

Text.en: Pain brings clarity.
Text.zh: 身尝苦痛才看得明白。

Text.en: Death crawls in darkness, closer than we think.
Text.zh: 死亡潜于黑暗，近在你我身旁。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
There is power in hunger, though it will
consume all that you have... and more.
Text.zh:
饥渴蕴藏着力量，但它会吞尽
你拥有的一切……还不会罢休。

Text.en:
"Your covetous hands bring the Unlight
ever closer to consuming your realm."
Text.zh:
“你贪婪的双手将暗光之域日益拉近，
直至吞噬你的国度。”

Text.en: The roots burrow deeper, unveiling the wood's bounty...
Text.zh: 根须深扎，尽显林木之丰饶……

Text.en:
A terror of ancient times, his identity
remains lost... but his power does not.
Text.zh:
那上古恐魔的身份无人知晓，
可他的力量并未失落。

Text.en: For none of us are as cruel as all of us.
Text.zh: 结群聚众必然生成力量之源。

Text.en:
Remaining unseen, the Dishonoured Assassin struck
only in the depths of the harshest sandstorms.
Text.zh:
无荣的刺客掩盖了行踪，
只待最猛烈沙暴才出手。

Text.en:
"A queen should be seen, admired, but never touched."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“女王者，可敬观崇拜而不可亵玩焉。”
——瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en:
"The ice seared his naked feet
As the lightning stilled his heart,
But it was the flames upon his lover's face
That roused him to vengeance."
- From 'The Three Dragons' by Victario of Sarn
Text.zh:
冰霜严寒，他的赤足伤痕布满，
雷霆万钧，他的心念无法动弹，
恶火猛烈，情人容颜化为飞灰，
此时他才终于奋起复仇，猛攻不退。
——萨恩的维多里奥著作"猎龙记"

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The sky tore asunder, black cleaving upon blue
The end of life, of Time, with no escape
But they found a fragment, a void, a haven
And there they waited, as it all began again
Dark will, dark knowledge, enemies of Fate
They know your mind, because they remember
Text.zh:
天空撕裂，漆黑破空，
生命终结，时间终末，无处可逃。
他们却找到碎片、虚空与避所，
就在那里，等待一切再度开始。
黑暗的意志，黑暗的知识，命运的敌人：
他们知你之念，因为他们曾记得。

Text.en:
"You think us savages?" mused the Red Wolf, as
he pulled teeth from the Eternal's skull. "I will
show your kind the way of tooth and claw."
Text.zh: “你认为我们是野蛮人？”血狼一边从永恒者的头骨上拔下牙齿，一边沉思道，“我会让你们这类人见识尖牙利爪之道。”

Text.en:
The largest beings on Wraeclast
are not flesh and blood.
Text.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯最庞大的生灵
并不是血肉之躯。

Text.en:
Why cling to your sanity? It offers you nothing.
Surrender to me, and I will grant you everything.
Text.zh:
迁就理智，你将一无所获，
屈服于我，你将收获丰硕。

Text.en: What is worse, the sting of the past, the pain of the present, or the fear of the future?
Text.zh: 最糟糕的，究竟是过去的伤痕，现在的痛苦，还是未来的恐惧？

Text.en:
"The heart is the herald. 
It will tell me when it is best to strike."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“心脏是最佳传令官，
让我知道何时该出击迎战。”
- 瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"I like my vassals at sword point,
but my enemies as close as the hilt."
- Emperor Chitus
Text.zh:
“寡人处处提防，就算封臣也得距离一剑之遥，
岂料仇敌宛若剑柄，早已潜伏身旁。”
- 切特斯大帝

Text.en: Forged from the heart of the densest star, your courage will fail long before it does.
Text.zh:
以至密星辰的核心锻造而出，
若你竭尽勇气，它也不曾黯淡。

Text.en: Fight with the ferocity of the First Ones.
Text.zh: 上阵搏杀的英姿，当如凶猛的初生之子。

Text.en:
After the eruption, the skies turned grey,
ash began to fall, and a chill set in...
Text.zh:
熔火喷发，苍穹黯淡，
飞灰如雪，寒冬降临……

Text.en: The forest is a stronghold mightier than any other.
Text.zh: 以森林为垒，筑不破坚城。

Text.en: The devil finds work for idle hands.
Text.zh: 虚度光阴之人容易走上邪道。

Text.en:
As the serpent shuns thought,
It shuns fear.
It strikes with the speed of wrath
And the skill of compulsion.
Text.zh:
当巨蛇不再多虑，
它变得无所畏惧。
愤恨难平，迅速杀敌！
展现气血狂怒的战技。

Text.en:
Maligaro operated effortlessly,
with great speed and terrible consequences.
Text.zh:
马雷格罗奇术出众卓越，
无比迅捷，带来无尽浩劫。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"We have methods of interrogation the Inquisitors only dream of."
- Marcus, Brotherhood Liaison
Text.zh:
“我们的审讯术是审判官们梦寐以求的。”
——兄弟会线人马库斯

Text.en: If fear doesn't kill you, I will.
Text.zh: 如果恐惧杀不死你，我也会亲手杀了你。

Text.en:
Bloodshed on the crimson shores,
longing for the endless sea.
Treasures, life, I'd give it all
just to capture thee.
Text.zh:
猩红海岸血战殇，
唯盼无尽之汪洋。
珍宝生命皆可献，
只求跃然笔墨间。

Text.en: You can be the wick or the wax. Either way, your light goes out and mine goes on.
Text.zh: 烛芯烛蜡皆一视同仁，火光燃尽助我等光辉。

Text.en:
While Doedre lacked Maligaro's sense of style,
she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.
Text.zh:
德瑞虽无马雷格罗的才思，
却能善用她天生的毒刺。

Text.en: Reality is a puzzle. Ingenuity is power.
Text.zh: 现实如同谜题，才思乃是力量。

Text.en:
Xibaqua's treachery was met with divine fury.
One by one, the gods reclaimed their flesh,
until all that remained was a droplet of pure light:
The first Vaal.
Text.zh:
夏巴夸亚的背叛遭到了神罚。
众神逐一剥夺了他们的肉体，
直到他们的身躯只残留下最后一点光沫，
那就是最早的瓦尔。

Text.en: Diamora sings not for hunger, but for longing.
Text.zh: 驱使戴娅摩菈歌唱的不是饥饿，而是渴求。

Text.en: "Keep smiling. The deepest cut comes not from insults, but from false praise."
Text.zh: “接着微笑吧。最深的伤痕并非来自侮辱，而是源于虚伪的赞美。”

Text.en: Absolute corruption empowers absolutely.
Text.zh: 绝对的腐败带来绝对的力量。

Text.en: The whispers of the old gods hum through the iron. They demand a hero.
Text.zh: 旧神的低语在铁中嗡嗡作响。他们呼唤英雄到来。

Text.en: Wealth is not to be borne lightly.
Text.zh: 千金万贯，得来不易。

Text.en: Anticipation is a gift.
Text.zh: 期盼是一份礼物。

Text.en:
Unlike the other gods, when he was born from the volcano,
Valako rode the clouds of ash into the thundering sky.
Text.zh:
瓦拉克自火山诞生，不同于其他神明。
他乘着灰烬之云，腾飞到雷鸣的高空。

Text.en: The strongest souls are forged through struggle and defeat.
Text.zh: 苦难与挫折的锤炼，造就了最坚强的灵魂。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Try as you like to hide the
blood on your hands.
You'll still know the truth.
Text.zh:
尽管擦去手上的鲜血吧。
你对此心知肚明。

Text.en: Captivity breeds creativity.
Text.zh: 对自由的渴望会造就无穷的希望。

Text.en: The secret was lost with its maker.
Text.zh: 它的奥妙已同创造者一起入了土。

Text.en:
Only once did Maligaro wonder if he'd gone too far.
His greatest success took three entire legions to capture.
Text.zh:
这是仅有的一次，连马雷格罗都怀疑自己是否太过分了。
他至高的杰作耗费了整整三个军团来追捕。

Text.en: The laws of the faith do not apply to its leader.
Text.zh: 清规戒律对教会的领袖无效。

Text.en:
By my hand, the inert is given life.
By my hand, that which rots is reborn.
There is nothing that cannot be changed.
Nothing.
Text.zh:
以吾之手，予惰者生机。
以吾之手，予腐者重生。
万物无定数，
世事无绝对。

Text.en:
The Master's tether wraps itself around the soul.
Should he be denied, he will unmercifully set it free.
Text.zh:
大师的锁链缚住灵魂。
若遭违抗，他便无情地将其释放。

Text.en: Ulcers, scabs, and pocks, the third army makes its claim.
Text.zh: 溃疡、痂痕和痘疹，索命无数的第三方。

Text.en:
"Stitches? Wouldn't that defeat the purpose?" 
- Jeffry, Torturer's Apprentice
Text.zh:
缝起来？那不就违背本意了吗？
——杰弗里，拷问者的学徒

Text.en: A plan without a deadline stays a plan.
Text.zh: 没有期限的计划方为计划。

Text.en:
"You think you have Coralito chained. You don't.
You think you're torturing him. You're not.
He needed to get close to you... and you let him."
Text.zh:
“你以为能铐住克拉里多。做梦。
你以为能折磨克拉里多。妄想。
他想要接近你……你遂了他的愿。”

Text.en:
The darkest clouds clashed and coupled,
giving birth to four lightning children of hate.
Text.zh:
乌云密布，相互碰撞交迭
激发出四道仇恨的雷电。

Text.en:
The roar of the heavens
Strikes more than fear
Into the hearts of Man
Text.zh:
天庭狂嚎震怒
神罚永不饶恕
人心恐惧无助

Text.en: A wall of steel and muscle.
Text.zh: 坚钢与血肉铸成了长城。

Text.en: Natural decay can be twisted to dark ends.
Text.zh: 自然的衰朽也能成为阴谋的助力。

Text.en: We move to be closer to her, but the distance yet grows.
Text.zh: 我们亦步亦趋，却是渐行渐远。

Text.en: The truly mighty are never outnumbered.
Text.zh: 真正的力量不会屈服于数量。

Text.en:
As the sun rises and the light approaches,
so too shall your enemies fear you.
Text.zh:
日出东方，光芒现世，
敌人也将为你胆寒。

Text.en:
Centuries ago, there existed a unique grove imbued with ancestral fire.
As with all things, the Karui used its wood for war.
Text.zh:
数百年前，他们在古老的树林中闪烁着先祖的火焰。
无一列外，卡鲁人也把它们用于战争。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: The druids walk the Grelwood without fear.
Text.zh: 韧木森林中的德鲁伊无所畏惧。

Text.en:
All your tomorrows lie ahead of you,
unknown and snarled to the very last.
Text.zh:
明日未来皆无定，
万般混乱亦未宁。

Text.en:
Where legends tread,
the world hearkens.
Text.zh:
传奇所到之处，
天地为之撼动。

Text.en:
Banished for his tragic failure,
Erian learned to hunt to survive.
Text.zh:
悲剧失败，惨遭流放，
阿里安只能以狩猎为生。

Text.en: The wyrm draws warmth from the fires of desire.
Text.zh: 欲望熊炎，是巨龙的力量来源。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“不闻音乐者，
料定跳舞之人皆痴狂。”
——瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en: Blessed are those who tend the Grove.
Text.zh: 护林之人可蒙恩典。

Text.en: All the world is my home.
Text.zh: 敝人以天地为家。

Text.en:
The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.
Text.zh:
亡者徘徊之处，
生人退避却步。

Text.en: Wonders abound at death's door.
Text.zh: 濒临死亡之际，人总能创造奇迹。

Text.en:
The mocking wind, a shielding spell,
The haunting screams, a maddening hell
Text.zh:
恶风袭击，召出护身宝具，
尖啸不息，目睹烈刑恶狱

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Some search forever for their path.
Text.zh: 有些人永远在寻找自己的道路。

Text.en:
"Sirrius flew on wings of light, faster than wind, faster
than thought. But try as he might to outrun the darkness,
it was there, at every turn, waiting for him."
- Azmerian legend
Text.zh:
“西里乌斯超越狂风，力振光辉双翼
穿越沉静思绪，在他挑战凌驾黑暗之际，
那暗影总是无所不在，四处迁移。”
——阿兹莫里传说

Text.en: The storm cannot sway those of sure footing.
Text.zh: 稳健之人无惧风浪。

Text.en:
"Captain Hiff Greybeard accomplished what nary a Brinerot
could: he died of old age. Almost had him a dozen times
meself, if it weren't for that damn leg of his... crafty shite..."
Text.zh:
“希夫·灰胡子船长做到了布琳洛特人永远做不到的事：
自然老死。我差点亲自弄死他十几回，
全怪他那条该死的腿……狡猾的老东西”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Tempest's power given form,
Flee before the walking storm.
Text.zh:
风暴成形，初生乍现，
伺机而动，逃出生天。

Text.en:
For the immortal, what is the difference
between an age and an instant?
Text.zh:
对于永恒的神灵而言，
一个世纪与一瞬之间又有什么差别呢。

Text.en:
To extend your life as long as possible
is to extend all the maladies that come with it.
Text.zh:
延长你的寿命
一并延长伴随着的疫病。

Text.en:
Where he tread, disintegrating storms of lightning
and death laid waste to all around him.
Text.zh:
他所行之处，雷霆风雨交加
身旁所伴者，尽是荒芜废灭。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"Soar. Be swift. Let none trespass here, from
above or below, lest your purpose be forfeit."
Text.zh:
“翱翔。迅捷。无论来自天上还是地下，
勿让任何人侵犯此地，以免你的使命前功尽弃。”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The cursed ones march forever,
On their hopeless, last endeavour.
Text.zh:
受诅亡魂永世行军，
踏上必败无疑的远征。

Text.en:
The combat stance used by Vaal nobles
was as elegant as it was deadly.
Text.zh:
瓦尔贵族的战姿
优雅与致命相伴。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Praetor Draven knew his only chance to subjugate
the Ezomytes was to catch them unaware.
Text.zh:
执政官德莱文心知肚明，
唯有攻其不备才能征服艾兹麦人。

Text.en:
The Counts of Ogham share a
legacy of cunning and power.
Text.zh:
欧甘伯爵世袭血脉，
传承着狡黠与力量。

Text.en: Welcome to Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 欢迎来到瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en:
"Beyond fire, blood, and nightmare,
the Saviour will build Utopia."
Text.zh:
“跨越火焰、鲜血与梦魇，
救赎者必将筑起乌托邦。”

Text.en: Some stories are never told.
Text.zh: 总有一些未曾言说的故事。

Text.en: A true predator does not chase; It waits.
Text.zh: 真正的狩猎者不会追逐；只会等待。

Text.en: Blood shed is blood shared.
Text.zh: 流血等同分享血液。

Text.en:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.
Text.zh:
身体沉默了内心，
因此我们舍去肉体。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Tukohama knew that he could not lose a fight in his fortress.
So he carried his fortress to the fight.
Text.zh:
战争之父图克哈玛未尝败绩，
因为这具盾牌一直守护着他。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Lunaris crossed silently, shining and full,
Softly night left her, alone and forlorn.
Solaris rose to meet her, feeling her pull.
'Neath the midday sun, the night was reborn.
Text.zh:
月影沐浴着月光，沉静地穿行着，
孤身一人离开了温柔的黑夜。
日耀起身与她会面，感受到了她的压力。
黑夜将在艳阳之下重生。

Text.en:
Fire dances with those who doubt
Licks the skin and flesh from the fearful
Where there is no fear
There is no flame
Text.zh:
犹豫迟疑，身陷恶火
胆怯畏惧，皮烧肉灼
唯有无惧无畏
方能业火中自得进退。

Text.en:
"Upon plains of endless chill,
They Who Never Tire... dominate.
They Who Never Surrender... terrify.
 And They Who Lay Beneath... wait for Nightfall."
- Tul, She That Silences
Text.zh:
“于无尽寒原之上，
永不疲倦者……主宰。
永不降者……令人生畏。
而蛰伏于下者……静候夜幕降临。”
— 托沃，止息之母

Text.en:
The unending carnage of war
mercilessly grinds away
at body and mind.
Text.zh:
漫漫无期的鏖战
无情地磨碎了
肉体与心灵。

Text.en: Lead by example, and you shall never be alone.
Text.zh: 以身作则，就不会成为孤身陌客。

Text.en:
The Wildwood was a gift, meant as a haven
against the Winter of the World.
Text.zh:
曾几何时，荒林本该是一份赠礼，
庇护我们，躲过世界之冬的寒意。

Text.en: Ride the western wind, and take flight.
Text.zh: 乘西风，翔千里。

Text.en:
Crimson burn'd the star of sadness,
All was woe that seem'd but gladness.
Text.zh:
血煞灾星现凶光
谁知恶劫吉中藏

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Not even the storm knows when lightning will strike.
Text.zh: 即使风暴也不知闪电何时会降临。

Text.en:
Never let the audience know your true form.
Misdirect them, beguile them.
Strike when they least expect it.
Text.zh:
千万别让观众发现真实的你。误导他们，哄骗他们。
在他们最不希望的时候出手。
