Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
From aeons past, Dannig felt the Runefather's
gaze, challenging him. There is no honour in ease.
True greatness is torn from the jaws of defeat.
Text.zh:
自远古以来，丹宁便感受到符文之父的目光向他发出挑战。
安逸之中没有荣耀。真正的伟大，
是从失败的血口中夺来的。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: May your resolve never waver.
Text.zh: 愿你的决心永不动摇。

Text.en: The druids swore to protect the Grelwood with their very lives.
Text.zh: 德鲁伊誓言守护韧木森林，不惜生命。

Text.en: A swift mind solves problems before they occur.
Text.zh: 机智心灵总能预测危难。

Text.en:
When the Red Sekhema called,
the Ardura were the first to answer.
Text.zh:
红色丝克玛高呼之时，
阿杜拉率先前来响应。

Text.en: When blood is paid, the weak think twice.
Text.zh: 唯有弱者对挥洒鲜血感到迟疑。

Text.en:
My bearer shall be guarded by flame,
for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.
Text.zh:
持此护盾，圣火护卫，
吾乃凤凰，光灿永辉。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Be not blinded by the light.
Text.zh: 光采，不夺目。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.
Text.zh:
冰霜和夜空互映辉映，
带来惊人的璀璨明光。

Text.en:
"A thief in the night, Draven did creep,
families asleep, taken, held on high.
Clever, he thought, 'til his children paid.
Nay, villain, a man never bleeds alone."
Text.zh:
“卑鄙的德莱文深夜来袭，
沉睡的人们被俘获受刑。
他自诩聪明却遗祸后代，
谁又能躲避手上的血债。”

Text.en:
Light and shadow chase eternal,
but neither knows the other exists...
Text.zh:
光影在永恒的追逐中纠缠，
却根本不知道彼此的存在。

Text.en:
"Resist for long enough, and your oppressor
will lose his will. Then, you've won."
Text.zh:
“只要坚持抵抗，暴君终会灰心。
那便是胜利的日子。”

Text.en:
A window onto a realm of red,
where countless voices scream...
Text.zh:
通往赤红领域的窗户，
无数个声音齐声哀嚎……

Text.en: Cold, miserable and alone... but alive.
Text.zh: 冰冷，悲惨，无人过问，但一息尚存。

Text.en:
As a boy, in the arena, Daresso learned to
feign weakness to open up a lethal blow.
Text.zh:
青年的德瑞索踏上了竞技场，
学会了示敌以弱，扮猪吃虎。

Text.en: An eye for an eye. A curse for a curse.
Text.zh: 以眼还眼，以咒还咒。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Light as a board,
Stiff as a feather.
Text.zh:
轻如浮木，
静如长羽。

Text.en: "There is nowhere my vengeance cannot find you."
Text.zh: “就算逃到天涯海角，也躲不开我的复仇。”

Text.en:
"Lundara held back the hordes, while Solerai rose to split the sky.
With a single stroke, she ended the Winter of the World."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara
Text.zh:
“兰拉阻挡众人之际，索瑞腾空击碎了天穹。
凭此一击，世界之冬终于走到了尽头。”
——乌兰嘉，瓦希达阿卡拉的说书人

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"As long as I see death in my mirror, so will Wraeclast."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal
Text.zh:
"只要我一日在镜中窥见死亡，瓦尔克拉斯便一日不得超生。"
——瓦尔女王阿兹里

Text.en: The cry of death whispers in the wind.
Text.zh: 逝亡者的呼号，化作风中耳语。

Text.en:
A gift, a braid, of golden hair.
The war, forgotten.
The reason, remembered.
Text.zh:
一份礼物，一缕金色的发辫。
战争，早已被遗忘。
理由，却铭记在心。

Text.en:
The horrors we imagined as children
still exist somewhere in the dark...
Text.zh:
儿时想象出的恐魔，
依然潜伏于黑暗中……

Text.en: Obedience stretches beyond the grave.
Text.zh: 跨越生命的界限，也将会继续服从。

Text.en: Sinuous, entwined... inextricable.
Text.zh: 蜿蜒盘曲，百转千回……难解难分。

Text.en:
A flash of blue, a stormcloud's kiss,
her motionless dance the pulse of bliss
Text.zh:
闪过的碧影，雷云的亲吻，
她静止的舞步中脉动着喜悦

Text.en: Give him your body, and your burdens will follow.
Text.zh: 向他献出你的躯体，你的负担也会随之而去。

Text.en:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.
Text.zh:
瓦尔帝国建立在无数人的血汗之上，
为之付出的人们如今却已化为尘埃。

Text.en:
You carried me through life,
The least I can do is carry you through death.
Text.zh: 汝与我同生，吾与汝共死。

静止的身影，缠绕着光晕；
陌生的自己，映入了眼帘。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Mist of breath
Icing to lips and throat
As the warm ones choke and fall
Upon the frozen wasteland.
Text.zh:
如斯雾气，化为冰霜刺进口鼻
那是冻原旅人窒息倒地前
最后一次的呼吸。

Text.en:
Molten feathers, veiled spark,
Hissing arrows from the dark.
Text.zh:
炽羽疾驰化浊影，
烈矢奔腾照光明。

Text.en: Life and death ooze from the same sap.
Text.zh: 生死同源，承自一脉。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer
Text.zh:
“很少人能像背后生出双眼一般地感应空气的流动。”
——瓦尔箭术师奇拉维

Text.en:
"Boiling frogs isn't for spells, dear. That's a disgusting
rumour. They're actually for brewing poisons."
- Selassie of the Black Fen
Text.zh:
“水煮青蛙不是为了施法，亲爱的。那是
歹毒的谣传。这其实是用来制备毒药的。”
——黑沼的瑟莱西

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"One can never fully eliminate Chance, but with the right
machinations, all the outcomes may be turned in your favour..."
- Cadiro Perandus
Text.zh:
“无论如何抹除，世间总有机遇。
只要机制得当，一切果效都能转为己用……”
——卡迪罗·佩兰德斯

Text.en: Coming Soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
In this chaotic world
The rewards of the Soul
Outlast the rewards of the Flesh.
Text.zh:
于此乱世之中，
灵魂升华远胜肉体淬炼。

Text.en: Even emptiness may be harnessed.
Text.zh:
即使空无一物的虚空，
也能被掌控。

Text.en:
"Why waste such a fine arrow on just one man?"
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer
Text.zh:
“何须为这一人耗费如此良箭？”
——瓦尔箭术师奇拉维

Text.en:
A hearth unyielding, ever warm,
A light unbroken, endlessly reborn.
Text.zh:
炉火不灭，温热长存。
光明不惜，复明常恒。

Text.en:
Worship of house gods was tolerated
in Oriath, so long as it remained private.
Text.zh:
奥瑞亚容忍私下的崇拜，
只是不得将其公之于众。

Text.en:
What they saw was what they believed, and
they believed Lunaris had not abandoned them.
Text.zh:
相信的一切映射在他们眼前，
他们相信月影不会抛弃他们。

Text.en: Gentle anger, raging calm.
Text.zh: 平静与愤怒有时是一体两面。

Text.en: The sacred sap flows slowly, but surely.
Text.zh: 纯洁的树脂缓缓流动。

Text.en:
Forged from the blood of countless wars, 
its thirst has only begun.
Text.zh:
以无数战事的鲜血铸成，
对死亡的饥渴油然而生。

Text.en: Natural grace is born, not earned.
Text.zh: 自然的恩赐源于天赋，而非争取。

Text.en:
The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn,
but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.
Text.zh:
卡鲁战士的尊重来之不易，
但会持续一生……乃至身后。

Text.en:
You are slow, foolish and ignorant.
I am not.
Text.zh:
众人迟钝昏庸，愚昧无知。
唯我迅捷聪颖，博学睿智。

Text.en: Healing the soul requires sacrifice.
Text.zh: 只有精诚奉献，才能治愈心灵。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Fanatics are the most dangerous enemy,
for they care not for their own survival.
Text.zh:
狂热之人最为危险，
他们早已枉顾安危。

Text.en: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.
Text.zh: 让那信仰的铁砧将你无比的毅力千锤百炼。

Text.en: Let the unrepentant be dragged ever downwards by the weight of their sins.
Text.zh: 让冥顽不灵者深陷罪恶的泥沼吧。

Text.en:
Mindless rage will shake the world,
Cunning lies will bend it.
Reckless haste will break the world,
And into darkness send it.
Text.zh:
盲目的愤怒引起纷争，
狡诈的谎言让战火停歇；
无知的莽撞造成仇恨，
而无尽黑暗将吞噬一切。

Text.en:
He knew not why he was changing, only
that he wanted to hold his family close...
Text.zh:
他不知道改变的理由，
只想抱紧自己的家人……

Text.en:
The homeguard signalled for aid against a surprise attack,
but it was not their dekharas that responded.
It was Solerai herself.
Text.zh:
族卫发出了抵抗奇袭的信号，
可回应他们的不是德卡拉，
而是索瑞自己。

Text.en:
Tale-women in training drink of a painful desert fruit.
Fire, they learn, springs from agony.
Text.zh:
受训的说书人会饮下沙漠之果，
他们这才明白，烈火源于苦痛。

Text.en: Never blinking, always watching.
Text.zh: 永不眨眼，凝视不休。

Text.en:
When Kabala the Serpent Queen was banished from Keth,
the Sekhemas took a single hostage as punishment.
Text.zh:
毒蛇女王卡芭菈被逐出了克斯，
众丝克玛仅仅质押了一名人质。

Text.en: Remember the past, anticipate the future.
Text.zh: 回忆过去，预想未来。

Text.en:
Dannig sculpted the Verisium to evoke the
night-blooming lotus of Middengard's stygian peaks,
which grow only where ash meets the snow and stars.
Text.zh:
丹宁雕琢维金，
以唤起米登加德那冥河峰顶的黑夜之莲
——此花仅生于灰烬与雪、星辰交汇之处。

Text.en: To stray is to condemn this world to sin.
Text.zh: 偏离正道，便是将陷这世界于罪孽之中。

Text.en:
If evil must always exist, so be it.
Embrace it. Become its master.
Text.zh:
若邪恶必将永存，那就接受它。
拥抱它。成为它的主宰。

Text.en:
Those members of the Brotherhood who employ the venom of 
Trarthan ice snakes must take great care with the volatile substance.
Text.zh:
兄弟会的人想要使用特拉珊冰蛇之毒，
那就务必小心谨慎。

Text.en:
There is a way to survive the bite of an ice snake,
but few have the resolve to attempt it.
Text.zh:
只有一种方式能逃过冰蛇的毒牙，
但甚少有人敢下决心。

Text.en: Agony brings clarity to those of pure mind.
Text.zh: 心灵纯粹之人可从痛苦中获得明晰。

Text.en:
As their eyes adjusted, they became aware of a strange
blue light. Countless glowing worms crawled above,
blissfully unaware of their flight from the sirens.
Text.zh:
眼目应变，化作古怪的蓝光。
无数闪光的虫子在上方爬行，
丝毫不觉他们从海妖旁逃离。

Text.en: Where her mouth should have been there was only a whirling, black void.
Text.zh:
望向她双颊之间，
徒见那无底深渊。

Text.en: The dawn of a new era is set into motion
Text.zh: 新时代的黎明已经降临了

Text.en: Fear the fire that spreads like a plague.
Text.zh: 蔓如毒疫的烈火，应由人畏之惧之。

Text.en:
"The Brotherhood of Silence does not set out to torture our targets.
Excruciating pain is simply a byproduct of certain... necessary methods."
Text.zh:
“寂静联盟并没有折磨我们的目标。
极致痛苦只是……必要手段的产物。”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
I rule the north
A legacy earned
Time and time again
Sing Meginord's song!
Text.zh:
我御北疆之地，
争得一世传承，
梅吉诺德之歌，
传唱千秋万代！

Text.en:
Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness
And awoke its Master.
Text.zh:
多里亚尼误闯狂乱之境，
狂乱帝国之王因其苏醒。

Text.en:
Forged by the last remaining brother
to return all that was once given.
Text.zh:
仅存的兄弟锻造出了它，
将获赠的一切物归原主。

Text.en: Highgate held other secrets.
Text.zh: 统治者之殿还隐藏着其他秘密。

Text.en:
It coils deeper and deeper
It slithers between thoughts
It lies beneath the valley
It lies in our minds
Text.zh:
它越钻越深，
在思绪中蠕行，
安睡在山谷中，
沉眠在心里

Text.en:
Forged by three brothers
so that they may recognize each other
across any distance of time or travel.
Text.zh: 此戒由三兄弟合力铸造，即便物换星移，辗转流离，他们终究能以此相认。

Text.en:
Ming slew Tranquillity
Took Chaos for his wife
And on Her immortal finger
He placed his Heart
Text.zh:
明将宁静击毙
迎娶混沌为妻
在她那不朽的细指
明戴上真心诚挚

Text.en:
Beyond the veil of death, there burns a fire
by whose light night is borne.
Text.zh:
远在死亡的面纱之外，
燃烧着以黑影为柴的火光。

Text.en:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.
Text.zh:
纯净之神升格成为神灵并不是靠信仰所激发，
而是对另外一个人的诋毁和憎恨。

Text.en:
The warriors of the Unblinking Eye moved
together as one, shoulder to shoulder.
Text.zh:
凝望之眼的战士们，
并肩同行，进退如一。

Text.en: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends
Text.zh: 目睹生命的消逝，才能深刻体会存活的价值。

Text.en:
The ring I stole,
My finger they took,
A shrouded mind,
Cut their curses short,
As I drained their spirit
And stole their soul.
A blessing is often a curse.
Text.zh:
我偷了枚戒指，
被人家砍下一手指，
我心已受蒙蔽，
对其诅咒漫不在意，
我吸尽他们心神，
窃取他们灵魂。
祝福往往招致咒诅。

Text.en:
Power comes to those who seek
Death comes to those who reach
Text.zh:
探求者将获得力量，
探取者将寻得灭亡

Text.en:
When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.
Text.zh:
斧刃落下，塞里尔感受到他的剧痛，
他在恍然垂死时只听见
塞里尔凄厉惨烈的哀嚎。

Text.en: They wrap around you until your blood turns as cold as theirs.
Text.zh: 用鲜血灌溉它，让它的残暴更加的嗜血。

Text.en: God blesses those who bless themselves.
Text.zh: 自助而后天助。

Text.en:
"Berek hid from Storm's lightning wrath
In the embrace of oblivious Frost
Repelled by ice, blinded by blizzards
Storm raged in vain
While Berek slept."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
“贝雷克凌驾风暴之巅，
怀抱一般人只敢远观的雪线；
踏遍冰河，放眼渺无人烟，
深夜狂风恶梦无限，
他竟睡得香甜。”
——贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"From Frost's ice-bound pass
Berek taunted and jeered
Until furious Flame scaled the mountain
Berek escaped through the thaw
And Frost's tortured moans."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
“贝雷克伫立冰封之道，
对自己征服此地得意逍遥。
那烈炎发出尖啸，
贝雷克却能躲过火烧
以及冷酷的撕咬。”
——贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
“灾祸的火焰就在脚下翻滚，
贝雷克却充耳不闻；
接着，他感受到雨水划过风暴之后的余温，
于是打起精神，
却感叹自己无法
浴火新生。”
——贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en:
"Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed
Text.zh:
“贝雷克拥有无比机智，
从他和抗驯者之间的缠斗便可得知。
他让那三种元素互相角力，
直到它们露出败迹，
接着一鼓作气
让自己和恶梦远离。”
——贝雷克及抗驯者

Text.en: A pact with Prospero always comes at a price.
Text.zh: 与普洛斯彼罗定约总要付出代价。

Text.en: Danger is the price of wealth.
Text.zh: 不入险处，焉得巨富?

Text.en:
In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.
Text.zh:
至辉荣耀，劣境克敌
“不败”怪物终遭天谴
芬多取得毕生最后胜绩。

Text.en: The darker the eye, the more diligent the watched.
Text.zh: 深沉的双眼总是望着最勤奋的灵魂。

Text.en: Power is a matter of perspective.
Text.zh: 力量也只是一种观念。

Text.en:
Drink deeply of the Well.
Let the Abyss coil within.
Text.zh:
痛饮魂井之水。
任由深渊在血管中游走。

Text.en:
The tribe revelled wildly, unaware that each fruit 
they ate further bound their continuity to the fog's. 
In time, the merest touch could break their reality.
Text.zh:
部族纵情狂欢，未觉所食的每一颗果实，
都令他们的存续与迷雾的存续愈发紧密地绑定。
日久，最轻微的触碰，也足以令他们的现实崩碎。

Text.en:
Kaom's strength was rivaled only by
the great Meginord of the north.
Text.zh:
冈姆的勇猛威震天下，
唯有北方的梅吉诺德能与他一较高下。

Text.en:
Adversity is the soil in
which persistence grows.
Text.zh:
以逆境为沃土，
便可培育毅力。

Text.en:
Below all living things,
there exists a flow...
Text.zh:
众生之下，
皆有涓流……

Text.en:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3
Text.zh:
“不曾锈蚀绝不代表纯净。”
——伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，第3号物品

Text.en: Some families have peculiar gifts...
Text.zh: 有些家族的礼物属实诡异……

Text.en: The Brinerot sail without fear of storms.
Text.zh: 布林洛特的水手们不惧风暴。

Text.en: Coming Soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Vaal bloodpriests were among the earliest intellectuals on record.
It was they who found that a newly freed soul would
desperately cling to any other source of life.
Text.zh:
瓦尔赤红先师是史料可考的最早的知识分子。
他们最先发现刚脱离的躯壳之灵会不顾一切地附身在其他生命形式上。

Text.en: Tempered by the forbidden flame.
Text.zh: 禁断之火淬炼而出。

Text.en: Bleeding just means you're still alive.
Text.zh: 流淌的殷红正是你活着的象征。

Text.en: Poison the land and they'll have nothing to defend.
Text.zh: 毒化地面，则无需再守。

Text.en: All creatures have the potential for greatness or unequivocal failure.
Text.zh: 所有生物都有干成大事或是贻笑大方的潜质。

Text.en:
Death is your most important duty.
Face it, or curse your bloodline for all eternity.
Text.zh:
死亡是你的最高职责。
拥抱它，或是为你的血脉降下万世诅咒。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Trifle not with the trinket mage.
Text.zh: 不要招惹饰品法师。

Text.en:
Asinia promised vengeance beyond death,
and she found a way to keep that promise.
Text.zh:
阿辛妮娅许诺，纵使身死也将复仇。
她确实找到了信守承诺的方式。

Text.en: Clever artifice is not always complex.
Text.zh: 奇谋妙计不应该费尽心机。

Text.en:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
“骨骼是灵魂的居所，
血肉是精神和世界交流的窗口，推动一切的力量就在心窝。
即使有了这些，失去了头脑就没有自我。”
——冈姆军师拉维安加

Text.en:
A Templar thinks he's righteous for flogging
himself once for every ten lashings he gives.
Text.zh:
圣堂武僧觉得自己很正义，
因为他每施加十下鞭刑，就会鞭打自己一下。

Text.en:
The sun's fury, trapped
in pillars of blazing light,
Explodes from its cage.
Text.zh:
炽热毒辣的烈日
困在出一道道夺目光柱里，
在其中爆炸燃烧。

Text.en: Bring mystery to life. Again and again.
Text.zh: 一次又一次，令生命萌生谜团。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Kulemak sat triumphant, raising the crown.
Darkness coiled the world in eternal night.
Victory, a mere moment, came crashing down.
No conqueror, no conquered, only searing Light.
Text.zh:
库勒马克胜利在握，高举王冠。
黑暗将世界拖入永恒长夜。
胜利不过转眼，旋即灰飞烟灭。
没有征服者，没有被征服者，唯有炽烈光辉。

Text.en:
Rivers of power coursed through their veins.
Now, that power is yours, for good or ill.
Text.zh:
力量的河流曾于他们血管中奔涌。
如今，那力量属于你了——无论祸福。

Text.en:
"Tukohama may be asleep, but he still gives us his strength. A small
needle, an offering, and a vial... drink deeply, my son, and you
will more than survive the coming battle... you will thrive."
Text.zh:
“图克哈马虽然已经沉睡，但依然赐予我们力量。
一枚细针，一次供奉，一瓶圣液……喝下去吧，我的孩子，
你不只能在即将到来的战斗中活下去……你必将凯旋。”

Text.en:
"Calculations complete, and He is assembled.
Our immaculate tactics are set in motion."
Text.zh:
“计算完毕，他已组装完成。
我们的完美战术已启动。”

Text.en:
"How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast?
Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows."
- Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom
Text.zh:
“我该如何面对在瓦尔克拉斯目睹的一切？
感谢先祖！我的酒杯，早已满溢。”
— 拉维安加，冈姆前任军师

Text.en:
Uhtred drank. Verisium burned through his veins.
He gazed at death's face. With all his strength,
he turned instead to the stars, and witnessed Truth.
Text.zh:
乌崔德饮下了维金。
维金在血脉中灼烧。他凝视着死亡的面庞。
他用尽全力，转而望向星辰，从而见证了真理。

Text.en: As battle calms, blood turns to rust.
Text.zh: 激烈战火成冷灰，浴血宝剑色锈黑。

Text.en: War inevitably takes an untold toll on the soul.
Text.zh: 鏖战之伤，终刻于魂。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Take your partners by the hand,
Keep your steps in time.
Swing together, spin apart,
And dance with death sublime.
Text.zh:
执伴之手，
步调一致，
一共摇摆，
与亡共舞。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"Painful suicide in the hands of a fool,
Creative death in the hands of a master."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 2992
Text.zh:
“愚者自绝，仅存痛苦。
名家刎颈，亦有玄妙。”
— 伊席厄斯·普兰德斯，《珍奇古玩大典》，藏品第2992项

Text.en: The mark of the smith was widely known.
Text.zh: 这位匠人的印记举世皆知。

Text.en: Shaped metal never forgets the forge.
Text.zh: 塑成的金属永远铭记着锻炉的锤炼。

Text.en:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.
Text.zh:
仁慈的罪犯扫过了萨恩的街道
夺走了衰弱和悲哀之人的气息

Text.en:
Ezomyte loyalty was not given to distant leaders.
It was earned by comrades in arms.
Text.zh:
艾兹麦人不会向高高在上的领袖效忠，
只有同胞战友才能赢得忠心。

Text.en:
The Abyssals were created, not born,
and every moment in the light was agony.
Text.zh:
深渊之物并非自然诞生，而是外力创造。
在光明之中的每一刻，都将是痛苦煎熬。

Text.en: Within lies a window.
Text.zh: 它的深处潜伏着暗影。

Text.en:
They hoped that, trapped in its prison,
the creature would age and perish.
But time would not touch the fiend.
Text.zh:
人们希望，那只被困在牢狱中的怪物
会衰老死去。
但时间没有对这只恶魔造成丝毫影响。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often
required to garnish the perfect confession."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom
Text.zh:
“想要取得招供的最好方法，
就是洒点滚烫的液化金属在罪犯身上。”
— 布鲁特斯，典狱长

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.
Text.zh: 拾起此锤者，将可操控雷霆，号令风暴。

Text.en:
"You mortals are insidious. You repress your
evil, or deny it exists. Liars! When I open
your heads, that violence floods out."
- The Raven Trickster
Text.zh:
“凡人真是阴险。
要么压抑内心的邪恶，要么否认它的存在。一群骗子！
等我打开你们的脑袋，那暴力便会奔涌而出。”
— 黑鸦欺诈者

Text.en:
A common soldier from a common family kept hammering into the night
after each grueling march, his eyes afire with starlight and determination.
Few suspected that he would one day become the greatest among them.
Text.zh:
一个平民出身的普通士兵，每次残酷行军后
依然在深夜苦练，双眼燃烧着星火般的决心。
没人料到他日后会成为众人之中的传奇。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.
Text.zh:
艾兹麦人于法瑞欧定居，
漫漫流亡就在此地终结，
源于明显而美味的理由。

Text.en:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.
Text.zh:
“碎骨溅血之声
岂非天籁悦耳之音？”
——艾兹麦人雷姆诺。

Text.en: The art of surgery advances one mistake at a time.
Text.zh: 手术之道的进步，源于一个个错误。

Text.en: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.
Text.zh: 你的脑力可能没有极限，但你的头颅却不这么认为。

Text.en: Secrecy and silence are powers all their own.
Text.zh: 守秘和沉默自有其力量。

Text.en: Be not deceived by the treachery of men.
Text.zh: 莫被人之诡诈所欺。

Text.en: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.
Text.zh: 信众虔诚甚笃，即便死后依旧为神服事。

Text.en:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal
Text.zh:
“富贵总是险中求，
但财货乃身外之物，哪会问去留。”
——瓦尔族多里亚尼

Text.en:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.
Text.zh:
海水击岩石，
一日复一日，
待到洞穿时，
惊海之王兴。

Text.en:
"Drunken Erqi boasted to Tukohama; the God of War
challenged him to a clash of strength. Woe to the
Divine - he should have made it a test of skill!"
Text.zh:
“醉汉厄尔齐跟图克哈马吹牛；
战神跟他比拼力气。倒霉的是神明
——他应该比的是技巧才对！”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The secret Order endured by publicly
praying however the Templars demanded.
One day, justice would fall upon them...
Text.zh:
暮光会对圣堂教团逆来顺受
以公开祈祷换得了一线生机。
而总有一天，制裁必将降临。

Text.en: Infinite mutations over endless eons borne upon it in a singular moment.
Text.zh: 无尽岁月中的无数突变，于刹那之间尽数加诸其身。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...
Text.zh: 邪影宝石的腐化仍在继续……

Text.en:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.
Text.zh:
永恒帝国威势滔天，
然各路仁人义士众志成城。

Text.en: The Sacred Hunt ends with mercy.
Text.zh: 神圣狩猎以仁慈作为终点。

Text.en: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky
Text.zh: 首级滚落杀害，星辰坠落天际。

Text.en:
"You killed their Golden Sekhema. The Maraketh will think of nothing
but vengeance now." - Dimos, Advisor to General Titucius
Text.zh:
“你害死了黄金丝克玛。
现在马拉克斯人唯有复仇这一条路了。”
— 蒂莫斯，提图库斯将军的顾问

Text.en:
"In the hands of Orbala, it made a god bleed."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara
Text.zh:
“在欧巴拉手中，它曾令真神流血。”
— 乌兰嘉，瓦希达阿卡拉的说书人

Text.en:
Born in a star of man's own make,
fused to her hand by her last mistake.
Text.zh:
诞生于人造的星辰，
因她最后的错误而与手相融。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The spear was specially forged to assassinate Voll,
but Maligaro never got a chance to use it...
Text.zh:
这把长矛是为了行刺福尔而专门打造的，
但马雷格罗从未有过动手的机会……

Text.en:
"My people? I'm not doing this for them.
They belong to me. They want this for me.
Their sacrifice is a gift they give out of love
and adoration... I deserve it. I am their Queen."
Text.zh:
“我的人民？我这么做可不是为了他们。
他们本就属于我，是他们甘愿为我付出。
他们的牺牲是出于爱与崇敬的献礼……
我配得上这一切。因为我是他们的女王。”

Text.en: May the Lightless drown in the violence of His devotion.
Text.zh: 愿暗光者沉溺于祂那暴烈的虔信之中。

Text.zh: 唯仇恨之刃最为冷酷。

Text.en: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.
Text.zh:
手中所触荆棘之外，
满溢鲜血苦痛不断。

Text.en:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt
Text.zh:
生来驾浪驭潮
命定侍从行者
若铁塔，坚韧不倒
似细针，挥动自如

Text.en:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.
Text.zh:
阿里安放哨偷懒的那一晚，
正是德莱文来袭的那一夜。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: In our tales, and in our hearts, the rivers still flow.
Text.zh: 传于故事，藏于内心，河川奔流不止。

Text.en:
The first witch hunter knew one critical tactic:
never let your enemy have a clear moment.
Text.zh:
最初的猎巫人掌握了最重要的战术：
绝不可让你的敌人获得片刻的安生。

Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Dannig saw Seren in his mind's eye, a public ornament of
extravagance. Until she bore Cadigan a son and vanished.
Decadence covering brutality, like all Kalguuran customs.
Text.zh:
丹宁在脑海中看见塞伦，一个浮夸的公共装饰品。
直到她为卡迪甘生下一个儿子后便消失了。
如同所有卡古兰的习俗，那是用颓废掩盖的暴行。

Text.en:
With a flick of the finger, their fates are written,
the pages torn to a million pieces.
Text.zh: 弹指一挥间，命运已书写，篇幅皆四散。

Text.en: One way or another, it will find what it seeks.
Text.zh: 不论如何，它终会找到目标。

Text.en:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.
Text.zh:
至微者，须弥芥子
至伟者，参天神木，
无论微伟，皆可立足帝陆。

Text.en:
Adonia rose with eyes afire, emanating a ghastly aura, and
broke off a carving from the wall of the Throne Room.
"You think me powerless without my wand? Insult me again!"
Text.zh:
阿多尼娅腾空，双眼燃着火焰，身周弥漫可怖气息；
她自王座厅的墙上折下一块雕刻。
“你以为没了魔杖我便无能？你真口出狂言！”

Text.en: He alone was welcome in the sacred spaces of the Titans.
Text.zh: 泰坦的领域只欢迎他的到来。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Lost in the Black Fen, Erian hoped that dawn would save him.
He had no idea how far away the light truly was.
Text.zh:
阿里安迷失在黑沼中，只求黎明到来。
他不知道光明究竟降临到了何处。

Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
In that moment, Viridi's bones became 
branches, weaving over the Darkness. 
She coiled around the nothing, 
trapping it within her everything.
Text.zh:
那一刻，维里迪的骸骨化作枝杈，
在黑暗之上编织。
她盘绕虚空，
将其困于自身的万物之中。

Text.en:
Smithed from ancient metal 
wrought from the very stars.
It is a means to call upon them, 
for one capable of wielding it.
Text.zh:
“来自星辰之体，
锻自远古金属。
这是召唤群星的秘术，
唯有能者才能使用。”

Text.en: The candlemass tradition was born in a time of darkness and fear.
Text.zh: 做烛火雕像的传统源自于黑暗和恐惧的时代。

Text.en:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.
Text.zh:
带翼野兽在夜里脱胎换骨，
蜕下寒霜覆盖的带麟犄角。
众人感受到凛冬寒光冷酷，
无不浑身颤抖，凄厉尖啸。

Text.en: An ancient Azmeri staff, overgrown by roots...
Text.zh: 上古的阿兹莫里法杖被根须所缠绕……

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.
Text.zh:
燃为灰烬，崩裂焚解；
斯是霸权，立于火焰。

Text.en: That which was broken may yet break.
Text.zh: 往昔战败遭破，来日亦可破敌。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
In ghastly pits beneath the world,
Kulemak grows countless new bodies,
each more powerful than the last.
Not all of his abominations survive.
Text.zh:
在世界深处那些可怖的深坑中，
库勒马克孕育着数不清的新躯体，
一具比一具强悍。
他造出的怪物并不都能活下来。

Text.en:
"From what beast you derived, we can only fathom.
Aye, you of living ice, rotting gill, and untold nightmare!
We Brinerot return ye to the sea."
- Weylam Roth
Text.zh:
“你的亲族是何等兽物？我们猜测不得。
诚然，你有冰霜之躯、腐烂之鳃与未名梦魇！
布琳洛特将你送回深海。”
— 威勒姆·罗斯

Text.en:
With Kulemak dead and the Abyssals destroyed, the
Master Below All could do nothing but wait... and plan.
As the cold crept in, an age of gods and heroes began.
Text.zh:
库勒马克死了，深渊众族也被消灭，
万物之下的主宰只能等待……和谋划。
寒冷降临时，诸神与英雄的纪元拉开了序幕。

Text.en:
For three centuries, the Wayward Druid returned each
spring to bless the lands of Ogham. None knew from
whence he came, or where he went, but he was loved.
Text.zh: 三百年来，那位迷途的德鲁伊每年春天都会回来祝福欧甘的土地。无人知晓他从何而来，去往何处，但人们始终敬爱他。

Text.en: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.
Text.zh: 跪伏于她，否则就面对最严厉的死亡。

Text.en:
"Where the boy went, ravens gathered,
feasting on misery. His vile influence
spread, swift as the carnage they wrought."
Text.zh:
“男孩所至，乌鸦云集，
以悲苦为宴。他那恶毒的侵染蔓延，
迅如彼等造就的屠戮。”

Text.en:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
Text.zh:
“我射出连珠箭矢飞入害我爱人的凶手的心脏。
但这并没有给我带来满足，
没有治愈，没有复仇。只留下一片……空虚。”

Text.en:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes
Text.zh:
“万矢齐发，战事皆往，生者皆亡。”
——艾兹麦人瑞佛

Text.en:
Each crest was a Thane's word, bolted to Ivor's bow.
They would join the Count's side, or die by his hands.
Text.zh: 每一枚纹章都是一位领主的誓约，被铆接在艾沃的弓上。他们要么归顺伯爵，要么死于伯爵之手。

Text.en:
The forests of the Vastiri held many secrets
mystical and dark. Men learned not to wander,
lest they return with a strange new purpose.
Text.zh:
瓦斯提里的森林隐藏着许多奥妙
神秘与黑暗令人们不愿踏入其中，
以免回归之时肩负起奇异的使命。

Text.en:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch
Text.zh:
“尽管劫运当头，饱受苦楚，
吾仅留心于手中把握之物，
如同所招致的死亡般，沉默而专注。”
——“毁灭之弦”寇拉卢斯

Text.en:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.
Text.zh:
万里征途抚弦悼，
号角起，羽矢啸，唯闻百里伤残号；
一世战魂拨琴梢，
生灵息，干戈倒，只望七步亡魂招。

Text.en:
The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning
rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its
arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair.
Text.zh:
奇异风暴在我头顶笼罩，
雷霆风暴在我眼前宣泄
秘术让手上的金属熔解，生命零凋，
奔逃无路，求助无门！绝望永不止歇……

Text.en: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.
Text.zh: 血肉的气味弥漫于空气中。

Text.en:
The power of the Allflame rends
souls just as easily as flesh.
Text.zh:
万焚之力撕裂灵魂，
如撕裂血肉那般轻易。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"Kinslayer, you dishonour your own traditions to turn the tide of battle! 
Let us see which is stronger... Karui savagery or the might of the Empire!"
- General Marceus Lioneye
Text.zh:
“弑亲者，你为扭转战局，居然背弃传统！
让我们看看哪方更强……卡鲁的野性，还是帝国的力量！”
— 穆希尔斯，狮眼将军

Text.en:
As the Maji approached the edge of Nothingness, she strung 
fragments of the Wildwood's carcass together. When she 
nocked her arrow, she pulled upon the elements of life itself.
Text.zh:
当玛吉行至虚无之畔，
她将荒林残骸的碎片串联成弓。
当她搭箭上弦，她引动的便是生命本身的元素。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Sibilant promises surrounded them in the night.
All the travelers had to give him was their devotion...
Text.zh:
深夜之际，细碎的承诺环绕着他们。
所有旅人只得向他献出自己的虔诚。

Text.en:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report
Text.zh:
“他来到大门前，只闻嘹亮的号角
只见舒展的旌旗，令他始料不及。”
— 不知其名的寂静联盟报告

Text.en:
The rebelling Trarthans thought they were secure behind
the walls of the cities they'd captured. Emperor Tyndarus
Phrecius made it clear that nowhere would ever be safe.
Text.zh:
叛乱的特拉珊人自以为躲在他们占领的城市城墙内就安全了。
廷达鲁斯·弗雷修斯皇帝清楚地表明，
没有任何地方会是安全的。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.
Text.zh:
在瓦斯提里无处安居的人们
面对着炎炎白昼，苦寒死夜。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"And here we shall remain... 
trapped in our symphony of eternal anguish.
Artist and Composer, their fates entwined for all of time."
- Adamantia Brektov, the Composer
Text.zh:
“我们将永远在此留驻……
由永恒苦痛的交响困缚。
画师与作曲者，两者命运自此缠纠。”
— 阿达曼缇娅·布雷克托夫，作曲家

Text.en:
"The time has passed for diplomacy!
If they will not respect House Azadi, 
then let them die gloriously... and loudly.
We are the masters of the Death Trades!"
- Ratha Azadi
Text.zh:
“外交的时代已经过去！
如果阿扎迪家族得不到尊重，
那就让他们光荣而响亮地赴死。
我们是亡命买卖的大师！”
— 拉莎·阿扎迪

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Rare is the Necromancer who leads
his undead armies from the front.
Text.zh:
少有死灵法师立于阵前，
亲率亡者大军冲锋陷阵。

Text.en: Her sons sang with hate and mockery, their howling twisted in dark harmony.
Text.zh: 她颂唱着仇恨与讥讽，他们的哀嚎如同黑暗的合声。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Tale-women may not fight directly,
for they have a much higher purpose.
Text.zh:
说书人虽然不舞刀弄剑，
却肩负着更崇高的使命。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"When the Third Pact was written in stone, the Dreamer gave the alliance of men and
beasts knowledge. In return, they gave him a drop of blood; one from each of the
races of Wraeclast. In the centuries that followed, his Will began to subtly change."
- Book of the Benevolent Dreamer, Histories 220:5
Text.zh:
“第三契约铭刻于石，幻梦者将智慧赋予人兽联盟。
作为交换，他们献给他一滴血；
来自瓦尔克拉斯每个种族的一滴血。
此后的千百年中，他的意志悄然生变。”
— 《慈爱的幻梦者之书》，编年史220:5

Text.en:
"Power of the Red Pyre! Flaming Heart of the Hive!
I release your burning message to rest here, forevermore."
The Dreamer declared, casting out the lingering dark embers within him.
Text.zh:
“赤焰之力！虫巢燃心！
我释放你炽烈的讯息，并永远安息于此。”
幻梦者如此宣告，将体内残留的黑炭之焰驱逐。

Text.en:
"With piercing eyes, you saw through the Stillness.
Undulating as one, you gloriously covered all in white. 
But... I can bear you no longer."
The Dreamer whispered with fogging breath, ice creeping down his hand.
Text.zh:
“你以锐利目光洞悉寂静。
如波律动，你圣洁覆盖一切白芒。
可是……我无法再承受你。”
幻梦者低语，气息成雾，冰霜自他掌间蔓延。

Text.en:
"Deep in thought, you would tremble the very air before you.
Wreathed in light, you nurtured them all. 
And yet... Your nature became you."
The Dreamer mused with aching heart, as remnants of forking tendrils burst forth.
Text.zh:
“你的沉思令空气颤抖。
你光芒四溢抚育众生。
可是……你的本性终成你自身。”
幻梦者哀叹，心痛如绞，分叉的触须残影破体而出。

Text.en:
"We sometimes fail. We sometimes succeed. Who determines one from the other?
I now know we can never be made One, if we are bore of differing desires.
And yet, I have hope for a new truth. And I will see it... made real."
- The Benevolent Dreamer
Text.zh:
“我们有时失败，有时成功。谁来定义孰是孰非？
我如今明白：若我们欲合为一体，却心怀不同愿望，便永不得其所。
但我依然怀抱希望，愿这新真理……得以实现。”
— 慈爱的幻梦者

Text.en:
"Drink deep. Unlife depends on life. Yours,
to be specific." - Selassie of the Black Fen
Text.zh:
“痛饮吧。无生者依赖生命，
你们的生命。”
— 黑沼的瑟莱西

Text.en:
A chilling hush, a scraping sound
Of things no more entombed in ground.
A shambling horde is on its way
To crush the very light of day.
Text.zh:
魑魅惊魂扰生灵，
魍魉摄魄传疠病；
精怪摧命掩泣月，
妖魔噬骨蔽残星。

Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Darkness howls through ancient bones, a wistful cry
on hollow winds. The moon listens. The pack gathers.
Text.zh:
黑暗呼啸于古骸之间，是空穴之风里怅然的悲鸣。
明月倾听。狼群啸聚。

Text.zh: 敬请期待
