Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.
Text.zh:
艾兹麦首批拓荒者中，几位心有所感之人
循微光乘舟而去。在雾霭笼罩的林中岛上，
塔斯的布莉姬正静候他们的到来。

Text.en:
If you see the blushing tree of the northern woods,
remember: "Blossoms of red, the tree's been fed.
Blossoms of white, prepare for a fight."
Text.zh:
若你见北方林间那羞红之树，
请谨记：“红花绽放，树已饱餐；
白花绽放，迎战莫缓。”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.
Text.zh:
深渊生物围困的危难之际，
迷途的德鲁伊向烈日部族伸出援手。
这份恩情，族人至今铭记。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.
Text.zh:
昔日，阿扎卡部落的女巫们掌握了
驾驭鲜活命能流的方法，
以此与敌人进行“合作”——强制合作。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"A traditional hatungo does not carry an axe,
it is true. But as Narumoa showed us, there
are many ways to crush one's enemy..."
Text.zh:
"传统的哈图纳格斯确实不持战斧，
但正如纳鲁摩奥所展示的——
击溃敌人的方式……从来不止一种。"

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair...
but one day, the Father will return,
and discover the fate of his children.
Text.zh:
格鲁丝克本是绝望之母……
然终有一日，严父必将归来，
清算子嗣的命运。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"Even in the face of the Winter of the World,
life found a way. The Spirit always provides."
Text.zh:
“即使面对世界之冬，生命也能找到出路。
万灵始终都在庇佑我们。”

Text.en:
Wraeclast has known too few true heroes.
It remembers those that stood in defiance.
Text.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯从未出过如此多的英雄豪杰。
这里会铭记那些敢于奋起反抗的勇者。

Text.en:
Devotees of the Goddess of Lust
needed never fear her sting.
Text.zh: 放荡女神的信徒永远无需害怕她的毒刺。

Text.en:
They found a crying child tied to a frozen pyre.
She was clad in ice, but the village was ash.
Text.zh:
他们在冰封的火堆上发现了嚎哭的孩子。
她被寒冰紧紧包裹，村庄却已化作燃灰。

Text.en:
The most beloved member of every Brinerot crew
is the one that refuses to do any actual work.
Text.zh:
在布琳洛特的每艘船上，
最讨人喜爱的家伙都是从不干活儿的那个。

Text.en:
"It may be centuries hence, but I still hold utmost faith.
The Saviour will rise, and mankind will be free."
Text.zh:
“纵使千秋已逝，我仍怀至深信仰。
救赎者将会崛起，人类将会自由。”

Text.en:
"When the headsman's blade swings,
your last moments stretch to eternity."
- Vorm, the Twice-Pardoned
Text.zh:
“处刑者挥起大刀之时，
最后一刻便永远定格。”
——被特赦两次的沃尔姆

Text.en: Kaom was not known for his restraint.
Text.zh: 冈姆的英名与隐忍毫无关联。

Text.en:
"To scrape the sky,
to touch the clouds themselves,
is to know true freedom."
- Mutewind saying
Text.zh:
“翱翔天际，
触碰流云，
方知自由为何物。”
— 哑风谚语

Text.en:
The sea swells, the sky thunders; two ships tilt at odds.
Flashes of light show only swinging axes... and a grin.
Text.zh:
海涛汹汹，天雷滚滚，双舸竞斗冲。
电闪破黑云，刀光映斧影，唯见寒笑森森。

Text.en:
Among the Templars, a secret few ate the sins of others.
They bore this burden to empower their hidden Order.
Text.zh:
在圣堂武僧中，少数秘密成员以他人的罪恶为食。
他们负重前行，只为让他们的隐秘教团发展壮大。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
The Unblinking Eye did not cower and wail.
They stood against the end.
Text.zh:
凝望之眼绝不会退缩，
他们傲立至最后一刻。

Text.en: One warrior alone survived to face the Arbiter.
Text.zh: 只有一个幸存的战士与仲裁官交锋。

Text.en: The greatest warrior of his era fought with honour.
Text.zh: 那时代最伟大的战士都心怀荣耀。

Text.en: His enemy was for endurance forged. His own waned.
Text.zh: 他的敌人精于鏖战，而他心勉力衰。

Text.en:
Fire destroys, but fire also purifies.
Life always springs anew.
Text.zh:
烈火带来破坏，火焰送来净化，
生命也将孕育一新。

Text.en:
The final element the tale-women
mastered was Time itself.
Text.zh:
说书人最后掌握的元素
乃是时光本身。

Text.en: A fell wind brings death.
Text.zh: 陨落之风带来死亡。

Text.en:
"We survived the endless winter.
We endure the long summer.
One day, spring will return the rains."
Text.zh:
“我们熬过了无尽的严冬。
我们挺过了漫长的酷暑。
总有一日，春雨将归来。”

Text.en:
The Vaal protected those who integrated into their 
culture. Many neighbours became one. Sekhema Safrin 
vowed the Maraketh identity would remain resolute.
Text.zh:
瓦尔接纳了那些融入其文化的人。
众多邻邦与之合为一体。丝克玛·萨芙琳
誓言马拉克斯人的身份将坚如磐石。

Text.en:
During the Winter of the World, her akhara began
shepherding jingakh across the harsh Vastiri. Sekhema
Eshtera planted the seeds of Maraketh diplomacy.
Text.zh:
世界之冬期间，
她的阿卡拉开始引领外来人穿越严酷的瓦斯提里。
丝克玛·埃斯特拉播下了马拉克斯外交的种子。

Text.en:
The relative peace under the fledgling Empire saw
the first Sekhema to choose, in her resplendent age and
wisdom, to step down. The role of Zaitema was born.
Text.zh:
羽翼未丰的帝国治下相对的和平时期，
见证了首位丝克玛在其光辉岁月与智慧之年选择退位。
扎特玛这一角色由此诞生。

Text.en:
Man retains sanity and strives toward civilisation
only under the blessed veil of ignorance.
Text.zh: 只有在无知的祝福之下，才能保持理智，心向文明。

Text.en: The most horrifying ideas often begin with a simple innovation.
Text.zh: 最恐怖的创意，往往诞生于一个简单的创新。

Text.en: The Banished Architect sought to employ the darkest secrets of the Vaal.
Text.zh: 被放逐的建筑师试图采用最黑暗的瓦尔秘法。

Text.en: The first Karui born on the fringes of the Vaal empire developed a blood fever born of corruption.
Text.zh:
首个卡鲁人诞生于瓦尔帝国边陲，
来自一场从腐化中开发血瘟的实验。

Text.en:
The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.
Text.zh:
巨盾坠入米登加德，当夜便入先师之手，
但深究其中奥妙的却是那些匠人。

Text.en:
The priests of the Kalguur keep faith through numbers
and calculation, not unprovable promises.
Text.zh:
卡古兰的先师相信数字和计算，
而不是无从求证的空洞诺言。

Text.en:
Olroth the Gallant,
tireless and true,
he fights for me,
he fights for you!
Text.zh:
勇敢的欧罗什，
不知疲倦和真实，
他为我而战，
他为你而战！

Text.en:
"True heroes grow stronger in the face of adversity."
- Fourth Tenet of the Knights of the Sun
Text.zh:
“真正的英雄面对逆境，越挫越勇。”
— 《烈阳骑士第四信条》

Text.en: A moment of calm before the battle can end the war.
Text.zh: 从容一击，息鼓偃旗。

Text.en:
The Trickster God turned the very Day and Night against each other.
What hope have you?
Text.zh:
狡诈的天神让白昼和夜晚永世为敌，
你还能有什么指望？

Text.en: What is life, but a dreamlike spiral of panic?
Text.zh: 所谓生命，不就是噩梦般螺旋不止的恐慌吗？

Text.en: The edges bend, the world flexes, the infinite spills into view.
Text.zh: 边界开始扭曲，世界逐渐舒展，永恒映入眼帘。

Text.en:
There is no light at the end of this inner strife,
but the shadows eventually become home.
Text.zh:
内心的纠葛看不到尽头，
但暗影终将在此处扎根。

Text.en:
Nothingness is loathe to relinquish its grip.
Every moment is a struggle to exist.
Text.zh:
虚无不肯罢休，不愿放手。
每时每刻皆为存在而抗争。

Text.en:
They crawl and chitter and swarm
in the shadow of his presence.
Text.zh:
啾鸣的它们蜂拥而至，
尾随着他的影子。

Text.en:
Experiments with geomancy taught
the Maji more than they ever expected.
Text.zh:
众贤尝试地术，
收获远超预想。

Text.en:
In an endless war against darkness,
one must be ever vigilant.
Text.zh:
在对抗黑暗的无尽战争里，
每个人都要时刻警惕。

Text.en:
We happily give our limbs.
A net woven to keep safe the bones of the Lords.
Text.zh:
献上我们的身躯，
捍卫领主的遗产。

Text.en:
She thinks and we act.
She acts and we think.
Fragments of the whole that washes clean the skies.
Text.zh:
她的思想，使我们动作。
她的动作，使我们思考。
完整的碎片洗净天空。

Text.en:
The limit of our knowledge is a barrier
that protects us from ourselves.
Text.zh:
知识的局限是一道屏障，
让我们不被自己所害。

Text.en:
We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.
Text.zh:
我们是他的血肉。
透过我们，他散播炙热的启示。

Text.en:
But the fool did not bow.
The fool stood and questioned.
And the fool was unwritten.
Text.zh:
愚人未躬不敬，立于疑惑。
始终他立于疑惑。

Text.en:
A single moment sets in motion an eternal fall,
beneath which all are buried.
Text.zh:
剎那便能造就无尽毁坏，
一切将受掩埋。

Text.en:
Seeking to add their distinctiveness to his own, He
Who Dreamt acquired the essence of each of the races
of Wraeclast. His success slowly became his doom.
Text.zh:
逐梦者欲揽众生独特本质于一己，
遂豪夺帝陆万族之精髓。
然其成功之道，渐成覆灭之因。

Text.en:
To become a warrior and a hunter, each young
Azmeri must prove themselves before the Spirit.
Text.zh:
要想成为战士和猎手，每个年轻的
阿兹莫里人都必须在万灵面前证明自己。

Text.en:
"Ghorr knows only hunger, only ravenous feasting.
It will consume all that lives, and more!"
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page fourteen
Text.zh:
“咕尔欲壑难填，一心纵情饕餮。
它将吞噬所有生灵，乃至万物！”
— 圣堂囚犯的胡言，第十四页

Text.en:
"All Beidat desires is a foothold, a grip on your flesh,
on the world... he will offer you anything to get it..."
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page thirty
Text.zh:
“贝达特想要的就是一个立足点，一个抓手，
借此来掌控你的肉体，掌控世界……
为达目的，他会给你一切……”
— 圣堂囚犯的胡言，第三十页

Text.en:
"The mind at the center of the swarm... K'Tash does
the thinking... but it has only one thought... hate."
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page ninety-four
Text.zh:
“位居群魔核心的大脑……科塔席负责思考……
但他满脑子只有一种思绪……憎恨。”
— 圣堂囚犯的胡言，第九十四页

Text.en: A wellspring of vitality bubbling from within.
Text.zh: 从中涌现出生生不息的活力。

Text.en: An indomitable force of control.
Text.zh: 不屈不折的掌控之力。

Text.en: Skin like steel tempered by bright flames.
Text.zh: 像钢铁在烈火中锻造般的表面。

Text.en:
If you're going to act like you're better
than everyone else, make sure you are.
Text.zh:
如果你想表现得比所有人都强，
那最好有真本事。

Text.en:
They believed themselves courageous and selfless,
but that bravery became the doom at their door.
Text.zh:
他们相信自己的勇敢和无私，
可勇敢成为了通向末日的路。

Text.en:
They clawed their way up from the agonising depths of nonexistence,
breathing deep with joy the exquisite light of meaning.
Text.zh:
它们在不曾存在的深渊中挣扎着爬行，
为一缕意义的光辉而欢欣鼓舞。

Text.en:
Our world was dying, but we chose to survive.
We broke free from the chains within.
Text.zh:
我们的世界奄奄一息，但我们选择活下去。
我们挣脱了内心的枷锁。

Text.en: Entropy can be reversed.
Text.zh: 熵灭也可逆转。

Text.en:
At their height, the Vaal glittered under the sun.
A decade, a century, an aeon of prosperity...
now nothing more than a passing wonder.
Text.zh:
瓦尔至盛年代，沐艳阳而烁金辉。
昌荣十年百年，绵延至千秋万代……
如今追思奇迹，都只是过眼云烟。

Text.en: After the fires, in the depths of the Winter of the World, all life in the Vastiri banded together. Whether serpent, hyena, human, or golem, hated enemies clasped hand to claw, built refuge, and fought side by side against the Abyssals. Thus, the Third Pact was born.
Text.zh: 烈焰熄灭，世界之冬降临，瓦斯提里的众生依偎在一起。毒蛇，土狼，人类和傀儡，彼此憎恨的敌人携手并肩。它们兴建了避难所，共同对抗深渊的力量。第三盟约由此诞生了。

Text.en:
They believed themselves driven by necessity,
but that desperation made them monstrous.
Text.zh:
他们自认为是被逼无奈，
但正是这种绝望把他们变成了恶魔。

Text.en:
Countless souls scream in agonising harmony,
forever sinking under the weight of the newly dead.
Text.zh:
无数魂魄在痛苦中齐声哀嚎，
永远被新亡者的重量压向深渊。

Text.en:
"Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact,
a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one
lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."
Text.zh:
“不要在意这疼痛，它不过是在……腾出空间。顺便一提，
人单靠一颗肾或一片肺叶也能正常生活。
你永远不知道瓦尔科技会让你付出什么代价……”

Text.en:
"Try on another life. See how it fits. You'll
find that your one life is utterly inadequate."
- He of Many Names and Many Faces
Text.zh:
“试试另一种人生。看看合不合身。
你会发现，你仅有一次的人生根本不够用。”
— 千面千名者

Text.en: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.
Text.zh: 只有疯子才无视天神的指引。

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
Those qualities possessed by the victor
are proven inherently right and true.
Text.zh:
胜利者所具有的品质
被论证为天选的正义。

Text.en:
A champion is a tower of deeds,
each stacked upon the last,
each carved by hand.
Text.zh:
丰功伟绩堆砌成英名
一举一动，层层相叠。
一言一行，出自本心。

Text.en:
Victory finds those who make
a stand when all others fall.
Text.zh:
纵使他人倒下，若能顽强挺立，
胜利便会将你收为宠儿。

Text.en:
Pierced, slashed, battered, and bludgeoned,
the champion rises with a bloodied grin.
Text.zh:
伤痕累累，皮开肉绽，
浴血勇士，泰然屹立。

Text.en:
The victor holds back the tide,
never faltering, never failing.
Text.zh:
胜利者总能力挽狂澜，
从不动摇，永不言败。

Text.en:
The price of failure comes due
at the end of the victor's blade.
Text.zh:
胜利者的刀锋划过，
失败者便付出代价。

Text.en:
In his broken madness, Xesht spills forth the hordes,
reaching out to wreak pain and ruination.
Text.zh:
在支离破碎的疯狂当中，薛斯释放出群魔，
四处散播痛苦与毁灭。

Text.en:
Before the starlight barrier failed, before the end came,
countless Kalguuran settlers sought a new life on Wraeclast.
Of the towns they founded and the lives they lived, little remains...
Text.zh:
星光的屏障崩塌前，终末的时代来临前，
卡古兰人为寻出路，远航至瓦尔克拉斯。
大兴土木安居乐业，如今却已不似从前……

Text.en:
A simple instruction that will purify an entire region,
making it safe and kind for weary travellers.
Text.zh:
一个简单的指令就能净化一片区域，
让疲惫的旅人得以在此安歇。

Text.en:
When darkness comes, we pray for light.
When darkness is all that there is,
we pray for death.
Text.zh:
黑暗降临时，我们乞求光明。
黑暗笼罩时，一切荡然无存。
我们乞求解脱。

Text.en:
"I see a pattern in these towers. Whoever the Precursors were, they sought to master
this world, to shape it as they saw fit. My people had the same ambition..."
Text.zh:
“这些高塔隐含着某种规律。这所谓的先驱，一定是想要
掌控并塑造这个世界。我的人民也曾有过这样的雄心壮志……”

Text.en: Coming soon
Text.zh: 敬请期待

Text.en:
"If they had ever completed the tower network,
it could have changed the face of the world..."
Text.zh:
“如果他们当真完成了高塔网络，
或许会改变整个世界的面貌……”

Text.en:
Darkness and light, naught but forest between.
As the forest fades, the twilight hunt begins.
Text.zh:
黑暗与光明，不过是森林的变迁。
若森林黯淡，暮光狩猎随之而来。

Text.en:
The lash of the whip,
the ire of the tithe...
the press of the boot.
Text.zh:
鞭笞的痛楚
奉纳的恼怒……
靴下的压迫。

Text.en:
The Well was naught.
The Precursors dug too deep.
The Well always had been.
Text.zh:
井本是虚无。
先驱掘得过深。
井，始终是虚无。

Text.en:
For a brief shining time, the Precursors
could resculpt the world as they saw fit.
Text.zh:
在短暂而辉煌的岁月里，
先驱者曾能随心所欲地重塑世界。

Text.en: A carved piece of something older than the Vaal.
Text.zh: 这块雕琢的碎片来自比瓦尔更久远的年代。

Text.en: The carvings it holds are too worn to decipher.
Text.zh: 它的雕刻久经侵蚀，已经无法辨别。

Text.en: Pictographs seem to convey a dire warning.
Text.zh: 壁画似乎传达着一条严厉的警告。

Text.en:
It bears a pictograph of a lunar eclipse
made crimson by crystallised Corruption.
Text.zh:
它刻有月蚀的象形图案
被结晶腐蚀染成猩红之色。

Text.en:
It bears a pictograph of three stones
being placed at the foot of a great tower.
Text.zh:
它刻有三块巨石的象形图案
置于巨塔根基之下。

Text.en:
It bears a pictograph of vast flames
sweeping across mountains and forests.
Text.zh:
它刻有熊熊烈火的象形图案
焚遍群山与密林。

Text.en: Accept the darkness.
Text.zh: 接受黑暗。

Text.en: Accept the futility.
Text.zh: 接受徒劳。

Text.en: Accept the end.
Text.zh: 接受终结。

Text.en: Accept the now.
Text.zh: 接受当下。

Text.en: Accept oblivion.
Text.zh: 接受湮灭。

Text.en: Answer the whispers... as they did.
Text.zh: 回应低语……如他们一般。

Text.en: Peer into abysses unknown...
Text.zh: 窥探那无人知晓的深渊吧……

Text.en:
The Twisted Breachlord reaches out from his
Domain with maddened agony and anger.
Text.zh:
扭曲的裂隙领主从他的领域中传出音讯，
其中尽是疯狂的痛楚与愤怒。

Text.en: A curious find...
Text.zh: 真是奇怪的发现……

Text.en:
His Trials will end when Time does...
and then, they will begin again.
Text.zh:
唯有时光到头，他的试炼才会到头。
即便如此，时光之轮总是周而复始。

Text.en: The cycle of vengeance never ends... even in death.
Text.zh: 复仇的循环如同不灭的轮回……死亡也无法将其斩断。

Text.en:
Prospero smiles upon you, fair traveller.
Step close, take a chance, and try fortune's fare!
Text.zh:
普洛斯彼罗眷顾了你，旅行者。
上前来，碰运气，博取飞来横财！

Text.en:
During the first rain of each year, rich and poor alike
chased the Beetle through the flooding streets of Keth,
and its bounty was shared equally by all.
Text.zh:
每年第一次降下雨水之时，
富豪和贫民踏上克斯街头，
一同追逐奔走的神圣甲虫，
平等分享它的恩赐与馈赠。

Text.en:
A decayed blackmarket explosive. It's waterlogged, 
covered in barnacles and ready to explode.
Text.zh:
一捆腐烂的黑市炸药。就算被水泡烂了，
长满了藤壶，也还是能炸。

Text.en: The Liege of the Lightless seeks dominion for the authority it brings.
Text.zh: 暗光领主追求统治是为了权威的威势。

Text.en: The Hated Slave seeks dominion for the revenge it enables.
Text.zh: 憎恨之奴追求统治是为了复仇的快感。

Text.en: The Blackblooded seeks dominion for its own sake.
Text.zh: 黑血之众追求统治是为了纯粹的霸权。

Text.en: The Sovereign of the Well seeks dominion to banish the Light.
Text.zh: 弱言领主追求统治是为了无尽的黑夜。

Text.en:
"We are nothing but flesh. Blood. If we are to
ascend, we must empower that flesh."
Text.zh:
“吾等不过血肉之躯。若想登临至高，
便需重塑这具皮囊。”

Text.en:
"Altering reality, even locally, is no simple matter.
Let us start not with ourselves, but with willing subjects."
Text.zh:
“篡改现实——即便只是方寸之地——也非易事。
何不放过我们自己，从自愿的受试者开始？”

Text.en:
"The soul carries the truth of what we are.
That is where we should focus our efforts."
Text.zh:
“灵魂承载着吾等存在的本质。
那才是我们应当倾注心血之处。”

Text.en:
"The results prove it. With enough focused Corruption,
we can alter the fundamental laws of existence in a
small area... the question now: what do we try first?"
Text.zh:
“结果足以证明：通过高度集中的腐化，
我们足以在小范围内改写存在的基本法则
而今唯一的问题是：先试验什么？”

Text.en:
The creature languished in Corruption, driven 
by hunger alone. The sky opened, and
crushed the creature beneath its gift.
Text.zh:
那生物在腐化中饱受折磨，仅凭饥饿驱使。
天空豁然裂开，
坠落的馈赠将其压垮。

Text.en:
The once infinitesimal creature erupted.
It was not torn apart, but expanded, filled
with the matter and will of the stars.
Text.zh:
那只曾经微乎其微的生物骤然爆发。
它并非被撕裂，而是不断膨胀，
充满了星辰的物质与意志。

Text.en:
It flexed its molten limbs and caressed its 
metal bones. It meticulously rearranged
itself until it was complete.
Text.zh:
它活动着熔融的四肢，轻抚着自己的金属骨骼。
它一丝不苟地重塑自身，
直至完整。

Text.en:
Awareness shot through its Verisium 
consciousness. It cursed the sky, and its rage
reverberated throughout its earthen cradle.
Text.zh:
意识穿透了它的维金意识体。
它诅咒天空，
怒火在它的泥土摇篮中回荡。

Text.en:
"Remember this tale, lest you hear the Bodach. If you
listen to its words, you'll never listen again."
- Chronicler of Fables
Text.zh:
“好好记住这故事，免得听见伯达克。
一旦你倾听了它的话，你将再也无法倾听。”
— 寓言编撰者

Text.en:
"Carry this carving, lest the Bodach find you. If you've
no idol to offer, it carves your bones instead."
- Chronicler of Fables
Text.zh:
“随身携带这尊雕像，免得伯达克找到你。
你若没有雕像可以献上，它便会雕刻你的骸骨。”
— 寓言编撰者

Text.en:
"Wander not, lest the Bodach walk with you. You'll walk 'til
your feet open the earth, where its Darkness awaits."
- Chronicler of Fables
Text.zh:
“切勿彷徨，免得伯达克与你同行。
你将行走至双足犁开大地，而它的黑暗正静候其中。”
— 寓言编撰者

Text.en:
"Stay in the light, lest the Bodach take you. You'll disappear
so completely none will know you existed."
- Chronicler of Fables
Text.zh:
“留在光明之中，免得伯达克带走你。
你将消失得如此彻底，以至于无人知晓你曾存在过。”
— 寓言编撰者

Text.en:
Kurgal's first body was a mere stone golem, enslaved by a
collar. He found such ecstasy in the power of dominion,
he clawed his way free... and soon, supplanted a Lich Lord.
Text.zh:
古加尔的第一具身体不过是个被项圈束缚的石头魔像。
他在统治的力量中尝到甜头，拼死挣脱枷锁……
很快就干掉了一个巫妖领主。

Text.en:
Few mortals can comprehend the horror of experiencing
every possibility. Chaos alone takes joy in the
unthinkable and the unimaginable made manifest.
Text.zh:
很少有凡人能承受体验所有可能的恐怖。
只有混沌会从不可思议和无法想象的
显现中获得快乐。

Text.en:
The Tasalio Tribe developed their own Way, seeing
the world not as it is, but as it should be, given its
roiling and endless grace of constant motion.
Text.zh:
塔萨里奥部落走出了自己的路，他们看世界不看现状，
而看本该如何，因为世界有着翻滚不息、
无穷无尽的优雅律动。

Text.en:
At the last, her hope gone - but not her resolve - she threw her
beloved Tangletongue. That was the day a god bled. For this, the
Great Roc graced a Maraketh warrior with a feather for the first time.
Text.zh:
最终，她希望断绝——但意志未灭——她掷出了心爱的纠缠之舌。
那一天，神明流下了血。
为此，巨鹏首次将羽毛赐予马拉克斯战士。

Text.en:
She holds in her hand a shattered crystal, a vision of her desire: to
see her sister's silver palace obliterated, to see it cast across the
heavens. One cross word, and the sky will rain down her fury.
Text.zh:
她手中紧握破碎水晶，那是她内心渴望的映像：
看到姐妹的银色宫殿化为废墟，
看到碎片散落星空。只需一句恶言，天空便会降下她的怒火。

Text.en:
Young Guatelitzi was found moving among the prisoners,
preparing their living bodies for sacrifice. The High Priests
recognised his inclinations, and gave him a higher calling.
Text.zh:
年轻的瓜铁雷兹被发现穿行于囚犯之中，
将活人之躯用来献祭。
高阶祭司们认可他的天性，赋予了他更高的使命。

Text.en:
Confident their enemy was defenseless, the Keitans brazenly
charged the walls - but Arjun's ammunition supply reports
had been... 'inaccurate'... just like everything else Bardiyan.
Text.zh:
柯伊塔人确信敌人束手无策，大胆冲击城墙——
但阿尔琼的军需报告有些……“水分”
……就像巴迪亚的其他东西一样不靠谱。

Text.en:
"I will become your Gemling Queen, my love, but not
with such dull stones. I want to give myself to you
for eternity. Surely we can seek perfection together?"
Text.zh:
“我会成为你的宝石皇后，我的挚爱，
但不要用这些黯淡的石头。我想把自己永远交给你。
我们何不一起追求完美？”

Text.en:
Ailith awoke to find her fire iridescent, and her mind alive
with visions. By morning, she began teaching what she'd
seen... thus was born the Keepers of the Pale Vision.
Text.zh:
艾利丝醒来发现火焰变成了虹色，脑海中涌现出各种异象。
天亮时，她开始传授所见之物……
苍白异象守护者由此诞生。

Text.en:
Reliving the same day for all time, Zarokh raged against
the moments that made up his prison. There would be
no redemption, for he had broken his only barya.
Text.zh:
扎洛卡永远重复同一天，对组成牢笼的
每个瞬间怒不可遏。再无救赎可言，
因为他已经亲手打碎了唯一的巨灵币。

Text.en:
Zarokh's ire built over the centuries as he planned his escape.
The Afarud would find what he sought, and then... the
Weeping Black would break the chains of his prison.
Text.zh:
扎洛卡的怒意在数个世纪中积聚，他一直在谋划逃离。
阿法鲁德终将找到他所求之物，而后……
腐泣必将打破他囚笼的枷锁。

Text.en:
"No plan. No stealth. I want shock. Awe. I want them to
know who did it, and I want them telling tales. That's the
only way for us to earn their respect... and their fear."
Text.zh:
“不要计划。不要潜行。我要的是震撼。是敬畏。
我要他们知道凶手是谁，我要他们代代相传。
只有这样我们才能赢得他们的敬重……和恐惧。”

Text.en:
A scavenging warrior found Tawhoa meditating in a grove.
"There is only so much jade in this world," intoned the god.
"Take my gift to your tribe. Ironwood will grow for all time."
Text.zh:
一个搜寻者发现塔赫亚在林中打坐。
“这世间的青玉数量有限，”神明开口道。
“将我的恩赐带给你的族人。铁木将生长到永远。”

Text.en:
"Skothe kept us idle, sitting safe on these islands, while our
brethren remain slaves. We are one and the same! We must
fight! So, I bring you his head. I am now your Wolven King!"
Text.zh:
“斯科提让我们闲坐在这些岛上无所作为，而我们的兄弟依然为奴。
我们本是同根！我们必须战斗！
所以，我把他的脑袋带来了。我就是你们的新狼王！”

Text.en:
The water used to cool the Locus of Corruption ran red
as blood, bright as flame, and bubbled with strange heat.
"Drink," he offered. "Suffuse your flesh with power!"
Text.zh:
用来冷却腐化蝗群的水变得
血红如火，冒着诡异的热泡。
“喝吧，”他提议道。“让力量渗透你的血肉！”

Text.en:
The Lich Lords destroyed his body, but with his dying fury,
Tecrod found a way. He lurks deep, in the blood, in the flesh,
in the Well... perhaps walking among them even now, unseen.
Text.zh:
巫妖领主毁灭了他的肉体，但在濒死的怒火中，
特克德找到了一条道路。他深潜在鲜血、血肉、
深井之中……或许此刻仍隐匿于人群之中，无人察觉。

Text.en:
"This carving seems to depict curled bodies floating in vats...
the next shows all but one of them dying. What were they
trying to do? It seems they kept trying... kept experimenting..."
Text.zh:
“这幅雕刻似乎描绘了众多容器之中漂浮着蜷缩的躯体……
而下一幅则显示，除一人之外，余者尽皆死亡。他们究竟意欲何为？
看来，他们屡遭失败，却依旧不断实验……”

Text.en:
Atazek and Atalui rose, battered and dark, bleeding from a hundred
different wounds. She gave her brother a sinister grin. "Shall we
show them what happens to those who challenge the Vaal?"
Text.zh:
阿塔泽科与阿图鲁伊踉跄起身，遍体鳞伤，
肌肤焦黑，身负百般创痕。她向兄长投以狰狞笑意：
“不如让他们见识一下，胆敢挑战瓦尔血脉的代价？”

Text.en:
Day and night, she hammered away, obsessed with proving it
could be done; a vast ring of artifice under the earth, pushing
energy to speeds never before seen - all to prove Qotra wrong.
Text.zh:
她日夜不休地锤打，痴迷于证明其可行性；
一座深埋地下的巨大机械圆环，
将能量推动至前所未有的速度——只为证明科塔拉是错的。

Text.en:
"How? Well, the Great Wyvern granted her passage, of course.
Eonyr and his flock soar the winds between us and the Moon.
The roar of the storm... that's them, as they hunt and call."
Text.zh:
“怎么做到的？呵，自然是伟大的飞龙准她通过的。
伊奥尼尔和他的族群，一直在我们与月亮之间的天风中翱翔。
那风暴的咆哮声……正是他们捕猎与呼唤的声响。”

Text.en:
As possessed golems ravaged the land, Aul - crowned Ahn
by blood and tyranny - began the last ritual, causing azurite
crystals to rupture and grow throughout his doomed citadel.
Text.zh:
当被附身的魔像肆虐大地时，奥尔——以鲜血与暴政为汉恩加冕
——开始了最后的仪式。蓝晶爆裂而开，疯狂蔓长，
吞噬了他那命定毁灭的要塞。

Text.en:
The oldest and greatest fortress on Wraeclast was grown, not built.
She Who Waited planted their seeds in a time of ash and snow.
Now, the gate of the Taisce is unassailable, yet open to all.
Text.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯最古老、最宏伟的堡垒并非建造而成，而是生长出来的。
“等待之女”在灰烬与冰雪的时代埋下了它们的种子。
如今，泰斯卡之门虽坚不可摧，却向所有人敞开。

Text.en:
The volcano roared, but there was no thunder, only the boom
of Uruk's hammer. Wraeclast had forgotten the old alliance,
but by the Molten One's will, the fires would rage again.
Text.zh:
火山咆哮，却无雷鸣，唯闻厄罗克战锤之轰响。
瓦尔克拉斯或许早已遗忘古老的盟约，
但凭熔岩者之意志，烈火势将再次怒燃。

Text.en:
Shavronne gleefully raised her arms to the sky as lightning
flashed. She'd done it! Her creation was perfect! Invincible.
Immortal! But she soon realized there was one piece missing...
Text.zh:
薛朗欢欣地举起双臂，迎向雷电交加的天空。
她成功了！她的造物完美无缺！无敌！不朽！
但她旋即意识到，尚缺关键一环……

Text.en:
"Come, my faithful wife," he crooned. "Sit. Eat. I wanted to
reward you for your loyalty. I even cooked this myself..."
She looked 'round for her sons, but hers was the only chair.
Text.zh:
“来吧，我忠贞的妻子。”他低语道。“坐，用餐。
我要奖赏你的忠诚，这甚至是我亲手烹制……”
她环顾四周，儿子们踪迹皆无，只看到一把属于自己的椅子。

Text.en:
The High Templar needed thousands of prisoners if his and
Piety's experiments were to succeed. Conspiring on the
matter, they decided to revive an age old tradition... exile.
Text.zh:
若神主和派蒂的实验要成功，
便需要数千名囚犯。为此密谋时，
他们决定重启一项古老的传统……流放。

Text.en:
"These traditions we shall set forth, so that we may remain
strong, so that we may endure throughout the ages. Not to
bind, not to dominate, but to protect... and guide."
Text.zh:
“我等立下此等传统，意欲永葆强固，以求永世长存。
绝非为束缚，绝非为支配，
而是为守护……与指引。”

Text.en:
Those that serve the Liege of the Lightless are his, utterly.
Blood, flesh, and soul are fodder to bend to his will.
Under a Lich Lord, not even death is an escape.
Text.zh:
凡侍奉暗光领主者，皆彻底归其所有。
鲜血、血肉与灵魂，皆乃可扭曲、可屈从其意志之耗材。
在巫妖领主麾下，纵是死亡亦非解脱。

她露出满口獠牙的笑容：“罪，我的爱人，
忘却玛拉凯的苦烦吧。”她撕咬、狂欢；
而他，困于丝茧之间，绝望与狂喜交织。

Text.en:
Still a shadow of his former self, Kulemak turned to deception.
He promised Ahn untold power and mastery, in exchange for
a single golem. "After all, what harm could one servant do?"
Text.zh:
库勒马克的力量远不如昔，他转而诉诸欺诈。
他向汉恩许诺无尽的权利与统治，只为换取一尊魔像。
“毕竟，一介奴仆又能有何危害？”

Text.en:
"The perfect harmony of architecture and thaumaturgy.
My vaults were impenetrable....until it was
decided that they wanted to be able to leave."
--Estazunti, Architect of the Vault
Text.zh:
“建筑术与奇术的完美谐律。
我的宝库固若金汤……在他们的意愿之下，
宝库才留下了出口。”
——埃斯塔祖提，宝库建筑师

Text.en:
Such was her seductive power, every noble in the court fell
over themselves to do her bidding. Winning a single glance
away from her mirror meant more than their lives.
Text.zh:
她那致命的诱惑，驱使宫廷贵族
争先恐后地效忠于她。赢得她梳妆镜中的惊鸿一瞥,
甚至胜过他们自己的性命。

Text.en:
The Red Communion was meant to transcend the limits
of the soul, to transfigure the flesh, to bestow immortality.
It accomplished all of these things... most horribly.
Text.zh:
红色圣礼本欲超脱灵魂的桎梏，
重塑血肉的形态，赐予众生永恒的生命。
它确实达成了这些目标……以最骇人的方式。

Text.en:
"Those who bored the Queen suffered an excessive punishment:
everyone they had ever known would be killed, effectively
erasing their life. So, no matter the cost... none kept her waiting."
Text.zh:
“凡令女王厌烦之人，皆受严惩：
所有与他们相识者都将被诛杀，以此彻底抹除其存在。
故而无论代价如何……无人敢让她等候。”

Text.en:
"They drank until only dust remained. Ate until their gums
bled rust. Such was their greed, the only thing that remains
of the Broken Sun... is the Red Pyre, the Torus Eternal."
Text.zh:
“他们饮尽万物，直至唯余尘埃。吞食一切，直至齿龈锈血横流。
贪婪至此，破碎太阳遗迹中，唯有赤焰长存
——是为永恒环火。”

Text.en:
"Where life once thrived, now only metal grows, inching
like endless worms through the ash. Where silence fell,
now sourceless thought whispers numbers in the dark."
Text.zh:
“生命曾经繁盛之地，如今唯余金属滋长，
宛如无尽蠕虫于灰烬中爬行。寂静降临之地，
如今传来无源之思，在黑暗中低声吟唱。”

Text.en:
"Countless graves glow silently in endless rows that stretch
on unseen. The living lie within, but do not decay, do not
die. Their eyes remain open, their essence stilled, waiting."
Text.zh:
“无数坟茔，无尽延伸，静默泛光。
生者躺于其内，却不腐不朽，拒斥死亡。
他们圆睁双目，精华凝滞，默然等待。”

Text.en:
"The Lords could not breathe, so they grew new lungs.
The Lords could not venture, so they grew new skin.
The Lords were alone, so they grew us, to serve them."
Text.zh:
“诸主无法呼吸，故而培育新肺。
诸主无法远行，故而培育新肤。
诸主形孤影寡，故而培育我等，以供驱使。”

Text.en:
By the time Uhtred realised the truth, only Vorana remained
to defend them. While the rest fled, she implanted her flesh
with gems and set forth alone to face the endless hordes.
Text.zh:
待乌崔德察觉真相之时，仅剩沃拉娜守卫众人。
余众尽数逃离之际，她却将宝石植入血肉，
独身迎向无尽大军。

Text.en:
Day and night, his priests followed each of the Kalguuran
heroes. When Medved disappeared, Uhtred grew even more
paranoid. Now, only two remained... Olroth and Vorana.
Text.zh:
日日夜夜，他的祭司跟踪每一位卡古兰英雄。
梅德维德失踪后，乌崔德愈发偏执多疑。
如今，仅存两人……欧罗什与沃拉娜。

Text.en:
Studying the ill omens of the stars, Uhtred came to suspect
something was very wrong among the first Kalguurans.
Olroth, Vorana, Medved... three there were. Three dangers.
Text.zh:
研读星象恶兆之后，乌崔德疑窦丛生，
第一批卡古兰人大有蹊跷。
欧罗什、沃拉娜、梅德维德……三人。三大威胁。

Text.en:
"You must cut the beast, like this," he told the wide-eyed
and forgetful woman. "The juiciest parts are in the middle!"
She nodded, and began relearning the way of the wilds.
Text.zh:
“你应当这样肢解野兽，”他对那目光惊愕的健忘女人说道。
“最肥美部位就在当中！”
她点头，开始重新学习荒野之道。

Text.en:
As King Kaom delved further into Wraeclast, so, too, did he
draw closer to the Beast. One night, in a nightmarish fit, he
swung his axe at his own men, slaughtering hundreds.
Text.zh:
当卡鲁之王冈姆愈发深入瓦尔克拉斯，他也愈发接近那头巨兽。
一夜，他于梦魇中发狂，
挥舞战斧砍向麾下士兵，戮数百。

Text.en:
Doedre's depravity knew no limits. She stretched and
broke and rebuilt herself until she forgot her own shape.
She reverted to a familiar form, and began anew.
Text.zh:
德瑞的堕落没有底线。
她拉伸、撕裂、重塑自身，直到忘却了自己的样子。
她回归了熟悉的形态，然后一切从头开始。

Text.en:
The Architect of Destruction slipped explosive powder
under the royal temple one pinch at a time. For years,
he clung to that, never finding the courage to light it.
Text.zh:
毁灭之建筑师将火药一撮一撮地
埋进皇家神庙的地基。多年间，
他始终守着这个秘密，却始终没能点燃引线。

Text.en:
"It was the quality of his heinous acts that set him apart, not
the quantity... all of the physical trauma inflicted occurred
while the victim was still alive. Perhaps this was the key."
Text.zh:
"令他脱颖而出的并非暴行的数量，而是其质量……
所有肉体创伤的施加，都发生在受害者意识清醒之时。
或许，这正是关键所在。"

Text.en:
Surrounded by abominations, Lysanda of Myr expected her
time had come to an end. Helbrym of Tarth charged from
the trees, breaking his oath, to save the Ezomyte Queen.
Text.zh:
被可憎之物团团围困时，艾兹麦的莱桑达
以为自己的大限已至。塔斯的赫尔布林却从林中冲出，
不惜破誓拯救了这位艾兹麦女王。

Text.en:
"I raised my eyes to look upon my death. Instead, I saw her.
Merveil. Fighting had always been about survival. Now the
fight became about something much greater... love."
Text.zh:
“我抬起双眼凝视我的死亡。却看见了她，
莫薇儿。战斗从来只是为了生存，
而此刻，战斗有了更崇高的意义……爱。”

Text.en:
"Her voice reached into my chest and plucked my beating
heart from its cage. By the wide, glistening eyes of my
fellow punters, I knew that they felt it, too."
Text.zh:
“她的声音探入我的胸膛，将跳动的心脏
从牢笼中摘走。从同伴们圆睁而晶莹的眼中，
我知道他们也感同身受。”

Text.en:
He almost saved the Vaal. His unique poison made it past
the Queen's cupbearers; he had only to direct his anger...
but in her presence, he could feel naught but lust.
Text.zh:
他差点就拯救了瓦尔。他的独门毒药
骗过了女王的侍酒官，他只需引燃自己的怒火……
可在她面前，他感受到的却唯有欲望。

Text.en: The blood of the Titans flows within humanity still. It need only be reawakened.
Text.zh: 泰坦之血仍在人类血脉中流淌，只需重新唤醒。

Text.en:
Life itself. Not as it was, but as
they aspired for it to be...
Text.zh:
生命本身。并非如其所是，
而是他们向往的模样……

Text.en:
A burgeoning emergent
flare of empowered life
Text.zh:
蓬勃喷涌的
强化生命之火

Text.en:
A paradox, whose very existence 
would change... everything.
Text.zh:
一个悖论，其存在本身就将改变……
一切。

Text.en:
The Chieftain built a grand waikoama, and boasted that
it could never be sunk. Tasalio grinned, and the waves
rolled in, tilting the ship, cresting higher and higher...
Text.zh:
酋长曾建造雄伟战舰，狂言此船永不沉没。
塔萨里奥闻之莞尔，巨浪翻涌而至，
舰身倾斜，怒涛层层攀升……

Text.en:
The surging geysers flooded the tunnels of the ancient
enemy, destroying whole legions. His akhara turned to
praise the tale-man Khatal, but he was dust on the wind.
Text.zh:
喷薄的地泉吞没了宿敌的地道，整师覆灭洪流。
他的阿卡拉回身欲颂说书人卡哈塔之功，
却见其已化作随风飘散的尘埃。

Text.en:
Born of the gods, his treachery was met with divine fury.
One by one, the gods reclaimed their flesh, until all that
remained was a droplet of pure light: the first Vaal.
Text.zh:
诞生于神祇血肉，他的背叛遭到了神罚。
众神逐一剥夺了他们的肉体，
直到他们的身躯只残留下最后一点光沫，
那就是最早的瓦尔。

Text.en:
Each initiate hears a bell tolling in their dreams. It is the
clarion call of the Benevolent Dreamer. From then on,
they dedicate their lives to a singular purpose.
Text.zh:
每位入门弟子梦中都会听闻钟声回响。
那是慈爱的幻梦者的召唤号角。自此刻起，
他们便将毕生献于唯一的神圣使命。

Text.en:
It is said that the Steward of Tales roams Wraeclast still,
lost in the form of a Wyvern, full of sorrow and fury at
the loss of his beloved pupils to the King in the Mists...
Text.zh:
传说，故事守护者至今仍在瓦尔克拉斯游荡。
他化身为双足飞龙，因爱徒们被迷雾之王掠走
而深陷于无尽的悲愤之中……

Text.en:
To bear the head of a king is to send a
message both concise and profound.
Text.zh:
携君王之颅，
传达的讯息既简洁又深刻。

Text.en:
Locked within the unseen fabric
lie the chains of power and control.
Text.zh:
隐于无形的织理之中，
缚着权柄与掌控的锁链。

Text.en: Witness the genesis of madness.
Text.zh: 见证疯狂的起源。

Text.en: A masterwork of runecraft.
Text.zh: 符文工艺的杰作。

Text.en: Shattered pieces of glory long lost.
Text.zh: 失落已久的破碎荣耀。

Text.en:
"Behold! A marvel of innovation! Pay no mind the cost of flesh..."
- Guatelitzi, Architect of Flesh
Text.zh:
“看呐！这巧夺天工的造物！何必在意耗费了多少血肉……”
— 瓜铁雷兹，血肉建筑师

Text.en: The first Warden of Eaves swore to patrol the border twixt the worlds forevermore, so that the tragedy of Gruthkul's stampede would never recur. In time, his vigil on the edge began to... change him.
Text.zh:
初代“林际守望者”曾立誓永世巡守两个世界间的交界，
只为让格鲁丝克的践踏悲剧永不重演。
然而经年累月，他在边缘地带的守望……竟开始改变他。

Text.en:
On the nights the fugue would come over her, the Ezomytes would
gather below, begging her to bring the rains. Atop the Taisce,
wailing with unknown sorrows, her cries made the skies rage.
Text.zh:
每当恍惚之夜降临她身，艾兹麦人便齐聚于下，
祈求她唤来甘霖。在泰斯卡之巅，
她怀着无人知晓的悲恸恸哭——那哭声令苍穹为之暴怒。

Text.en:
"The laws are binding. They are absolute. If they believe
it is their choice to enforce them, all the better.
Upholding our solemn duty is imperative."
Text.zh:
“法律具有约束力，法律是绝对的。
如果他们认为执行法律是出于自身的选择，那便再好不过。
履行我们庄严的职责，刻不容缓。”

Text.en:
"The murals tell a story of creation, of design... the Precursors
delved into the secrets of life itself. In their war with the Abyssals,
they sought to breed warriors, grown in legions, to fight back..."
Text.zh:
“壁画讲述了创造与设计的故事……
先驱者曾深入探索生命本身的奥秘。
在与深渊魔物的战争中，他们试图培育战士，成建制地培养，以进行反击……”

Text.en:
Intricate machinery imperceptibly woven into a
biological foundation. It felt delicate in her hands.
In him, it would be her greatest achievement.
Text.zh:
精密机械隐秘地织入生物基础之中。
在她手中，感觉很精致。
而在他身上，这将成为她最伟大的成就。

Text.en:
"To control the stars, we swallow the firmament.
We imbibe the truth. We are filled with the void.
We embrace the vast emptiness, or we die."
Text.zh:
“为了掌控星辰，我们吞下苍穹。
我们饮下真理。我们吞食虚空。
我们拥抱浩瀚的虚无，否则便是死亡。”

Text.en:
They'd cast him out, declared him a dark omen. Their judgement
rattled in his head. He'd no control over crops, or herds, but
that mattered little. Upon his return, their fear was his weapon.
Text.zh:
他们将他驱逐，宣称他是不祥之兆。他们的评判在他脑中回响。
他无法控制庄稼，也无法控制畜群，但这并不重要。
当他归来时，他们的恐惧便是他的武器。

Text.en:
"They designed our salvation. No longer shall
our people's grief be in vain. From their hands,
perfection is wrought. Within His reach, we are safe."
Text.zh:
“他们设计了我们的救赎。我族人的悲伤将不再徒劳。
他们手中，锻造出了完美。
在他的臂围之内，我们安然无恙。”

Text.en:
In his roiling fog, their fear becomes form.
Dark truths unveiled by a shroud. They see only
their perception of him, and thus, he is remade.
Text.zh:
在他翻滚的迷雾之中，他们的恐惧逐渐显化。
黑暗的真相由迷雾揭开。
他们所见仅是自己对他的认知，于是，他便被重塑。

Text.en:
"Where Its dread gaze fell,
ruination followed..."
Text.zh:
“其恐惧目光所至，
毁灭随之……”

Text.en: Thorough notes tracking Gwennen's movements.
Text.zh: 详尽笔记追踪着桂温妮的行踪。

Text.en: The last one alive, she understood too late...
Text.zh: 最后一个活着的人，她明白时已太迟……

Text.en: Schemes laid bare, in their hour of need...
Text.zh: 计划在他们最需要的时刻，暴露无遗……

Text.en: He made his way to the ends of the earth...
Text.zh: 他跋涉了天涯海角……

Text.en:
A collector travelled the world and
wove a fabled garment of rings...
Text.zh:
一位收藏家游历世界，
编织出一件传说中的戒指法衣……

Text.en: The rune hungers, an empty chasm...
Text.zh: 符文饥渴，一如虚空裂谷……

Text.en: Arcane energy churns wildly within.
Text.zh: 奥术能量在其中疯狂涌动。

Text.en:
Knowledge unending had transcended physical form.
Her minds raced through metal latticework as the
flesh of the melding reached up to contain her.
Text.zh:
无尽的知识已超越血肉。
当融合的血肉向上蔓延将她包裹时，
她的思维在金属晶格中飞驰。

Text.en:
Our Broken Sun... it is no mere allegory. It is
the consequence of insolent disharmony.
For now, it is contained, but time is against us.
Text.zh:
我们的破碎之日……并非单纯的寓言。
而是傲慢失谐的恶果。
目前它尚被遏制，但时间不等人。

Text.en:
The flesh rejoiced. The melding began.
Then, fear. Something foreign within.
It was cast out too late. The unity was broken.
Text.zh:
血肉为之欢欣。融合开始了。
随即，恐惧袭来——体内有异物。
将其驱逐已为时过晚。统合已然破碎。

Text.en:
Vruun tore through Tul's preserved, shattering their
bodies with reckless malice. "The will of the Lords!"
he roared over his decimation. "All broods must serve."
Text.zh:
弗伦撕碎了托沃保存之物，以肆意的恶意粉碎了它们的躯体。
“领主的意志！”他在屠戮中咆哮，
“虫群，必须效忠。”

Text.en:
"If you think you've won, it's only because you don't
understand their strategy. Each Vruun you kill only
teaches the next one how to endure against you."
Text.zh:
“如果你认为自己赢了，你多半还不理解他们的策略。
你杀死的每一个弗伦，
都会让下一个变得更棘手。”

Text.en:
"In the stars, I see our future. My plans are laid,
lines tracing a constellation. You may only see
pieces, but I see the whole, and it will be glorious."
Text.zh:
“在星辰之中，我看见了未来。计划已铺就，轨迹描绘出星座。
你或许只看到碎片，但我看到了整体，
无比辉煌。”

Text.en:
"There is no zealotry like that of a mystic roused
to battle. He broke his own code, wielding weapons
long forbidden, to defend that which he loved."
Text.zh:
“没有什么狂热，能比得上被唤起战斗意志的神秘者。
他打破了戒律，挥舞着禁忌已久的武器，
只为捍卫心之所爱。”

Text.en:
"Your laws of war are asinine. I shall prevail!
I'll crush every pawn you put before me.
Face me, coward! Play by my rules."
Text.zh:
“你们的战争法则愚蠢至极！我必将获胜！
我会碾碎你摆在我面前的每个棋子。
直面我，懦夫！按我的规则来。”

Text.en:
Bound by his oath to the Runefathers, Styrn the
Indomitable refused to bow to Cadigan the First.
His resistance laid the seeds for future defiance.
Text.zh:
受符文之父誓言所缚，
不屈的斯泰恩拒绝向卡迪甘一世低头。
他的抵抗为日后的反抗埋下了种子。

Text.en:
Each knight who encountered Styrn challenged
him to the traditional duel. One by one, he fought
his way across all of Middengard... and beyond.
Text.zh:
每一位遇见斯泰恩的骑士，
都向他发起了传统的决斗挑战。
他过关斩将，横跨整个米登加德……乃至更远。

Text.en:
Rumors claim that Sir Styrn the Indomitable is
still out there, fighting his way across the world,
seeking that which he may never find...
Text.zh:
传言说，不屈的斯泰恩爵士依然在外闯荡，
过关斩将，周游世界，
追寻他可能永远无法找到的东西……

Text.en:
"The yellow sap... the Vivid flow... it is the energy of
harmony between disparate forces. They call it the
Catha, an aspect of the Goddess. It is so much more."
Text.zh:
“那黄色的汁液……鲜活的流淌……是不同力量之间和谐共存的能量。
他们称之为卡莎，女神的一个面向。
实则远不止于此。”

Text.en:
"Wild energy is as misunderstood as the Mórrigan
itself. Many revere life, yet revile death. What is dead
feeds the living. Death is but one aspect of the whole."
Text.zh:
“狂野的能量正如莫丽根本身一样被误解。
许多人崇敬生命，却憎恶死亡。
死者滋养着生者。死亡不过是整体中的一个面向。”

Text.en:
Then, there was movement. What once preserved them
now pulled them free from their silence. In the
absence of stillness, their screams echoed.
Text.zh:
接着，有了动静。
曾经保护他们的东西，正将他们从寂静中拖出来。
寂静被打破，尖叫声回荡开来。

Text.en: We search for the memories missing...
Text.zh: 我们寻觅失落的记忆……

Text.en: We reach for the promises lost...
Text.zh: 我们触及遗失的誓约……

Text.en: We grasp the eternal unborn...
Text.zh: 我们握住永生的未诞者……

Text.en: We yield our mind to save the body...
Text.zh: 我们牺牲心智以拯救躯体……

Text.en: It is our steps that stir.
Text.zh: 是我们的脚步在搅动。

Text.en: It is our hands that join.
Text.zh: 是我们的双手在合拢。

Text.en: It is our flesh that binds.
Text.zh: 是我们的血肉在束缚。

Text.en: It is our mind that splits.
Text.zh: 是我们的心智在分裂。

Text.en:
The true power of the Knights of the Sun came not from
force of arms, nor cleverness of artifice. Its beating heart
was the valour and determination of the heroes of old.
Text.zh:
烈日骑士真正的力量，
并非来自武力或智谋。它的核心，
乃是古代英雄们的勇气与决心。

Text.en:
The pinnacle of Serle's work was not a grand artefact.
It was a subversion; a window. He stood upon a peak
and saw beyond mortal limitations, understanding, in
that moment, that so much more was possible...
Text.zh:
瑟尔毕生技艺的巅峰，并非宏伟的神器。
而是一种颠覆，一扇新窗。
他立于山巅，望见凡人之外的世界。
那一刻，他明白了，还有众多可能……

Text.en:
"A man may win every battle, conquer every neighbor.
Yet, the oldest enemy will always overtake him in the end.
That day, when he realised that some functions of the body
could be displaced into artifice... it changed everything."
Text.zh:
“一个人或许能赢下每一场战斗，征服每一个邻邦。
然而，最古老的敌人终将在生命的尽头来袭。
直至那一天，当他意识到身体的某些机能可以被转移到造物之中……
一切都随之改变了。”

Text.en:
To become a Runefather - an Artificer of standing - one
must create something truly new. Astrid was the youngest
smith to ever succeed. Hers was not a work of supreme
power or strength, but simple flexibility and control.
Text.zh:
要成为一名符文之父——一位德高望重的工匠——必须创造出真正新颖的东西。
阿斯特丽德是有史以来最成功的年轻铁匠。
她的作品鲜见至高的力量或强度，
而是胜在简单的灵活性与控制力。

Text.en:
Time was not night and day to the Order of the Chalice.
It was the motions of the stars, the celestial patterns.
To understand Time was to comprehend existence itself.
Text.zh:
对于圣杯教团而言，时间并非昼夜交替。
它是星辰的运转，是天体的模式。
理解时间，便是理解存在本身。

Text.en:
In distant Ezomyr, there exists a rare monastery
dedicated to the First Ones. The brothers there
are well accustomed to suffering as a virtue.
Text.zh:
在遥远的艾兹麦，
有一座献给初生之子的罕见修道院。
那里的修士们早已习惯将苦难视为美德。

Text.en:
Long did the Steward of Tales give
refuge to any and all who needed it.
Text.zh:
长久以来，故事守护者为任何需要庇护的人
提供藏身之所。

Text.en:
For a brief few weeks each year, both Ezomyte
and Eternal were unified in fear of the legendary
boar. To this day, the Manor still bears gouges.
Text.zh:
每年有短暂的几周，无论是艾兹麦还是永恒帝国，
都会团结在对传奇野猪的恐惧之中。
时至今日，庄园上依然留有抓痕。

Text.en:
"There came a time when the oppressed could
simply endure indignity no longer. Can't spell
courage without 'rage,' now can you?"
Text.zh:
“终有一日，
受压迫者将再也无法忍受屈辱。
没有‘怒’，哪来的‘勇’呢？”

Text.en:
"A hunt is just another kind of battle,
and as in any war, the side that wins
is the side that's better fed."
Text.zh:
“狩猎不过是另一种形式的战斗，
而任何战争中，
获胜方总是吃得更好的那一边。”

Text.en:
It was said the Taisce could never fall
so long as Cirel of Tarth stood watch.
Text.zh:
据说，只要赛尔塔斯的西雷尔亲自镇守，
泰斯卡便永远不会沦陷。

Text.en:
"Indeed, in the nearby mountains, that's
where you'll find the monks. Strange, they
are. Gave the Thane a gift to leave them be..."
Text.zh:
“没错，在附近的山里，你能找到那些僧侣。
他们很奇怪。他们给领主送去礼物，
好让领主别去打扰他们……”

Text.en:
None fought so bravely as the Brothers
of Holten. For every wound they took,
they left two Eternal soldiers gutted.
Text.zh:
无人能像霍尔顿兄弟们那般英勇。
他们每增一处新伤，
便会让两名永恒帝国的士兵开膛破肚。

Text.en:
Caelyn knew he and his brother would
not survive the rebellion. The need
for freedom simply mattered more.
Text.zh:
凯琳知道他和他的兄弟
无法在叛乱中幸存。
但对自由的渴望更加重要。

Text.en:
"It was a simple helm. Found in the Red
Vale. Didn't belong to no one famous or
the like. Could have been any of us..."
Text.zh:
“一顶普通的头盔。在红谷找到的。
不属于什么名人或是大人物。
可能属于我们中的任何人……”

Text.en:
"Curious lot, those monks. Kept to their
own, mostly. But when the call came to
rebel, they were there, alongside us."
Text.zh:
“那群僧侣真有意思。
大多时候他们独来独往。
可当叛乱的号角吹响时，他们却和我们并肩而行。”

Text.en:
"Devotion to the Greatwolf came with...
certain side effects. A few generations on,
you'd find some baring teeth, and howling..."
Text.zh:
“对巨狼的虔诚会带来……
某些副作用。几代人之后，
你会发现有些人龇着牙，嚎叫着……”

Text.en:
None now remember a name.
None now remember the act.
Text.zh:
如今无人记得那个名字。
如今无人记得那件事情。

Text.en:
The first to journey through all of Wraeclast,
Erian continually found himself getting exiled
or banished through unfortunate mishaps.
Text.zh:
作为第一个游历整个瓦尔克拉斯的人，
阿里安屡屡因不幸的意外，
而遭到流放或驱逐。

Text.en:
"And then Bynden struck a mortal blow,
straight through the heart! And that damn
knight... he didn't flinch. Just kept on!"
Text.zh:
“然后，柏安登给了他致命一击，
直穿心脏！可那该死的骑士……
他眼睛都没眨一下，仍然继续战斗！”

“我们的历史中，从不乏因弑君而遭放逐的骑士。
大多数时候，我们能够理解，
但即便如此，总要付出代价。”

Text.en:
High Druid Iaine was never able to change
his shape. That never held him back.
Text.zh:
至高祭司伊安从来没能改变自己的形态。
但这并没有妨碍他。

Text.en:
"Roderick was first famous for his artistry
with wax. Second, for his... proclivities."
Text.zh:
“罗德里克最初以蜡艺闻名，
其次，则是他的……种种癖好。”

Text.en:
The role of Executioner was much maligned
in Ogham. Every man who took the job
wore the same equipment, for anonymity.
Text.zh:
刽子手这个角色在欧甘广受诟病。
每个接手这份工作的人都会穿戴相同的装备，
以保持匿名。

Text.en:
The offensive at the Red Vale began with lockstep
maneuvers the rebels had practiced in secret.
Text.zh:
对红谷的攻势
始于叛军秘密演练的齐步战术。

Text.en:
To suppress the rebellion, the Eternals began
harming the families of those involved.
Text.zh:
为了镇压叛乱，
永恒帝国开始戕害参与者的家人。

Text.en:
Survival in the Vastiri was harsh and unforgiving,
but lizard meat was surprisingly tasty.
Text.zh:
瓦斯提里的生存幻境严酷无情，
但蜥蜴肉却出乎意料地美味。

Text.en:
The Wanderer was seen as a sign of good luck,
and welcome in every culture on Wraeclast...
though he has not been seen for a century.
Text.zh:
流浪者被视为好运的象征，
受到瓦尔克拉斯所有文化的欢迎……
尽管他已有一个世纪未曾现身。

Text.en:
"Ah, early Ezomyr. It was a time of  myth
and legend. Wandering knights, and
would-be kings. I long for those days."
Text.zh:
“啊，古早的艾兹麦。那是个充满神话与传奇的时代。
游荡的骑士，怀揣梦想的国王。
我渴望回到那个时代。”

Text.en:
Obern had never been cruel to the Ezomytes.
Though he would not abandon his duty,
they left him alive. Others were not so lucky.
Text.zh:
欧本从未对艾兹麦人残忍过。
尽管他不愿放弃职责，他们还是饶了他一命。
其他人就没那么走运了。

Text.en:
Word of Draven's hostage-taking was not
sent back to the heart of the Empire. Even
he knew the stain of what he had done.
Text.zh:
德莱文劫持人质的消息并未传回帝国腹地。
甚至连他自己也心知肚明，
自己行径留下的污点。

Text.en:
"Descendants of the Chosen could do
far more than mimic the Greatwolf..."
Text.zh:
“被选中者的后代能做的
远不止模仿巨狼……”

Text.en:
A secret cult among the Ezomytes has long
worshipped a dark god. Those who find out
his name do not live to tell it to others.
Text.zh:
艾兹麦有一个秘密邪教，
长久以来崇拜着一位黑暗之神。
知晓其名讳者，无人能活着对他人讲述。

Text.en:
"In truth, our battle for freedom gave us
something. A spark, a spirit, a unity. I fear
what we may become without struggle."
Text.zh:
“事实上，我们的自由之战赠予了我们。
一点火花，一种精神，一份团结。
我害怕，没有斗争我们会变成何种模样。”

Text.en:
They longed for revenge, and spoke of it
often, but found themselves horrified
when Dunkel actually did it.
Text.zh:
他们渴望复仇，经常谈论此事，
但当邓克尔真动手时，
他们却惊恐万分。

Text.en:
The art of runesmithing died out among the Ezomytes,
lost to the passage of time. The practice reawakened when
smiths started to notice the difference Brynhand's personal
mark made for a hammer's durability and precision.
Text.zh:
符文锻造的艺术在艾兹麦人中逐渐失传，湮没于时间长河。
当铁匠们开始注意到，布林汉德的个人印记，
对锤子的耐用性和精度所产生的差异时，
这门技艺才得以复兴。

Text.en:
"There is bravery in leadership, yes, but an
even greater courage in giving one's loyalty.
In trusting your life, or death, to another."
Text.zh:
“领导需要勇气，这话没错，
但付出忠诚则需要更大的勇气。
将自己的生死托付于他人，需要莫大的胆识。”

Text.en:
"These forests used to run thick with
packs of boars... before my time, mind
you. Now, there's nary a hide nor tusk."
Text.zh:
“这些森林以前到处都是野猪群……
不过那是我出生前的事了。
如今，连块兽皮、连根猪牙都见不着了。”

Text.en: "Hrimnor lies in the Red Vale, for all time."
Text.zh: “雷姆诺，永世长眠于红谷。”

Text.en:
"Ah, Thane Grannell's mighty weapon.
According to the songs, he definitely
crushed his share of Eternal skulls that day."
Text.zh:
“啊，格兰内尔领主的强大武器。
歌谣里说，
那天，他确实砸碎了不少永恒帝国士兵的脑袋。”

Text.en:
"We sing Erian's songs now, but he was hated
for many a generation. All the poor man did
was fall asleep at the wrong time."
Text.zh:
“我们现在歌颂阿里安，
可他曾被好几代人憎恨。
这可怜人不过是在错误的时间睡着了罢了。”

Text.en:
The Counts of Ogham were not kings,
but that did not spare them the drama
generated by having a noble court.
Text.zh:
欧甘的伯爵虽非国王，
却也未能幸免于贵族宫廷所带来的纷争戏剧。

Text.en:
"The songs become... unclear on that long night.
Selassie of the Black Fen is described as a 'hag,'
but Erian did not seem to regret his time there..."
Text.zh:
“关于那个漫长的夜晚……歌曲里的描述模糊不清。
黑沼的瑟莱西被称为‘巫婆’，
但阿里安似乎并不后悔在那里度过的时光……”

Text.en:
Most Ezomytes treat the Candlemass rite
as a tradition and a holiday. They have
no idea what really lurks underneath.
Text.zh:
多数艾兹麦人将烛火仪式视为传统和节日。
他们根本不知道
底下潜伏着什么。

“萨奇沃的赐羽，
法瑞尔的鬃毛……
那是信言：战斗吧，尔等当得自由。”

Text.en:
His whole life, Aldur looked up at the stars,
forever wondering what secrets lay beyond.
Text.zh:
奥杜尔穷尽一生仰望星辰，
永远思索着星辰彼岸埋藏着怎样的秘密。

Text.en:
"There is a sacredness to the fundamental rules
of existence; an elegance. All things move in
keeping with them, whether they know it or not."
Text.zh:
“存在的基本法则有一种神圣性；一种优雅。
万物皆循此而动，
无论他们自觉与否。”

Text.en:
The Knights of the Sun were founded out of a
love for that bygone mythical age of heroes.
Not what men are, but what they should be.
Text.zh:
烈阳骑士团的建立，
源于对逝去的神话英雄时代的热爱。
并非基于人原本的样子，而是基于人应有的样子。

Text.en:
Aldur created something that went beyond king
or country, beyond family or honour. The craft
of runesmithing stands apart, in deed and skill.
Text.zh:
奥杜尔创造了一种超越国王与国家、
超越家族与荣誉的事物。
符文锻造的技艺，在行为与技能上都独树一帜。

Text.en:
Serle may be the only figure lauded on two continents. He
made a name for himself on Middengard, then joined the
expedition to Wraeclast, eventually becoming an Ezomyte...
Text.zh:
瑟尔或许是唯一在两个大陆都备受赞誉的人物。
他在米登加德成名，随后加入前往瓦尔克拉斯的远征，
最终成为了一名艾兹麦人……

Text.en:
For leading the expedition in search of that crimson omen,
Cadigan III gifted Olroth a royal boon of power. Should he
succeed, the Knights of the Sun would be forever lauded.
Text.zh:
为嘉奖率领远征队寻找那赤红预兆的功绩，
卡迪甘三世赐予欧罗什力量王权恩惠。
若他成功，烈阳骑士团将永受赞誉。

Text.en:
To Vorana the Irrepressible, Cadigan III granted a royal boon
of hardiness. They had long clashed, but in this endeavour,
the King knew she was the best possible choice for success.
Text.zh:
卡迪甘三世赐予不屈者沃拉娜强韧王权恩惠。
他们虽久不和睦，但在这项事业中，
国王深知她是成功的最佳人选。

Text.en:
Cadigan III met with Uhtred in secret, and granted him a
royal boon of leadership. His hidden task would be to
watch the others, and make sure they remained loyal.
Text.zh:
卡迪甘三世秘密会见了乌崔德，并赐予他领导王权恩惠。
他的秘密任务是监视其他人，
确保他们保持忠诚。

Text.en:
Medved and the Druids of the Circle were not commanded
to join the expedition. They volunteered. For this bravery,
Cadigan III granted their leader a royal rune of vitality.
Text.zh:
梅德维德与圆环祭司并非受命加入远征，而是自愿前往。
为表彰此等英勇，
卡迪甘三世赐予他们的领袖一枚活力符文。

Text.en:
The priests had long charted the dance of the stars,
but it was Aldur who brought that meaning to his forge.
Night and day, he wrestled the flames into submission.
Text.zh:
祭司们长久以来描绘星辰的舞动，
但正是奥杜尔将那意义带入了他的熔炉。
日日夜夜，他迫使火焰屈服。

Text.en:
The first runes ever carved by the hand of man refused
to cool. Aldur trekked to the highest peak of the tallest
mountain, bringing his sword to the primordial snows.
Text.zh: 人类之手雕刻的第一批符文拒绝冷却。奥杜尔带着他的剑跋涉至最高山脉的巅峰，将其置于原初之雪中。

Text.en:
On the highest peak, Aldur discovered the true secret
of runes. They awaited willpower, and command. Raising
his sword high, he received the might of the skies.
Text.zh:
“在山巅之上，奥杜尔发现了符文的秘密。
它们等待着意志与号令。
他高举宝剑，接受了苍穹之力。”

Text.en:
Aldur made a choice to share the art of runesmithing
with all those who would seek the craft. He knew it
might be used for ill, even by his own descendants...
Text.zh:
奥杜尔选择将符文锻造的技艺
分享给所有愿意追寻此道之人。
他知道这技艺可能被用于作恶，甚至是他自己的后代……

Text.en: Preserve the essence, so that it may evolve.
Text.zh: 保存精华，使其得以进化。

Text.en: Grow the flesh, so that it may endure.
Text.zh: 培育血肉，使其得以承受。

Text.en: Build the mind, so that it may serve.
Text.zh: 构建心智，使其得以服侍。

Text.en: Sharpen the claw, so that it may rend.
Text.zh: 磨砺利爪，使其得以撕裂。

Text.en: Devour the dream, because we must.
Text.zh: 吞噬梦境，因为我们必须。

Text.en: Seek all that is, so it may become ours.
Text.zh: 求索万物，使其归于我有。

Text.en:
To win over the Wildking, Aldur spent a winter on the
hunt with Kolr and his men. He did not land a single
arrow on any stag, yet Kolr agreed to unify. It was not
an arrow that mattered. It was the determined attempt.
Text.zh:
为了赢得荒野之王的青睐，
奥杜尔、克尔及其部下一同进行了贯穿冬季的狩猎。
他没有向任何一头雄鹿射出过哪怕一箭，但科尔最终还是同意联手。
重要的并非那一箭，而是不懈的尝试。

Text.en:
Vorana the Irrepressible never once recruited. The Black
Scythe Mercenaries were entirely composed of men and
women who had seen her relentless will to fight - and
thought to themselves, "I would follow her anywhere."
Text.zh:
不屈者沃拉娜从不招兵买马。
黑镰佣兵完全由那些见识过她无畏意志的男女组成。
他们心怀信念：我愿意追随她，无论天涯海角。

Text.en:
Thrud cared for neither diplomacy nor treaty. To end
the ravaging of distant corners of Middengard, Aldur
challenged him to a duel. With runes, Aldur fought him
to a stalemate. Now power... that, Thrud could respect.
Text.zh:
斯鲁德既不在乎外交，也不在乎条约。
为了终结米登加德偏远角落的劫掠，奥杜尔向他发起决斗挑战。
借助符文，奥杜尔与他战成了平手。
而力量……正是斯鲁德所敬重的。

Text.en:
Before they joined the expedition, the Druids of the
Circle offered sanctuary to all. Criminals, dissidents,
and the unwanted could walk a path to redemption.
Text.zh:
在他们加入远征之前，圆环祭司曾为所有人提供庇护。
罪犯、异议者、不被接纳之人，
皆可走上一条救赎之路。

Text.en:
For generations, the people had feared the power of
the Witch of the Dark Lake. Aldur set out to invite her
to the Royal Court... He ended up marrying her instead.
Text.zh:
数代以来，人们一直畏惧黑湖女巫的力量。
奥杜尔本打算邀请她入朝为官……
结果却娶了她。

Text.en:
It reached out a long, horrific limb, and touched it
to my forehead. Awareness grew there. The truth.
A window into limitless darkness... and loneliness.
Text.zh:
它伸出一条长而可怖的肢体，触碰了我的额头。
觉醒在那里生长。那是真相。
一扇通往无尽黑暗……与孤独的窗口。

Text.en: Something awaits you in the Well.
Text.zh: 井中有某种东西在等着你。

Text.en:
"The Eternals were men of Empire. They believed that
slaying Rigwald would end the uprising. Their focus
on attacking him lost them the battle - and the war."
Text.zh:
“永恒帝国之人心怀帝国。他们坚信，击杀瑞佛就能终结起义。
他们集中攻击他，却因此输掉了整场战役——
也输掉了整场战争。”

Text.en:
"Wildmen. The clanless. The unwanted. They hold an
almost mythical place in our stories, but they were
real people, and still are. We must remember them."
Text.zh:
“野人。无族之者。不被需要者。
在我们的故事中，他们几乎是神话般的存在，
但他们曾是真实存在的人，如今亦然。我们必须铭记他们。”

Text.en:
"Our culture is rife with contradiction. We fight to
the death for freedom, but struggle with the animal
within. Our strength must be tempered with restraint."
Text.zh:
“我们的文化充满矛盾。
我们为自由战斗至死，却与内心的野兽苦苦缠斗。
我们的力量必须用克制来调和。”

Text.en:
Attempting to redeem himself, Erian slew the Great
Beast Starkonja by creeping in during its hibernation.
For this, he was not lauded. None looked him in the eye.
Text.zh:
为求救赎，阿里安趁巨兽斯塔空加冬眠之际潜入，并将其击杀。
为此，他并未受到赞誉。
无人敢直视他的双眼。

Text.en:
"We did not always treasure our local witches. When
our ancestors found the child Beira, they... assumed
some things about her. It was... a tragic mistake."
Text.zh:
“我们并非一直珍视本地的女巫。
当祖先们发现贝拉这孩子时，他们……对她妄加揣测。
那是个……悲惨的错误。”

Text.en:
"No, we did not journey between Phaaryl and Ezomyr
on foot. When settlers first found us in Caer Tarth, we
had... other ways... of joining them in their homeland."
Text.zh:
“不，我们并非徒步往返于法瑞欧和艾兹麦之间。
当赛尔塔斯的定居者的首次找到我们时，
我们……用了其他方式……与他们一同前往他们的家园。”

Text.en:
"When we first joined the Ezomytes in Phaaryl, we found
a verdant land teeming with unfamiliar energies. There
were none to protect it. We Druids took up the cause."
Text.zh:
“在法瑞欧，当我们首次加入艾兹麦人时，
我们发现了一片翠绿之地，充满了陌生的能量。
那里无人守护。而我们德鲁伊承担起了这份责任。”

Text.en:
"Contrary to the stories, the Empire did not hate us.
That would require it to have a heart. It let us go the
moment we became more trouble than we were worth."
Text.zh:
“与传说相反，帝国并不憎恨我们。这么做，需要极大的宽仁。
帝国在我们变得弊大于利的那一刻，
放我们离开了。”

Text.en:
"A lone knight and a Karui warrior travelled together out
of necessity, battling bandits for weeks. He gifted the
knight that hammer, which was later runed by smiths."
Text.zh:
“孤胆骑士和卡鲁战士出于必要结伴同行，与强盗奋战数周。
他将那把锤子赠予了骑士，
后来铁匠们为锤子刻上了符文。”

并非所有铁匠都为荣誉而劳作。
有人怀着恶意与邪念工作。
有人发了疯，制造出蕴含神秘恶意的武器。

Text.en:
"I did once wander from the Wildwood onto
a forested island. There I met men who believed
as I do, but they called it 'Tawhoa's Way'..."
Text.zh:
“我确实曾从荒林漫游至一座森林岛屿。
在那里，我遇见了与我信仰相同的人，
但他们称之为‘塔赫亚之道’……”

Text.en:
The people loved Seren. She was the darling
of Middengard. There are those who still
search for her... or her grave, if one exists.
Text.zh:
人们敬爱塞伦。她曾是米登加德的宠儿。
至今仍有人在寻找她……或是她的坟墓
——如果还存在的话。

Text.en:
"Many bloodbonds were forged in those years.
We quarrel with the Maraketh at times, yes, but
we will aid them once more, should the need arise."
Text.zh:
“那些年我们缔结了许多血盟。
有时，我们确实会与玛拉克提人起冲突，
但若有需要，我们将再次援助他们。”

Text.en:
"It is shameful, what we used to do witches.
The thorns that grow in Phaaryl are descended
from those rites of pain and punishment."
Text.zh:
“我们过去对女巫的所作所为，实属可耻。
遍布法瑞欧的荆棘，
正是源于那些痛苦与惩罚的仪式。”

Text.en:
"The clans. Ah, the clans... we are a rowdy lot.
Unified, at times. A bloody mess, others. There
are many stories we tell only in jest, now."
Text.zh:
“部族。啊，部族……我们是一群喧闹的家伙。
有时团结一致。有时乱成一团。
许多故事，我们现在只当笑话来讲。”

Text.en:
"They say Cirel still waits. Though Caer Tarth
be a bleak waste, she knows one will come.
One with the power to do what she could not."
Text.zh:
“据说西雷尔仍在等待。
尽管赛尔塔斯已成荒凉废墟，但她知道终会有人前来。
那个有能力完成她未竟之事的人。”

Text.en:
"The witches could have inflicted great suffering
upon us. Instead, they showed us how to quell
the blushing trees. We realised we had erred."
Text.zh:
“女巫们本可以带来灾难。
可相反，她们教会了我们如何安抚那些泛红的树木。
我们意识到自己错了。”

Text.en:
"Farrow has yet to make a name for himself,
but knowing him - and I think I do now -
he'll make his legacy one for the ages."
Text.zh:
“法罗尚未成名，但以我对他的了解
——我想我现在算是了解他了
——他会留下传世的遗产。”

Text.en:
"How does one defeat an Empire?
Simple... endure. The Empire is gone,
but we are still here. We have won."
Text.zh:
“如何击败一个帝国？
简单……忍受。
帝国已消亡，而我们尚存。所以我们赢了。”

Text.en:
"We do not always find peace with
humans. But let it be willed, that we
must never attack lone travellers."
Text.zh:
“我们并非总能与人类和平共处。
让我们心怀意愿：
绝不能攻击孤独的旅者。”

Text.en:
The gem warmed his palm. "Our fear of this
power cost many lives. No longer!" With his own
hands, Olroth sealed that expedition's demise.
Text.zh:
宝石温暖了他的掌心。
“对这种力量的恐惧，已夺去了太多生命。到此为止！”
欧罗什亲手注定了远征的败亡。

Text.en:
In every era, in every age, Fate conspires to
unite heroes from across Wraeclast. That is
the secret of history: Fate and Order are one.
Text.zh:
每个时代，每个纪元，
命运都会合谋，将来自瓦尔克拉斯各地的英雄们团结起来。
这便是历史的秘密：命运与秩序本为一体。

Text.en:
The Empty-Eyed Fiend emerged from darkness.
Olroth raised his sword, gem in its pommel. 
The Fiend smiled. Olroth swung. 
Its head rolled, sockets ablaze with delight.
Text.zh:
空眼妖魔自黑暗中现身。
欧罗什举起长剑，剑柄镶着宝石。恶魔笑了。
奥尔罗斯挥剑。恶魔的头颅滚落，眼窝因喜悦而燃烧。

Text.en:
In days of yore, the Druids of the Circle walked
the mountains and valleys of Middengard,
calming the lava flows and enriching the earth.
Text.zh:
曾几何时，
法环祭司行走于米登加德的山脉与山谷，
平息熔岩之流，肥沃大地。

Text.en:
The Black Scythe Mercenary Company was an
extension of Vorana. No storied history, no
centuries of service... and yet, legendary.
Text.zh:
黑镰佣兵是沃拉娜的部曲。
没有悠久历史，没有数个世纪的服役……
然而，却成为了传奇。

Text.en:
The Order of the Chalice still exists today.
Its priests teach engineering, mathematics,
and science to all those who would learn.
Text.zh:
圣杯教团至今依然存在。
教团祭司向所有愿意学习的人
教授工程、数学和科学。

Text.en:
The Knights of the Sun defined what it
means to be a hero in a world full of
monsters, mysteries, and darkness.
Text.zh:
烈日骑士团定义了
在一个充满怪物、神秘与黑暗的世界中，
何谓英雄。
